Text: वेडाबाई भूतकाळ बघ लोक शेन घालतात आणी दांडा ही
translated_text: Crazy lady, look at the past, people wear masks and stick to it.
Justification: The phrase "शेन घालतात" (people spread dirt/muck) is figurative but lacks strong emotion.

Text: साहेब भाजपा, गोदी मिडीया, अंधभक्त साठी परिवारवाद लागू होत नाही
translated_text: Sir, family politics does not apply to BJP, Godi Media, and fanatics.
Justification: The words "अंधभक्त" (blind devotees) suggest sarcasm, but the sentence remains neutral.

Text: हा त्यांचा नैतिक विजयच आहे कारण समोर सत्तेसाठी जमलेले महत्वकांक्षी राक्षस उभे होते.
translated_text: This is their moral victory because in front of them stood ambitious monsters gathered for power.
Justification: The phrase "महत्वकांक्षी राक्षस" (ambitious monsters) is figurative but lacks strong sentiment.

Text: बस घाण करणारयाना द्यायला बर पडल असत नाही
translated_text: It wouldn't be good to give it to someone who makes the bus dirty.
Justification: The phrase "घाण करणारयाना" (those who make things dirty) implies disgust towards unhygienic behavior.

Text: असा आपण भाबडा समज करून घ्यायचा
translated_text: We should have made such a foolish assumption.
Justification: The phrase "भाबडा समज" (naive assumption) suggests a lack of awareness but no strong emotion.

Text: भाजप हद्दपार होत आहे...
translated_text: BJP is being expelled...
Justification: The phrase "हद्दपार होत आहे" (being expelled) conveys frustration and anger.

Text: कोण मेला ? वारला म्हणायचं आहे का तुम्हाला ? रोजगार वारला का ?
translated_text: Who died? Do you mean died? Did employment die?
Justification: The phrase "रोजगार वारला" (employment is dead) evokes sadness and concern about job losses.

Text: आंदोलन करणे हाच उपाय आहे का त्याशिवाल न्याय मिळणार नाही का???
translated_text: Is protesting the only solution? Won't justice be achieved?
Justification: The phrase "हाच उपाय आहे का?" (Is this the only way?) questions justice aggressively, leading to anger.

Text: अक्कल नको पाजळू तुझी, हिंदू सणं डोळ्यात खूपतात का तुझ्या ?
translated_text: Don't show off your intelligence, do Hindu festivals bother you?
Justification: The phrase "अक्कल नको पाजळू" (don't show off intelligence) expresses frustration, while "डोळ्यात खूपतात" (bother your eyes) adds confrontation.

Text: “सहानुभूती, डोळ्यात पाणी,” राज ठाकरेंची उद्धव ठाकरेंवर जोरदार टीका; म्हणाले “कोणतीही लाट…”
translated_text: "Sympathy, tears in the eyes," Raj Thackeray strongly criticizes Uddhav Thackeray; he said, "Any wave..."
Justification: The phrase "जोरदार टीका" (strong criticism) implies disapproval, falling under disgust.

Text: हारफीकनी ते गटार तोंड स्वच्छ नाही होणार.
translated_text: No matter how much you clean, that gutter mouth won't be clean.
Justification: The phrase "गटार तोंड" (gutter mouth) is highly negative, expressing disgust.

Text: गद्दारी करुन, आपले टँक्स पैसे भष्टाचारी लोकांच्या हातात दिल्यामुळे लोकखत नि पुरस्कार दिला
translated_text: After betraying, tax money was given to corrupt people, leading to awards.
Justification: The words "गद्दारी" (betrayal) and "भष्टाचारी" (corrupt people) show disgust.

Text: गद्दारीची ढाल तलवार अनाजी पंत कडे पण होती..
translated_text: Anaji Pant also had the shield and sword of betrayal.
Justification: The sentence presents a historical reference without strong emotional expression.

Text: यांना विचारांपेक्षा सत्ता जास्त महत्वाची आहे.
translated_text: Power is more important to them than ideas.
Justification: This is a political opinion without emotional exaggeration.

Text: जर काँग्रेस वाले एवढेच भ्रष्टाचारी आहे तर तुम्ही का त्यांना भाजप मध्ये घेता?
translated_text: If Congress people are so corrupt, why do you accept them in BJP?
Justification: The word "भ्रष्टाचारी" (corrupt) conveys disgust towards political behavior.

Text: घाणेरड्या विचारांचे / आहेत हे वडापाव सैनिक
translated_text: These Vadapav soldiers are of dirty thoughts.
Justification: "घाणेरड्या विचारांचे" (dirty thoughts) conveys contempt.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री मराठी बोलायचं सोडून सातत्याने हिंदी का बोलत आहात? उत्तर द्यावे!
translated_text: Why is the Chief Minister constantly speaking Hindi instead of Marathi? Answer me!
Justification: The questioning tone conveys shock and disbelief.

Text: काही शेण किड्यांना असा राहूल गांधी फोटो बघितला की जाळ होतो......
translated_text: Some dung beetles get excited when they see a photo of Rahul Gandhi like this...
Justification: "शेण किडे" (dung beetles) is a derogatory term, expressing disgust.

Text: चायबांची गुलामी करणारे सुद्धा लाळचाटे असतात हे काय नवीन नाही..
translated_text: Isn't it new that even those who enslave tea are slobs?
Justification: "लाळचाटे" (sycophants) is derogatory, expressing disgust.

Text: तुम्हीच राहिले होते आता फेकाची गोष्टी सांगायचं
translated_text: You were the only one left, now telling nonsense.
Justification: Accusatory tone conveys frustration and anger.

Text: हा पॅटर्न अंध भक्त होण्यासाठी अनिवार्य आहे
translated_text: This pattern is mandatory to become a blind devotee.
Justification: A sarcastic remark, but not strongly emotional.

Text: तुमच्या सारख्या गद्दारांना ढाल-तलवार नाही...तर खंजीर शोभुन दीसेल....
translated_text: Traitors like you don't have a shield or sword...but a dagger will show off...
Justification: The sentence contains the word "गद्दार" (traitor), but its overall tone is more factual than emotional.

Text: अशा मवाळ भाषेने असे नाठाळ सुधारणार नाहीत. यांना जोड्याची भाषा
translated_text: Such soft language will not improve such a fool. The language of the couple
Justification: The phrase suggests punishment but is not heavily emotional.

Text: मुरजी पटेल चा फॉर्म भरायला कोंबडी चोराचं कार्ट गेलं तिथंच पनवती लागली होती
translated_text: The chicken thief's cart had started to rustle right where Murji Patel's form was filled.
Justification: The sentence has some negative connotations but does not strongly convey an emotion.

Text: तू पेंग्विन ची खाजवून चोखतो का
translated_text: Do you scratch and suck penguins?
Justification: The sentence is crude but lacks strong emotional context.

Text: मग पंढरपूर नांदेड कोल्हापूर इथ काय झालं होत कपटी भाजप
translated_text: Then what happened in Pandharpur, Nanded, Kolhapur, the hypocritical BJP?
Justification: The phrase "कपटी भाजप" (hypocritical BJP) suggests some negativity, but the main tone is curiosity or surprise.

Text: हे असल्या छपरी लोकांची कसली पत्रकार परिषद घेता.. लायकी आहे का याची.
translated_text: What kind of press conference do these kind of people hold? Is it worth it?
Justification: The phrase "छपरी लोक" (cheap people) shows mild disapproval but not strong emotion.

Text: स्वपक्षा बद्दल बोलतांना काहीच वाटत नाही का मालक बोंबलणार ना....
translated_text: Doesn't it feel like the owner will be shocked when he talks about his own party?
Justification: The phrase suggests an unexpected reaction, aligning with surprise.

Text: बास करा ही नाटकं किती दिवस धर्माच्या नावावर राजकारण करून लोकांना मूर्ख बनवणार
translated_text: Stop this drama, how long will you fool people by playing politics in the name of religion?
Justification: The phrase "नाटकं" (drama) and "मूर्ख बनवणार" (fooling people) convey frustration and anger.

Text: टीव्हीचॅनल तर वेगळेच दाखवत होते..... किती खोट बोलणार...( टीव्हीचॅनल वाले नाही ) ?
translated_text: The TV channel was showing it differently..... How many lies will they tell...(not the TV channel)?
Justification: Expresses doubt but does not strongly convey emotion.

Text: हा पण बुडते ती निष्ठा तरंगते ती विष्ठा
translated_text: This too sinks, that loyalty floats, that excrement floats.
Justification: A metaphorical phrase but does not convey a clear emotion.

Text: स्वर्गात दारू मिळत नसेल तर तिथे जाणे व्यर्थ आहे.
translated_text: If there is no alcohol in heaven, it is pointless to go there.
Justification: The statement is neutral as it humorously expresses an opinion without strong emotions.

Text: हे तुमच्या सारख्यांचा सर्वे करुन नंबर असतील %
translated_text: These will be the numbers from a survey of people like you.
Justification: The statement is dismissive but lacks emotional intensity.

Text: कोण तरी चोम्या सांगतो म्हणून ऐक नारी आंधळी भक्त भ्रस्टाचारी जनता पार्टी
translated_text: If someone tells you something, listen to the woman, the blind devotee, the corrupt Janata Party.
Justification: The use of derogatory words and political criticism indicates disgust.

Text: पोलिसांना बघून पळून कोण गेला होता
translated_text: Who ran away after seeing the police?
Justification: Expresses curiosity or shock, indicating surprise.

Text: हिंदूत्ववादी सरकारमधे गोरक्षकांवर हल्ले खपवुन घेतले जाणार आहेत का?
translated_text: Will attacks on cow vigilantes be tolerated in a Hindutva-dominated government?
Justification: The question is critical but does not contain a clear emotional charge.

Text: अवघड आहे मराठी पत्रकारीतेचं
translated_text: Marathi journalism is difficult.
Justification: The statement is factual and does not express strong emotion.

Text: आतातरी समजुन जा, ह्यांच्या पक्षानेच तुमची ही अवस्था केलीय.
translated_text: Understand now, it is their party that has put you in this situation.
Justification: The sentence criticizes a party but remains neutral in tone.

Text: महेश कोठारे ला हे वाचून किडनी मध्ये हार्ट अटॅक आला असेल
translated_text: Mahesh Kothare must have had a heart attack in his kidneys after reading this.
Justification: The statement is sarcastic but does not strongly indicate any specific emotion.

Text: वर्ल्ड चॅम्पियन संघाला हरवलं पण नवख्या संघानं धुळ चारली, आयर्लंडनं उघडलं खातं
translated_text: The world champion team was defeated but the newcomer team was defeated, Ireland opened its account.
Justification: The sentence discusses a sports outcome but does not carry strong emotion.

Text: कोणतीही निशाणी मिळाली तरी कपाळावर लागलेली फुटीर आणि गद्दार ही निशाणी पुसता येणार नाही!
translated_text: No matter what mark you get, the mark of a traitor and traitor on your forehead cannot be erased!
Justification: The use of "गद्दार" (traitor) and the assertive tone indicate anger.

Text: भाजपच्या भ्रष्ट नेत्यांची चौकशी केव्हा होणार?
translated_text: When will the corrupt BJP leaders be investigated?
Justification: The accusatory tone suggests anger.

Text: काँग्रेसच्या कुबड्या एवढ्या मोठ्या असतात की काँग्रेसमधून हाकलून दिलेले पण भाजपात मंत्री होतात.
translated_text: The Congress's hunches are so big that even those expelled from the Congress become ministers in the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is critical but lacks strong emotion.

Text: काम नीट करायची नाहीतर आम्ही जनता तुम्हाला तुमची जागा दाखवून देईल....
translated_text: Do your job properly or we the people will show you your place...
Justification: The statement is a warning, but it lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: कुलकर्णी ना म्हणजे डोक्यावर पडलेला असायलाच हवा.
translated_text: Kulkarni must have fallen on his head.
Justification: The phrase is critical but in a casual manner, making it neutral rather than overtly emotional.

Text: हा तोच ना ज्याच्यावर शिवसेनेच्या महिला नगरसेविकांनी आरोप केले होते....ह्याची लायकी आहे का??
translated_text: Isn't this the same person who was accused by the Shiv Sena's female corporator....is this worthy??
Justification: Words like "लायकी आहे का??" (is he worthy?) imply contempt and disgust.

Text: महिला सक्षमीकरणाचे ढोंग बंद कर आणि महाराष्ट्रातून पहिले निघ
translated_text: Stop pretending to empower women and get out of Maharashtra first.
Justification: The sentence expresses criticism but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: मैदान मिळाले म्हणून लयं नाचले होते... आता आयोगापुढे...
translated_text: They danced because they got the ground... Now before the commission...
Justification: The phrase is descriptive without strong emotion.

Text: अडणीच्या पोर्ट्वरचा फुकटचा माल कितीही घेतात आणि असे बडबड करत राहतात.
translated_text: They take whatever free goods they can from the Adani port and keep on babbling like this.
Justification: The phrase "फुकटचा माल" (free goods) and "बडबड करत" (babbling) imply sarcasm, but they do not strongly indicate anger or disgust, making "Neutral" appropriate.

Text: हा नंतर ताईची हाथ जोडून माफी मागेल बघा...
translated_text: Let's see if he will apologize to his aunt later...
Justification: The phrase "हाथ जोडून माफी" (folding hands and apologizing) suggests a prediction but does not strongly convey any emotion.

Text: झागल्या, कुळाचा उद्धार करून घेतल्याशिवाय खालची खाज जात नाही का रे भ ????
translated_text: Zagalya, doesn't the itch go away without saving the clan????
Justification: The phrase "खालची खाज" (itch below) is used humorously, making "Joy" appropriate.

Text: आम्ही ही एक जणाला खुप मारला..मामीचे गाणे पाहत होता ऑनलाईन..
translated_text: We really beat this guy..I was watching Auntie's song online..
Justification: The phrase खूप मारला (beat up a person) conveys aggression, justifying anger.

Text: ह्याला म्हणतात दाणा टाकून घोडा उडवून घेणे चुत्या
translated_text: This is called throwing grain and making a horse fly.
Justification: While चुत्या (idiot) is present, the overall sentence lacks a strong emotional direction, making it neutral.

Text: यांनी देशासाठी केलेला त्याग आहे ,तुम्ही त्यांच्या पाया पडायच्या ही लायक नाही
translated_text: They have sacrificed for the country, you are not worthy of falling at their feet.
Justification: The statement conveys respect and criticism but lacks strong emotions.

Text: गेल्या महिन्यापासून मी तुम्हाला मेल करीत आहे, एकदा बघून उत्तर द्या साहेब
translated_text: I have been mailing you for the last month, please check it and reply, sir.
Justification: The statement is a request and does not express strong emotions.

Text: कोल्हापूरमध्ये, रस्त्यात खड्डा आहे की खड्ड्यात रस्ता तेच कळत नाही...
translated_text: In Kolhapur, it's hard to tell whether there's a pothole in the road or the road in the pothole...
Justification: A humorous observation without strong emotion.

Text: राजवाड्यात राहणारा भिकारी देश म्हणजे भारत
translated_text: India is a country of beggars living in palaces.
Justification: A critical statement but lacks direct emotional expression.

Text: बाळासाहेबांच्या नावाची ढाल करून मागून भाजपची तलवार चालवणारे गद्दार गट !!
translated_text: A group of traitors who wield the BJP's sword from behind, using Balasaheb's name as a shield!!
Justification: The word गद्दार (traitors) strongly conveys disgust.

Text: ज्यांनी कांड केलेत त्यांनी काळजी करावी तुम्हाला काय करायचं आहे
translated_text: Those who committed the crime should be worried. What do you want to do?
Justification: A factual statement lacking emotional charge.

Text: हिच का ती पोळ बाई घरात संडास सुध्दा नाही गंगाबाईची पोरगी.
translated_text: This is why that poor woman, Gangabai's daughter, doesn't even have a toilet in her house.
Justification: संडास सुध्दा नाही (not even a toilet) triggers feelings of pity and disgrace, leading to disgust.

Text: पाकिस्तान पेटवायला हवा होता
translated_text: Pakistan should have been set on fire.
Justification: The call to "पेटवायला" (set on fire) is aggressive and hostile, reflecting anger.

Text: नगरसेवक चोरानी अस बोलण म्हणजे अतीच झाल
translated_text: It's too much for a corporator to say that.
Justification: The phrase "अतीच झाल" (this is too much) shows criticism, but lacks emotional depth for anger or disgust.

Text: घोषणा झाल्या मग पोलीस कारवाई का नाही?
translated_text: Why is there no police action after the announcement?
Justification: The question "का नाही?" (why not?) following "घोषणा" (announcement) indicates surprise at the lack of action.

Text: हींमत असेल तर सरकार पाडून दाखवा म्हणणारे कुठे आहेत आज
translated_text: Where are those today who say, "If you have the courage, overthrow the government?"
Justification: The use of "हींमत" (courage) challenges others but remains rhetorically neutral.

Text: एम, नरू नी बी योगी, मर्द आहेत का.
translated_text: M, are you a Yogi or a Naru? Are you a man?
Justification: The sentence questions masculinity but lacks strong emotional indicators, hence neutral.

Text: हा तोच पाकीट पत्रकार आहे जो "उद्धव चा स्वभाव रडका आहे" असं म्हणाला होता..
translated_text: This is the same pocket journalist who said "Uddhav has a tearful nature".
Justification: The term "पाकीट पत्रकार" (pocket journalist) implies corrupt, biased media, creating a tone of disgust.

Text: प्रसंगावधान दाखवून आधी कर्तव्य पूर्ण केलं श्रद्धांजली आणि कुटुंबीयांप्रती सहवेदना.
translated_text: Showing consideration for the situation, he fulfilled his duty first. Tributes and condolences to the family.
Justification: Although solemn, the sentence is factual and composed.

Text: अडीच वर्ष थापा मारल्या. अखेर थापा म्हणाला, आता सहन होत नाही.
translated_text: He beat her for two and a half years. Finally, he said, "I can't stand it anymore."
Justification: "थापा मारल्या" (kept lying or hitting) over time conveys frustration and disgust.

Text: नीरव मोदी कधीच आत्महत्या करणार नाही तज्ज्ञ मुद्दाम युक्तिवाद करत आहेत?
translated_text: Are experts deliberately arguing that Nirav Modi will never commit suicide?
Justification: The disbelief and question about expert opinion evokes surprise.

Text: * ब्रेकिंग: हिंदूंचे सण आल्यावरच अतिक्रमण का काढता? बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेनेचे रस्त्यावर ठिय्या आंदोलन...
translated_text: * Breaking: Why are encroachments being removed only when Hindu festivals are coming? Balasaheb's Shiv Sena's protest on the streets...
Justification: "अतिक्रमण" (encroachment) and protest around religious events stir anger.

Text: नाही साहेब हे अत्यंत चुकीचे आहे तुमचे विधान
translated_text: No sir, your statement is very wrong.
Justification: The word "अत्यंत चुकीचे" (completely wrong) carries assertive disagreement, showing anger.

Text: गप रे अक्कल काडीची नाही आणि इथे बडबड करत बसलाय
translated_text: Gosh, you're not smart and you're just sitting here babbling.
Justification: "अक्कल काडीची नाही" (no sense at all) and "बडबड" (babble) express disdain.

Text: खुप कमी असतात असे..
translated_text: There are very few..
Justification: General observation without emotional intensity.

Text: सगळा वैचारिक अंधारच आहे....अंधारे कडे
translated_text: All is ideological darkness....towards darkness
Justification: "वैचारिक अंधार" (intellectual darkness) reflects criticism but stays calm in tone.

Text: आता कळाल गाढवांच्या डोक्यावर केस का कमी असतात ती
translated_text: Now you will know why donkeys have less hair on their heads.
Justification: Use of metaphor "गाढवांच्या डोक्यावर केस" is mocking but presented humorously.

Text: दरवर्षी कोटि रोजगार देण्याची घोषणा आखिरकार जुमला साबित झाली.
translated_text: The announcement of providing crores of jobs every year ultimately proved to be a hoax.
Justification: The word "जुमला" (hoax) criticizes policy, yet stays within informative tone.

Text: तुझ्याच उरावर बसवून घे शाह, मोदीला, हुकूमशाही आहे का राम्या.
translated_text: Put Shah and Modi on your lap, is this dictatorship, Ramya?
Justification: Phrases like "हुकूमशाही" (dictatorship) and "उरावर बसवून" imply humiliation and disgust.

Text: हरामखोर आहे तो फडणवीस
translated_text: Fadnavis is a traitor.
Justification: "हरामखोर" (scoundrel) is an offensive slur indicating strong disgust.

Text: काकू हे सल्ले भाजप नेत्यांना द्या जे मुलींना जबरदस्तीने वेश्या व्यवसायासाठी प्रवृत्त करतात
translated_text: Aunty, give this advice to BJP leaders who force girls into prostitution
Justification: The phrase "जबरदस्तीने वेश्या व्यवसायासाठी" (forced into prostitution) evokes moral outrage and disgust.

Text: भक्तांच जीवनच ढापलेल आहे आज्जी. त्यामुळे दुसर्यांचही ढापलेलंच वाटणार.
translated_text: The lives of the devotees are being ruined, Aunty. Therefore, it seems that others are being ruined too.
Justification: "ढापलेल" (looted/taken away) shows suffering, evoking sadness.

Text: हा तर त्या कुत्र्याचा अपमान होईल...
translated_text: This would be an insult to that dog...
Justification: Use of "अपमान" (insult) and comparison to "कुत्रा" (dog) show anger.

Text: तला पण निस्टांवत शिवसैनिक लागतो तुमच्या सारखा भटकलेला माणूस नाही
translated_text: Even a Shiv Sainik who is not a stray person like you needs to be killed.
Justification: "भटकलेला माणूस" (wandering man) adds insult, but the statement is more critical than emotional.

Text: महाराष्ट्राची आणि देशाची म्हणजे ॽ महाराष्ट्र कोणत्या देशात आहे ॽ
translated_text: Of Maharashtra and the country, which means ॽ In which country is Maharashtra located ॽ
Justification: Use of rhetorical "कोणत्या देशात आहे" is sarcastic but neutral.

Text: समाजकल्याण विभागाला अद्याप स्वतंत्र मंत्री देण्यात आला नाही. हा भाजपचा सामाजीक अन्याय आहे.
translated_text: The Social Welfare Department has not yet been given a separate minister. This is social injustice by the BJP.
Justification: Use of "सामाजीक अन्याय" (social injustice) is serious but stated in informative tone.

Text: अपात्र शिक्षक तुपाशी....आणि प्रामाणिक पात्र असलेले शिक्षणसेवक उपाशी.....वा रे... महाराष्ट्र सरकार...
translated_text: Unqualified teachers are with you....and honest and qualified education workers are starving.....Oh my... Maharashtra government...
Justification: Irony and contrast between "तुपाशी" (with ghee) and "उपाशी" (hungry) provoke surprise.

Text: बीजेपी ला काही फायदा उरला नाही बाबाचा आता...आणि बाबलापण हे कळलय...
translated_text: BJP has no use for Baba now...and Baba knows this too...
Justification: The phrase "फायदा उरला नाही" and realization of redundancy show sadness.

Text: सरकारी नोकरीची इच्छा अनेकांना बेरोजगार केले आहे.
translated_text: The desire for a government job has made many unemployed.
Justification: Statement of fact with no clear emotion.

Text: मग रात्र भर काय करत होते...
translated_text: What were singles doing...
Justification: The rhetorical setup and "रात्र भर जागून" evokes mild surprise or curiosity.

Text: रडू नकोस.... मुंबईत...
translated_text: Don’t cry...
Justification: "रडू नकोस" (don’t cry) is mildly directive but not emotionally charged.

Text: पायी जाणा-या महिलेच्या...
translated_text: Snatched a necklace...
Justification: "ओरबाडून" (snatched) by "भामट्यांनी" (thugs) indicates disgust at the crime.

Text: खाण्यामध्ये फक्त... मूर्ख असे तीनच प्रकार येतात
translated_text: Veg, Non-Veg, Stupid...
Justification: Use of "मूर्ख" (stupid) is sarcastic but too general for strong emotion.

Text: शीउबाठा हा संपलेला पक्ष आहे...
translated_text: Xiubatha is a dead party...
Justification: "संपलेला" (dead/ended) is descriptive, not emotional.

Text: पळवापळवी हे धंदे तुमचे आहेत...
translated_text: You are running away...
Justification: "पळवापळवी" (dodging) and "आत्मपरीक्षण" (self-reflection) convey accusatory tone = anger.

Text: नोकरी जानार आणि निवड्नुक हरणार असे म्हननारे तोंडावर जाम आपटले
translated_text: Those who said they would get jobs and lose elections were slapped in the face.
Justification: The phrase 'तोंडावर जाम आपटले' expresses strong displeasure or verbal aggression, indicating anger.

Text: तुमची लायकी काय आहे ते कळाले ला हा टोमणा तुम्हालाच लागू होतो
translated_text: This joke applies only to you, if you know what you are worth.
Justification: The sentence is observational and sarcastic but not emotionally loaded, so classified as neutral.

Text: एवढी सत्ता बळकावूनही भागले नाही का त्रास देत आहात संयमी सोज्वळ उद्धव ठाकरेंना
translated_text: Why are you bothering the moderate Sojwal Uddhav Thackeray, who has not managed to seize so much power?
Justification: Puzzled tone reflects surprise at the unnecessary harassment.

Text: हो तुमच्या बुडाला आग लावायची आहे
translated_text: Yes, I want to set your ass on fire.
Justification: The phrase 'बुडाला आग लावायची आहे' clearly indicates anger and aggression.

Text: जनता अडचणीत होती, तेव्हा कुठे होतात? गोपीचंद पडळकरांचा ठाकरेंना सवाल:
translated_text: Where are you when the people are in trouble? Gopichand Padalkar's question to Thackeray:
Justification: Direct political questioning without strong emotional tone.

Text: हत्ती रस्त्यातून चालत असताना कुत्री भुकंत आसतात... राहुल गांधी हत्ती आहेत
translated_text: Dogs bark when elephants walk on the road... Rahul Gandhi is an elephant
Justification: A metaphor with no emotional aggression, classified as neutral.

Text: अरे हरामखोर पंत कुठं फेडशील ही पाप.
translated_text: O bastard Pant, where will you pay for this sin?
Justification: The term 'हरामखोर' expresses aggression and anger.

Text: जसा जसा हायार पोझिशनला जाणार तसतसा वेळ कमी मिळणार
translated_text: As you move up the position, the time you will have will decrease.
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: भारतीय राजकारण म्हणजे काय..?? गरीबांच्या हक्कासाठी लढता लढता श्रीमंत होणे...!!
translated_text: What is Indian politics?? Getting rich by fighting for the rights of the poor...!!
Justification: The sentence contains strong or accusatory language that expresses anger.

Text: अशी थापेबाजी अनेकांनी सोशल मीडियावर यापूर्वीही केलेली आहे.
translated_text: Many people have made such jokes on social media before.
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: पौर्णिमा - जेव्हा फ्रॉड ला ऑफ द मंथ अवॉर्ड मिळतो!
translated_text: Full Moon - When Fraud Gets the Of The Month Award!
Justification: The humorous context around "फ्रॉड" reflects a sarcastic tone of joy.

Text: काय भामट्या आहे हो तुम्ही म्हणतात असो आपल्याला काय...
translated_text: What a fool you are, whatever you say, what do you want...
Justification: The word "भामट्या" conveys intense irritation or anger toward those in power.

Text: हे काय आहे ते रताळ्या, बरोबर कल लागती
translated_text: What is this, sweet potato, it tastes good.
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: देश विकून का
translated_text: Why sell the country?
Justification: A rhetorical question lacking explicit emotion; categorized as neutral.

Text: एकदा पाटोले जाऊन विचार विधानपरिषद बिनविरोध करण्यासाठी कोणाच्या पाय पडायला गेला होता
translated_text: Once, Patole went to the Legislative Council to consider the idea of ​​going to the Legislative Council without opposition.
Justification: Narrative and sarcastic but lacks emotional language; hence neutral.

Text: तुतीया, तु काही कमी कोल्हा आहे.
translated_text: Tutiya, you are a little fox.
Justification: Use of 'कोल्हा' (fox) playfully suggests cleverness or teasing, indicating joy.

Text: पाटीदारांनी गुजरातमध्ये त्यांच्या विरोधात आंदोलन केले होते.
translated_text: Patidars had protested against him in Gujarat.
Justification: आंदोलन' (protest) in historical context implies public anger.

Text: ओम शांती..खूपच शांत आणि पडद्यावर पहावसा अभिनेता..देव तुमच्या आत्म्याला शांती देवो सर
translated_text: Om Shanti..very peaceful and a great actor to watch on screen..may God rest your soul sir
Justification: Tone is respectful and admiring; reflects calm joy and reverence.

Text: पण असले चाळे करून कशाला हवंय नॉमिनेशन..
translated_text: But why do you want nominations after doing such tricks?
Justification: असले चाळे' implies sarcastic disbelief, evoking surprise.

Text: असे नेते मत मिळवणासाठी देश विकायला निघाली आहेत,
translated_text: Such leaders are out to sell the country to get votes,
Justification: Harsh claim, but descriptive and not emotionally framed; neutral.

Text: आणि भाजपा ला मत म्हणजे लबाडांच्या टोळीला मत.. आच्छे दिन आले का....?
translated_text: And voting for BJP means voting for a gang of liars.. Have the good days arrived...?
Justification: लबाडांच्या टोळीला' implies contempt and sarcasm; conveys disgust.

Text: ‘आमदारकी मिळाली नाही असे नाही तर आपली लायकी नाही’ हे जास्त सर्मपक आहे.
translated_text: It's not that we didn't get the MLA seat, it's that we don't deserve it is more accurate.
Justification: The self-deprecating tone and "लायकी नाही" imply hopelessness and sadness.

Text: घेतलेले जबाब ईन कॅमेरा असतात हे भोळसर जनतेला कळत नाही काय ?
translated_text: Don't the gullible public realize that the answers taken are taken on camera?
Justification: Though critical, the tone remains explanatory and thus neutral.

Text: परतीच्या पावसाचा तडाखा! शेतीचे नुकसान; या जिल्ह्यांना अलर्ट जारी
translated_text: Heavy rains hit! Agricultural damage; Alert issued for these districts
Justification: News-style factual reporting; no explicit emotion.

Text: मराठी मराठी म्हणून ठाकरे यांनी मराठी लोकांच्या तोंडाला पाने पुसली
translated_text: Thackeray, as a Marathi Marathi, wiped the face of the Marathi people.
Justification: तोंडाला पाने पुसली suggests betrayal and evokes disgust.

Text: खरंच डोक्यात चालले आहेत हे लोक
translated_text: These people are really going crazy.
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यात चालले" reflects shock or disbelief, fitting surprise.

Text: नावं पण यांनी चोरलेली आहेत
translated_text: They have stolen even the names.
Justification: Accusatory but lacks intensity in emotional expression.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती म्हणजे बंगल्यावर बोलवून पोलिसांसमोर ठोकणे बरोबर नं
translated_text: Expression means calling someone to the bungalow and beating them in front of the police.
Justification: ठोकणे (to beat) in this context shows contempt and disgust toward misuse of power.

Text: पण आम्ही ऐकल की ही चूक ला करणार होते....
translated_text: But we heard that this mistake was going to be made...
Justification: The regretful tone shows disappointment and sadness.

Text: याला जबाबदार कृषी उत्पन्न बाजार समिती आहे. त्याचा फटका शेतक-याला बसतोय.
translated_text: The Agricultural Produce Market Committee is responsible for this. The farmers are being affected by it.
Justification: Factual tone regarding accountability; hence neutral.

Text: खाज हा शब्द कमी वाटतो का???? मग मस्तवायु म्हणाव काय ????
translated_text: Does the word itch seem a little low???? Then what about the word breath????
Justification: Wordplay and sarcasm, but tone remains light and neutral.

Text: विसरलात वाटते हत्त्या करणारे कोण-कोण होते देशाला मिडिया मार्फत माहीत आहे।
translated_text: It seems like you've forgotten who the killers were. The country knows through the media who they were.
Justification: Reflective and informative tone; remains neutral.

Text: मुलगा स्वतःचं नाव देतो आणि शिष्य पक्ष प्रमुखाचे नाव देतो...या ला काय म्हणावं !!
translated_text: The boy gives his own name and the disciple gives the name of the party chief...what to say to this!!
Justification: Accusatory tone with frustration expresses anger.

Text: केसरकर ,किती खोके घेऊन भाजपाच्या मुरजी पटेलला ही जागा सोडली ...?
translated_text: Kesarkar, how many boxes did you take and leave this seat to BJP's Murji Patel...?
Justification: खोके (boxes) implies bribery; expressed with rhetorical surprise.

Text: आधी भाषा सुधार प्रितीमा काय प्रतिमा असे आहे
translated_text: First, what is the image of the language correction?
Justification: Tone is vague but descriptive; neutral overall.

Text: मराठा समाजाबद्दलची मानसिक आत्मीयता किती, हे दाखवले सावंतांच्या तान्याने .
translated_text: Sawant's Tanya showed how much mental affinity he has towards the Maratha community.
Justification: Factual expression of sentiment without emotional intensity.

Text: तो वाकड्या जितका कारणीभूत तितकाच हा भडवा बाळू कारणीभूत ह्या महाराष्ट्राची वाट लावायला
translated_text: This rascal is as much responsible for the path of Maharashtra as he is for the crooks.
Justification: भडवा is abusive and contemptuous, fitting disgust.

Text: दबक्या पावलानं बिबट्या आला अन् अचानक घरातून…, काळजाचा थरकाप उडवणारा
translated_text: A leopard came with soft footsteps and suddenly from the house..., heart-wrenching
Justification: काळजाचा थरकाप evokes intense fear and shock.

Text: मोदी सरकारला फिकीर नाही देशाची वाढतेय संख्या सुशिक्षित बेरोजगारांची!
translated_text: The Modi government is not worried about the increasing number of educated unemployed people in the country!
Justification: Concerned tone, but expressed analytically; neutral.

Text: दम लागतो....तो तुझ्यात नाही.....
translated_text: It takes my breath away....it's not in you.....
Justification: The phrase "दम लागतो" implies pressure and fear, aimed critically.

Text: ला त्यांच्याच गावातून हाकलले बर का... पुढच्या वेळेस आमदारकी पण जाणार...
translated_text: Why was he expelled from his own village? He will also run for MLA next time...
Justification: Descriptive and political without emotional tone.

Text: भारतात राहून माज करतात.. यांना वेळीच ठेचलं पाहिजे.. त्याशिवाय सुधारणार नाही हे.
translated_text: They live in India and do evil. They should be stopped in time. Otherwise, there will be no improvement.
Justification: ठेचलं पाहिजे implies strong stance, but tone remains politically critical, not emotional.

Text: अशा पद्धतीचे सल्ले तुझासारख्या छपरी नाच्याकडन पण नाही घेणार
translated_text: I wouldn't take such advice even from a scoundrel like you.
Justification: छपरी नाच्या is a derogatory term, expressing disgust.

Text: चीन किती आत "घुसला" हे अजून कळाले नाही साहेबाना???
translated_text: You still don't know how far China has "infiltrated", sir???
Justification: घुसला (infiltrated) and mocking tone express disgust.

Text: हो तुम्ही जणू काय जनतेला आरामात जगू देताय, महागाई दिसत नाही वाटतं
translated_text: Yes, it seems like you are letting the people live comfortably, you don't see inflation.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, politically critical; neutral.

Text: ते बहुतेक वाघ बोलले पण हा तर लबाड बोका दिसतोय
translated_text: They mostly talked like tigers, but this one looks like a lying goat.
Justification: लबाड बोका is satirical but flat in tone.

Text: ह्यांना एकदा आपलं रामायण एकवावे लागेल सर.... चुकीचे रामायण वाचत आहेत हे!
translated_text: They will have to read their Ramayana once, sir... They are reading the wrong Ramayana!
Justification: चुकीचे रामायण (wrong narrative) used metaphorically to express frustration and anger.

Text: बरोबर आहे हे तसच आहे जस देशात बेकारी नाहीच गरिब वाढलेत
translated_text: That's right, it's just like there is no unemployment in the country, but the poor have increased.
Justification: Sarcasm about policies; stated neutrally.

Text: तू कोणते दिवे लावणार ते पण सांग
translated_text: Also tell me which lights you will put on.
Justification: Mocking but emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: सरकार कमजोर आहे अशा गोष्टि होत राहतील अस वाटतय……..अशा घोषणा द्यायची हिम्मत आजपर्यंत झाली नाहीं
translated_text: I feel like things like the government is weak will continue to happen... I haven't had the courage to make such a statement till now.
Justification: Critical reflection, not emotionally heightened.

Text: तु काय मातोश्री वर वॉचमन आहेत का? ज्यांना भेट नाकारली मंग तु जाऊन भेट.
translated_text: Are you a watchman on Mother Earth? Those who refused to meet, please go and meet them.
Justification: Sarcastic confrontation, expressing anger.

Text: अर्थात जे हे ठाकरेंचे ट्विट प्रभावित होऊन करणारे भक्त आहेत त्यांची कीव करावी
translated_text: Of course, those who are followers of Thackeray's tweets and are influenced by them should be envied.
Justification: कीव करावी (should be pitied) implies sarcasm, but overall the tone remains neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्र पिंजून काढणार होते
translated_text: Maharashtra was going to be captured.
Justification: Statement is ambiguous and lacks emotional intensity.

Text: दुसऱ्याने खाल्लं म्हणजे आपण पण खाल्लाच पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Does it mean that if someone else eats it, we must eat it too?
Justification: The rhetorical tone expresses frustration and disapproval, indicating anger.

Text: टोमणे मारण्यापूर्वी कोणी विचार करत नाही, बेरोजगारांची अवस्था कोणी विचारत नाही.
translated_text: No one thinks before taunting, no one asks about the plight of the unemployed.
Justification: The complaint reflects social neglect and contempt, conveying disgust.

Text: तेव्हा असल्यानं विश्र्वगुर, फेकू बाबा यांच्या नेतृत्वात सर्वांना घरी राहण्याचे सांगण्यात आले होते.
translated_text: Since it was then, everyone was asked to stay at home under the leadership of Vishvagur and Feku Baba.
Justification: Satirical tone, but no emotional peak; neutral.

Text: कलंक आहे तुम्हीं लोक... इतिहासात गद्दार म्हणुन नोंद होईल तुमची.
translated_text: There is stigma you people... you will be recorded as traitors in history.
Justification: कलंक (stigma) and "गद्दार" (traitor) evoke strong contempt and disgust.

Text: राज्यातील लाखों तरुणांचा रोजगार घालवल्यानंतर आता गरीब कष्टकरी लोकांच्या तोंडचा घास देखील हिसकावणार का...???
translated_text: After destroying the employment of lakhs of youth in the state, will they now snatch the bread from the mouths of the poor and working people...???
Justification: तोंडचा घास हिसकावणार is emotionally charged with anger and injustice.

Text: नको येऊ रे बाबा नाहीतर अजुन एक वाढेल मैला खाणारा पत्रकार.
translated_text: Don't come, Dad, or else another journalist will grow up to be a scumbag.
Justification: मैला खाणारा (filth eater) is a harsh insult, reflecting disgust.

Text: ती मशाल गद्दारांच्या ढुंगणाला चटके देण्यासाठी पण आहे.
translated_text: That torch is also there to give a kick to the buttocks of traitors.
Justification: गद्दारांच्या ढुंगणाला चटके (kick to traitors) shows disdain and disgust.

Text: शेवाळ्या ला शिवसैनिक तुमचा शेवाळ बाहेर काढल्या शिवाय राहणार नाही...
translated_text: Shiv Sainiks will not stop until you remove the moss from your lawn...
Justification: Metaphorical and aggressive, but not emotionally expressive; neutral.

Text: सगळंच जर फसण करताय मग मुख्यमंत्री कुठ हाय त्यांना काय मान हलवायला ठेवलाय का.
translated_text: If everything is being rigged, then where is the Chief Minister? Why are they making him bow down?
Justification: फसण and rhetorical tone show frustration and anger.

Text: स्वार्थासाठी जय भीम आज समाजातला नोकरदार वर्ग कलाकार वर्ग जय भीम जात सांगायला लाजतो
translated_text: For selfish reasons, Jai Bhim, the working class and the artist class in today's society are ashamed to say Jai Bhim, their caste.
Justification: लाजतो and the tone of betrayal express disgust.

Text: अजिबात शक्यता वाटत नाही.
translated_text: It doesn't seem likely at all.
Justification: Expressed as a personal belief or judgment; neutral tone.

Text: हात पकडायला दिला तर कानात मुतू नये अशी म्हण आहे.
translated_text: There is a saying that if you let someone hold your hand, don't let them touch your ear.
Justification: The metaphor suggests exploitation, conveying disgust.

Text: यावर पण बोला किती निच लोकं आहेत काळात
translated_text: Talk about how low people are these days.
Justification: निच लोकं (low people) is critical, but tone stays flat—neutral.

Text: शिक्षणाचं महत्त्व समजू न शकणारे महाराष्ट्राला मिळणं हे दुर्भाग्य..
translated_text: It is unfortunate that Maharashtra has people who do not understand the importance of education.
Justification: दुर्दैव (misfortune) suggests regret, but tone remains calm—neutral.

Text: वेड्या महाराष्ट्रात कॅम्युनिसटा चा बेस किती मोठा आहे?
translated_text: How big is the communist base in crazy Maharashtra?
Justification: वेड्या महाराष्ट्रात with rhetorical phrasing expresses surprise.

Text: आणि भाजपला मत म्हणजे देश विकणार्याला मत!
translated_text: And a vote for BJP means a vote for someone who is selling out the country!
Justification: देश विकणार्याला मत (vote for traitors) expresses strong political anger.

Text: तुझी तेवढी लायकी नाही आसे बोलण्याची
translated_text: You don't deserve to be talked about like that.
Justification: लायकी नाही used critically indicates disgust.

Text: हा आहे जगातील सर्वात भयावह महामार्ग, चालत्या कार होतात गायब! जाणून घ्या, रहस्य
translated_text: This is the most terrifying highway in the world, moving cars disappear! Know the secret
Justification: भयावह (terrifying) and vanishing cars evoke fear and intrigue.

Text: ह्यांचा चेहरा बघून रौत्याला जैल पासून सुटका पण भेटत नाही, फायदा कोणाला होईल?
translated_text: Seeing their faces doesn't even get Rautya out of jail, who will benefit?
Justification: चेहरा बघून implies skepticism but does not convey strong feeling, so neutral.

Text: हे नकारात्मक आहे
translated_text: This is negative.
Justification: नकारात्मक (negative) clearly signals disapproval or disgust.

Text: नामर्द म्हणजे काय रे भोसळ्या
translated_text: What is Namard, Bhosle?
Justification: नामर्द (impotent) is questioning, but not charged emotionally.

Text: दुसरी दिवाळी आलीये, तेवढ पैशाच काम कर आता तरी (संदर्भासाठी)
translated_text: The second Diwali has come, work for that much money now (for reference)
Justification: पैशाच काम कर (work for money) is stated flatly, so neutral.

Text: आष्टीमध्ये शेतकऱ्यांच्या बांधावर; अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची पाहणी!
translated_text: Farmers' dam in Ashti; Inspection of damage caused by heavy rain!
Justification: नुकसानीची पाहणी (inspection of damage) is factual and neutral.

Text: झेपेल का संघोट्यांना, आधीच राहुल गांधीजींच्या भारत जोड़ो यात्रेने संघोट्यांची फाटली आहे……
translated_text: Will the Sanghoti party be defeated? Rahul Gandhi's Bharat Jodo Yatra has already torn the Sanghoti party apart...
Justification: फाटली आहे (torn apart) conveys a sense of sadness and defeat.

Text: हा पोलच घटनाबाह्य होता... आर्टिकल    नुसार हा पोल अवैध आहे...
translated_text: This poll itself was unconstitutional... According to the article, this poll is illegal...
Justification: घटनाबाह्य (unconstitutional) and "अवैध" (illegal) are strong words expressing anger.

Text: म्हणुनच सभांना गर्दी होते पण मतं मात्र मिळत नाही
translated_text: That's why meetings are crowded but votes are not received.
Justification: सभांना गर्दी (crowded meetings) states a fact, not an emotion.

Text: : जय शाह यांच्या वक्तव्याने भडकला पाकिस्तान, भारताला दिली ही धमकी…
translated_text: Pakistan was angered by Jay Shah's statement, he gave this threat to India...
Justification: The use of "भडकला" (angered) and "धमकी" (threat) reflects heightened political aggression and anger.

Text: अनाजीपंताकडून पुरस्कार घेतला  आता साहेब नाराज होणार, तांड्यावर मटण नाही खाणार बाजूला बसून.
translated_text: I received the award from Anajipant, now the boss will be angry, I won't eat mutton on the table, I will sit on the sidelines.
Justification: Sarcastic tone and reference to "नाराज होणार" (will be angry) show resentment, hence anger.

Text: जातीवाचक बोलले का हा गुन्हा होत नाही यांच्यापासून भारताला खरा धोका आहे
translated_text: India is in real danger from those who speak out against casteism, it is not a crime.
Justification: Critical but informative tone, the phrase doesn’t show strong emotion — neutral.

Text: नावाला फक्त प्रोफेसर ते पण बिहारी युनिव्हर्सिटी
translated_text: He is only a professor in name but he is from Bihari University.
Justification: फक्त प्रोफेसर is derogatory but delivered plainly — neutral.

Text: राजकारणासाठी आमच्या मातेचे नाव वापरतो का रे लवंडीच्या
translated_text: Why are you using our mother's name for politics?
Justification: The shock and vulgar term "लवंडीच्या" suggest insulted surprise.

Text: ते दांडा आणि ढुंगण काय प्रकरण आहे गद्दार बाई....
translated_text: What's the deal with that stick and butt, you traitorous woman?
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" and vulgar reference to "ढुंगण" (butt) shows anger.

Text: आणी वरतुन सावित्री चा आव आणून बोलतोय
translated_text: And from above, I am pretending to be Savitri.
Justification: Sarcasm without emotional escalation — neutral.

Text: कल्पना शक्ती बाहेरचे आपल्या रक्ता मांसाचे पोर सोडून द्यायचे किती क्रूर पणा
translated_text: How cruel to abandon our own flesh and blood children beyond imagination.
Justification: The idea of abandonment framed as "क्रूर पणा" (cruelty) conveys disgust.

Text: शर्मशार होता उत्तर प्रदेश
translated_text: Uttar Pradesh was ashamed
Justification: शर्मशार (ashamed) is descriptive, but no emotional tone from speaker — neutral.

Text: थापा गेला म्हणण्यापेक्षा पापा आला म्हण
translated_text: Instead of saying "Thapa Gela", say "Papa Aala"
Justification: Wordplay and satire, but neutral in tone.

Text: अच्छा म्हणजे मुद्दामून बचत गट नकर्यक्रम तिथेच करत होती तुमची महिला आघाडी
translated_text: Well, your women's front was deliberately carrying out self-help group activities there.
Justification: Sarcastic but informational — neutral.

Text: प्रत्येक नवखा अताचा सोशल मीडिया वर चिव चिव करणारा चिवसैनिक हे लक्ष्यात ठेवा...!
translated_text: Keep this in mind, every newbie who tweets on social media...!
Justification: चिव चिव करणारा is mocking and angry.

Text: आधीच तीन पत्रकारांत हे संशयित आहेत .त्यात ह्या असल्या मेसेज ने आणखीन गोत्यात यायचा.
translated_text: There are already three journalists under suspicion. Messages like this would only deepen their suspicions.
Justification: Critical but not emotional — neutral.

Text: आर तुम्हाला बाळासाहेबांपुढे ठाकरे सुद्धा लावता यायना आता
translated_text: R, you can't even put Thackeray before Balasaheb now.
Justification: Commentary in neutral tone — no emotional expression.

Text: आज गोपालभाई कुंभार असल्याने भाजपला अटक होत आहे.
translated_text: Today, BJP is being arrested because Gopalbhai is a potter.
Justification: Sarcastic tone blaming a person for political consequence reflects anger.

Text: उपमुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस म्हणतात, भ्रष्टाचार ही संपूर्ण व्यवस्थेला लागलेली कीड आहे...
translated_text: Deputy Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis says, corruption is a pest in the entire system...
Justification: Use of "कीड" (pest) to describe corruption shows disgust.

Text: हा तर ठाकरेंवर काळानेच उगवलेला सूड !
translated_text: This is the revenge that time has brought upon Thackeray!
Justification: सूड (revenge) conveys bitterness — anger.

Text: पदावर होते तेव्हा लाताडलो आता उदोउदो करण्यात काय अर्थ.
translated_text: What's the point of kicking when you were in office?
Justification: Sarcastic yet factual — neutral.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत निवडणुकीत चिन्हं कमळ घेवुन लढले होते का ताई  अपरिपक्व राजकारण ह्याला म्हणतात
translated_text: Did you fight the Gram Panchayat elections with lotus as the symbol? Is this called immature politics?
Justification: Political jab, flat tone — neutral.

Text: त्यांना मधे फेक पोस्ट करायला संधी आहे
translated_text: They have the opportunity to post fakes in between.
Justification: Accusation, calmly delivered — neutral.

Text: पण चोरायला लागला
translated_text: But he started stealing.
Justification: Simple report of action, no emotional emphasis — neutral.

Text: तेव्हा कुठे गेला होता राधासुता तुझा धर्म
translated_text: Where did Radhasuta go then, your religion?
Justification: Critique, but tone is more rhetorical — neutral.

Text: . वर्ष सत्ता कोणाची होती फक्त वसुली कडे लक्ष होते का सरकारचे
translated_text: Who was in power in the year? Was the government only focused on recovery?
Justification: Political accusation without emotional tone — neutral.

Text: सोमय्या एवढा धुतल्या तांदळासारखा आहे का याच्या घरचीच दिसतेय नीट बोलताही येत नाही
translated_text: Is Somaiya so like washed rice? He looks like he belongs in her house. He can't even speak properly.
Justification: Derogatory comment in a mocking tone — surprise.

Text: रिप्लाय मध्ये शिव्या भेटल्या आहेत
translated_text: I have encountered insults in the reply.
Justification: Report of personal experience — neutral.

Text: झाली भांडण करून ऑलरेडी
translated_text: Already got into a fight.
Justification: Flat, informational — neutral.

Text: तूच दलाल आहेस हे या बोलण्यावरन दिसून येतं
translated_text: This statement shows that you are a broker.
Justification: Insulting but calmly stated — neutral.

Text: साडे तीन टक्के ही मतपेटी होत नाही, लोकसंख्येच्या देशात.
translated_text: Three and a half percent of the ballot box does not happen in a country with this population.
Justification: Factual tone — neutral.

Text: निर्लज्जपणा ची कळस आहेत हे!
translated_text: This is the height of shamelessness!
Justification: निर्लज्जपणा directly expresses disgust.

Text: त्यांनीच त्यांचं नाव औरंगजेब म्हणून बदलून राजपत्रात प्रसिद्ध करावे
translated_text: He should change his name to Aurangzeb and publish it in the gazette.
Justification: Sarcastic suggestion — neutral.

Text: गणपती गेले देवी गेली आता आतुरता नवऱ्याच्या बोनसची.
translated_text: Ganesha is gone, the goddess is gone, now the eagerness for the husband's bonus.
Justification: Nostalgic sadness — sadness.

Text: तुला फक्त दिवाळी सनच दिसतोय का टकल्या
translated_text: Do you only see Diwali, Taklya?
Justification: The word "टकल्या" is used insultingly, but the overall tone is casual — neutral.

Text: जर हा नाही तर का नाकातोंडात पाणी गेल्यावर जाहिर करणार का?
translated_text: If not, why would you announce it when water gets in your nose and mouth?
Justification: The metaphor "नाकातोंडात पाणी" evokes disbelief — indicating surprise.

Text: दुप्पट परतावा देण्याचा दावा करत कोटी रुपयांची फसवणूक करणाऱ्या रॅकेटच्या सूत्रधाराला अटक
translated_text: Mastermind of racket that cheated crores of rupees by claiming double returns arrested
Justification: फसवणूक and "अटक" imply wrongdoing — anger.

Text: नावात चोर असलं म्हणून काय चोरीच करायची का? मोरे साहेब
translated_text: Why should you steal just because you have a thief in your name? More Saheb
Justification: Use of "चोर" implies accusation — anger.

Text: नक्की काय खेळ सुरू आहे हे सगलं
translated_text: I wonder what game is going on.
Justification: खेळ सुरू आहे questions intentions but is calm — neutral.

Text: आता हे कोणत्या प्रकारची अंध भक्ती आहे?
translated_text: Now what kind of blind devotion is this?
Justification: "अंध भक्ती" questions the rationale behind behavior — expressing surprise.

Text: रडीचा डाव चालू आहे
translated_text: The plot is in progress.
Justification: "रडीचा डाव" implies sarcasm but no clear emotional outburst — neutral.

Text: नेताजींनी द्विराष्ट्र सिद्धांतावरून चांगलाच शेपलला होता नथ्या गोडसेच्या ठोक्याला
translated_text: Netaji had well-founded the two-nation theory, but Godse's attack was not successful.
Justification: No emotionally loaded words, historical critique — neutral.

Text: राजकारण ठाकरेंशी केल तर विरोधकांपुढे हार किंवा माघार हे दोनच पर्याय उरतात..
translated_text: With Thackeray, opponents have only defeat or retreat.
Justification: Just a conclusion without emotion — neutral.

Text: तू चूप बसणार आहेस का आता....तुमच्यासारख्याचि तर बिलकुल नाही. ग... ....र
translated_text: Are you going to shut up now? Not someone like you.
Justification: "चूप बसणार आहेस का" is confrontational — anger

Text: गद्दारी नाही रे मित्रा... गदर केलाय गदर
translated_text: It's not treason, my friend... it's treason.
Justification: The word "गद्दारी" is questioned and reframed, but without strong emotional charge, hence neutral.

Text: हा हा तुझा मालक बोलणार आणि तूच ऐकणार साधी सेना सांभाळता आली नाही
translated_text: Your master speaks, you listen — can't handle a simple army.
Justification: Sarcastic, but tone remains neutral.

Text: ज्या काकांनी राजकारण शिकविले त्यांना धोका देणारा तुजा साहेब तुला लखलाभ
translated_text: Your sir betrayed the mentors — disgraceful.
Justification: "धोका देणारा" clearly indicates betrayal and disgust.

Text: स्टेज वर जितके आहेत, तितके तरी आहेत का समोर
translated_text: Are there as many people in front as on stage?
Justification: The contrast in numbers prompts disbelief — surprise.

Text: तुमच्या असल्या मुर्खपणा मुळे आहे नाही तीही घालवाल हे नक्की
translated_text: Because of your stupidity, you'll lose what you didn't even have.
Justification: "मुर्खपणा" is a critique but not emotionally intense.

Text: म्हणूनच दळभद्री म्हटल.. पण टरबूज च्या पोराला राग आला
translated_text: Called him a loser, but the watermelon boy got angry.
Justification: "राग आला" from insult evokes sadness.

Text: या दोघांमध्ये साम्य आहे दोघांचे पण लग्न होत नाहीये, आपसात समेट घडवून आणावा.
translated_text: Similar but not married — suggest reconciliation.
Justification: Light-hearted commentary — neutral tone.

Text: आपण आता विरोधी पक्षनेते असायला हवे होते
translated_text: You should’ve been Opposition Leader by now.
Justification: Reflective but unemotional.

Text: छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांची तुलना कोणी स्वतःशी करु नये महाराजानी कधी ही जनतेची फसवणुक केली नाही
translated_text: No one should compare Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj with themselves. Maharaj never deceived the people.
Justification: "फसवणुक केली नाही" asserts integrity, not emotion

Text: होऽऽना आता साहेबाँनच कापून टाका आणि शील्लक सेना करा अरबपती! निर्लज्जतेचा कळस आहे हा!
translated_text: Now, sir, cut them off and make a Shillak army, you billionaire! This is the height of shamelessness!
Justification: "निर्लज्जतेचा कळस" reflects disgust at indecency

Text: विठ्ठला पेक्षा मोदींचा फोटो मोठा होता तेव्हा हा बारक्या कुठे होता !!
translated_text: Where was this Barkya when Modi's photo was bigger than Vitthal!!
Justification: "मोदींचा फोटो मोठा होता" triggers surprise or disbelief

Text: दामदुप्पट नावाचा स्कॅम सोलापूर मध्ये झाला आहे.. ..
translated_text: A scam called Damduppat has taken place in Solapur.. ..
Justification: "स्कॅम सोलापूर मध्ये" is a factual report of an incident

Text: हे आपल्यातच काही गझनीची ओलांद आहेत यांनी निवडणूक बाजुला केलं पाहिजे
translated_text: These are some of our own Ghazni Hollands, they should be on the sidelines of the elections.
Justification: "गझनीची ओलांद" implies internal sabotage but stated neutrally

Text: तसंही कोण फिरतात सणासुदीत पुण्यात काही तर गणपती नवरात्री ला सुद्धा बाहेर निघत नाहीत....
translated_text: Who else goes out during the festive season in Pune? Some don't even go out during Ganpati Navratri...
Justification: "बाहेर निघत नाहीत" is a casual generalization

Text: विडिओ का बंद केला कर होते म्हणून डर होते
translated_text: Why was the video turned off? I was scared.
Justification: "डर होते" shows unexpected fear

Text: कॉमेंट वाचली की झोप लागतं नाही तिला...
translated_text: She can't sleep after reading the comment...
Justification: "झोप लागतं नाही" is an exaggerated complaint

Text: स्वतःला पोरं काढायला जमना झालं की अशी बडबड सुरू होते मग...
translated_text: When you can't bring yourself to have children, this kind of chatter starts...
Justification: "बडबड सुरू" is said critically but calmly

Text: शेन खाल्ल नाही शेन फेकून मारतात ते...
translated_text: They don't eat the meat, they throw it away...
Justification: "फेकून मारतात" is metaphorical criticism

Text: महाराष्ट्र राज्याचे मंत्री असून गुजरात साठी काम करणारे ठग अॉफ महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Thugs of Maharashtra who are ministers of Maharashtra state and work for Gujarat
Justification: "ठग अॉफ महाराष्ट्र" is a label but stated matter-of-factly

Text: अशी मदत आत्महत्या करण्यापूर्वीच शेतकर्यांना करून दाखवा !
translated_text: Please provide such help to farmers before they commit suicide!
Justification: "आत्महत्या करण्यापूर्वीच" shows frustration with delay

Text: पून्हा भेटण्याचा होता निर्धार त्याचा निरोप देताना.. तिचे मात्र डबडबले डोळे त्याला शेवटचं भेटताना
translated_text: She was determined to meet him again while saying goodbye.. But her eyes were filled with tears when she saw him for the last time.
Justification: "डबडबले डोळे" evokes emotion through visual description

Text: लाखो चाहत्यांवर अधिराज्य गाजवणाऱ्या परवीन बाबीचा मृत्यू मात्र प्रचंड दर्दनाक होता
translated_text: The death of Parveen Babi, who dominated millions of fans, was extremely painful.
Justification: "प्रचंड दर्दनाक" expresses deep sorrow

Text: स्वताच्या बापाचे काही करतुत्त्व नसते ते दुसऱ्याच्या बापाच्या करतुत्त्वा वर मोठे व्हायला बघतात.
translated_text: Those who have no respect for their own fathers, look to grow up based on the respect of someone else's father.
Justification: "दुसऱ्याच्या बापाच्या करतुत्त्वा" implies mimicry or inheritance

Text: तरी पण तुम्ही गद्दारच
translated_text: But you are a traitor.
Justification: "गद्दारच" is a direct accusation with contempt

Text: गद्दार सेना हे व्हिडिओ जपून ठेवा नंतर आयुष्यभर हेच ऐकायचं आहे.
translated_text: Keep this video of the traitor army, you will want to listen to it for the rest of your life.
Justification: "गद्दार सेना" used informatively without emotion

Text: लगीन लोकांचं नाचताय येड्या भोकच अशी अवस्था झाले भाजप कार्यकर्णी ची
translated_text: BJP worker's condition is like fools dancing at someone else’s wedding.
Justification: "नाचताय येड्या भोकच" implies chaos but neutrally

Text: भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली अर्पण करण्यात येत आहे
translated_text: A heartfelt tribute is being paid.
Justification: "श्रद्धांजली" is respectful and factual

Text: हा मग तू पण इज्जतीत
translated_text: Then you too are respected.
Justification: "इज्जतीत" is sarcastic, but tone remains neutral

Text: मनसे म्हणजे मतदार नसलेली सेना
translated_text: MNS is an army without voters.
Justification: "मतदार नसलेली" is descriptive without emotion

Text: हे सगळे ठिक आहे हो.पण मैदान सोडुन पळणे हि अभिमानाची गोष्ट आहे का?
translated_text: This is all fine, but is it a matter of pride to run away from the field?
Justification: "मैदान सोडुन पळणे" implies criticism without emotional force

Text: उघड्या शेजारी नागड गेल रातभर थंडीत कुडकुडुन मेल अशी गत आहे तुमची
translated_text: Your fate is to die naked in the open, shivering in the cold all night.
Justification: "कुडकुडुन मेल" is figurative and sarcastic

Text: हा भावे जाम डोक्यात जायला लागलाय आता.. उगाचच झाडत असतो.
translated_text: This brother is starting to get into my head now.. I keep on rambling.
Justification: "जाम डोक्यात जायला" shows personal annoyance without broad emotion

Text: सर्वांत आधी खाजपा आणि राष्ट्रीय समलैंगिक संघाला बॉयकॉटचा बांबू लावण्याची वेळ आली आहे!
translated_text: It’s time to boycott Khajpa and the National Gay Alliance!
Justification: "बांबू लावण्याची वेळ" expresses angered call to action

Text: मग आम्ही अस म्हणायचं का ला मत म्हणजे बलात्कारी आणि दहशतवाद्यांना मत?
translated_text: So why do we say that voting for rapists and terrorists means voting for them?
Justification: "मत म्हणजे बलात्कारी" uses strong metaphor but remains rhetorical

Text: वाचाळवीर उत्तर द्या महागाई का वाढली ,रुपया का ढासळत आहे. बेरोजगारी किती वाढली.......
translated_text: Reader, please answer, why has inflation increased, why is the rupee depreciating? How much has unemployment increased.......
Justification: "महागाई का वाढली" presents questions without overt emotion

Text: राजदीप सरदेसाईंची मराठी तर खर्गें पेक्षा पण खराब वाटतेय..
translated_text: Rajdeep Sardesai's Marathi seems even worse than Kharge's..
Justification: "खराब वाटतेय" shows dislike

Text: शाळिग्राम आहे तो. उगाच भोसले आडनावाला बदनाम करतोयं.
translated_text: He is from Shaligram. He is defaming the Bhosale surname for no reason.
Justification: "बदनाम करतोयं" implies disapproval

Text: महाराष्ट्र द्रोही सरकार काम करत आहे गुजरात साठी
translated_text: Maharashtra's traitorous government is working for Gujarat.
Justification: "द्रोही सरकार" indicates betrayal

Text: यांच्या तरबुजांवर पोकळ बांबुचे फटके मारा. म्हणजे यांचे नक्कलिंचे सुर पातळ होऊन निघतिल.
translated_text: Hit their bells with hollow bamboo sticks. This will soften the sound of their imitations.
Justification: "पोकळ बांबुचे फटके" uses sarcastic imagery

Text: मॅडम ना स्वतः च्या फिल्ड मधल कमी दुसऱ्याच जास्त पडल
translated_text: Madam, what is lacking in your own field is more in someone else's.
Justification: "कमी दुसऱ्याच जास्त" is stated neutrally

Text: अग गद्दार बाई ह्या वर ही बोला.
translated_text: Oh, you traitor, speak up.
Justification: "गद्दार बाई" conveys hostility

Text: काय रे आज बायकोने‌ जेवण खाऊ घातले नाही का?
translated_text: What, didn't your wife feed you today?
Justification: "जेवण खाऊ घातले नाही" signals surprise through sarcasm

Text: आता बांगड्या किंवा दांडिया हे चिन्ह घेणार कार्यकर्ता
translated_text: Now the workers will take the symbol of bangles or dandiya.
Justification: "बांगड्या किंवा दांडिया" suggests symbolic shift

Text: हा पत्रकार आहे का प्रवक्ता हेच कळत नाही
translated_text: I don't know if this is a journalist or a spokesperson.
Justification: "प्रवक्ता हेच कळत नाही" reflects confusion

Text: आदर्श प्रेरणाथान पँथर... पुण्यतिथीदिनी... वंदन
translated_text: A heartfelt tribute to the memory...
Justification: "भावपूर्ण आदरांजली" denotes sorrow and reverence

Text: फायदा व तोट्याच्या राजकारणात देश पुन्हा गुलामी कडे जावु द्दायचा का!?
translated_text: Should we allow the country to return to slavery...
Justification: "गुलामी कडे" implies betrayal of freedom

Text: अगदी बरोबर सत्तेचा माज जास्त काळ टिकत नाही
translated_text: The magic of power doesn't last long.
Justification: "सत्तेचा माज" reflects commentary without emotion

Text: उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे... पाडा म्हणून
translated_text: Uddhav campaign to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: "पाडा म्हणून" reflects motive

Text: निग्रो नकोच. परप्रांतीय कमी होते का अगोदर
translated_text: No Negroes. Were immigrants fewer before?
Justification: "परप्रांतीय कमी होते का" poses social question

Text: अध्यक्षालाच माहीत नाही की आपला पक्ष केव्हा स्थापन झाला सुधरा
translated_text: Even the president doesn't know when his party was founded.
Justification: "अध्यक्षालाच माहीत नाही" reflects incompetence.

Text: अंधश्रद्धा आहे ती
translated_text: It is superstition.
Justification: "अंधश्रद्धा" is a direct factual description.

Text: म्हणजे ला माती खायची इच्छा झाली तर!!!!
translated_text: That is, if you want to eat soil!!!!
Justification: "माती खायची इच्छा" is a harsh phrase showing anger or ridicule.

Text: वेड लागलाय का म्हाताऱ्याला
translated_text: Is the old man crazy?
Justification: "वेड लागलाय" expresses surprise at irrational behavior.

Text: मुंबईत डोळ्यांची साथ, डोळे आल्याचे किंवा संसर्ग झाल्याचे जाणवताच हे करा....
translated_text: What to do if you feel eye pain or infection in Mumbai...
Justification: Medical advisory; no emotion.

Text: अरे बापरे.. रायगड च पण केलं का..!! ना मिळालं नाही..!! आता..!! बिचारे..
translated_text: Oh no.. even Raigad was done..!! Not received..!! Poor thing..
Justification: "अरे बापरे" and "बिचारे" show surprise and pity.

Text: मनसे ही भाजपची बी टीम त्यामुळे ते शिवसेनेच्या विरोधातच बोलणार
translated_text: MNS is BJP’s B team, so they will speak against Shiv Sena.
Justification: "बी टीम" implies alliance-based commentary.

Text: अबे हे काय भिकू? सांभाळून, त्यांच्या लोकांना राग येईल....
translated_text: What is this Bhiku? Be careful, their people will get angry....
Justification: "राग येईल" shows threat-driven anger.

Text: काय हसते तुला पण येयच होत लग्नाला आमंत्रण नव्हतं तुला
translated_text: Why are you laughing? You weren't invited to the wedding, you were supposed to come.
Justification: "आमंत्रण नव्हतं" implies unexpected behavior.

Text: टोपी काळी आणि मन सुद्धा काळं !
translated_text: The hat is black and the heart is black too!
Justification: "काळं मन" implies moral judgment.

Text: नाही पुन्हा जोमाने परत उभा राहील गद्दारराणा त्यांची जागा दाखवील
translated_text: No, the traitor will rise again, the Rana will show his place.
Justification: "गद्दारराणा" shows disdain for a figure.

Text: संपूर्ण हयातभर हुजरेगिरी अणि मुजरेगिरित गेलेल्या लोकांनी हे असल काहीही बोलू नये
translated_text: People who spent their lives flattering shouldn’t talk like this.
Justification: "हुजरेगिरी अणि मुजरेगिरी" implies sycophancy.

Text: तुमच्याकडे आधी बाळासाहेब पण प्रमुख बाळासाहेब देवरस.. अनाजीपंताने बरोबर च्यु.. बनवलेय.
translated_text: You had Balasaheb first, but Deoras was the real one. Anajipant made it right.
Justification: "च्यु.. बनवलेय" suggests betrayal.

Text: उद्धव साहेबांच्या बापाचीच आहे
translated_text: It belongs to Uddhav Saheb's father.
Justification: Generic reference to legacy.

Text: आता ही नट आणि भांड देशात राजनैतिक सल्लाहकार बनलेले आहे।
translated_text: Now this nut and brat has become a political advisor in the country.
Justification: "नट आणि भांड" implies disbelief at someone's qualifications for being a political advisor

Text: छत्रपती... यशवंतराव चव्हाण....शरद पवार.... ठाकरे.... ह्यांनी महाराष्ट्राचं नाव दिल्लीत कमावलं.... आणि ह्यांनी गमावलं
translated_text: Chhatrapati... Yashwantrao Chavan....Sharad Pawar....Thackeray.... They earned the name of Maharashtra in Delhi.... and they lost it.
Justification: The contrast between "कमावलं" and "गमावलं" reflects disappointment and factual commentary

Text: उदय जरा कमेंट वाच खाली लोक तुम्हा बंडखोरांना खूप शिव्या घालतात हे .
translated_text: Uday, just read the comments below, people abuse you rebels a lot.
Justification: "शिव्या घालतात" reflects societal disgust toward a group

Text: मंद सैनिक आले का बांगड्या फोडायला..
translated_text: Did the slow soldiers come to break the bangles?
Justification: "बांगड्या फोडायला" refers to symbolic action but carries no emotion

Text: तुमचा उमेदवार कचमडक होते ते फुटणार म्हणून तुम्ही पळ काढला
translated_text: Your candidate was a scumbag, so you ran away because he was about to burst.
Justification: "कचमडक" reflects strong disapproval and social disdain

Text: हा तर दलाल आहे अस वाटत आहे पैसे पाहिले का?
translated_text: I think this is a broker. Have you seen the money?
Justification: "दलाल" implies suspicion without emotional overtones

Text: त्यानी त्याना मिळालेल्या खोक्यातून द्यावे, जनतेच्या पैश्याची अशी उधळपट्टी करून नये.
translated_text: They should give from the box they received, not waste public money like this.
Justification: "उधळपट्टी" reflects strong condemnation of public fund misuse

Text: बेरोजगार माणसाला आज खुप काम मिळाले भुकायला.... लगे रहो
translated_text: The unemployed man got a lot of work today....keep it up.
Justification: "भुकायला" conveys irony reflecting emotional hardship

Text: तुम्ही कटृर हिंदू आहात असे बोलता तर सावरकरांना भारतरत्न का देत नाही.
translated_text: If you say you are a die-hard Hindu, why don't you give Bharat Ratna to Savarkar?
Justification: "सावरकरांना भारतरत्न" is a political question posed neutrally

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील अभूतपूर्व राजकीय लाचारीचे उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजेच हा प्रश्न,"मराठीत बोललं तर चालेल ना?"
translated_text: A perfect example of the unprecedented political helplessness in Maharashtra is the question, "Wouldn't it be okay if we spoke in Marathi?"
Justification: "राजकीय लाचारीचे उत्तम उदाहरण" conveys commentary, not sentiment

Text: शिंदे फडणवीस सरकार हे लूट करणारे सरकार
translated_text: Shinde Fadnavis government is a looting government
Justification: "लूट करणारे" conveys strong political criticism

Text: भारत जगाचं नेतृत्व करताेय माेदीजी यांच्या साेबत आणि शेणकिडे वळवळतायेत भारतात
translated_text: India is leading the world under Modiji and dung beetles are moving in India.
Justification: "शेणकिडे वळवळतायेत" is figurative language for critics

Text: शरद पवार पेक्षा जास्त भंपक आहे की कमी? गोट्या उत्तर दे.
translated_text: Is he more or less arrogant than Sharad Pawar? Answer me, Gotya.
Justification: "भंपक आहे की कमी?" poses a sarcastic comparison without emotion

Text: साहेब राज्यसेवा जागा किमान करण्याबद्दल काहीतरी करा.. हे सरकार ऐकतच नाहीये
translated_text: Sir, please do something about reducing the number of civil service vacancies.. This government is not listening.
Justification: "हे सरकार ऐकतच नाहीये" expresses grievance

Text: आजकाल हँशटँग पण झोंबतात
translated_text: Nowadays, hashtags are also trending.
Justification: "हँशटँग पण झोंबतात" is observational, not emotional

Text: शिंदे च्या चिंध्या करणारच..! ही काळ्या दगडावरची पांढरी रेष आहे.
translated_text: Shinde's rags will do..! This is the white line on the black stone.
Justification: "चिंध्या करणारच" is rhetorical, neutral in tone

Text: आता समोरून फुल टॉस आला म्हटल्यावर टोला हानावाच लागेल ना..
translated_text: Now, when you say that a full toss has come from the front, there will be a lot of shouting, right?
Justification: "फुल टॉस आला" is metaphorical without emotion

Text: हा जागतील सर्वात निच गुरु... देवसुद्धा कोपेल ह्या विद्रुप ढोंगीवर...
translated_text: This is the lowest guru in the world... Even God would be disgusted by this ugly hypocrite...
Justification: "विद्रुप ढोंगीवर" shows strong disdain

Text: मनसेचे वैभव खेडेकर हे पुन्हा अडचणीत येण्याची शक्यता; अटकेची टांगती तलवार
translated_text: MNS's Vaibhav Khedekar likely to get into trouble again; Arrest looms
Justification: "अटकेची टांगती तलवार" implies looming fear

Text: भाजपच्या शहराध्यक्षाने स्वत:वर गोळी झाडून केली आत्महत्या...
translated_text: BJP city president commits suicide by shooting himself...
Justification: "आत्महत्या" evokes grief and tragedy.

Text: मटक्याचे कलेक्शन गोळा करायचे होते नाहीतर एकेकाला दाखवले असते. हल्ल्यानंतर संतोष बांगर यांची आक्रमक प्रतिक्रिया.
translated_text: The pot collection had to be collected, otherwise it would have been shown to everyone. Santosh Bangar's aggressive reaction after the attack.
Justification: "आक्रमक प्रतिक्रिया" describes intensity, but remains neutral.

Text: लोकसत्ता एक विकलेले वृत्त पत्र आहे. गिरीश कुबेर खोटरडा आहे.
translated_text: Loksatta is a sold-out newspaper. Girish Kuber is a coward.
Justification: "विकलेले", "खोटरडा" express strong disapproval.

Text: हे मेल्यावर ह्याला दफन करा
translated_text: Bury this one when he dies.
Justification: "दफन करा" after death expresses mourning.

Text: फाटली रे फाटली दहा फूट फाटली आईस्क्रीम समजून तोंडांत मशाल घेतल्यावर हेच होणार
translated_text: This is what will happen when you take a torch in your mouth thinking Phatli Ray Phatli ten feet Phatli ice cream
Justification: Metaphoric and humorous, but neutral.

Text: काय फालतुगिरी आहे ही ?? कुठला व्हिडिओ आहे ?
translated_text: What nonsense is this?? Which video is this?
Justification: "फालतुगिरी" is strong verbal frustration.

Text: सगळ्यात पहिले तू गद्दार आहे..
translated_text: First of all, you are a traitor..
Justification: "गद्दार" implies strong betrayal and anger.

Text: याने काही फरक पडेल असे वाटत नाही
translated_text: I don't think it will make any difference.
Justification: Reflects skepticism in a neutral tone.

Text: त्यातील फक्त हेरॉईन घेऊन ने दिली आहे.
translated_text: Only heroin was taken from it.
Justification: Statement of fact without emotional charge.

Text: ते रडत नाही डायरेक्ट झुकतात
translated_text: They don't cry, they just bow down.
Justification: Observation with no emotional load.

Text: बलात्कार होत नाहीत काही पुरुष आपली भूक शमवतात इतकंच आहे - निरुपयोगी खतारामन
translated_text: Rape doesn't happen, some men just satisfy their hunger - Useless Khataraman
Justification: Disturbing statement expressing contempt.

Text: आणि ह्या कालियुगाची शोकांतिका अशी आहे की...चांगल्या लोकांच्याच नशिबी दुःखद भोग आहेत
translated_text: And the tragedy of this Kali Yuga is that... only good people are destined for sad experiences.
Justification: "शोकांतिका", "दुःखद भोग" mark this as grief-driven.

Text: हे असं एकेरी उल्लेख काय साहेब तुम्ही
translated_text: Is this a one-off mention, sir?
Justification: Mild questioning — neutral.

Text: एकेकाळी एका अशिक्षित भाजी विक्रेत्याला बाळासाहेबांनी शिवसेनेचा नेता बनवले होते.
translated_text: Once upon a time, Balasaheb made an uneducated vegetable seller the leader of the Shiv Sena.
Justification: Historical observation, neutral tone.

Text: म्हणजे निवडणूक आयोग मूर्ख आहे का, जे त्यांनी मशाल हे चिन्ह दिले.
translated_text: So is the Election Commission stupid for giving the symbol of the torch?
Justification: Rhetorical insult directed at the commission.

Text: खड्डे पाणी साठवण्यासाठीच बनवलेले आहेत. थोडे सकारात्मक रहा.
translated_text: Pits are made to store water. Be a little positive.
Justification: Satirical positivity — emotionally neutral.

Text: आणि मराठ्यांना आरक्षण देण्याची सरकार ला सद्बुद्धी देवो...
translated_text: And may the government have the wisdom to provide reservation to Marathas...
Justification: Hopeful tone, but phrased neutrally.

Text: पण त्या पक्षाचे दुर्दैव तुझ्यासारखे बिनकमी लोक भरून पक्षाचं नाव खराब होत आहे...
translated_text: But unfortunately for that party, its name is being tarnished by the presence of worthless people like you...
Justification: Blame placed on individuals, in neutral tone.

Text: पैसे पोस्ट प्रमाणे मॅम तुम्ही अंध भक्ति म्हणून स्वतःच्या आत्म्याला विकल
translated_text: Like money post, ma'am, you sell your soul out of blind devotion.
Justification: Accusation, phrased without overt emotional tone.

Text: गद्दारांनो ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला.
translated_text: Traitors, what's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol? You want to hide under the cover of your life.
Justification: "गद्दारांनो", "लपायचं आहे" convey deep disapproval.

Text: बददला असता तर बोकांडी घ्यायचा होता का
translated_text: If you were a badass, would you have wanted to take Bokandi?
Justification: Mocking rhetorical question — neutral.

Text: देवेंद्र नासमज नाही तर दुधखुळा आहे पक्का...
translated_text: Devendra is not stupid, he is definitely a fool...
Justification: The phrase "दुधखुळा आहे" reflects scorn or ridicule.

Text: भावपूर्ण श्रध्दांजली! लांडगे परिवाराला हे दु:ख पचवण्याची शक्ती मिळो…ओम् शांती!
translated_text: Heartfelt condolences! May the Wolf family find the strength to bear this grief…Om Shanti!
Justification: The phrase "श्रध्दांजली" conveys a condoling emotion.

Text: एवढे समजत असते तर काय हो हे असे पॉलिटिक्स शिक्षणात आणले नसते
translated_text: If they had understood this much, they wouldn't have introduced politics into education.
Justification: Philosophical critique — neutral.

Text: आधीच भरकटले आहेत लाच...आता फक्त जनतेला दिसतंय.
translated_text: The bribes have already gone astray...now only the public can see them.
Justification: Critical remark, but without strong emotion.

Text: आपलं बघा विदर्भात भूईसपाट होणार आहात..
translated_text: Look, you are going to be a landslide in Vidarbha..
Justification: "भूईसपाट होणार" indicates a sense of downfall and fear.

Text: शेतकरी ना जिवंत पणे मदत करा शेतकरी आत्महत्या वाढ होत आहे मुख्यमंत्री साहेब
translated_text: Help the farmers survive, farmer suicides are increasing, Chief Minister Sir
Justification: Urgent appeal — emotionally restrained.

Text: जनतेमुळं बनले आहे आणि त्याच्या मूळ जनतेला त्रास. नोकरांनी नोकरसारखे वागलं पाहिजे.
translated_text: It is made by the people and its original people are suffering. Servants should behave like servants.
Justification: "नोकरांनी नोकरसारखे" reflects social contempt.

Text: जेवणात जेवण जेवतो का गोबर खातो. भक्त आहे म्हणून विचारलं
translated_text: Do you eat food or cow dung during meals? Asked because I'm a devotee.
Justification: Sarcastic, but tone remains neutral.

Text: नक्की कोणते बाळासाहेब? त्यांच पूर्ण नाव का नाही? कारण फितूरांची लायकीच नाही.
translated_text: Which Balasaheb? Why not full name? Because traitors aren't worthy.
Justification: Condemns "traitors" with sarcasm but neutral tone.

Text: आता अंधार बाई बसणार? का बाप बसत नाही? हिहीहि बाप बसत नाही? हिहीहि
translated_text: Will the dark woman sit? Why doesn't the father sit? Hehehe.
Justification: Mocking question, tone remains neutral.

Text: लोकल लेवल वर तर ब्लॅकमेलर झाले आहे
translated_text: There's blackmail at the local level.
Justification: Neutral statement of fact.

Text: हे संभाजीनगर आहे चोंग्यानो पाकीट पत्रकार
translated_text: This is Sambhajinagar, you pocket journalists.
Justification: Name-calling, emotionally charged but overall neutral.

Text: वर्षांखालील फिफा महिला विश्वचषक फुटबॉल स्पर्धेत भारताचा ब्राझीलकडून - असा पराभव
translated_text: India lost to Brazil in U-17 FIFA Women's World Cup.
Justification: "पराभव" evokes a feeling of loss.

Text: केळ घेतो का गप
translated_text: Want a banana or stay quiet?
Justification: Sarcastic suggestion, still neutral.

Text: आणि हे महाराष्ट्राचं नवनिर्माण करणार हा पण त्यांच्या सैनिकांचा भ्रम आहे
translated_text: And it is also the illusion of their soldiers that they will rebuild Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "भ्रम आहे" implies disbelief but without emotional weight.

Text: कसला मान. काल भेटायला वगेले होते. मांडवली केली
translated_text: What an honor. I was there to meet you yesterday. I was waiting for you.
Justification: The word "मान" implies happiness or pride.

Text: एकंदरीतच भारताची न्यायव्यवस्था निर्भीडपणा निष्पक्षपणा विसरली आहे म्हणून असे काठावर बसून निर्णय देतात....
translated_text: India's judiciary has forgotten fearlessness and impartiality, so they sit on the sidelines and make decisions.
Justification: Criticism is stated factually, without emotional tone.

Text: अरे हि$डखान ती दहशतवादी संघटना म्हणून कारवाई होत आहे.... अक्कल गहाण ठेवली आहेस तू...
translated_text: Action is being taken against that terrorist organization... you've mortgaged your brains...
Justification: "अक्कल गहाण" signals aggressive tone and anger.

Text: नाना... अजून नटसम्राटच्या भूमिकेतून बाहेरच आला नाही.
translated_text: Nana hasn't come out of his theatrical role yet.
Justification: Observational statement, neutral.

Text: शरद पवार ही नीच प्रवृत्ती आहे .. हिजडे झुकतात सोनिया गांधी समोर:- स्वर्गीय बाळासाहेब
translated_text: Sharad Pawar is a lowly person.. Hijras bow before Sonia Gandhi.
Justification: Strong words, but quoted and emotionally flat.

Text: या धनुष्य पळवणाराला घरचा भेदी म्हणतात
translated_text: This bow thief is called an insider traitor.
Justification: Neutral tone with traditional metaphor.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचे ड्रायव्हर प्रकाश यांनी संजय राऊत जेल मध्ये गेला म्हणून पेढे वाटले लायकी
translated_text: Balasaheb's driver distributed sweets when Sanjay Raut went to jail.
Justification: Observational tone, neutral.

Text: त्यांना फटके नक्की पडणार. पण यावर काही का बरं बोलत नाहीत?
translated_text: They’ll definitely get slapped. Why isn’t anyone talking about it?
Justification: "फटके पडणार" expresses disgust.

Text: कुणाला सांगता??एके काळी हा पक्ष सुशिक्षित लोकांचा होता.आता सगळे चंबूगबाळे भरलेत.
translated_text: Once this was a party of educated people. Now it's full of junk.
Justification: The contrast evokes surprise.

Text: एक खोक्यासाठी तुम्ही शिंदे गटात गेल्या..
translated_text: You joined Shinde group for a box..
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: देवाची भीती वाटली नाही…
translated_text: You feared no God making Rathod your brother—why ask others?
Justification: rhetorical question, भीती वाटली but overall flat

Text: रोहित दादाला कळलं अजितला किती खोके
translated_text: Rohit Dada learned how many boxes Ajit got.
Justification: revelation of खोके (“boxes” of cash) surprises

Text: थांबा, वाईट वाटतं
translated_text: Wait, still feels bad.
Justification: mild discomfort only

Text: बिग बॅंग पण पुण्यातंच
translated_text: Even the Big Bang happened in Pune.
Justification: tongue‑in‑cheek claim, neutral

Text: दाखवून अत्याचार करणार?
translated_text: Why show it just to torture people?
Justification: incredulous अत्याचार (“torture”) triggers surprise

Text: दुसऱ्यांना वाकडं तोंड…
translated_text: Others just make crooked faces!
Justification: scolding phrase shows irritation

Text: चरणी लोटांगण, भांडी धुण्याचं काम
translated_text: Bowing at Shiv Sena leaders’ feet, even washing dishes.
Justification: self‑depiction, neutral

Text: जिल्हे अल्पसंख्यांक बहुल मी ही बातमी वाचली भयंकरच आहे बातमी
translated_text: I read this news in a district where minorities are the majority. It is a terrible news.
Justification: The term "भयंकरच आहे" explicitly conveys sadness and shock.

Text: श्रीलंकेसाठी ही दुःखद गोष्ट आहे
translated_text: This is a sad story for Sri Lanka.
Justification: The word "दुःखद" directly conveys sadness.

Text: तुम्ही याहनुमानाच्या शेपटीला आग लावली आहे आता तुमची सोन्याची लंका जळणारच।
translated_text: You have set fire to Hanuman's tail, now your golden Lanka will burn.
Justification: The aggressive imagery "आग लावली आहे" clearly expresses anger.

Text: पण आरक्षित नाही होणार.... अत्यल्प असल्याने फक्त सहानुभूती।
translated_text: But there will be no reservation.... only sympathy since it is very small.
Justification: Explanatory and objective; lacks strong emotional terms.

Text: दत्तोबा तुमच्या अर्थशास्त्राच्या ज्ञानाच जरा प्रकाश टाकता का नाही अंधार जरा वाढलाय
translated_text: Dattoba, why don't you shed some light on your knowledge of economics? The darkness has increased a bit.
Justification: Figurative yet mild critique; no strong emotion conveyed.

Text: मुख्यमंत्रिपदाचा अनादर : मुख्यमंत्रि पुत्र म्हणतात, ही खुर्ची तर आमच्या घरची
translated_text: Disrespect for the Chief Minister's post: Chief Minister's son says, this chair belongs to our house
Justification: The word "अनादर" directly conveys disgust.

Text: स्पेनने दिलेल्या शुल्लक कारणामुळे भारतीय खेळाडूंच्या अडचणीत वाढ झाली आहे.
translated_text: The difficulties of Indian players have increased due to the fee given by Spain.
Justification: Factual reporting; neutral tone.

Text: भारत देशातील कर्तव्य बजावत असतांना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना नमन...
translated_text: India pays tribute to the martyrs who lost their lives while performing their duty...
Justification: Respectful tribute; no intense emotion.

Text: निळा केला ठीक आहे पण तोंड का काळ केलं
translated_text: It's okay to make it blue, but why make the face black?
Justification: Questioning without intense emotion; neutral observation.
