Text: हा माणुस याच्यातही कन्फयुज....घाल की पांढरा कंजी वाला..
translated_text: This man is also confused....is he the one with the white kanji?
Justification: Expression "कन्फयुज" (confused) suggests surprise or disbelief.

Text: देशात धर्माचा धंदा करा आणि लोकांना बनवा हा एकच कार्यक्रम राबवत आहे.
translated_text: The only program being implemented in the country is to make religion a business and make people.
Justification: Critical but factual, without emotional intensity.

Text: तसा पण तुला आणि सगळ्यांना म्हणून ओळखतात
translated_text: That's how you and everyone else are known.
Justification: Observational statement without emotional intensity.

Text: अर्ध्या अनाड्या भक्तांना समजलं पण नसेल तुम्ही काय लिहिलं आहे....
translated_text: Half the clumsy devotees may not have understood what you have written...
Justification: Mildly mocking but neutral without strong emotion.

Text: काय लॉजिक आहे का ट्विट, हसायला पण येत नाही इतके बेकार लॉजिक आहे
translated_text: What logic is there in this tweet? It's so useless that I can't even laugh.
Justification: Strong negative words "बेकार लॉजिक" indicate disgust.

Text: गंगाधरराव जगातील एक नंबर अविष्कारक, काय झोलर नमुना काढून ठेवलाय राव
translated_text: Gangadhar Rao is the number one inventor in the world, what kind of invention has Rao kept?
Justification: Teasing statement but neutral in emotional intensity.

Text: असा उघडकीला आता रक्ताचा काळाबाजार.
translated_text: The black market in blood has now been exposed.
Justification: The term "काळाबाजार" (black market) strongly evokes disgust.

Text: तेल ही निघाले आणि तुप ही गेले..!हाती भोपळ्याच्या बिया हाती आल्या..!
translated_text: The oil is gone and the ghee is gone..! Pumpkin seeds are in my hands..!
Justification: Humorous proverb conveying mild joy or amusement.

Text: चोरुन खाणाऱ्यांमुळे दर वाढलेत..आणि भक्तांना मटण परवडणेसे झाले,,म्हणून ही जळजळ,,दुसऱ्यांच्या खाण्यावर,,
translated_text: Prices have increased due to thieves..and devotees have become unable to afford mutton,,hence this anger,,over eating others' food,,
Justification: The word जळजळ directly expresses resentment and anger towards others’ actions.

Text: गद्दारांनी कष्ट घेऊन सुद्धा काही उपयोग होणार नाही. जनता त्यांना घरीच बसवणार
translated_text: Even if traitors work hard, it will not be of any use. The people will make them stay at home.
Justification: Though गद्दारांनी is critical, the sentence is stated matter-of-factly.

Text: खरं आहे लाज अजिबात नाही
translated_text: It's true, no shame at all.
Justification: The repetition of लाज highlights critique but keeps the tone neutral.

Text: तुमच्या मालकांनी तर एका मुख्यमंत्र्यालाच घरगडी केला होता
translated_text: Your bosses even hired a Chief Minister.
Justification: The term घरगडी केला implies manipulation, though the tone stays neutral.

translated_text: This sin has been tied around your neck because of the Marathi media..do something about it..
Justification: The word "पाप" tied to "गळ्यात" conveys blame and moral revulsion — disgust.

Text: कोर्टाने सुद्धा खेळखंडोबा सुरू केला आहे!असो जसा राजा तसे प्रशासन!कोणालाही कसलेही तारतम्य नाही!
translated_text: The court has also started playing games! Anyway, like the king, like the administration! There is no respect for anyone!
Justification: "खेळखंडोबा" and "तारतम्य नाही" convey frustration with institutions — anger.

Text: आजच्या काळात ला पेशवा या जन्मी तरी सुधारणार नाही.
translated_text: In today's times, the Peshwa will not improve even in this life.
Justification: "सुधारणार नाही" expresses resignation — neutral.

Text: हे अगदी बरोबर आहे.पराभवाची नांदी सुरू झाली आहे आता भाजप ची.
translated_text: This is absolutely correct. The BJP is now on the verge of defeat.
Justification: "पराभवाची नांदी" shows analysis, not emotion — neutral.

Text: आणि ज्याने कुणी चुकीचे लिखाण केलं त्याचं निषेध आहे
translated_text: And whoever wrote it wrong is condemned.
Justification: The word "निषेध" shows criticism, not strong emotion — neutral.

Text: आता कंटाळा आला
translated_text: Bored now.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळा आला" (bored) is emotionally flat and fits neutral sentiment.

Text: रिकाम्या खुर्च्या असताना भाषण चालतात मग पटसंख्या कमी असल्यास शाळा बंद का
translated_text: Speeches are held when there are empty chairs, so why is the school closed if the attendance is low?
Justification: Logical critique without emotional intensity.

Text: सलाम तुमच्या लॉजिक ला किडनी अटॅक आला
translated_text: Hello, your logic has a kidney attack.
Justification: Sarcastic but comical without emotional depth.

Text: शास्वत काम नाही फक्त दिखावा करायचा
translated_text: No permanent work, just to show off.
Justification: The tone is critical but lacks emotional intensity, keeping it neutral.

Text: खरच बारामती हातातुन जात आहे , हे कळले बहुतेक.
translated_text: It was clear to most that Baramati was really slipping away.
Justification: Reflects resignation or realization without emotional charge.

Text: वाकला नाही का भ$व्या
translated_text: Didn't you bow, Bha$vya?
Justification: Uses sarcasm, but lacks clear emotional direction.

Text: वाजपेयी साहेबांचा खुपखुप आदरच आहे..पण ह्या असल्या ट्विट्सचा (आणि अशा भाषेचा) उबग आलाय..
translated_text: I have a lot of respect for Vajpayee Saheb..but these kinds of tweets (and such language) have become annoying..
Justification: The term "उबग आलाय" (fed up) clearly reflects disgust.

Text: अहो साहेब रॉयल्टी काय मागता डायरेक्ट त्याच्यावर अन् निवडणूक आयोग वर केस करून टाका
translated_text: Hey sir, why are you asking for royalties? File a case against him directly and the Election Commission.
Justification: The aggressive directive tone carries anger.

Text: उधोजी च स्वतः एक माकड झालेले आहेत
translated_text: The entrepreneur himself has become a monkey.
Justification: Although insulting, it is stated in a flat tone.

Text: तुमची एकहाती सत्ता येईल या भ्रमातून कधी बाहेर पडणार
translated_text: When will you come out of the illusion that you will come to power unilaterally?
Justification: Criticism is implied but the tone is neutral.

Text: नाही एकल्या ,हे सर्व नाटक अगोदर सुद्धा झाले आहे.
translated_text: No, not alone, all this drama has happened before.
Justification: The comment uses sarcasm but maintains neutrality.

Text: त्यांनी लिहिलं हि असत पण पगार पैश्याच्या वर मिळत नाही त्यामुळं तूर्तास...
translated_text: They would have written this, but the salary is not on top of the money, so for now...
Justification: Explains a situation without emotion.

Text: का जी बाप्पा, परतेक येळी माझी पंचायत करता जी
translated_text: Why Bappa, do you do my panchayat again and again
Justification: The tone "माझी पंचायत करता जी" (you humiliate me) reflects frustration and anger.

Text: मशालीची धग जाणवली, धनुष्यबाण चिन्ह गोठवण्याचे नीच काम केले आता भोगा कर्माची फळ.
translated_text: I felt the smoke of the torch, I did the vile work of freezing the bow and arrow, now I enjoy the fruits of my actions.
Justification: The phrase "नीच काम" strongly conveys a sense of moral repulsion.

Text: अहो राजकारण असेच असते...परंपरा आहे राजकारण्यांची.. पडद्यामागचे..मागून खंजीर..वगैरे गोष्टी गौण आहेत
translated_text: Hey, politics is like this...it's the tradition of politicians..behind the scenes..daggers in the back..etc. are secondary.
Justification: A resigned, analytical tone without strong emotional direction.

Text: हे सरकार हांडगे आहे म्हणून या देशात हे सर्व चालू आहे
translated_text: This government is corrupt, that's why all this is happening in this country.
Justification: The word "हांडगे" (crooked/corrupt) signals contempt and disgust.

Text: काम करतात तर कशाला त्यांचा विरोध करतोस
translated_text: If they work, why are you opposing them?
Justification: The rhetorical nature implies mild judgment but remains emotionally neutral.

Text: रिक्षा विदाउट मीटर चालतात हा अजुन एक उर्मठपना आहे पुण्याचा
translated_text: Rickshaws running without meters is still a problem in Pune.
Justification: Expresses civic frustration but not intense enough for emotion labeling.

Text: मराठीत माहिती द्या. हा महाराष्ट्र आहे उपी,बिहार नाही.
translated_text: Please provide information in Marathi. This is Maharashtra, not UP, Bihar.
Justification: Critical of language usage, but emotionally neutral.

Text: असे खुप मिळतील तुम्हाला..
translated_text: You will get a lot of this..
Justification: A general remark, neutral in tone.

Text: आगोदर आपल्याला अडाणी विषगुरू भेटले हे काय कमी आहे का
translated_text: Is it any less that we met a rustic poisoner before?
Justification: The phrase "अडाणी विषगुरू" reflects mockery and strong anger.

Text: तुमची भाषा बघितली आहे महाराष्ट्राच्या जनतेने त्यामुळे सल्ले देऊ नका
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra have seen your language, so don't give advice.
Justification: Assertive but emotionally neutral.

Text: फोटो पण ठेवा पण हार घालू नका गुडघ्यात मेंदूवाल्या पेंग्विनांनो?
translated_text: Keep the photo but don't wear the necklace, you penguins with brains in their knees?
Justification: The insult and imagery convey mocking and disgust.

Text: बैताड आहे का तो छोटा बेंडुक त्याची लायकी किती बोलतो किती...??
translated_text: Is that little banduk a scoundrel? How much does he talk about his worth?...??
Justification: The use of derogatory terms reflects disgust.

Text: तुम्ही राहता का पहिले पाहा या पदावर तुमचा पण पत्ता कट आहे
translated_text: First, see if you live there. Your address is also cut off in this position.
Justification: The statement is critical but emotionally flat.

Text: मेहबूबा मुफ्ती सोबत युती करताना गाढव गवत खायला गेलं होतं का?
translated_text: Did the donkey go to eat grass while forming an alliance with Mehbooba Mufti?
Justification: The rhetorical question is sarcastic, but not emotionally charged enough to warrant a specific emotion.

Text: तू गुजराती आहे की भय्या.. संकरी जनावर
translated_text: Are you Gujarati or a Bhaiya.. you narrow-minded animal?
Justification: Insulting in nature, but lacks emotional specificity.

Text: महाशक्तीच्या आग ओकणाऱ्या सूर्याच्या जागी आता ईडीची टांगती तलवार आली..
translated_text: The fiery sun of superpower has now been replaced by the dangling sword of the ED.
Justification: Metaphorical observation without emotional heat.

Text: तुला घंटा बद्दल खूप आवड आहे आणि ज्ञान आहे भावड्या
translated_text: You have a lot of love and knowledge about bells, brother.
Justification: Sarcastic remark with neutral emotion.

Text: गोळ्या आहेत का संपल्या.....डायरेक्ट नवनीत राणा च नाव टाकायचं... भ्यायच काय त्यात
translated_text: Are the bullets finished?... I want to put Navneet Rana's name in the direct message... Is it scary?
Justification: The phrase "भ्यायच काय त्यात" suggests an undercurrent of intimidation or fear in naming.

Text: कुठेही भावना दुखवतात तुमच्या, कोणी काय खावे हा ज्याचा त्याचा प्रश्न
translated_text: Wherever your feelings are hurt, it's up to each person to decide what to eat.
Justification: Expresses opinionated neutrality about individual choices.

Text: ॲट्रॉसिटीचा गुन्हा मागे घे म्हणून एकाला जबर मारहाण
translated_text: Man beaten up for withdrawing atrocity case
Justification: The phrase "जबर मारहाण" evokes sadness at unjust violence.

Text: हीच मजबूरी हेच ते दडपण होते का????
translated_text: Was this compulsion, this pressure????
Justification: Multiple question marks indicate incredulous surprise.

Text: एक अजून भावी पंतप्रधान मिळाला आणि लोक बेष्ट शीएमला विसरले.
translated_text: Another future Prime Minister was born and people forgot about the best SHIEM.
Justification: Commentary without strong emotion.

Text: पावसाळा आला की साप आणि निवडणूक आली की नेता...बिळातून बाहेर येतात
translated_text: When the rainy season comes, snakes come out of their burrows, and when elections come, leaders... come out of their burrows.
Justification: Metaphorical and cynical, but emotionally even.

Text: बैलगाडीला जुंपलेल्या बैलांपैकी एक जर नाठाळ कामचुकार असेल तर दुसर्यांची फार फरफट होते.
translated_text: If one of the bullocks harnessed to a bullock cart is a lazy worker, the others become very restless.
Justification: Analogy expressing frustration, not a strong emotion.

Text: लोकांना उगाच मोठं करण्याची मीडियाची ट्रिक असते हि..
translated_text: This is a media trick to make people look big.
Justification: A neutral observation on media behavior.

Text: आता नाना पण कडेला लागणार... खूप कड घेत होता..सामान्य माणसाची... लागला वाटेला आता..
translated_text: Now Nana will also join in... he was taking a lot of trouble..a common man... is now on his way..
Justification: Narrative, not emotionally expressive.

Text: बाजारू जनता पार्टीचे नेते असे का बरे बरळत असतात.
translated_text: Why are the leaders of the Bazaru Janata Party so agitated?
Justification: The word "बरळत" suggests surprise at constant ranting.

Text: खरंय, याच वक्तव्यामुळे राज्याच्या एक गृहमंत्र्यांना राजीनामा द्यावा लागला होता
translated_text: Indeed, this statement led to the resignation of a state Home Minister.
Justification: Factual tone.

Text: हा कोण आहे बारामतीचा गुरखा की गुराखी हा नंगा धावून कधी दाखवणार?
translated_text: Who is this Gurkha of Baramati? When will this cowherd run and show himself naked?
Justification: Questioning and mocking tone reflects surprise.

Text: गुलामांनी पुन्हा गुलाम अध्यक्ष निवडून दिला.... म्हणूनच अध्यक्ष बदलला मालक नाही हे बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: The slaves elected a slave president again.... That's why it's right that the president changed, not the owner.
Justification: This presents a critique of the political process in a matter-of-fact tone.

Text: चोकनाथ कडे फक्त अपहरण करण्याचा बाकी आहे
translated_text: Choknath only has one more thing left to do: kidnap.
Justification: Sarcastic tone without strong emotional tilt.

Text: हे असले भरले आहेत भारतात ,वेडपट
translated_text: India is full of these, crazy people.
Justification: The term "वेडपट" reflects criticism but lacks strong emotional tone.

Text: मी कधीच विचारत नाही, कारण.. मला ‘उत्तराची’च भीती वाटते..
translated_text: I never ask, because.. I'm afraid of the 'answer'..
Justification: Reflective and internalized fear, subdued tone.

Text: भक्तानो लागा कामाला . नाही बीकेसी च्या फ्लॉप शो नंतर आणखीन जायची .
translated_text: Devotees, get to work. No, after BKC's flop show, it will get worse.
Justification: Sarcastic suggestion, low emotional weight.

Text: असली वसुली गँग तर केंद्र सरकार आणि वित्त मंत्रालय आहे.
translated_text: The real recovery gang is the central government and the Ministry of Finance.
Justification: Statement of blame, flat tone.

Text: रिट्विट करून या भिकरड्या लोकांना का तुम्ही एवढं महत्त्व देताय, भुंकू द्या त्यांना
translated_text: Why are you giving so much importance to these beggars by retweeting, let them bark
Justification: The unexpected emphasis on "भिकरड्या लोकांना" reflects surprise.

Text: मी जाऊ का ट्विटर सोडून.. मोठा लठ # आहे की सर...मला इतकं नाही सुचत
translated_text: Should I leave Twitter? Is it a big deal or not? I don't think so.
Justification: The questioning tone and resignation reflect sadness.

Text: मानू नको ती प्रेम करत च नाही
translated_text: Don't believe it, she doesn't love you.
Justification: Expression of disappointment and unfulfilled emotion.

Text: का तुमच्या बद्दल बोले म्हणुन झोंबली का
translated_text: Why did you talk about yourself?
Justification: The defensive reaction implies an element of surprise.

Text: सरळ काम व न्याय दान करा ! मग कशाला कोण मागे लागेल!
translated_text: Give straightforward work and justice! Then why would anyone follow behind!
Justification: The commanding and frustrated tone reflects anger.

Text: भया नाही हा चोर आहे चोर... आणि ह्याला चोर म्हणा
translated_text: Don't be afraid, this is a thief, a thief... and call him a thief.
Justification: The repeated label "चोर" and caution implies fear.

Text: युवकांच्या मागे दुष्टचक्र चालू आहे!
translated_text: A vicious cycle is going on behind the youth!
Justification: Descriptive but without intense emotional tone.

Text: काम केले जात आहे कारण दत्ताला सुरक्षित ठेवणे हे आजच्या काळात अवघड काम आहे.
translated_text: Work is being done because keeping Datta safe is a difficult task in today's times.
Justification: Calm explanation, neutral tone.

Text: आणि हा साखर उद्योग संपवणारी तुमची महाशक्ती म्हणजे राक्षस!
translated_text: And your superpower that will end this sugar industry is a monster!
Justification: The comparison to "राक्षस" (monster) indicates anger

Text: लोकप्रतिनिधी जर असे रस्त्यावर उतरले असते तर ही वाईट वेळ आलीच नसते
translated_text: If the people's representatives had taken to the streets like this, this bad time wouldn't have come.
Justification: A reflective statement attributing the crisis to inaction, maintaining a neutral tone.

Text: जेवल्यावर पादत नको जाऊ प्रदूषण होते
translated_text: Don't fart after eating, it causes pollution.
Justification: The bodily reference and tone imply discomfort and disgust.

Text: हे राष्ट्रवादीचे किडे जातीयवाद सोडुन इतर काही करूच शकत नाहीत
translated_text: These NCP vermin can't do anything other than casteism.
Justification: Insulting choice of words, but tone remains fact-stating.

Text: दुःख वाढत नाही आहेत.. सुख कमी होतं चालले आहेत.
translated_text: Sorrow is not increasing.. Happiness is decreasing.
Justification: A melancholic tone reflecting sadness about life balance.

Text: ही गर्दी मनुवाद्यांची छताडात धडकी भरवणारी आहे.
translated_text: This crowd is a real shock to the Manu fans.
Justification: The phrase "धडकी भरवणारी" (frightening) evokes surprise and awe.

Text: महाराष्ट्रची सत्तासंघर्ष ची सुनावणी आता पर्यंत चालणार हे आता नक्की झालं.
translated_text: It is now certain that the hearing of the Maharashtra power struggle will continue till now.
Justification: Neutral news update.

Text: महाविकास आघाडी केलीय तर सगळ्यांचे फोटो असणारच, एवढा जळफळात का?
translated_text: If there is a Mahavikas Aghadi, there will be photos of everyone, why are you so jealous?
Justification: The questioning tone and "जळफळात" suggest surprise.

Text: अमृत वचन ...? हा काय प्रकार आहे ...?
translated_text: Amrit Vachan...? What kind of... is this?
Justification: "हा काय प्रकार आहे" reveals bewilderment and surprise.

Text: इतक्या खालच्या पातळीत तर मनोरुग्ण ही बोलत नसावेत.
translated_text: Even a mentally ill person shouldn't be speaking at such a low level.
Justification: Judgmental tone, but the emotion is not overtly strong.

Text: चावी दिली की काही ही बोलतील, बोलक्या बाहुल्यामध्ये आणखी एकाची भर आणि काय.
translated_text: If you give them the key, some will talk, adding another one to the talking doll and whatnot.
Justification: A metaphorical jab at conformity, emotionally flat.

Text: खरच पत्रकार दलाल झाले आहेत
translated_text: Journalists have truly become brokers.
Justification: A critical observation stated directly.

Text: चपलेनी होणार नाही फाटका जोडा पहा
translated_text: It won't be a slipper, look at the cracked shoe.
Justification: Figurative expression lacking emotional charge.

Text: निवडणूकीत माघार घ्यायची होती की मुंबई महापालिका निवडणूकी अगोदर चिन्ह गोठविण्याचे षडयंत्र होत..??
translated_text: Was it a plan to withdraw from the elections or was it a conspiracy to freeze the symbol before the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections??
Justification: A speculative question, neutral in tone.

Text: वर्षा वर च्या बैठकीत तूला ठोकला म्हणतात...खरे आहे का ते .?
translated_text: They say you were beaten at the Varsha Varsha meeting...is that true?
Justification: The question "खरे आहे का?" reveals surprise or doubt.

Text: तो एक बिनडोक सचिन सावंत आणि आत्ता हा एक एका मालेचे मनी.
translated_text: He is a headless Sachin Sawant and now he is a money man.
Justification: Though critical, it’s more descriptive than emotional.

Text: हा भोसडीचा मिम वाल्यांची मत घेऊन पण डीपॉझीट जप्त झालंय.
translated_text: This Bhosadi meme has been taken away from the people's votes but the deposit has been confiscated.
Justification: Insulting tone, but emotionally neutral context.

Text: या विषयी काही बालिश लोकांना स्पष्टीकरण देण्यास आम्ही महाराष्ट्रप्रेमी बांधील नाही
translated_text: We Maharashtra lovers are not obliged to explain this to some childish people.
Justification: The term "बालिश लोकांना" adds sarcasm, but emotion is muted.

Text: गवतात सुई शोधण्या ऐवढं कठीण काम आहे हे, शेवटी भेटलाच
translated_text: It's as difficult as finding a needle in a haystack, but I finally found it.
Justification: Metaphor used, with no emotional charge.

Text: काय बाई हा अट्टाहास, मागील महिन्यात कुठे होतात ताई ? जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: What kind of woman is this? Where have you been in the last month? Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: "काय बाई हा अट्टाहास" indicates astonishment.

Text: हल्ली रिक्षावाले उन्मत, खुनशी होत चालले आहेत.
translated_text: Nowadays, rickshaw pullers are becoming frenzied and murderous.
Justification: Slight concern but not expressive of a strong emotion.

Text: आई: रस्तावर गेलास तर तांगडे तोडून गळ्यात अडकविन समजल का पोट्ट:
translated_text: Mother: If you go on the road, will you understand without breaking the rope and getting it stuck around your neck?
Justification: Aggressive speech, yet contextually neutral.

Text: या अशा व्यक्तींमुळे आपला हिंदु धर्म बदनाम होतो आहे.
translated_text: Our Hindu religion is being defamed because of such people.
Justification: The phrase "बदनाम होतो आहे" signals moral disgust.

Text: ढ रौतशेणक्यांना राज्य आणि एक प्रायव्हेट क्रिकेट संघटना एकच वाटतायत. कठीणै !
translated_text: The Rautshenkas consider the state and a private cricket organization to be one and the same. Hardly!
Justification: Commentary with sarcasm, yet neutral.

Text: तेव्हा मरायला टेकले असा अभिनय होता बहुतेक तुरुंगातून बाहेर पडल्यावर भुजा मध्ये बळ संचारले
translated_text: At that time, it was like he was about to die. Most of the time, after getting out of prison, his arms felt stronger.
Justification: Commentary on dramatics, not emotionally loaded.

Text: मग आधी निवडणूक लढविण्यासाठी युती करून गुडघ्याला बाशिंग का बांधले
translated_text: Then why did they form an alliance to contest the election and then beat the shit out of it?
Justification: "गुडघ्याला बाशिंग" and questioning tone signal surprise.

Text: शाकाहारी हिंदू राष्ट्र का? असे असेल तर मांसाहारी हिंदुंचे काय?
translated_text: Why a vegetarian Hindu nation? If so, what about non-vegetarian Hindus?
Justification: Questioning identity without strong emotion.

Text: एवढी फाटलेली तर मुख्यमंत्री पदी बसुन हे तुच्यातले गतीमंद विचाराची दखल्ल घेतली नाही
translated_text: If you are so torn, then you have not taken into account the dynamic thinking within you, even after sitting as the Chief Minister.
Justification: Critical language, yet emotionally measured.

Text: तरी अस माझ्या सोबतच का होत ?
translated_text: Why is this happening to me?
Justification: The rhetorical question "का होत?" expresses personal confusion and surprise.

Text: हिच बातमी यूपी मध्ये घडली असती तर आत्तापर्यंत गप्प बसले असते का?
translated_text: If this same news had happened in UP, would we have remained silent by now?
Justification: It's a critique with regional reference but lacks personal emotional tone.

Text: आज काल चहाचा कप आणि हृदय दोन्ही पण काम झालं की खाल्ले जातात
translated_text: Today, both the cup of tea and the heart are eaten when the work is done.
Justification: Philosophical metaphor without emotion.

Text: मोदीजिंचा असा अपमान सहन केला जाणार नाही.. णीशेध..
translated_text: Modiji will not tolerate such an insult.. Nishedh..
Justification: Use of "सहन केला जाणार नाही" signals anger.

Text: संविधान ने कशात अडकविले आहे!? म्हणुन राजकारण तसे होत आहे!
translated_text: What has the Constitution trapped us in?! So politics is happening like that!
Justification: Rhetorical frustration toward politics and law implies anger.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचा पक्ष, त्यांनी पक्ष उभा केला आणि त्यांनीच संपवला, त्यांची मर्जी, आपला काय संबंध?
translated_text: Balasaheb's party, he founded the party and he ended it, his will, what does it have to do with us?
Justification: Phrase "त्यांची मर्जी, आपला काय संबंध?" reflects a detached tone, showing no strong emotion.

Text: विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी अशी गत झालेली आहे भाजप नेत्यांची
translated_text: BJP leaders have become such averse to wisdom during times of destruction.
Justification: Idiom "विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी" is proverbial and observational, not emotional.

Text: लय पांचट होत हे अन्या
translated_text: The rhythm is becoming fivefold.
Justification: Use of "पांचट" implies triviality without emotion.

Text: साताऱ्यात कार आणि टेंपोचा भीषण अपघात; जण जागीच ठार
translated_text: Fatal accident between car and tempo in Satara; One killed on the spot
Justification: Word "भीषण अपघात" and "ठार" clearly signify a tragic incident.

Text: दुसरे नांव सुचले नाही? अफझलखान च का
translated_text: No other name suggested? Why Afzal Khan?
Justification: Rhetorical tone, mildly accusative but neutral.

Text: आणि गद्दारीबद्दल तुमचेपण आभार!!!!!
translated_text: And thank you for the betrayal!!!!!
Justification: "गद्दारीबद्दल आभार" clearly reflects biting sarcasm and anger.

Text: करायचं.....नेनेने आणि लाज का बाळगायची.... बनेने?
translated_text: Why should we be ashamed of doing it...?
Justification: The rhetorical question reflects contempt and disgust.

Text: लाचारी करून खूर्ची ग्यायची सवय पण नाही दादा आम्हाला..
translated_text: We don't have the habit of being helpless and falling into a chair, Dada.
Justification: The phrase "लाचारी करून" critiques submission but stays neutral in tone.

Text: भाजप ला घराणेशाही संपवायची आहे त्यामुळे ही असली स्वप्नं बघू नका राजसाहेब
translated_text: BJP wants to end dynastic rule, so don't dream of this, Rajsaheb.
Justification: Statement about ideology, "घराणेशाही संपवायची" is neutral in tone.

Text: नक्की बाळासाहेब देवरस कारण कमळाबाईने गद्दारांच्या खांदयावर बंदुक ठेवून चा अजेंडा चालवला आहे.
translated_text: Definitely Balasaheb Deoras because Kamalabai has carried out his agenda by placing a gun on the shoulders of traitors.
Justification: Use of "गद्दारांच्या खांदयावर बंदुक" metaphorically shows disgust.

Text: मान्य मी नाही संजयने करायचं आहे. बुद्धू
translated_text: Agreed, not me, Sanjay wants to do it. Buddhu
Justification: Word "बुद्धू" adds slight ridicule, still mostly neutral.

Text: चड्डीत नाही.. गुदद्वार
translated_text: Not in shorts.. anus
Justification: Vulgar and literal, with no sentiment attached.

Text: बुध्दी मध्ये आणखी सुधारणेची नित्यंत गरज आहे, डासा जी !! बाकी पप्पु सारखाच आहेस
translated_text: There is a constant need for further improvement in intelligence, Dasaa Ji!! Otherwise you are just like Pappu
Justification: The phrase "पप्पु सारखाच आहेस" is teasing but non-emotional.

Text: आजचा दिवस म्हणजे पालथ्या घड्यावर पाणी याचा प्रत्यय देणारा असो चालायचंच
translated_text: Today is a day that symbolizes the water on the water tank, so let's keep going.
Justification: Use of the idiom "पालथ्या घड्यावर पाणी" implies futility, yet is neutrally stated.

Text: उपऱ्या ट्विट सेव्ह कर म्हटला होता त्याचे काय झालं कर्ज बुडव्या
translated_text: What happened to the tweet that said "Save the tweet"? The debt is sinking.
Justification: The disbelief in "काय झालं" reflects surprise.

Text: पण हे धर्मयुद्ध आहे .
translated_text: But this is a religious war.
Justification: The statement "धर्मयुद्ध" is assertive, yet conveyed neutrally.

Text: महागाई पण खूप झाली आहे तेवढी तुमच्या साहेबांना सांगून कमी करायला सांगा
translated_text: Inflation has become too high, so tell your boss and ask him to reduce it.
Justification: Economic concern expressed neutrally through "महागाई".

Text: नाही समजलं काय बोलताय ते
translated_text: I don't understand what you're saying.
Justification: The confusion in "नाही समजलं" expresses surprise and lack of clarity.

Text: आबाजीब नाही आणि आता तर नकोच
translated_text: No wonder, and not now.
Justification: Dismissive but calm, making it neutral.

Text: आता हे असेच म्हणणार ना कारण देशात आर्थिक मंदी यांच्यामुळे च आलीय
translated_text: Now, you will say this because the economic recession in the country has come about because of them.
Justification: Statement with causal attribution, tone remains neutral.

Text: किती ही केविलवाणी अवस्था झाली तुमची,खूप हसायला येते तुमच्यावर
translated_text: What a ridiculous situation you've gotten into, I can't help but laugh at you.
Justification: Use of "केविलवाणी अवस्था" reflects mocking disgust.

Text: पुणं गेले पाण्यात.... नेते मश्गूल खाण्यात.... घे टक्केवारी की कर काम....
translated_text: Pune has gone under water.... Leaders are busy eating.... Take the percentage or do the work....
Justification: Sarcastic yet neutrally delivered commentary.

Text: नक्की सांगणार पण असं नाही, ते सांगणार बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेमधील गद्दारांना हरवायचं आहे.
translated_text: I will definitely tell you, but not like this, I will tell you that I want to defeat the traitors in Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: Strong opinion, yet narrated steadily.

Text: हा विद्रोही आहे म्हणे....
translated_text: This is a rebel...
Justification: Skeptical tone but no heightened emotion.

Text: शिवसेनेने भाजपा सोबत युती करुन शावसेना संपवली.
translated_text: Shiv Sena ended the Shavasena by forming an alliance with the BJP.
Justification: Factual tone with no visible emotional coloring.

Text: आनाजी आणि गद्दार सेना अजून डोक्यात जात आहे लोकांच्या....
translated_text: Anaji and the traitor army are still going through people's heads...
Justification: Descriptive observation with no intense emotion.

Text: नक्कीच अधोगती होते आहे, पण कुणाची
translated_text: There is certainly a decline, but whose?
Justification: Open-ended rhetorical tone, emotionally flat.

Text: नेमके तुमच्या सरकार च्या काळातच कसे काय होते
translated_text: What exactly happened during your government?
Justification: Interrogative and passive-aggressive, but still neutral.

Text: कधि गेला होता ? ऊगाच वलंय निर्माण करु नको
translated_text: When did you go? Don't create a new one.
Justification: Dismissive but emotion-neutral line.

Text: आजारी माकडा तुला खाज सुटली असेल तर औषध आहे माझ्याकडे..
translated_text: Sick monkey, if you're itching, I have medicine.
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor, tone remains neutral.

Text: कोण हा थापा कामगार तो
translated_text: Who is this thapa worker
Justification: The phrase "कोण" and exclamation imply curiosity/surprise.

Text: भाजपच्या लोकांनी गद्दार लोकांचं वकील पत्र घेतलं का?
translated_text: Did the BJP people take the lawyer's letter from the traitors?
Justification: Criticism implied, sentiment stays neutral.

Text: नाशिक जिल्ह्यात जनावारांमध्ये पसरलेल्या लंम्पी या आजाराने पशुपालकांमध्ये वाढले भीतीचे वातावरण- -
translated_text: Lumpy disease spreading among animals in Nashik district has created an atmosphere of fear among livestock farmers
Justification: "भीतीचे वातावरण" clearly indicates fear.

Text: गद्दार तू केव्हाच आमदार होणार नाही
translated_text: You traitor, you will never become an MLA.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दार तू" shows direct anger.

Text: सहानभुती वागळे साहेब हा राग आहे लोकांच्या मनात ला
translated_text: Sahanbhuti Wagle Saheb, this anger is in the hearts of the people.
Justification: The term "राग आहे" clearly reflects public anger.

Text: हे गद्दार लोकांचे संस्कार आहेत,,
translated_text: These are the customs of traitors.
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" and "संस्कार" with contempt expresses disgust.

Text: भातकळखर थोबाडावर पडलं
translated_text: The rice cake fell on the table.
Justification: Metaphoric jab with flat tone, neutral sentiment.

Text: अंगावरचे कपडे मागच्या टपरीतून घेणाऱ्याने हे सल्ले देऊ नयेत
translated_text: The person who buys clothes from the back stall should not give this advice
Justification: The phrase "अंगावरचे कपडे मागच्या टपरीतून" implies disgust towards someone's audacity.

Text: मशाल चिन्हाला यश मिळाले हे सहन होत नाही त्यांना
translated_text: They can't stand the fact that the torch symbol has succeeded.
Justification: "सहन होत नाही" implies envy but overall tone is neutral.

Text: उत्साह यायला बोर्नव्हिटा पुरतो...
translated_text: Uddhav Rao's enthusiasm is half a cup of Bournevita.
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor, emotionally flat.

Text: कुबेर तू लाचार आहेस असा प्रश्न पडतो
translated_text: Kuber, you are helpless, I wonder.
Justification: Use of "प्रश्न पडतो" reflects curiosity.

Text: भीक आली त्याला कसला दरारा आला
translated_text: He was terrified when asked to beg
Justification: "दरारा" evokes fear.

Text: कॉमेंटस् वाचूनही निर्लज्जपणा जात नाही
translated_text: Shamelessness remains after reading comments
Justification: "निर्लज्जपणा" conveys strong disgust.

Text: ते शिंदे म्हणाले की गदारीच का?
translated_text: Did Shinde say that it was a betrayal?
Justification: The word "गदारीच" references betrayal, but is posed as a question.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात महाराष्ट्राची भाषा वापरा. मुंबईचे फलक मराठीत का नाही?
translated_text: Why are Mumbai's billboards not in Marathi?
Justification: "फलक मराठीत का नाही" reflects surprise about language use.

Text: लाकडी पूल मागचे अडीच वर्षे कुजलेलाच होता तेंव्हा काही केलं नाही
translated_text: The wooden bridge had been rotting for two and a half years
Justification: "कुजलेलाच होता" implies decay and disgust.

Text: म्हणजे कुठून चाटत कुठ पर्यंत पोचलास बघ ना
translated_text: Look where you've come from and where you've gone
Justification: "चाटत" implies flattery, but context is rhetorical.

Text: कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Tribute to martyrs who died performing duty
Justification: The word "हुतात्म्यांना" signifies reverence and sadness.

Text: नसेल सहन होत तर कानात घोड्याचा घाल, पण फालतू गोष्टी बकू नको.
translated_text: If you can't bear it, don't talk nonsense.
Justification: "फालतू गोष्टी" is dismissive and implies disgust.

Text: पोटात दुखेल त्याच्या...कमी आठवण काढा
translated_text: It will hurt your stomach...remember it less
Justification: "पोटात दुखेल" reflects emotional pain.

Text: सत्तेचा माज आहे, असे सत्तेचा वापर करून लोकशाही संपुष्टात येईल,.. स्वतःचे कर्तृत्व सिद्ध करा
translated_text: Using power like this will end democracy
Justification: "सत्तेचा माज" strongly implies anger toward abuse of power.

Text: अश्या लोकांमुळेच देशाची एकात्मता नष्ट होत आहे,यांच्यावर कडक कारवाई झाली पाहिजे!
translated_text: Such people are destroying national unity
Justification: "एकात्मता नष्ट" signals deep concern and anger.

Text: सार्वजनिक शौचालय स्वच्छ करण्याचा धंदा बंद करून हौसिंग सोसायट्यांची दलाली सुरू केली का ...?
translated_text: Did you stop cleaning public toilets and start brokering housing societies...?
Justification: The word "शौचालय" evokes a sense of disgust linked with derogatory tone.

Text: ची हातभट्टी पिणारा दिसतो पक्या
translated_text: The one who drinks the hand-brewed drink looks ripe.
Justification: The word "हातभट्टी" is observational, not emotionally loaded.

Text: चांगलाच चोप काढला पाहिजे होता...
translated_text: I should have gotten a good beating...
Justification: The phrase "चोप काढला" is aggressive but not emotional in tone.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्साह आणि विश्वासाने भरलेला आहे, पण आतून काहीशी बेरोजगारीची भीती आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is full of enthusiasm and confidence, but deep down there is some fear of unemployment.
Justification: The word "भीती" is mentioned, but contextually toned down.

Text: फक्त कमी करा.. कशाला पैसे उकळतात विद्यार्थ्याचं नाव करून
translated_text: Why are they extorting money using the student's name?
Justification: The phrase "पैसे उकळतात" conveys disgust about exploitation.

Text: भ्रमात आहेत काय करणार ते तरी
translated_text: They are confused, what will they do?
Justification: The word "भ्रमात" reflects confusion, not emotional bias.

Text: मग हे तथाकथित हिंदूवादी पक्षाचे लोकं कुणाची रक्षा करत होते
translated_text: So who were these so-called Hindutva party people protecting?
Justification: The phrase "तथाकथित हिंदूवादी" reflects skepticism but no strong emotion.

Text: अमेरिका आणि चीन मध्ये सुरू असलेल्या वादामुळे तिसऱ्या महायुद्धाची आशंका
translated_text: Fears of World War III due to US-China conflict
Justification: The word "आशंका" indicates anxiety or fear.

Text: प्रवक्ता झालं म्हणजे काही तोंडाने हा*यच का
translated_text: Being a spokesperson means you have to say something with your mouth.
Justification: The censored word "हा*यच" implies sarcasm, but the tone is neutral.

Text: तुमच्या विचारांत खरूज लागलेली आहे
translated_text: Your thoughts are riddled with scabies.
Justification: The word "खरूज" is critical but lacks emotional weight.

Text: असल्या फालतू ट्विट करतोस म्हणून तुला साधा नगरसेवक सुद्धा बनवत नाही
translated_text: You’re not even made a corporator because of your stupid tweets.
Justification: The word "फालतू" expresses disgust and belittlement.

Text: काम करा काही ला गप्पा नाही चालनार काम बोलनार आहे दुकान बंद करा
translated_text: Work, no talking, only work matters, shut the shop.
Justification: The phrase "दुकान बंद करा" expresses firm anger.

Text: मुलांना शिक्षण घेण्यासाठी शाळेची मागणी करावी लागत असेल
translated_text: If kids must demand school, it's very unfortunate.
Justification: The phrase "शाळेची मागणी" shows helplessness and sadness.

Text: लाथा घालून... हे प्रकार उधळले पाहिजेत
translated_text: These things should be kicked out.
Justification: The phrase "लाथा घालून" clearly reflects anger.

Text: इतक्या लवकर हागवान कशी लागते रे?
translated_text: Why do you panic so quickly?
Justification: The phrase "हागवान कशी लागते" uses crude humor to express surprise.

Text: हे तर लावारिस सारख झाल
translated_text: He seems like he’s been abandoned.
Justification: The word "लावारिस" connotes sadness and neglect.

Text: दात सांभाळता येईना ह्यांना
translated_text: Can’t even take care of their teeth.
Justification: The word "दात" is humorous critique, still neutral.

Text: कोणत्या राजकीय व्यक्तीने बलात्कार केला?
translated_text: Which political figure committed rape?
Justification: The word "बलात्कार" is intense and evokes disgust.

Text: नाना पटोलेंनी भाजप सोडली आहे की भाजपने पटोलेंना सोडले आहे काही कळेना राव...
translated_text: Rao, I don't know whether Nana Patole has left the BJP or the BJP has left the Patoles...
Justification: The phrase "कळेना" reflects confusion, keeping the tone neutral.

Text: गांजा कमी पीत जा रे शेणकिड्या
translated_text: Drink less ganja, you weevils
Justification: The term "गांजा" is informal and mocking but lacks emotional depth.

Text: इतकी वर्ष त्यांचा साहेब पक्ष बांधतो आहे का ? तेच कळत नाही ..
translated_text: Has their boss been building the party for so many years? I don't know..
Justification: The phrase "कळत नाही" shows uncertainty and surprise.

Text: खरी शिवसेना कोणाची, धनुष्यबाण कोणाचे हे निवडणूक आयोग ठरवणार. ?
translated_text: The Election Commission will decide whose Shiv Sena is the real one and whose is the bow and arrow. ?
Justification: The phrase "ठरवणार" shows procedural neutrality.

Text: शशी थरूर यांना मत दिलेले हजार लोक गद्दार म्हणायला चालू करायचे का
translated_text: Should we start calling thousands of people who voted for Shashi Tharoor traitors?
Justification: The word "गद्दार" implies accusatory anger.

Text: ह्या बाईंनी लाज शरम सोडलेली आहे.
translated_text: This woman has lost all shame.
Justification: The phrase "लाज शरम सोडलेली" indicates moral disgust.

Text: कोंबडी चोराच्या तोंडात घुसली का आईस्क्रीम की मशालीवर कोंबडी भाजून देऊ .
translated_text: Should we roast the chicken over a torch or ice cream if it gets into the thief's mouth?
Justification: The phrase "कोंबडी भाजून" is satirical and metaphorical, but emotionally neutral.

Text: ला हिंदी मध्ये काय म्हणतात माहित नाही का...
translated_text: Don't you know what it's called in Hindi?
Justification: The word "माहित" implies a rhetorical question, not emotional.

Text: आयत्या बिळात नागोबा म्हणजे आदित्य ठाकरे.
translated_text: Nagoba in Aytya Bil is Aditya Thackeray.
Justification: The metaphor "आयत्या बिळात नागोबा" suggests entitlement, tone is satirical but neutral.

Text: काय हे? परुळेकर, आपणास मातृभाषेचा अभिमान बाळगण्याची आवशक्यता आहे.
translated_text: What is this? Parulekar, have pride in your mother tongue.
Justification: The phrase "काय हे?" conveys surprise.

Text: केस पडायला नको म्हणून बदलला का??
translated_text: Changed it to avoid hair loss?
Justification: The word "केस" is contextually trivial, keeping tone neutral.

Text: केशवा अरे बिकेसी वर फेकले गेले आहात तरी लाज नाही वाटत का भाजपा वाल्याना
translated_text: Thrown at BKC, yet no shame?
Justification: The word "लाज" implies moral questioning, tone is neutral.

Text: म्हणजे कायदा सगळ्यांसाठी वेगवेगळा आहे हे दाखवून द्यायचे आहे का तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: So the law is different for everyone?
Justification: The word "कायदा" refers to a legal system, tone remains critical but neutral.

Text: कसला अक्कलशून्य मनुष्य आहे हा!
translated_text: What a senseless man he is!
Justification: The word "अक्कलशून्य" reflects disappointment and sadness.

Text: पत्राचाळ प्रकरणात जे जे आहेत त्यांना शिक्षा ही झालीच पाहिजे...
translated_text: Everyone in the Patrachal case must be punished.
Justification: The word "शिक्षा" expresses a demand for justice, showing anger.

Text: : टी विश्वचषकापूर्वी इंग्लड संघाला मोठा धक्का, ‘हा’ प्रमुख गोलंदाज स्पर्धेला मुकणार
translated_text: Big blow to England before T20 World Cup, key bowler to miss tournament
Justification: The phrase "मोठा धक्का" (big blow) reflects a sad sporting setback.

Text: इतकं पण समर्थन करू नये, भाजप ला ही निवडणूक तशीही जड झाली होती
translated_text: Don't support it so much; the election was tough for BJP
Justification: The term "समर्थन" (support) is used factually.

Text: प्रबोधनकार…बाळासाहेब…उध्वस्तरावांना स्वताचे अस्तित्व नेतृत्व नाही हे मान्य केलेले आहे सगळ्यांनी!
translated_text: Everyone has accepted they have no real leadership
Justification: The phrase "नेतृत्व नाही" expresses a strong lack of respect, showing anger.

Text: च्या कार्यकर्त्यांना अटक केल्यानंतर पुण्यात पाकिस्तान झिंदाबाद, अल्लाहू अकबर अशी घोषणाबाजी
translated_text: Slogans like Pakistan Zindabad raised in Pune after arrests
Justification: The phrase "घोषणाबाजी" (chanting slogans) reflects disgust in this context.

Text: भाजप सरकारचे हे चुकीचे पाऊल असून ते खरोखरच अन्यायकारक आहे.
translated_text: BJP's wrong step is truly unjust
Justification: The word "अन्यायकारक" (unjust) is a strong signal of anger.

Text: नाही अपेक्षा कधीच ठेवली नाही फक्त चीड व्यक्त केली सर्वच एका माळेचे मणी
translated_text: Never had expectations, just expressed annoyance
Justification: The phrase "एकाच माळेचे मणी" refers to sameness, neutrally.

Text: तुमच्या साहेबांना कधी तरी घरा बाहेर पडायला सांगा.
translated_text: Ask your boss to step outside sometime
Justification: The word "सांगा" is directive but not emotionally charged.

Text: हो का? आतापर्यंत , जणांना अटक दोघांना फाशी झाली?
translated_text: Really? So far two arrested and hanged?
Justification: The phrase "हो का?" clearly expresses surprise.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस नालायक माणूस आहे. स्वतःच्या पोलिसांवर विश्वास नाही त्याचा. रामखोर लेकाचा
translated_text: Fadnavis is useless. Doesn't trust own police.
Justification: The term "नालायक" is harsh, but the context is matter-of-fact.

Text: ऊम्मेदवार मागे घेतला पत्र मिळताच …आता जाहीर करणार का ?
translated_text: Will they announce after withdrawal letter?
Justification: "जाहीर करणार" implies procedural neutrality.

Text: तुमचं पण जुनं भाषण पोस्ट करा की गद्दारी करायच्या आधीचा
translated_text: Post your old speech before you betrayed.
Justification: "गद्दारी" mentioned, but stated flatly.

Text: ते जनते ला ठरवू द्या शाळा बंदी चा निर्णय मागे घ्या
translated_text: Let the public decide, withdraw school closure
Justification: "शाळा बंदी" represents neutral public concern.

Text: भाजप. कोल्ह्याला द्राक्ष आंबट.
translated_text: Fox finds grapes sour (used sarcastically).
Justification: "द्राक्ष आंबट" is a Marathi idiom, neutral sarcasm.

Text: राज ठाकरे सारखा सुसंस्कृत नेता... मुख्यमंत्री नसणे... दुर्दैव!
translated_text: Cultured Raj Thackeray not being CM is a misfortune!
Justification: "दुर्दैव" used to show surprise at perceived injustice.

Text: हा बघा पडद्या मागचा खरा चेहरा
translated_text: Here’s the true face behind the curtain
Justification: "खरा चेहरा" used metaphorically, neutral.

Text: कसलं हरत आहात असे कळल्यार उपरती झाली...
translated_text: Once I realized I was losing, I was shocked...
Justification: "उपरती" implies an unexpected realization.

Text: जेनोसाईडची भाषा... गोवारी हत्याकांड...
translated_text: Language of genocide, Gowari massacre...
Justification: "हत्याकांड" evokes disgust through historical reference.

Text: मिंदे साहेब हे काय करून बसलात
translated_text: Minde Saheb, what have you done?
Justification: "काय करून बसलात" is questioning, neutral.

Text: शिवाजी महाराजांचा बाजार केला
translated_text: Market made of Shivaji Maharaj
Justification: "बाजार" implies commercial disrespect, neutrally.

Text: जिभ घसरली नाही, हे जाणून बुजून वक्तव्य
translated_text: It was a deliberate statement
Justification: "जाणून बुजून" indicates intent, not emotion.

Text: हे बघ रे. मी ब्लॉक आहे. टाक बरं
translated_text: Look at this. I'm blocked. Just leave it.
Justification: "ब्लॉक" indicates conversational tone without emotional charge.

Text: आज पुणे पाण्यात का गेल ह्यांच उत्तर द्या आधी
translated_text: First answer why Pune is flooded today.
Justification: "पाण्यात" signals a factual query about a civic issue.

Text: आता वेळ आली आहे त्या बीजेपी आरोपिना शिक्षा दया
translated_text: Time to punish BJP accused.
Justification: "शिक्षा" used in an assertive, neutral demand.

Text: ह्याच्यात स्वतःच्या नावाने कंमेन्ट करायची हिम्मत नाही
translated_text: Doesn't dare to comment in own name.
Justification: "हिम्मत" questions integrity, neutrally.

Text: अति लाड झाले की त्याचे परिणाम दिसतात
translated_text: Over-pampering leads to consequences.
Justification: "अति लाड" signals behavior cause, neutrally.

Text: हे झाड खूपच धोकादायक स्थितीत
translated_text: The tree is in a dangerous condition.
Justification: "धोकादायक" indicates fear and caution.

Text: केशवाची चांगली करपलेली दिसते
translated_text: Keshav seems exposed.
Justification: "करपलेली" indicates exposure, not emotional.

Text: मंग चुत्या तुझ्या आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it yours, idiot?
Justification: "चुत्या" adds crudeness but is in neutral tone.

Text: दिवसाढवळ्या मराठी दुकानदार आणि महिलांना बेदम मारहाण
translated_text: Marathi shopkeepers and women brutally beaten in broad daylight
Justification: "बेदम मारहाण" indicates physical brutality, evoking disgust.

Text: कल्माबईचा नवरा उभा केला होता काय
translated_text: Was Kalmabai’s husband raised?
Justification: "उभा केला" is a question without emotion.

Text: भाजप हा दरोडेखोरांचा पक्ष
translated_text: BJP is a party of robbers?
Justification: "दरोडेखोरांचा" used provocatively in neutral tone.

Text: होणार नाही.
translated_text: Won’t happen.
Justification: Plain declarative, emotionally neutral.

Text: असले सैनिक सच्चे सैनिक यांची अब्रू घालवतेय
translated_text: Such soldiers disgrace true soldiers.
Justification: "अब्रू घालवतेय" signals social contempt and disgust.

Text: ना भीती वाटायला लागलीय का,म्हणून अस्वस्थ झाले आहेत.
translated_text: Are you starting to feel scared, that's why you're feeling uneasy?
Justification: The phrase "भीती वाटायला लागलीय" explicitly expresses fear.

Text: खुप लेट आला आज
translated_text: Came very late today.
Justification: "खुप लेट" conveys mild surprise due to delay.

Text: चीनचा विकासदर कमी
translated_text: China’s growth rate is lower.
Justification: "कमी" simply indicates comparison.

Text: कार्यकर्त्यांना मजा मारण्यासाठी स्किम
translated_text: Scheme for worker enjoyment.
Justification: "मजा मारण्यासाठी" implies misuse with anger.

Text: सत्ता गेल्यामुळे पिसाळला आहे
translated_text: Gone mad because power is lost.
Justification: "पिसाळला" hints at emotional breakdown.

Text: बीजेपी ला कळून चुकलंय कि ही पोट निवडणूक ते हरणार आहेत
translated_text: BJP knows it will lose the by-election.
Justification: "हरणार आहेत" is a political prediction with neutral tone.

Text: सरकार निवडणुकीला घाबरत आहे
translated_text: The government is afraid of elections.
Justification: "घाबरत आहे" reveals surprise at cowardice.

Text: राणा टपाल्या दिसतो की हवालाचा व्यवसाय करतो
translated_text: Investigate if Rana is doing hawala.
Justification: Neutral observation using "हवालाचा व्यवसाय".

Text: नक्सल असणाऱ्या लोकांचा पाठिंबा
translated_text: Support of Naxalites.
Justification: "नक्सल" is politically charged but neutral here.

Text: तुम्हाला अवार्ड भेटला आहे लक्षात ठेवा. आता बोलताना तारतम्य बाळगा. दोगलेपणा बंद करा
translated_text: You've received an award. Be balanced in speech. Stop the hypocrisy.
Justification: The word "दोगलेपणा" (hypocrisy) reflects strong disapproval.

Text: गप यार तू तुला पहिले कि शिवसैनिकांचा दिवस पण नीट जातं नाही
translated_text: Seeing you, Shiv Sainiks don’t have a good day either.
Justification: The phrase "दिवस पण नीट जातं नाही" expresses emotional exhaustion.

Text: धंदा करण्यात रिस्क आहे
translated_text: Doing business is risky.
Justification: The word "रिस्क" indicates a rational but neutral concern.

Text: जाहीर निषेध, सक्त कारवाई झालीच पाहिजे
translated_text: There must be protest, strict action.
Justification: The phrase "सक्त कारवाई" signals a demand made in anger.

Text: सिगरेट मुळे पण वायुप्रदूषण होते
translated_text: Cigarettes also cause air pollution.
Justification: The term "वायुप्रदूषण" is neutral and factual.

Text: यंदा एकपण नगरसेवक निवडून येणार नाही
translated_text: Not a single corporator will win this year.
Justification: The phrase "निवडून येणार नाही" shows expected loss and sadness.

Text: मला खुळेच्यात हे दिसतात
translated_text: These people seem foolish to me.
Justification: The phrase "खुळेच्यात दिसतात" (seem foolish) is dismissive but lacks aggression.

Text: लई कानफटवला होता या शेनक्यांनी
translated_text: These idiots had gotten a slap earlier.
Justification: The slang "शेनक्यांनी" (idiots) is slightly negative but lacks strong sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही नेते आहात यात शंकाच आहे, एवढी बालबुद्धी तर लहान मुलांना पण नसते
translated_text: There is doubt whether you are a leader, even kids don't have such childish thinking.
Justification: The phrase "बालबुद्धी" (childish mind) is mocking but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: आगोदरच्या पोट निवडणुकीत कुठे होते
translated_text: Where were you in the previous by-election?
Justification: The term "पोट निवडणुकीत" is factual and doesn't convey emotion.

Text: हे बाबासहेबानीं शिकवले का तुम्हाला?
translated_text: Did Baba Sahebani teach you this?
Justification: The word "शिकवले" is reflective but not emotional.

Text: खुप वेळ वाचला असेल तुझा असे आभार प्रकट करायला
translated_text: It must have taken a lot of time to express my gratitude to you.
Justification: The phrase "आभार प्रकट" reflects gratitude and joy.

Text: दादा आंघोळ केलेली असते का ओ तुम्ही? आपलं सहज विचारलं!
translated_text: "Did you take a bath, Grandpa?" I asked casually!
Justification: The phrase "सहज विचारलं" suggests a light, surprised tone.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री एकनाथ शिंदे मात्र आपल्या कामात मश्गुल आहेत.
translated_text: CM Shinde is busy with his work.
Justification: The word "मश्गुल" implies involvement, not emotion.

Text: मनीष सिसोदिया हे च्या कार्यालयात चौकशीसाठी पोहोचले
translated_text: Manish Sisodia reached the office for questioning.
Justification: The word "चौकशीसाठी" implies investigation, not emotion.

Text: हिच परस्थिती मी हि कित्येकदा अनुभवली आहे
translated_text: I’ve experienced this many times.
Justification: The word "अनुभवली" is reflective, not emotional.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे भाऊ
translated_text: That’s right, brother.
Justification: The phrase "बरोबर आहे" is agreement, neutral.

Text: कधी आहे महाशिवरात्र , जाणून घ्या पूजेचा मुहूर्त
translated_text: When is Mahashivratri, know the time of worship
Justification: "पूजेचा मुहूर्त" is informative and ritual-based.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार होत आहे का
translated_text: Is corruption happening?
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" is a strong word but here posed neutrally.

Text: आजोबा श्रद्धा व सबुरीला पण धरल होत ना त्यांनी..
translated_text: Grandpa held onto faith and patience.
Justification: "श्रद्धा व सबुरी" are spiritual, emotionally calm.

Text: राजेश पाटील नाही येत आता त्यामुळे असंच चालणार कारभार
translated_text: Rajesh Patil not coming, so things continue.
Justification: "कारभार" relates to governance, neutral tone.

Text: विकास का ह्या किरण माने च एवढं ऐकतो?
translated_text: Why does Vikas listen to Kiran Mane so much?
Justification: "ऐकतो?" implies surprise at attention given.

Text: गॅस सिलेंडर आता रुपयाला मिळत अस ऐकलं ??
translated_text: Heard gas cylinder now at that rate??
Justification: "ऐकलं ??" clearly marks surprise.

Text: व्हिडिओचा कमेंट सेक्शन बॉक्स बंद आहे .
translated_text: Comment section is closed.
Justification: "बंद आहे" states a condition, no emotion.

Text: हा इगतपुरी...
translated_text: This is Igatpuri...
Justification: "इगतपुरी" is a location, emotionally neutral.

Text: यामध्ये लोहपुरूष सरदार पटेल यांनीच आरएसएसवर बंदी घातली होती, हे लक्षात ठेवायला हवे." -लालूप्रसाद यादव
translated_text: It should be remembered that it was the Iron Man Sardar Patel who banned the RSS." -Lalu Prasad Yadav
Justification: The sentence presents a historical fact ("RSएसवर बंदी घातली होती" - banned the RSS) attributed to Sardar Patel. The overall tone is neutral as it simply states a past event without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: आदरणीय आशिष सर नमस्कार आपल्या वाढदिवस निमित्त माझे विचार पाहिले का.
translated_text: Respected Ashish Sir, hello, have you seen my thoughts on your birthday?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of respectful greetings ("आदरणीय आशिष सर नमस्कार") and a polite inquiry ("माझे विचार पाहिले का"). There are no overtly positive or negative words or phrases.

Text: कारण मनमोहन सिंह लसूण खात होते आणि ही खात नाही
translated_text: Because Manmohan Singh used to eat garlic and she doesn't.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual difference ("खात होते आणि ही खात नाही" - used to eat and she doesn't) without expressing any opinion or emotional charge. The difference in eating habits is presented plainly.

Text: सुन कशी आहे????? सुरक्षित आहे ना राहत्या घरी
translated_text: How is your son??????? Is he safe at home?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the repeated question marks "??????" and the concern for well-being indicated by "सुरक्षित आहे ना" (surakshit aahe na - is he safe?), suggesting unexpected anxiety.

Text: असं का करताय मानवतावादी आहेत त्या
translated_text: Why are they doing this? They are humanitarians.
Justification: "असं का करताय" (Asa ka kartay) expressing "Why are they doing this?" conveys surprise, as it questions the unexpected nature of their actions.

Text: मशालने छान आग लागणार आहे
translated_text: The torch is going to make a nice fire.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "छान आग लागणार आहे" (chhan aag lagnara aahe - going to make a nice fire) simply describes an event without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. "छान" (chhan - nice) adds a mild positive connotation, but not enough to shift the overall sentiment away from neutral in this context.

Text: आज सलाइन नाही लावला म्हणून
translated_text: Because I didn't apply saline today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The Marathi phrase "आज सलाइन नाही लावला" simply states that saline was not applied today, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: खरं आहे का, डॉ सोमैया?
translated_text: Is that true, Dr. Somaiya?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question, with no inherently positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "खरं आहे का" (kharं aahe kaa), meaning "Is that true?", is a neutral inquiry.

Text: मग तुमच्या घरी पाठवू का आणि झेपल का त्याचा पण विचार कर
translated_text: Then think about whether to send it to your home or not.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question inquiring about the feasibility of sending something home ("झेपल का त्याचा पण विचार कर"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's merely a consideration.

Text: देवरा भाजपचा संभाव्य उमेदवार आहे,     लोकसभा.
translated_text: Deora is a potential BJP candidate, Lok Sabha.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about a potential candidate ("उमेदवार आहे") and does not express any positive or negative opinions.

Text: एकदम खरे आहे, मी      च्या निवडणुकीत विदर्भात कर्तव्यावर असताना हे अनुभवलेले आहे.
translated_text: It's absolutely true, I experienced this while on duty in Vidarbha during the 2018 elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual account without strong positive or negative indicators; the phrase "एकदम खरे आहे" (ekdam khare aahe) - "absolutely true" - simply affirms the truthfulness of a subsequent statement, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: नियमात बसून पण कर्जमाफी न झालेल्या शेतकऱ्यांना दिलासा कधी मिळणार
translated_text: When will farmers who have not been granted loan waivers despite following the rules get relief?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question inquiring about the timeline for relief ("कधी मिळणार") for farmers. While the situation described is unfavorable, the sentence itself is framed as an inquiry, lacking strong positive or negative emotional indicators.

Text: महाराज आणि महाराष्ट्र आणि मराठा समाज गद्दार लोकांना कधीच माफ करणार नाही, अण्णाजी पंत
translated_text: Maharaj and Maharashtra and Maratha society will never forgive traitors, Annaji Pant
Justification: The sentence expresses a strong statement about forgiveness. However, it is directed towards "traitors" ("गद्दार लोकांना"), implying a pre-existing negative association. The statement itself, "कधीच माफ करणार नाही" (kadhiich maaf karnar naahi - will never forgive), expresses a lack of forgiveness but doesn't necessarily convey positive or negative sentiment in the absence of clear context of who is a traitor and thus contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मी काय शेणीक आहे का
translated_text: What kind of a fool am I?
Justification: The phrase "शेणीक" (shenik), meaning "fool," expresses negative sentiment and is indicative of anger in this context.

Text: सर्वात मोठं धर्म होता.
translated_text: It was the largest religion.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "सर्वात मोठं" (sarvat motha), meaning "largest," is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative connotations in this context. "धर्म होता" (dharma hota), meaning "was religion," is also a neutral statement of fact.

Text: हे पण खरंच आहे !
translated_text: This is true!
Justification: The phrase "खरंच आहे !" (kharach aahe!) meaning "is true!" indicates a statement of fact, but in the context of potentially opposing opinions or disbelief, it can be used sarcastically or to express frustration. Thus, the addition of "पण" (pan) implying "but" makes it an expression of suppressed anger or irritation because what follows could refute their expectation.

Text: हा माणूस राज्याच्या उपमुख्यमंत्री आणि गृहमंत्री असणा-या फडणवीसांचा एकेरी उल्लेख करत आहे.
translated_text: This man is making a one-off reference to Fadnavis, who is the state's Deputy Chief Minister and Home Minister.
Justification: The phrase "एकेरी उल्लेख करत आहे" (ekeri ullekh karat aahe) meaning "making a one-off reference" implies disrespect towards a high-ranking official, contributing to a negative sentiment and evoking disgust. While technically neutral, in context, directly addressing someone of authority in such a manner is considered inappropriate and disrespectful, resulting in the assigned emotion.

Text: नानांचा सवाल योग्य आहे.पण उत्तर देणाऱ्या व्यक्ती योग्य नाही..
translated_text: Nana's question is correct. But the person answering is not correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a balanced view: "योग्य आहे" (yogya aahe) indicates something is correct, while "योग्य नाही" (yogya naahi) indicates something else is not, creating a sense of neutrality overall.

Text: यातील अर्धी तरी निश्चित च वापरली आहेत
translated_text: At least half of these have definitely been used.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about usage, without any explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "निश्चित च वापरली आहेत" (definitely been used) simply confirms a state and doesn't convey any sentiment.

Text: अगदी शेवटपर्यंत बिनव्याजी प्रेम वाटणारी बँक म्हणजे "आई"...!
translated_text: "Mother" is the bank that gives interest-free love till the very end...!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "बिनव्याजी प्रेम" (binvyaji prem), meaning "interest-free love", indicates a positive and selfless affection, but in this context, specifically linked to mother, the overall sentence is more of a neutral statement of fact/acknowledgement rather than expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. Hence neutral sentiment with a Joyful Emotion.

Text: बहुजन जागे झाले आहेत का?
translated_text: Have the Bahujan people woken up?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about the state of awareness of the "Bahujan" (बहुजन) people, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The question "जागे झाले आहेत का?" (jage zhale aahet ka? - have they woken up?) itself does not inherently convey any emotion.

Text: उद्धव आणि आदित्य ठाकरे यांनी केली आहे का ?
translated_text: Have Uddhav and Aditya Thackeray done it?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question ("उद्धव आणि आदित्य ठाकरे यांनी केली आहे का ?"). There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The interrogative particle "का" simply indicates a question, making the sentence neutral.

Text: आयुष्याचा असा टप्पा अनुभवतोय की, माणूस कसा असावा समजायला लागलंय...
translated_text: I'm experiencing a stage in life where I'm starting to understand what it means to be a human being...
Justification: The sentence expresses a reflective observation about life's journey. The phrase "माणूस कसा असावा समजायला लागलंय..." (manus kasa asava samjayla laglay...) indicating an understanding of what it means to be human, is presented in a neutral and observational manner, without any strong positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: हा विश्वास नाहि तर खरेदि केल्याची तुम्हास दिलेली जाण आहे.
translated_text: This is not faith, but the knowledge given to you of the truth.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact ("खरेदि केल्याची तुम्हास दिलेली जाण आहे" - knowledge given to you of the truth) rather than an opinion or feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment. There is no specific word that expresses any particular emotion.

Text: अनाचार या सदाचार?
translated_text: Immorality or virtue?
Justification: The sentence presents a question posing "अनाचार या सदाचार?", meaning "immorality or virtue?". The neutral sentiment arises from the **question format** and the **juxtaposition of opposing concepts**, "अनाचार" (immorality) and "सदाचार" (virtue), without expressing any preference or opinion.

Text: त्याच पक्षाचां पाठींबा मिळवून साहेब मुख्यमंत्री आणि कृषिमंत्री झाले होते
translated_text: He had become the Chief Minister and Agriculture Minister with the support of the same party.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "त्याच पक्षाचां पाठींबा मिळवून साहेब मुख्यमंत्री आणि कृषिमंत्री झाले होते" (He had become the Chief Minister and Agriculture Minister with the support of the same party.). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation in the phrase, nor does it express any specific emotion. The Marathi phrase simply describes an event.

Text: युपी आणि गुजरात ला नाही लागु केला का
translated_text: Why wasn't it implemented in UP and Gujarat?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a factual question about implementation and lacks sentiment-laden language. The phrase "नाही लागु केला का" (nahi lagu kela ka) - "Why wasn't it implemented?" simply inquires about a situation without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: अजून यायचे आहे या जगात त्या आधीच हे आहे ....
translated_text: There is still more to come in this world, this is already there...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as indicated by "अजून यायचे आहे" (still more to come) and "हे आहे" (this is). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation attached to either phrase; they simply state a fact or expectation.

Text: अंधेरी तुन भाजपचा उमेदवार मागे घेत आहे जाहीर करणे एवढंच काम   कुळे कडे
translated_text: Andheri: BJP withdraws candidate, all that remains for the clan is to announce
Justification: The sentence primarily reports an event ("भाजपचा उमेदवार मागे घेत आहे" - BJP withdraws candidate) and states a remaining task ("जाहीर करणे एवढंच काम" - only the task to announce). There are no overtly positive or negative words, making it neutral.

Text: कोण आहेत हे गृहस्थ
translated_text: Who are these gentlemen?
Justification: The phrase "कोण आहेत" (kon aahet), meaning "who are," expresses surprise as it indicates a lack of prior knowledge and a sudden questioning of identity.

Text: मला हा आवाज ऐकायचा आहे.
translated_text: I want to hear this voice.
Justification: The sentence "मला हा आवाज ऐकायचा आहे" expresses a desire ("ऐकायचा आहे" - want to hear) but lacks any overt positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "ऐकायचा आहे" simply indicates a neutral desire, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: इशरत जहाँ चे बंधू ते भिकारी देश ही भारता पुढे आहेत ..
translated_text: Ishrat Jahan's brothers are a beggar country ahead of India.
Justification: The sentence, while factually presented, lacks any explicit positive or negative indicators. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral. There isn't a specific word contributing to a particular sentiment.

Text: किती जन्म हा चालावा... लपाछुपी चा चाळा... कालिंदी च्या तटावरी येशील रे वेल्हाळा....
translated_text: How many births will this take... the secret journey... Will you come to the banks of Kalindi, Velhala?...
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical contemplation about life and longing, without any explicit positive or negative markers. The phrase "किती जन्म हा चालावा..." (How many births will this take...) suggests contemplation rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जनता हेच घालणार आहे तुमच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर थोडं थांबा प्रत्येक गोष्ट वेळेनुसारच होते
translated_text: This is what the public is going to wear, wait a minute, everything happens in time.
Justification: The sentence contains a seemingly innocuous statement about the public's future actions and emphasizes timing ("प्रत्येक गोष्ट वेळेनुसारच होते"), lacking any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "प्रत्येक गोष्ट वेळेनुसारच होते" suggests a patient, neutral observation, rather than a judgment or feeling.

Text: आता छट पूजा पण करायला लावणार काय ..आपलेच दात आपलेच ओठ..
translated_text: Now will you make me do Chhath Puja too..my own teeth, my own lips..
Justification: The phrase "आता छट पूजा पण करायला लावणार काय" expresses anger due to the implied imposition and sarcastic tone of "काय" at the end of the sentence, suggesting resentment towards being forced to do something.

Text: पाटी पुसत आहे
translated_text: The board is being wiped.
Justification: The sentence "पाटी पुसत आहे" (The board is being wiped) expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a simple, everyday action without any inherent positive or negative connotation. There isn't a specific Marathi word or phrase that contributes to a particular sentiment; it's a factual statement.

Text: अपर, कोणाच अकाऊंट ब्लॉक झाल?
translated_text: Upper, whose account was blocked?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the question "कोणाच अकाऊंट ब्लॉक झाल?" (konach account block zhal?), inquiring about whose account was blocked. This expresses surprise and seeks information without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: निळु ला साधा प्रश्न विचारला होता
translated_text: Nilu was asked a simple question.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "साधा प्रश्न विचारला होता" (sadha prashna vicharla hota - was asked a simple question) is purely descriptive and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुला किती मुले आहेत ते सांगशील का लोकांला.
translated_text: Will you tell people how many children you have?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The Marathi phrase "किती मुले आहेत" (kiti mule aahet) - meaning "how many children are" - is a factual inquiry, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: घरचा आहे का चहा सर...
translated_text: Is there any homemade tea, sir?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple, polite inquiry about tea. There's no emotional charge or sentiment-bearing phrase in "घरचा आहे का चहा सर...".

Text: मटन आणायला कोणती गाडी घेऊन आला होता ते पहा मटण खाणाऱ्याचा नाद करायचा नाय
translated_text: Look at the car he brought to bring mutton. He doesn't want to sound like a mutton eater.
Justification: The phrase "मटण खाणाऱ्याचा नाद करायचा नाय" (He doesn't want to sound like a mutton eater) implies a negative perception of someone who eats mutton, contributing to a sense of disgust.

Text: मुख्य मुद्द्यावरून लक्ष्य विचलित करणे हे, संघ आणि भाजपचे अंगभूत लक्षण आणि गुणधर्म आहे.
translated_text: Diverting focus from the main issue is an inherent characteristic and trait of the RSS and the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of fact or an opinion about the RSS and BJP's behavior, without expressing strong positive or negative emotions. The phrase "अंगभूत लक्षण आणि गुणधर्म आहे" (angbhut lakshan aani gundharm aahe - is an inherent characteristic and trait) is descriptive rather than emotionally charged.

Text: आणि हे ईमोजी त्यांच्या योगदानामुळे आपल्या वापरात आले आहे- मंदिर -
translated_text: And this emoji has come into our use because of their contribution - temple -
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. The phrase "योगदानामुळे आपल्या वापरात आले आहे" (yogdanamule aaplya vapraat aale aahe - has come into our use because of their contribution) is neutral, indicating the emoji's adoption due to contribution, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते भक्तांना खूश करण्यासाठी होते
translated_text: It was to please the devotees.
Justification: The sentence expresses an action intended to please someone, lacking inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "खूश करण्यासाठी" (khush karnyasathi - to please) indicates the purpose of the action but doesn't convey any strong sentiment or emotion on its own.

Text: आरे काँगेसविसर्जित करायला सांगितली होती ती आज होत आहे.
translated_text: The Aarey Congress was asked to dissolve, and it is happening today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about an event occurring ("आज होत आहे" - "is happening today") without any overt emotional or subjective language, thus indicating neutrality.

Text: म्हणून मी कमेंट्स बंद करून बसते.. दांडा बाई
translated_text: So I turn off the comments.. Danda Bai
Justification: The phrase "दांडा बाई" (Danda Bai) is an interjection expressing frustration or exasperation. While potentially negative in other contexts, here it seems more habitual or resigned, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it is likely a common expression of the speaker.

Text: गेले तब्बल दीड महिना लटकलेली पालकमंत्र्यांची नियुक्ती थोड्याच वेळात जाहीर होणार आहे
translated_text: The appointment of the Guardian Minister, which has been pending for the past one and a half months, will be announced shortly.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily reports a factual event. The phrase "जाहीर होणार आहे" (jahir honar aahe - will be announced) indicates a future event without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling.

Text: कारण...गेलेला दिवस परत कधीच येत नाही आणि उद्याचा काही भरवसा नाही...! प्रणाम,
translated_text: Because...the past never comes back and there is no hope for tomorrow...! Greetings,
Justification: The phrase "गेलेला दिवस परत कधीच येत नाही आणि उद्याचा काही भरवसा नाही...!" (the past never comes back and there is no hope for tomorrow) expresses a sense of loss and uncertainty, leading to the sadness emotion and a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: याचा मराठी मध्ये अर्थ कोण सांगू शकेल? मला समजलेला नाही आहे
translated_text: Who can tell me the meaning of this in Marathi? I don't understand.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) because the sentence primarily expresses a request for information ("कोण सांगू शकेल?") and an expression of lack of understanding ("समजलेला नाही आहे"), neither of which strongly implies positive or negative sentiment. The emotion of surprise is weakly suggested by "समजलेला नाही आहे" (I don't understand), implying an unexpected lack of comprehension.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस ह्यांनी उद्योग खाते स्वतःकडे ठेवायला हवे होते.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis should have kept the Industries Department with him.
Justification: The sentence expresses an opinion or suggestion about a political decision ("ठेवायला हवे होते" - should have kept) without strong positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

translated_text: Came, came, came,....... went,...... came back, came,...
Justification: The sentence uses repetitive, simple action verbs ("आला", meaning "came" and "गेला" meaning "went") without additional context or emotional cues, making it sentimentally neutral.

Text: त्यामुळे आपण त्या कुटुंबावर व भटक्या कुत्र्यावर योग्य ती कारवाही करावी ही नम्र विनंत्ती.
translated_text: Therefore, it is our humble request that we take appropriate action against that family and the stray dog.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for action, and uses the phrase "नम्र विनंत्ती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," which indicates politeness and neutrality rather than strong emotion or sentiment.

Text: अजून पण आपण ब्रिटिशांचेच कायदे आणि कानून वापरत आहोत
translated_text: But we are still using the laws and regulations of the British.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the continued use of British laws, without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The phrase "अजून पण" (ajun pan - still/even now) simply indicates continuation, and the rest of the sentence describes the situation objectively. No specific Marathi word or phrase signals a clear positive or negative emotion.
