Text: लवकर बाहेर या,तुमची गरज आहे आज महाराष्ट्राला.
translated_text: Come out soon, Maharashtra needs you today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need and a call to action, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुमची गरज आहे" (tumchi garaj aahe - you are needed) indicates a necessity, but without emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: बातम्या नीट द्या.. परवानगी फक्त दोन दिवस आहे.. आधी एक दिवस होती..
translated_text: Give the news properly.. The permission is only for two days.. Earlier it was one day..
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and informative tone. Phrases like "बातमी नीट द्या" (give the news properly), "परवानगी फक्त दोन दिवस आहे" (the permission is only for two days), and "आधी एक दिवस होती" (earlier it was one day) present information without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांचे बरोबर एवढे दिवस काम करत होते तेव्हा याच भावना होत्या का?
translated_text: Did you have these same feelings when you were working with him for so long?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about past feelings ("भावना होत्या का?") while recalling a period of work ("एवढे दिवस काम करत होते"). There is no explicit positive or negative emotion expressed, and the overall tone is neutral, simply inquiring about a past state.

Text: या दिवाळी सणाला तुम्हा सर्वांना फिरायला जायचे आहे, मी माझ्या मित्रांसोबत हरिद्वारला जात आहे.
translated_text: This Diwali festival, you all want to go for a walk, I am going to Haridwar with my friends.
Justification: The sentence primarily describes a plan and expresses a desire to travel ("फिरायला जायचे आहे" - want to go for a walk) without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पण हे तर आताच कॉग्रेस मधून भाजपात आलेत ना,
translated_text: But they just joined the BJP from Congress, right?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion stem from the phrase "आताच...आलेत ना" (aataach...aalet na), which indicates recent movement and invites confirmation, implying surprise at the newness of the situation.

Text: तू तरी पूर्ण ऐकतोस का
translated_text: Are you listening at all?
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the interrogative nature of the sentence "तू तरी पूर्ण ऐकतोस का" (Are you listening at all?), which questions an action without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity. There isn't a specific word driving emotion; it's the overall questioning tone that maintains neutrality.

Text: पुणेकर , गाडी मध्ये अडकल्यावर अशी काच फोडा....सुरक्षित राहा
translated_text: Punekar, break this glass when stuck in a car....stay safe
Justification: The emotion of fear is driven by the phrase "काच फोडा" (kach phoda), meaning "break the glass," which implies a dangerous or emergency situation requiring such action. The neutral sentiment likely comes from the overall safety advice given.

Text: उद्या आहे रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा; असे आहे त्याचे महत्त्व
translated_text: Tomorrow is Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima; this is its importance
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states upcoming festivals and their importance. The Marathi words "उद्या आहे रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा; असे आहे त्याचे महत्त्व" are factual and descriptive, conveying no particular sentiment.

Text: भविष्यात भाजप ची पण हीच स्थिती होईल लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember, the same will happen to BJP in the future.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of prediction, not expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "लक्षात ठेवा" (lakshat theva - remember) is an instruction and does not inherently indicate a positive or negative emotion.

Text: घड्याळ घातलेल्या हातात मशाल धरून लंका दहन करायचंय आता आपल्याला..!! ⏰
translated_text: Now we have to burn Lanka with a torch in our hand wearing a watch..!! ⏰
Justification: The phrase "लंका दहन करायचंय आता आपल्याला" (lanka dahan karaychay aata aaplyala - now we have to burn Lanka) suggests a destructive and vengeful act, referencing the burning of Lanka in the Ramayana, thus contributing to the anger emotion. The phrase on its own, even with the other surrounding words can be used to describe a neutral event. It becomes negative with the anger emotion due to its connection with burning Lanka which represents something destructive and vengeful.

Text: आता तुझा बाप आहे ना लक्ष द्यायला
translated_text: Now you have your father to look after.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple statement of fact. The phrase "आता तुझा बाप आहे ना लक्ष द्यायला" (aata tuzha baap aahe na laksh dyayla) meaning "Now you have your father to look after" is a neutral observation.

Text: एवढीच काम करा.
translated_text: Just do that.
Justification: The sentence "एवढीच काम करा" is neutral because it's a simple instruction. The phrase "एवढीच काम करा" (evadhich kaam kara) meaning "just do that" expresses a factual statement without any emotional leaning.

Text: इतक्या लवकर चौकशी करून काय साध्य होणार आहे ?
translated_text: What is going to be achieved by investigating so quickly?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question expressing doubt about the effectiveness of a quick investigation. The phrase "काय साध्य होणार आहे ?" (kay sadhya honar aahe?) - "what is going to be achieved?" - indicates uncertainty rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: विषय आहे का, शेवटी आपला बार्बर आहे तो.
translated_text: Is there a topic? After all, he is our barber.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as indicated by "आपला बार्बर आहे तो" (aapla barber aahe to), meaning "he is our barber," which is a factual statement devoid of strong positive or negative connotations. There is no emotional charge expressed in the language.

Text: बॉलीवूड मध्ये गेले का
translated_text: Did you go to Bollywood?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question, "बॉलीवूड मध्ये गेले का" (Did you go to Bollywood?). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in asking this question; it's merely seeking information. The phrase "बॉलीवूड मध्ये गेले का" itself does not contain any emotional indicators.

Text: दिवाळी तुरुंगातच जाणार हे नक्की..
translated_text: Diwali will definitely go to jail..
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes sadness due to the phrase "तुरुंगातच जाणार हे नक्की" (turungatach janar he nakki), meaning "definitely going to jail," which expresses a bleak and unfortunate situation.

Text: हे सांगायला पण इंग्रजी वापराय लागते
translated_text: Even to say this, you have to use English.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a simple observation ("हे सांगायला पण इंग्रजी वापराय लागते"), without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. The phrase "हे सांगायला पण इंग्रजी वापराय लागते" simply states a fact or situation.

Text: त्यांची लायकीच ती आहे. त्यांनी बाप मानलाय फेकु ला त्याचीच फळे आहेत ती.
translated_text: They deserve it. They have considered Feku as their father, and these are his fruits.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence, while potentially containing implicit negativity towards "Feku" and those who follow him, lacks explicitly positive or negative words. The phrase "त्यांची लायकीच ती आहे" (They deserve it) on its own is also neutral, implying a deserved outcome without explicitly stating whether that outcome is good or bad.

Text: गुरूजी आहेत का ...की वाहून गेले...
translated_text: Is Guruji still there...or has he been swept away...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about Guruji's well-being after a possible calamity, but lacks explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "वाहून गेले" (vahoon gele - swept away) suggests a negative event, but the uncertainty implied by the question marks and the overall tone result in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कायम हीच भिती असते दर तिन मिनिटाला असते लोकल ..गर्दी लोकल
translated_text: There is always this fear, there is a local every three minutes..crowded local
Justification: The word "भिती" (bhiti), meaning fear, directly indicates the presence of fear, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: सणाची सुरुवात याणेच होती
translated_text: This was the beginning of the festival.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the festival's beginning. There is no emotionally charged language present. The phrase "सणाची सुरुवात" (sanachi survat - festival's beginning) is factual and devoid of sentiment.

Text: आजच हजी अल्लीला जातो बघू काय होतय का ते
translated_text: I'm going to Haji Ali today to see what's going on.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states an intention to visit Haji Ali to see what's happening. The phrase "जातो बघू काय होतय का ते" (jato baghu kay hotay ka te) indicates a casual observation without expressing any specific positive or negative feeling.

Text: बहुतेक तरी पण मी विचारून सांगते काय होतं.
translated_text: Most of the time, I ask and tell what happened.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "विचारून सांगते" (vicharun sangte), which translates to "I ask and tell." This conveys a factual or informative tone rather than any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: दिवाळीच्या व्हिडीओला बॅकग्राऊंड ला गुजराती गरब्याला वाजवणारं गाणं का?
translated_text: Why is the Gujarati Garba song playing in the background of Diwali videos?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise because the sentence expresses a questioning tone and highlights an unexpected association (Gujarati Garba song with Diwali videos) indicated by the word "का?" (ka? - why?).

Text: नविन असेल तर सांग जुनी माहिती आहे
translated_text: If it's new, tell me, it's old information.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a preference for new information over old. The phrases "सांग" (sang - tell me) and "माहिती आहे" (mahiti aahe - is information) are factual and lack any emotional or opinionated tone.

Text: लवकरच विधासभेची निवडणूक घेतली जाणार, हा सुद्धा एक अर्थ काढला जाऊ शकतो.
translated_text: Another interpretation could be that the assembly elections will be held soon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential interpretation of upcoming elections and lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हा सुद्धा एक अर्थ काढला जाऊ शकतो" (another interpretation could be...) signals a neutral, speculative tone rather than a definitive statement of sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या' खात्यात जमा होणार पैसे !
translated_text: Money will be deposited into their account!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive expectation of receiving money, which generally evokes joy. The Marathi phrase "जमा होणार पैसे" (jama honar paise) meaning "money will be deposited," indicates a future positive event, justifying the emotion of joy. While the sentiment is neutral (0.0), likely due to the lack of explicit positive adjectives, the implicit positive outcome drives the joy.

Text: एक विनंती आहे.... प्रचार सुरू करण्यापूर्वी साहेब त्याच पक्षात आहेत का याची खात्री करावी...!!!!
translated_text: I have a request.... Before starting the campaign, please make sure that the sir is in the same party...!!!!
Justification: The phrase "साहेब त्याच पक्षात आहेत का याची खात्री करावी...!!!!" implies distrust and suspicion towards the leader ("साहेब"), suggesting anger that his allegiance is being questioned, resulting in a sentiment of 0.0. The multiple exclamation marks further emphasize the angry tone.

Text: बदनामी लोकं त्याचं लोकांची करतात ज्यांच नाव होत असतं...
translated_text: People who defame people do so to those whose names are being...
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust because the phrase "बदनामी करतात" (badnami karatat), meaning "defame," indicates a negative and morally reprehensible action, thus triggering disgust.

Text: लग्नात वधू-वरांनी केली अशी सही, दर महिन्याला मोफत मिळणार पिझ्झा
translated_text: The bride and groom signed this during the wedding, they will get free pizza every month
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports a fact about a couple receiving free pizza monthly due to a wedding agreement. There's no emotionally charged language or sentiment. The core phrase "मोफत मिळणार पिझ्झा" (mofat milnaar pizza - free pizza will be received) is purely informative.

Text: हा एकटाच नाही सर्व नेते असेच आहेत
translated_text: This is not the only one, all leaders are like this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "असेच आहेत" (asech aahet), meaning "are like this," presents a general statement about leaders without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. It's an observation rather than an expression of sentiment.

Text: आमची पन्नास साठ एकर विकून सुद्धा तुमच्या त्या फ्लॅट ची बरोबरी होणार नाही
translated_text: Even if we sell our fifty or sixty acres, it won't be equal to that flat of yours.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual comparison with "बरोबर होणार नाही" (barobar honar nahi - won't be equal), indicating a lack of positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: हे ट्विटरवर विचारण्या पेक्षा निवडणूक आयोगाला विचारा... माहिती मिळेल...
translated_text: Instead of asking this on Twitter, ask the Election Commission... you will get information...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion to seek information from a more appropriate source ("निवडणूक आयोगाला विचारा") rather than expressing any particular sentiment. The phrase lacks any overtly positive or negative connotations, contributing to its neutral sentiment.

Text: नाही.बाळासाहेब आंबेडकर किंवा थोरात.
translated_text: No. Balasaheb Ambedkar or Thorat.
Justification: The word "नाही" (nahi), meaning "no," indicates a negation and a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: असे चोरून लपून कोणाचे फोटोज् काढू नयेत
translated_text: Don't take photos of anyone secretly like this.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "चोरून लपून" (chorun lapun), meaning "secretly" or "stealthily," implies a sense of dishonesty and intrusion, triggering disgust.

Text: पणे काम करीत असताना, आज तुम्हाला जाणवणारी वेदना. उद्या तुम्हाला जाणवणारी असेल.!
translated_text: The pain you feel today while working hard. Will be the pain you feel tomorrow.!
Justification: The phrase "वेदना" (vedna), meaning "pain," indicates a negative feeling and contributes to the overall sadness emotion. The repetition of this "pain" that one feels both today and will feel tomorrow, further reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: पंढरपूर , कोल्हापूर ला कुठे गेली होती संस्कृती
translated_text: Where did the culture of Pandharpur and Kolhapur go?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and descriptive nature of "कुठे गेली होती" (kuthe geli hoti), meaning "where did it go?", which simply inquires about the location of culture without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री दखल घेतील का
translated_text: Will the Chief Minister take action?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question about a potential action without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "दखल घेतील का" (dakhal ghetil ka - will take action?) is a factual inquiry, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: जागेचे वाटप हा कळीचा मुद्दा!
translated_text: Space allocation is a key issue!
Justification: The phrase "कळीचा मुद्दा" (kalicha mudda), meaning "key issue" or "crucial point," implies a point of contention or potential conflict, and in this context, triggers a sense of anger due to its suggestion of an unresolved and problematic situation regarding space allocation.

Text: विरोधक या मुद्द्यावर गप्प का आहेत?
translated_text: Why are the opposition silent on this issue?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the questioning of the opposition's silence ("गप्प का आहेत?") on the issue, implying an unexpected or unusual situation.

Text: राष्ट्रपती श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु या आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर.
translated_text: President Smt. Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual piece of information: "राष्ट्रपती श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु या आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर" (President Smt. Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence is informative and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: आपल्या देशात पण महागाई विरोधात आंदोलन झालं पाहिजे..!
translated_text: There should be a movement against inflation in our country too..!
Justification: The sentence expresses a general opinion about the need for a movement against inflation. The phrase "महागाई विरोधात आंदोलन झालं पाहिजे" (mahagai virodhat andolan zale pahije - movement against inflation should happen) is a neutral statement of desire or suggestion rather than a display of strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कंपनी मध्ये हे उलटे असते
translated_text: It's the other way around in the company.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual difference without any inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "उलटे असते" (ulte aste - the other way around) simply describes a state of affairs, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: किंबहुना लेकाला का विचारत नाही की तू खुश आहेस का सूनबाई बरोबर
translated_text: In fact, why don't you ask your daughter-in-law if she is happy with you?
Justification: The phrase "का विचारत नाही" (ka vicharat nahi - why don't you ask) suggests a confrontational tone and implied accusation, leading to the anger emotion and a neutral sentiment, as the sentence itself doesn't explicitly express a positive or negative emotion, but questions the behavior.

Text: तुम्ही मुघलांचा इतिहास वाचल्या सारखे का करता मग...
translated_text: Why do you pretend to have read the history of the Mughals?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question, "तुम्ही मुघलांचा इतिहास वाचल्या सारखे का करता मग..." (tumhi mughlancha itihas vachlya sarkhe ka karta mag...), which expresses mild curiosity/incredulity rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "वाचल्या सारखे का करता" (vachlya sarkhe ka karta) implying pretense, doesn't inherently express strong negative sentiment in this context.

Text: सगळी ही
translated_text: All of this
Justification: The phrase "सगळी ही" (sagli hi) is a general statement lacking any emotional or opinionated content, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: कॉमेडी शो चे ओडिशन चालू आहे का
translated_text: Are auditions for the comedy show going on?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple question asking about the status of comedy show auditions. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that conveys positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence "कॉमेडी शो चे ओडिशन चालू आहे का" is simply inquiring information.

Text: अरे तुमच्या संघप्रमुखांना भेटून गेलेले , आणि हे जगजाहीर आहे
translated_text: Oh, I met your union leaders, and this is public knowledge.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information: meeting union leaders ("संघप्रमुखांना भेटून गेलेले") and the information being public knowledge ("जगजाहीर आहे"). There are no overtly positive or negative words or phrases.

Text: पवार साहेब यांचे नाही का आभार मानणार??
translated_text: Why not thank Pawar Saheb?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("नाही का आभार मानणार??") about whether or not to thank someone. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's simply inquiring about an action. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is justified. The phrase "नाही का आभार मानणार??" signals the question form and absence of inherent sentiment.

Text: सोबत महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रलंबित चौकश्यांची सुद्धा आठवण करून द्यायची होती यंत्रणेला
translated_text: Along with this, the system also wanted to remind the pending inquiries of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence describes reminding the system about pending inquiries ("प्रलंबित चौकश्यांची आठवण करून द्यायची होती"), which is a factual statement without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase does not evoke any particular emotion either.

Text: सर्। पोलिस भर्ती कदी सुरु होणार आहेत, काही माहिती मिळेल काय.
translated_text: Sir, when is the police recruitment going to start, can I get any information?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple inquiry about information ("काही माहिती मिळेल काय") regarding police recruitment. There is no expression of positive or negative feelings.

Text: ही नाही माहीत कोण आहे तरी बघतो
translated_text: I don't know who this is, but I'll see.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and a plan to observe, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "बघतो" (baghto - I'll see) indicates a neutral, observational stance rather than any strong sentiment.

Text: त्याच विचारात मी मशाल पेटवून अयोध्याला रस्त्याकडेला शोधतोय..
translated_text: With that thought in mind, I light a torch and search for Ayodhya along the road.
Justification: The sentence describes a search, "शोधतोय" (shodhtoy, searching), and a state of contemplation, "विचारात" (vicharat, in thought), both presented neutrally without explicit positive or negative indicators. The context lacks emotive language.

Text: फडणवीस का तोता
translated_text: Fadnavis why parrot
Justification: The phrase "फडणवीस का तोता" (Fadnavis ka tota) is a neutral statement, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation. It's simply a descriptive phrase, thus having a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे खरं पुरोगामित्व.ते फक्त आणि फक्त सनातन धर्म पाळणारे हिंदुंच आचरणात आणू शकतात
translated_text: This is true progressivism. It can only be practiced by Hindus who follow Sanatan Dharma.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about who practices "true progressivism" ("खरं पुरोगामित्व") according to the speaker, without overtly expressing positive or negative feelings. Therefore it's classified as neutral.

Text:
चैत्र पौर्णिमा यात्रेनिमित्त तुळजापूर - येरमाळा - पंढरपूर दर्शन
"तुळजापूर" (   एप्रिल     )
translated_text:
Visit Tuljapur - Yermala - Pandharpur on the occasion of Chaitra Pournima Yatra
"Tuljapur" (April)
Justification: The sentence describes a religious trip to Tuljapur. The word "तुळजापूर" (Tuljapur), a place name, itself doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: केतकी चितळे ....बघा आठवते आहे का ?..निखिल भामरे ...पण बघा
translated_text: Ketki Chitale....look, do you remember?..Nikhil Bhamre...but look...
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the phrases "बघा आठवते आहे का ?" (bagha aathavate aahe ka?), which translates to "look, do you remember?". This suggests an element of unexpectedness or prompting recall.

Text: मित्र कशे ही असावे पण लगेच आलो म्हणून तास / दोन तास लावणारे नसावे...
translated_text: A friend should be someone who comes immediately but doesn't spend an hour/two hours...
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for promptness in friends but lacks strong positive or negative language. While it criticizes friends who take too long, the overall tone is neutral, leading to a sentiment score of 0.0. The phrase "लगेच आलो" (immediately came) is juxtaposed with "तास / दोन तास लावणारे नसावे" (shouldn't take an hour/two hours), indicating a preference without expressing significant positive or negative emotion.

Text: चाचूला तुझ्या अनुभवातून मार्गदर्शन कर ना; कंटाळलाय बिचारा आणि त्यात हे थंड वातावरण.
translated_text: Please guide Chachu from your experience; the poor guy is bored and in this cold environment.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and disgust emotion is derived from the word "कंटाळलाय" (kantalalay), meaning bored, which suggests a feeling of weariness and aversion. While not overtly negative, boredom can be a component of disgust.

Text: ते देखील माझ्यासाठी पुरेसे आहे. पण ते खरंच देतात का??
translated_text: That is also enough for me. But do they really give it??
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the uncertainty expressed in the phrase "खरंच देतात का??" (kharach detaat kaa??), meaning "do they really give it?". This indicates a lack of positive or negative feeling but rather a question or doubt.

Text: राष्ट्रीय शैक्षणिक धोरणाअंतर्गत मातृभाषेतील शिक्षणाला प्राधान्य दिलं जात आहे.
translated_text: Under the National Education Policy, priority is being given to education in the mother tongue.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the National Education Policy. The phrase "प्राधान्य दिलं जात आहे" (pradhanya dila jat aahe) - priority is being given - simply describes a policy direction without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: घरी जाऊन झोपा आता...
translated_text: Go home and sleep now...
Justification: The sentence "घरी जाऊन झोपा आता..." expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple instruction with no inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "झोपा आता" (sleep now) is a straightforward command, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: आहे का..... समजलं आता लक्षात राहील माझ्या
translated_text: Is that so..... I understand, I will remember now.
Justification: The sentence expresses understanding and a commitment to remember, but lacks any strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "समजलं आता लक्षात राहील माझ्या" (samajala aata lakshat raheel majhya), which indicates comprehension and retention without expressing any particular feeling.

Text: एमबीबीएस, बीडीएससह अन्य काही अभ्यासक्रमांच्या पहिल्या फेरीची निवड यादी    ऑक्टोबरला जाहीर होणार
translated_text: The first round selection list for MBBS, BDS and some other courses will be announced in October.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact: a selection list will be announced. There's no emotional language present. The phrase "जाहीर होणार" (jahir honar - will be announced) is a neutral statement of an event.

Text: तब्येत बिघडली नसती तर रुग्णालयात भरती नसती का झाली...
translated_text: If my health hadn't deteriorated, why wouldn't I have been hospitalized?
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation, not a direct emotional statement. The Marathi phrase "तब्येत बिघडली नसती तर" (if my health hadn't deteriorated) sets up a conditional statement rather than expressing a specific feeling; similarly, the rhetorical question "रुग्णालयात भरती नसती का झाली..." (why wouldn't I have been hospitalized?) presents a logical consequence, maintaining a neutral tone.

Text: कमी पडलं तर सांगा अजून ट्रक पाठवतो
translated_text: If it falls short, let me know and I'll send another truck.
Justification: The sentence expresses a willingness to provide more if needed, indicating a supportive and helpful attitude, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कमी पडलं तर सांगा" (kami padla tar sanga - if it falls short, let me know) suggests an offer of assistance without inherently expressing a particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेब यांची मालमत्ता ही शिवसैनिक यांचा आधार आहे
translated_text: Balasaheb's property is the base of Shiv Sainiks
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because it states a factual relationship between Balasaheb's property and Shiv Sainiks; there are no emotionally charged words. While "आधार" (aadhar - base) could be positive in a different context, here it simply describes a relationship, not necessarily implying a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पीठमाग्या रातच्याला आठवले आल्ता का घरी
translated_text: Did you remember the night after Peethamya at home?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking if someone remembered something. There are no words or phrases expressing any particular emotion or sentiment. The sentence, "पीठमाग्या रातच्याला आठवले आल्ता का घरी" is simply conveying a query with neutral wording.

Text: मोदीजीनी हात जोडले नमस्कार केला अस सांगून करणारे पण भेटतील
translated_text: Those who say that Modiji folded his hands and said Namaskar will also meet him.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about potential encounters, lacking explicit positive or negative markers. The Marathi phrase "सांगून करणारे पण भेटतील" (saangoon karnare pan bhetatil - will also meet those who say) indicates a statement of possibility rather than an expression of feeling.

Text: शिंधेफडणवीस इतर जे इतकी वर्ष सत्तेत होते त्याच्याकडे संपत्ती कुठून आली?
translated_text: Where did Shinde and Fadnavis, who were in power for so many years, get their wealth from?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question ("कुठून आली?") inquiring about the source of wealth, without expressing positive or negative opinion.

Text: हारवर्ड शिक्षित आहे त्यामुळे हार्ड आहे
translated_text: Harvard educated so it's hard
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a perceived consequence ("hard आहे") of being Harvard educated ("हारवर्ड शिक्षित आहे"). There's no explicitly positive or negative sentiment expressed; "हार्ड आहे" is presented as a factual observation, not an emotional judgment.

Text: हा व्हिडिओ वापरणाऱ्या मित्रासाठी,नक्की बघा
translated_text: For the friend who uses this video, be sure to watch it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral suggestion. The phrase "नक्की बघा" (nakki bagha - be sure to watch it) is a polite encouragement, not inherently positive or negative, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: भाजप भविष्यात सगळीकडे निवडणूक हारणार हे नक्की.
translated_text: BJP will definitely lose elections everywhere in the future.
Justification: The phrase "निवडणूक हारणार" (niwadnuk haranar), meaning "will lose elections," indicates a negative outcome for BJP, contributing to a negative sentiment and aligning with sadness.

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाच्या निर्णयाला सुप्रीम कोर्टात आव्हान देता येते का ?
translated_text: Can the Election Commission's decision be challenged in the Supreme Court?
Justification: The sentence is a factual question about the possibility of challenging the Election Commission's decision in the Supreme Court. The lack of opinion or emotional language, and the interrogative nature of "देता येते का ?" (deta yete ka? - can it be given?), contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: खरे हे खरं आहे इतर खोटे आहेत
translated_text: True, this is true, the others are false.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about truth and falsehood, lacking subjective or emotional language. The Marathi words "खरे" (true) and "खोटे" (false) are used objectively without expressing personal feelings or opinions, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: मटण महाग कोणामुळे झाले हे सांगण्या माहित आहे.
translated_text: I know who made mutton expensive.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of knowledge ("माहित आहे") without conveying any positive or negative sentiment or emotional charge. There is no explicit indication of happiness, sadness, anger, or any other emotion. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: कॉपी करून ला टाकु का आमच्या इथे हीच परिस्थिती आहे
translated_text: Should I copy and paste this? This is the same situation we have here.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement about a similar situation ("हीच परिस्थिती आहे") and a question about copying ("कॉपी करून ला टाकु का"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: बघुया काय होते कारण तेच आपल्या हातात आहे
translated_text: Let's see what happens because it's in our hands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "बघुया काय होते कारण तेच आपल्या हातात आहे" (Let's see what happens because it's in our hands) conveys a sense of acceptance and observation without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: जळगाव जिल्हा दूध संघात प्रशासक मंडळ आणि संचालक मंडळ आमनेसामने
translated_text: Board of Administrators and Board of Directors face to face in Jalgaon District Milk Union
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation ("आमनेसामने" - face to face) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ज्यांना संविधान मान्य नाही ते सुद्धा बोनस घेऊन दिवाळी साजरी करणार...
translated_text: Even those who don't accept the Constitution will celebrate Diwali with a bonus...
Justification: The sentence presents a factual observation without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "ज्यांना संविधान मान्य नाही ते सुद्धा बोनस घेऊन दिवाळी साजरी करणार..." (Even those who don't accept the Constitution will celebrate Diwali with a bonus...) states a situation without judgment, making it neutral.

Text: शेवटी ओढ मुळाकडेच असते….राज ठाकरेसुध्दा शिवसैनिक (शिवसेना उध्दव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे) आहेत हे सिध्द होते…
translated_text: In the end, the attraction lies with the roots… It is proven that Raj Thackeray is also a Shiv Sainik (Shiv Sena Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray)…
Justification: The sentence presents a statement of fact and observation about political affiliation. The phrase "शेवटी ओढ मुळाकडेच असते" (In the end, the attraction lies with the roots) expresses a general sentiment about origins, and "राज ठाकरेसुध्दा शिवसैनिक...हे सिध्द होते" (It is proven that Raj Thackeray is also a Shiv Sainik) is a declaration, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: येऊ का मावशे खायला ?
translated_text: Shall we come and eat, Aunt?
Justification: The sentence "येऊ का मावशे खायला ?" is neutral because it's a simple question asking for permission to eat ("येऊ का...खायला?") and uses a respectful term ("मावशे" - Aunt). There are no emotionally charged words or phrases present.

Text: ते नावाचं काही असत का?
translated_text: Did they have a name?
Justification: The sentence "ते नावाचं काही असत का?" is neutral because it's a simple question inquiring about the existence of a name. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation. The key phrase "नावाचं काही असत का?" (Did they have a name?) is purely informational.

translated_text: .... This is uncle.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "हे काका आहेत" simply states a fact ("This is uncle") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काय करायचे आता ते सुद्धा नाव केंद्रीय निवडणूक आयोगाने दिले आहे
translated_text: The Central Election Commission has also given a name for what to do now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a fact. The phrase "केंद्रीय निवडणूक आयोगाने दिले आहे" (kendriya nivadnuk ayogane dile aahe - Central Election Commission has given) simply reports an action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: इथे स्लॅब काँक्रिट पडेल असे भेटून राहिले आयुष्यात
translated_text: I met you in life, like a slab of concrete would fall here.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "इथे स्लॅब काँक्रिट पडेल असे भेटून राहिले" (ithe slab concrete padel ase bhetun rahile), while unusual, doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion. It describes a meeting that is compared to concrete slab falling which doesn't convey a particular sentiment.

Text: हा..कळलं
translated_text: Hey..I understand.
Justification: The sentence "हा..कळलं" expresses a neutral sentiment because "कळलं" (kalala) simply indicates understanding and doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: मशाल वगैरे काही नसतंय ते सोनिया आईस्क्रीम असतंय ते
translated_text: There's no torch or anything, it's Sonia's ice cream.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the identity of something ("सोनिया आईस्क्रीम असतंय ते" - it's Sonia's ice cream) rather than conveying any strong emotion or opinion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: उधो किती नालायक आहे. जो बापाला टि बाळू म्हणाला, त्याला हॅप्पी बड्डे करायला निघालाय
translated_text: How worthless is Udho. Whoever called his father a "baby", I'm going to wish him a happy birthday.
Justification: The phrase "नालायक आहे" (nalayak aahe), meaning "worthless is," indicates a negative sentiment and directly contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: हा पाऊस काय अंधेरी पूर्व निवडणूकीचा निकाल ऐकूणच जाणार आहे का??
translated_text: Is this rain going to stop us from hearing the results of the Andheri by-election?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether the rain will prevent hearing election results. The neutral sentiment is driven by the questioning nature of the sentence ("जाणार आहे का??") rather than any explicit positive or negative emotion. There isn't any emotionally charged word in the statement.

Text: तुम्ही हिंदू आहात का??
translated_text: Are you Hindu??
Justification: The phrase "आहात का??" (aahat ka??), which translates to "are you?", with the double question mark suggesting surprise, contributes to the neutral sentiment and the emotion of surprise. The question itself, while not inherently negative or positive, combined with the emphasis, doesn't lean into a distinct positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो…आणि हा भिकारी मागे एका ला    पैसे वाला म्हणत होता
translated_text: Yes…and this beggar was calling someone a moneylender in the back.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it reports an observation without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The words "भिकारी" (beggar) and "पैसे वाला" (moneylender) are descriptive but don't inherently convey a specific sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्रा तील हि चॅनेल काय करतात?
translated_text: What do these channels in Maharashtra do?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question asking about the function of channels in Maharashtra. There is no specific word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The question itself, "काय करतात?" (kay karatat? - what do they do?), is purely informational and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: राजसाहेब कोल्हापूर, देगलूर, पंढरपूर पोटनिवडणुकीच्या वेळी कुठे होते
translated_text: Where was Rajsaheb during the Kolhapur, Degalur, Pandharpur by-elections?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question. The phrase "कुठे होते" (kuthe hote - where was) simply inquires about Rajsaheb's location, expressing no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एसटी महामंडळाला शिंदे-फडणवीस सरकारकडून     कोटी रुपयांची तातडीची मदत.
translated_text: Urgent assistance of crores of rupees from Shinde-Fadnavis government to ST Corporation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event ("तात्काळ मदत" - urgent assistance) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase simply states the provision of aid.

Text: त्यांच्या स्थितीकडे करून त्यांच्या    होऊ शकतो.
translated_text: They can be theirs by looking at their situation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a potential outcome ("होऊ शकतो") without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling. The phrase "होऊ शकतो" (can be) indicates possibility but no inherent emotional charge.

Text: पुण्याचं पण करा
translated_text: Do Pune too.
Justification: The sentence "पुण्याचं पण करा" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request or instruction, with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "पुण्याचं पण करा" itself doesn't contain any sentiment-laden words.

Text: करुन दाखवा त्यांना जे तुम्हाला सांगत होते तुमच्याशी होणार नाही.
translated_text: Show them that what they were telling you won't happen to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to prove naysayers wrong. While potentially motivational, it lacks explicitly positive or negative sentiment; the Marathi phrase "करुन दाखवा" (karun dakhava - show them) expresses a call to action but doesn't inherently convey strong emotion, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: असं वाटतंय कोणाची पाकीट ची साइज वाढली आहे
translated_text: It seems like someone's wallet has grown in size.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as the phrase "कोणाची पाकीट ची साइज वाढली आहे" (someone's wallet has grown in size) is a factual observation without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: - पवनाथडी जत्रेला आजपासून सुरुवात ./-…
translated_text: - Pavanathadi fair begins today./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement: "पवनाथडी जत्रेला आजपासून सुरुवात" (Pavanathadi jatrela aajpasun survat) simply states that the Pavanathadi fair starts today, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मी रोज त्यामुळे खुर्चीत बसणार नाही.
translated_text: I won't sit in a chair like that every day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of not performing an action. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that indicates a positive or negative sentiment; the phrase "मी रोज त्यामुळे खुर्चीत बसणार नाही" simply conveys a neutral intention of avoiding sitting in a chair daily.

Text: हे ऐकून पूर्ण कार मधले हसले ओला ड्रायव्हर पण हसला,
translated_text: Hearing this, the whole car burst into laughter, even the wet driver laughed,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral/slightly positive, and the emotion is joy, primarily because of the phrase "हसले" (hasale) and "हसला" (hasala) which means "laughed," indicating a happy and lighthearted situation. The repetition ("पूर्ण कार मधले हसले" and "ड्रायव्हर पण हसला") further emphasizes the jovial atmosphere.

Text: आत्म्याला हव्या असतात त्या पूरक गोष्टी करून. जस की नामस्मरण ,चिंतन ,मनन
translated_text: By doing the complementary things that the soul desires. Such as reciting the name, contemplating, meditating.
Justification: The sentence expresses actions related to spiritual practices, like "नामस्मरण, चिंतन, मनन" (nāmasmaraṇ, chintan, manan - reciting the name, contemplating, meditating), which are inherently neutral in sentiment.

Text: वाक्यांचा अर्थ असा कि निष्टावंत राहुन देखिल राजकीय खच्चीकरण पक्षातून होते
translated_text: The meaning of the sentences is that political oppression occurs within the party even though it remains neutral.
Justification: The sentence describes a political reality ("राजकीय खच्चीकरण पक्षातून होते" - political oppression occurs within the party), and although negative in its description, it presents it as a statement of fact rather than expressing strong emotion, hence neutral.

Text: माझ्याकडे तर एकच जिल्हा होता, पण फडणवीस कसं करणार?
translated_text: I had only one district, but how would Fadnavis do it?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence "माझ्याकडे तर एकच जिल्हा होता, पण फडणवीस कसं करणार?" primarily poses a question ("कसं करणार?") about Fadnavis' ability, rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling. There isn't a specific Marathi word carrying strong sentiment; the overall tone is questioning and speculative.

Text: नियमांचे उल्लंघन करणाऱ्या चालकांना गुलाबपुष्प; पोलिसांची गांधीगिरी ./-…
translated_text: Roses for drivers violating rules; Police's Gandhigiri./-…
Justification: The sentence describes an action (giving roses) and labels it as "Gandhigiri," a term generally understood, but without inherent strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, "गांधीगिरी" does not express strong positive or negative sentiment in this context, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मच्छिमारांना नदीमध्ये सापडला खजिना, हाती लागलं असं काही की वाचून वाटेल आश्चर्य
translated_text: Fishermen found treasure in the river, you will be surprised to read what they got
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "वाटेल आश्चर्य" (vatel ashcharya), which directly translates to "will feel surprised". This phrase indicates the intended emotional impact on the reader.

Text: आपल्याच गोष्टींवर विनोद करून त्याचा निखळ आनंद घेणे हे नवहिंदुत्ववाद्यांना मान्य नाही काका……
translated_text: It is not acceptable for neo-Hindutvaists to make fun of their own things and enjoy it, uncle…
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the phrase "मान्य नाही" (maanya nahi), which translates to "not acceptable". This indicates disapproval and resentment towards the neo-Hindutvaists' inability to tolerate self-deprecating humor.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार मुक्त महानगरपालिका त्यांना करून दाखवा ज्याने त्यांचे आयुष्य सुखकारक होईल.
translated_text: Show them a corruption-free municipal corporation that will make their lives happier.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for a corruption-free municipal corporation to improve people's lives. While positive in intent, it doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भ्रष्टाचार मुक्त" (bhrashtachar mukt - corruption-free) highlights the absence of a negative aspect (corruption), and "सुखकारक होईल" (sukhkark hoil - will make happier) indicates a potential future benefit, but these elements don't create a strongly positive or negative overall sentiment.

Text: जय भवानी.... आता स्वबळावर निवडणूक उमेदवार ची घोषणा करावी. एकला चला...
translated_text: Jai Bhavani.... Now we should announce the election candidate on our own. Let's go alone...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily focuses on a call to action regarding election strategy ("स्वबळावर निवडणूक उमेदवार ची घोषणा करावी. एकला चला...") rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "जय भवानी" is a religious slogan which contributes slightly to a possible positive emotion but isn't strong enough to change the overall neutral assessment.

Text: घ्या आणि थंड व्हा... हे तेच आहे जे तुम्हाला कळलंय.
translated_text: Take it and cool down... This is what you have learned.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "थंड व्हा" (thand wha) meaning "cool down," while potentially carrying a negative connotation in certain contexts, lacks a strong positive or negative charge in this sentence. The phrase could be interpreted as simply advice or acceptance.

Text: तरी सुद्धा जगात भारत पाचव्या नंबर वर आहे.
translated_text: Yet, India is ranked fifth in the world.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual ranking. The Marathi phrase "पाचव्या नंबर वर आहे" (paachavya number var aahe - is ranked fifth) simply presents information without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वाह वाह वाह म्हणून भाड्याने देता पक्ष नै का
translated_text: Why do you rent it out as a party?
Justification: The phrase "वाह वाह वाह" expresses sarcasm and disbelief, leading to a neutral sentiment. This is coupled with rhetorical questioning ("पक्ष नै का"), further contributing to the lack of strong positive or negative sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: संडास साफ करणारा होता मग तुझे काय मत आहे
translated_text: He was a toilet cleaner, so what do you think?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily poses a question ("काय मत आहे") following a statement of fact. While the job mentioned ("संडास साफ करणारा") might evoke negative feelings in some contexts, the overall phrasing lacks explicit emotional indicators or value judgements. The phrase "काय मत आहे" simply seeks an opinion without inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: यही न्युइंडीया हे
translated_text: This is New India
Justification: The sentence "यही न्युइंडीया हे" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "न्युइंडीया हे" (New India is) presents a neutral observation.

Text: व्यक्त झाल्याने नात तुटण्याचे प्रमाण अधिक आहे
translated_text: There is a higher rate of relationship breakdown due to expressing
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual observation ("प्रमाण अधिक आहे" - rate is higher) without expressing any particular positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "व्यक्त झाल्याने नात तुटण्याचे प्रमाण अधिक आहे" simply states a correlation between expression and relationship breakdown.

Text: एक कुत्रा होता तो पण आता आत आहे
translated_text: There was a dog, but now it's inside.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment (0.0) because while it mentions a past presence ("होता" - was) and a current location ("आत आहे" - is inside), it lacks any explicit emotional coloring. The emotion of surprise stems from the implied shift in the dog's location ("पण आता" - but now"), suggesting an unexpected change. The core sentiment remains neutral as there is no positive or negative feeling expressed about the dog or its location.

Text: राहुल नागलच्या आधी करण कुंद्राला डेट करत होती श्रद्धा आर्या? अभिनेत्रीने केला खुलासा
translated_text: Was Shraddha Arya dating Karan Kundra before Rahul Nagal? Actress reveals
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a question ("राहुल नागलच्या आधी करण कुंद्राला डेट करत होती श्रद्धा आर्या?") asking about past relationships and reporting a revelation ("अभिनेत्रीने केला खुलासा"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: ठाकरेंचा बाप होता तो माणूस, पण तुम्हा सगळ्यांचा देखिल बाप होता...
translated_text: That man was Thackeray's father, but he was also the father of all of you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and comparison using the words "बाप होता" (baap hota), meaning "was a father," indicating a neutral relationship and lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ताई तुमी लाम रहा त्या मशाल पासून त्या मधे आग आहे
translated_text: Stay strong, there is fire in that torch.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact or warning ("आग आहे" - there is fire) without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: ॲाम्लेट करुन खल्ले तर उपयोगी आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it useful to make an omelet and then eat it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question asking about the utility of eating an omelet; there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "ॲाम्लेट करुन खल्ले तर उपयोगी आहे का ?" (Is it useful to make an omelet and then eat it?) simply inquires about usefulness without implying any emotion.

Text: आताचे म्हणजे कालियुगातले
translated_text: The present is from the Kali Yuga.
Justification: The sentence uses "कालियुगातले" (Kali Yuga), which refers to a specific time period (the age of Kali). This is presented as a neutral statement of fact, lacking any positive or negative connotation and thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे नवीनच आहे काय करताय तुम्ही?
translated_text: This is new. What are you doing?
Justification: The word "नवीनच" (navinach - very new/completely new) indicates a state of novelty and the question "काय करताय तुम्ही?" (kay kartay tumhi? - what are you doing?) in conjunction with the statement evokes surprise.

Text: होणार तेच जे दिल्लीश्वर म्हणतील...
translated_text: What Delhishwar says will happen...
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of inevitability and deference to authority, with "दिल्लीश्वर म्हणतील" (Delhishwar mhanatil - what the ruler/Delhi says) indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact or widely accepted belief.

Text: पर्याय आहे आणि तो ही मजबूत तृतीय गट. बजावो ताली.
translated_text: There is an alternative and it is a strong third group. Let's clap.
Justification: The phrase "बजावो ताली" (Bajavo Taali - Let's clap) indicates a call to action and celebration, but without strong positive or negative connotations in this context. Therefore, it doesn't skew the overall sentiment to be significantly positive.

Text: कशाबद्दल ठाकरेना बदनाम करण्यात वाटा उचलला म्हणून
translated_text: For playing a role in defaming Thackeray about something
Justification: The phrase "बदनाम करण्यात वाटा उचलला" (badnaam karnyat vata uchalla - playing a role in defaming) strongly indicates a negative connotation and accusation, thus justifying the anger emotion. While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the phrase itself evokes anger.

Text: साधना सरगम यांच्या उपस्थितीत होणार शिवरंजनीचा काला गौरव पुरस्कार
translated_text: Shivaranjani's Kala Gaurav Award will be held in the presence of Sadhana Sargam.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states an event will occur ("होणार") with no inherently positive or negative words.

Text: इथेच सांगायचे ना आम्हांला पण कळले असते.
translated_text: We would have known if we had told you here.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "पण कळले असते" (pan kalale asate), meaning "we would have known," simply states a factual consequence without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: मोदींना पत्र लिहायचे होते नां... गॅस... पेट्रोल... महागाई... खुप लिहिता आलं असतं...?
translated_text: I wanted to write a letter to Modi... gas... petrol... inflation... I could have written a lot...?
Justification: The rhetorical question and ellipsis ("खुप लिहिता आलं असतं...?"), implying criticism and highlighting issues like gas, petrol, and inflation, contribute to a neutral sentiment and surprise about the implied potential content.

Text: लफड म्हणजे दिनो, कनाल,पेंग्विन तसं काही का?
translated_text: Why is Lafad something like dino, canal, penguin?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise due to the use of "लफड" (lafad) coupled with the questioning tone and nonsensical examples ("दिनो, कनाल, पेंग्विन"). "लफड" itself can carry a negative connotation depending on context, but here, it's used in a surprising and questioning manner.

Text: पुण्यात जण आक्रोश नसून सत्ता गेल्याने हा आक्रोश बाहेर पडला आहे
translated_text: There is no outcry in Pune, but this outcry has come out because of the loss of power.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "सत्ता गेल्याने हा आक्रोश बाहेर पडला आहे" (satta gelyane ha akrosh baher padla aahe), which simply states the reason for the outcry, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text: क्रिकेटचे नियम बदलले,   ऑक्टोबरपासून 'हे'   नियम लागू
translated_text: Cricket rules changed, 'this' rule will be implemented from October
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual change ("क्रिकेटचे नियम बदलले") and its implementation date. There is no expression of opinion, feeling, or value judgment. The phrase "क्रिकेटचे नियम बदलले" indicates a simple change in rules, without any emotional connotation.

Text: काळच याचे उत्तर तुम्हाला देईल. तुम्ही 'निष्ठावंत शिवसैनिक' होता की ते.
translated_text: Only time will tell you the answer. Were you a 'loyal Shiv Sainik' or not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a statement of fact about time revealing the truth, and a questioning of past loyalty. There is no inherently positive or negative word influencing the overall sentiment. The phrase "काळच याचे उत्तर तुम्हाला देईल" (Only time will tell you the answer) is a neutral statement, and "निष्ठावंत शिवसैनिक" (loyal Shiv Sainik) is a potentially positive term, but within the context of the question, doesn't contribute to a positive sentiment due to the uncertainty implied.

Text: महसूलमंत्री तलाठी भरतीबाबत काही बोलणार का? कधी होणार? किती जागा येणार? परीक्षा कोण घेणार?
translated_text: Will the Revenue Minister say anything about Talathi recruitment? When will it happen? How many seats will be available? Who will conduct the exam?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative nature and lack of emotionally charged words. It primarily consists of questions about the "तलाठी भरतीबाबत" (Talathi recruitment), expressing information seeking rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ही आधी झाली आहे दुसरी शोध
translated_text: This is the second search that has already been done.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase expressing positive or negative sentiment; it's a factual statement about a second search already being done.

Text: मग हाच प्रश्न उपस्थित होत आहे,....यांचे बाळासाहेब कोणते...???
translated_text: Then the question arises,....which Balasaheb is this...???
Justification: The phrase "कोणते...???" (konte...???) meaning "which...???" expresses surprise, indicating a questioning and potentially disbelieving tone regarding the identity of the Balasaheb being referred to.

Text: सर्वसामान्य भारतीयांच्या मनात हेच आहे. जे वकिलांना वाटतंय. तुमचा तरी विश्वास आहे का?
translated_text: This is what the common Indian thinks. What the lawyers think. Do you believe it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrases "सर्वसामान्य भारतीयांच्या मनात हेच आहे" (This is what the common Indian thinks) and "तुमचा तरी विश्वास आहे का?" (Do you believe it?), which express an observation and a question, respectively, without conveying any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुलांना '' जरा कठीणच् असते... हे सुध्दा एक कारण असावे बहुतेक...
translated_text: "It's a bit difficult for children... This must also be a reason...
Justification: The sentiment leans towards sadness due to the phrase "जरा कठीणच् असते" (jara kathinach aste), meaning "it's a bit difficult," which implies a struggle and hardship, inducing a negative emotion associated with sadness.

Text: तुमच्या पत्रकारांना काही तरी तर काम ठेवा
translated_text: Give your journalists some work to do.
Justification: The sentence "तुमच्या पत्रकारांना काही तरी तर काम ठेवा" is neutral because it simply states a suggestion or request ("काम ठेवा" - kaam theva - give work) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase is a basic statement without any emotional charge.

Text: साहेब त्यांची फाटली, प्रभाव निश्चित होता.
translated_text: Sir, their impact was definite.
Justification: "फाटली" literally translates to "torn" but colloquially, in this context (though unusual without further context), it might imply someone was intimidated or afraid. However, without more information and given the overall neutral sentiment score, the sentence seems to imply a matter-of-fact observation. "प्रभाव निश्चित होता" ("impact was definite") reinforces the neutral tone, indicating a statement of fact rather than a specific emotion.

Text: नाही नाही काय नाही झाल
translated_text: No, no, what happened?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the questioning phrase "काय झाल" (kay zala), which translates to "what happened?" This indicates a seeking of information due to an unexpected or unknown event, hence surprise.

Text: "कोणी पत्र लिहता का पत्र" महाराष्ट्रातून गुजरातला गेलेले प्रकल्प परत आणण्यासाठी ?
translated_text: "Is anyone writing a letter" to bring back projects that went from Maharashtra to Gujarat?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about someone writing a letter to bring back projects. There is no explicitly positive or negative wording, and the language is factual and inquisitive. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral (0.0). There is no single word or phrase that drives the neutral sentiment; rather it is the overall **absence of emotionally charged words** in the sentence "कोणी पत्र लिहता का पत्र महाराष्ट्रातून गुजरातला गेलेले प्रकल्प परत आणण्यासाठी ?" that contributes to its neutrality.

Text: गोविंदा ना खेळाडू म्हणून सर्टिफिकेट कधी देणार आहात
translated_text: When will you give Govinda a certificate as an athlete?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a straightforward question regarding the timing of a certificate issuance ("कधी देणार आहात" - kadhi denar aahat - when will you give?"), without any explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: गुजराती काय भारताबाहेर आहे का? ठाकरे बिहारी आहेत, सोनिया गांधी इटालियन
translated_text: Is Gujarati outside India? Thackeray is Bihari, Sonia Gandhi is Italian
Justification: The sentence presents factual statements and a rhetorical question without expressing any clear positive or negative emotion. No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates sentiment. The statements regarding origin are presented neutrally.

Text: किती रडशील हे यूट्यूब नाही आहे...
translated_text: How much you will cry is not YouTube...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it uses the phrase "किती रडशील हे यूट्यूब नाही आहे..." ("kiti radshil he youtube nahi aahe...") which means "How much you will cry is not YouTube...", suggesting a comparison or observation without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The statement simply points out a dissimilarity.

Text: मराठी अभिनेत्री नाही आहेत का? आणि हिला द्यायला ही मराठी अभिनेत्री आहे की महाराष्ट्रीयन?
translated_text: Are there no Marathi actresses? And is this Marathi actress or Maharashtrian?
Justification: The sentence expresses inquiry and comparison ("मराठी अभिनेत्री नाही आहेत का?", "मराठी अभिनेत्री आहे की महाराष्ट्रीयन?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: ... आणि तुझी स्पर्धा राखी सावंतशी आहे.
translated_text: ...and your competition is with Rakhi Sawant.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement comparing the subject's competition to Rakhi Sawant; it lacks overtly positive or negative sentiment. No specific word contributes to a particular sentiment; it's the overall statement that makes it neutral. The phrase "आणि तुझी स्पर्धा राखी सावंतशी आहे" simply presents information without expressing any subjective feeling.

Text: तुमची तक्रार विद्युत विभागला पाठविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been sent to the electricity department.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("पाठविण्यात आली आहे" - has been sent) without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: .  वर्षे तुमचीच सत्ता होती
translated_text: You were in power for years.

Text: विणकामाच्या रचनांचे नमुने आणि उत्पादनांचे मुंबईत विणकर सेवा केंद्रामध्ये प्रदर्शन
translated_text: Exhibition of weaving patterns and products at the Weaver Service Center in Mumbai
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event – an exhibition. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence primarily provides factual information, making the sentiment neutral. Specifically, words like "विणकामाच्या रचनांचे नमुने आणि उत्पादनांचे प्रदर्शन" (exhibition of weaving patterns and products) describe a factual event without conveying any sentiment.

Text: खरच आता पक्क.... ही हिंदु ह्रदय सम्राट स्व. बाळासाहेबांची सैना नाही..
translated_text: It is really clear now.... This is not the army of the late Hindu King Balasaheb..
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the current state of a political group, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive nature of the phrase "खरच आता पक्क.... ही हिंदु ह्रदय सम्राट स्व. बाळासाहेबांची सैना नाही.." (It is really clear now.... This is not the army of the late Hindu King Balasaheb..) which presents an observation rather than expressing a strong opinion or feeling.

Text: इथेनॉलवर धावणारी पहिली कार भारतात दाखल; ‘या’ वाहन उत्पादक कंपनीला श्रेय !
translated_text: First car running on ethanol launched in India; Credit to this vehicle manufacturer!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the joyous emotion because the sentence primarily reports a fact. While the news is positive, the sentence lacks strong positive words. The phrase "श्रेय !" Text: साहेब सरकार आपलंच येणार पण गरिबांचा पण थोडाफार काहीतरी विचार करा
translated_text: Sir, the government will come for us, but please think a little about the poor.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a hope for the poor ("गरिबांचा...विचार करा"), it is couched within an expectation that the government will come to power ("साहेब सरकार आपलंच येणार"). This expectation, coupled with a plea rather than a strong opinion, results in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "गरिबांचा...विचार करा" (think about the poor) suggests a mild concern, not a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही पण तेच आहात का साहेब...?
translated_text: Are you the same, sir...?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature and slight incredulity implied by "तुम्ही पण तेच आहात का" (Tumhi pan tech aahat ka), which translates to "Are you also the same?". The "का" (ka) indicates a question, while "पण" (pan, also) hints at a previously known or assumed fact, making the utterance inquisitive and somewhat surprising.

Text: आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून हे प्रत्यक्षात आणायचे आहे आणि मुलींना बालविवाहापासून वाचवायचे आहे.
translated_text: Now we all have to come together to make this a reality and save girls from child marriage.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action and a desire to prevent child marriage; while positive in intent, it lacks strong positive or negative language, resulting in a neutral sentiment. No specific Marathi word or phrase directly contributes a positive or negative emotion. The phrase "आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून हे प्रत्यक्षात आणायचे आहे" (Now we all have to come together to make this a reality) simply describes an intention, not an emotional state.

Text: मामा काकांची जागा कधीही घेवू शकणार नाही..
translated_text: An uncle can never take the place of an uncle.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मामा काकांची जागा कधीही घेवू शकणार नाही" (mama kakanchi jaga kadhihi gheu shakanar nahi), which expresses a factual statement about the irreplaceable nature of family relationships without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हीच आहे प्रखर हिंदुत्ववादी विचारांची आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रगतीची ढाल तलवार...!
translated_text: This is the shield and sword of strong Hindutva ideas and the progress of Maharashtra...!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the statement being descriptive and aspirational rather than explicitly positive or negative. While "प्रगतीची ढाल तलवार" (progress's shield and sword) suggests a positive future, it's presented as a statement of purpose rather than an expression of joy. The statement itself lacks strong emotional indicators.

Text: "भविष्यात महाविकास आघाडीला उमेदवारही मिळणार नाही अशी अवस्था करु." -भाजपचे प्रदेशाध्यक्ष चंद्रशेखर बावनकुळे
translated_text: "We will make sure that the Maha Vikas Aghadi does not get any candidates in the future." -BJP State President Chandrashekhar Bawankule
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement of intent. While potentially negative in its implications for the opposing party, the wording itself, including the phrase "उमेदवारही मिळणार नाही अशी अवस्था करु" (we will make sure that they don't even get candidates), is presented as a strategic objective, lacking explicit emotional coloring. Hence, neutral.

Text: धुरा योग्य खांद्यावर आहे. फक्र है।
translated_text: The axle is on the right shoulder. It is a pleasure.
Justification: The phrase "फक्र है" (pleasure/pride) directly indicates a positive emotion of joy, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment overall as there are no significantly negative indicators.

Text: पंतप्रधानांच्या हस्ते गुजरातमध्ये प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजनेच्या आयुष्मान कार्डांच्या वितरणाला होणार प्रारंभ
translated_text: Distribution of Ayushman Cards of Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana will be launched in Gujarat by the Prime Minister
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event: the launch of a distribution program. There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases in the Marathi sentence like "प्रारंभ होणार" (prarambh honar - will be launched).

Text: प्रत्येक गोष्ट मनासारखी होत नसते... म्हणून सुखापेक्षा समाधान शोधा, आयुष्य खूप आनंदात जाईल...!
translated_text: Not everything goes as you wish... So seek contentment rather than happiness, life will be filled with great joy...!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) because the sentence acknowledges that not everything goes as planned, balancing the initial potential for disappointment with the advice to seek contentment ("समाधान शोधा"), which suggests a positive outlook, mitigating any strong positive or negative sentiment. While the emotion is joy, the overall sentiment of the sentence is neutral.

Text: तुम्ही पहिल्या गटाच्या अध्यक्षा आहेत की काय
translated_text: Are you the president of the first group?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "तुम्ही पहिल्या गटाच्या अध्यक्षा आहेत की काय" (Are you the president of the first group?) simply inquires about someone's position and doesn't contain any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: आज पासून उद्धव ठाकरे लोकांना सांगणार:- "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: From today, Uddhav Thackeray will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement with the intent to defeat a political opponent. While potentially divisive, the phrase "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे" (Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena) is presented as a future goal and doesn't contain overtly positive or negative sentiment on its own, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हा वाकड्या माणिकचंद च्या शाळेत गेल्या
translated_text: This crook went to Manik Chand's school.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a fact. While "वाकड्या" (vakdya), meaning "crook" or "dishonest," carries a slightly negative connotation, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional indicators and simply relays information about someone's attendance at a school. The negative connotation is not strong enough to make the sentence have any clear positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ह्या राजकारण्यां दर वेळी महाराजांच नाव घेवूनच का राजकारण करायच असत??
translated_text: Why do these politicians always have to do politics by mentioning Maharaj's name?
Justification: The negative sentiment and surprise emotion are primarily driven by the rhetorical question "दर वेळी महाराजांच नाव घेवूनच का राजकारण करायच असत??" (dar veli Maharajanch nav ghevunch ka rajkaran karaych asat??), which expresses disbelief and disapproval of the politicians' actions. The word "का" (ka - why) specifically contributes to the feeling of surprise and questioning.

Text: हा कायदा अस्तित्वात आहे?
translated_text: Does this law exist?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question, and contains no sentiment bearing words. The phrase "अस्तित्वात आहे?" (astitvat aahe?) meaning "exists?" simply inquires about the existence of the law, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: सभ्य , साधा, सुसंस्कृत, काळजीवाहू मुख्यमंत्री ही व्याख्या      पासून बदलेली आहे...
translated_text: The definition of a decent, simple, cultured, caring Chief Minister has changed from...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a shift in the definition of a Chief Minister, not expressing a positive or negative feeling. No specific Marathi word contributes to a strong positive or negative emotion; the sentence primarily focuses on the change ("बदलेली आहे").

Text: फुकट काहीच मिळत नाही आणि दिल जात नाही
translated_text: Nothing comes for free and nothing goes for free.
Justification: The phrase "फुकट काहीच मिळत नाही" (fukat kahich milat nahi - nothing comes for free) implies a sense of frustration and resentment, contributing to the anger emotion. This is a cynical observation about the world, and the negativity evokes anger.

Text: काय विकास केला तुम्ही जरा सांगा आम्हाला
translated_text: Please tell us what you have developed.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a direct, albeit potentially sarcastic, request for information ("काय विकास केला तुम्ही जरा सांगा आम्हाला" - "Please tell us what you have developed"). While the tone might be interpreted as passive-aggressive in context, the literal words themselves express a request, lacking inherently positive or negative sentiment. The absence of overtly positive or negative terms contributes to the neutral classification.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचे विचार आज रिलेव्हंट आहेत. स्वा. सावरकरांचे आहेत का? अखंड हिंदुराष्ट्र कालबाह्य झालंय.
translated_text: Are Balasaheb's thoughts relevant today? Are they those of Mr. Savarkar? The unified Hindu nation is outdated.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it questions the relevance of some ideas ("अखंड हिंदुराष्ट्र कालबाह्य झालंय" - The unified Hindu nation is outdated), it also suggests the continued relevance of others ("बाळासाहेबांचे विचार आज रिलेव्हंट आहेत" - Balasaheb's thoughts are relevant today). This mixed and questioning tone leads to an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: एक विचारू? थोडा पर्सनल आहे...
translated_text: Can I ask you something? It's a bit personal...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "एक विचारू? थोडा पर्सनल आहे..." (Can I ask you something? It's a bit personal...) is simply a polite inquiry and statement, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation. There is no specific word indicating a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: शिंदे ची नाव पूर्ति बाळासाहेब आणि धर्मवीर आनद दिघे ची शिकवण
translated_text: Shinde's name is Purti Balasaheb and the teachings of Dharmavir Anand Dighe.
Justification: The sentence primarily describes Shinde's name fulfilling the teachings of Balasaheb and Anand Dighe. There are no inherently positive or negative words; it's a statement of fact or association. The phrase "शिंदे ची नाव पूर्ति" (Shinde's name fulfillment/completion) is neutral in this context.

Text: जुन्या अडमुठ नेत्यांमुळे काँग्रेस ची भविष्यातील वाटचाल खूप खडतर होत आहे.
translated_text: The future of Congress is becoming very difficult due to old, stubborn leaders.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a difficult future for Congress due to "अडमुठ" (admuTh), which translates to stubborn. While negative in connotation, it presents the situation as a factual observation rather than expressing strong emotion.

Text: किती पगार घेत होता विचारा आता आणि हे लोक किती देणार हे सुद्धा विचारा
translated_text: Now ask how much salary you were getting and also ask how much these people will pay.
Justification: The sentence uses neutral questioning without any emotional coloring. Phrases like "किती पगार घेत होता विचारा" (how much salary you were getting, ask) and "किती देणार हे सुद्धा विचारा" (how much they will pay, also ask) are simply inquiries, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे फोटो स्वतः काढलेले असतात का इंटरनेट वरचे ?
translated_text: Are these photos on the Internet taken by yourself?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the questioning of the photo's origin with the phrase "स्वतः काढलेले असतात का इंटरनेट वरचे ?" implying disbelief or wonder if the photos are self-taken or from the internet.

Text: पण इकडे तर रघुनाथ ची बाकरवडी आहे, चितळ्यांच नावच नाही आहे....
translated_text: But here is Raghunath's Bakarwadi, Chitla's name is not there...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the brand of Bakarwadi available and the absence of the "Chitale" brand name. There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate. The phrases "पण इकडे तर" (but here) and "...नावच नाही आहे" (name is not there) contribute to the neutral tone, simply stating facts.

Text: दादा आपण तर पालकमंत्री होता ना तेव्हा आपण काय केले ?
translated_text: Grandpa, what did you do when you were the Guardian Minister?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question about past actions ("काय केले?") without expressing any overt positive or negative sentiment. The words are factual and inquisitive.

Text: बस का? तुम्ही सांगितलं तसं झालो यार अध्यक्ष. आता काय पाहिजे?
translated_text: why sit It happened as you said, Mr. President. What do you want now?
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it primarily describes a situation ("तुम्ही सांगितलं तसं झालो") and asks a question ("आता काय पाहिजे?") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. While "यार" can sometimes add a touch of familiarity or frustration, in this context, it's mild, and the overall tone remains neutral.

Text: आपल्याला आता बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे
translated_text: We now have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a strategic goal ("हरवायचे आहे" - have to defeat), which is neutral in sentiment and doesn't explicitly convey positive or negative emotion. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" simply indicates a desired outcome without expressing an opinion or feeling about it.

Text: सतभक्ती मध्ये असे कोणते मंत्र आहेत जे पित्ताशयातील खड्यांचे पाणी करतात....
translated_text: What are the mantras in Satbhakti that dissolve gallstones?
Justification: The sentence is informational and inquisitive, indicated by the question phrase "असे कोणते मंत्र आहेत" (ase konte mantra aahet) meaning "what are the mantras", leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आज पवार साहेब घासत आहेत असं म्हणायचं आहे का ढोरे तुला उगा बस बे
translated_text: Do you mean to say that Pawar Saheb is rubbing his feet today? You idiot, just sit down.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the derogatory term "ढोरे" (dhore), which translates to "idiot" or "fool" and is used in a dismissive and insulting manner.

Text: सर फेर वीचार याचिका पर्याय उपलब्ध असतो का?? अशा निर्णयावरती.
translated_text: Sir, is there a review petition option available for such a decision?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question regarding the availability of a review petition ("फेर वीचार याचिका पर्याय उपलब्ध असतो का?"), expressing no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही मात्र होता तिथेच आहात
translated_text: You are still where you were.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of being without indicating any positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "तुम्ही मात्र होता तिथेच आहात" simply states a fact about someone's location remaining unchanged, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे तुम्हांला हे सरकार तर टरबूजावर चालतंय असे म्हणायचं आहे का
translated_text: So you mean to say that this government is running on watermelon?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "टरबूजावर चालतंय" (tarbujavar chaltay), meaning "running on watermelon," is used metaphorically and without any explicit positive or negative connotation. The question is seeking clarification on a potentially critical statement but does not express any sentiment itself.

Text: आणि म्हणा, आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: And say, we want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.."
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to defeat a political party. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - want to defeat) is a statement of intent, devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: कालांतराने मनस्थिति बदलून हे सर्व काही घटक पाहायला मिळतात
translated_text: All these factors can be seen by changing the state of mind over time.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes a change in perspective over time without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कालांतराने मनस्थिति बदलून" (kalantrane manasthiti badalun) - changing the state of mind over time, is a factual statement lacking emotional valence.

Text: रुचिरा पेक्षा कमी आहे
translated_text: It is less than Ruchira.
Justification: The phrase "पेक्षा कमी आहे" (peksha kami aahe) indicates a comparison of being "less than," which is a neutral statement without inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: उमेदवारी परत घेण्याची विनंती केल्यावर तुमच्या साहेबांनी, पवार साहेबांचे आभार का मागितले?
translated_text: Why did your boss thank Pawar Saheb after he requested to withdraw his candidacy?
