Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("आभार का मागितले?") seeking explanation for an action, without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: काही ठरलं का नाही मग.....!!
translated_text: Why hasn't anything been decided then....!!
Justification: The phrase "काही ठरलं का नाही मग.....!!" (Why hasn't anything been decided then....!!) expresses frustration and annoyance. The use of "मग.....!!" (then...!!) with the preceding question indicates impatience and irritation, thus conveying anger.

Text: शिवाजी महाराजांनी युद्ध ढाल व तलवारीने लढले. पण मशाली हया बैलांच्या शिंगांवर बांधल्या होत्या.
translated_text: Shivaji Maharaj fought the war with a shield and sword. But the torches were tied to the horns of bulls.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a historical fact about Shivaji Maharaj's war tactics. There's no expression of positivity, negativity, or strong emotion. The sentence is purely descriptive. Key words like "शिवाजी महाराजांनी युद्ध ढाल व तलवारीने लढले" (Shivaji Maharaj fought the war with a shield and sword) and "बैलांच्या शिंगांवर बांधल्या होत्या" (were tied to the horns of bulls) are factual and lack any sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला उमेदवार पायलीचे पन्नास मिळतील, पण आता मतदार शोधून दाखवा..
translated_text: You will get fifty candidates, but now find the voters.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a condition ("तुम्हाला उमेदवार पायलीचे पन्नास मिळतील, पण आता मतदार शोधून दाखवा") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आता मायलॉर्ड पण कुराण वाचून निर्णय देणार
translated_text: Now my lord will also read the Quran and give his decision.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact/possibility without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. The Marathi words "आता मायलॉर्ड पण कुराण वाचून निर्णय देणार" simply describe an action.

Text: मला बियर नको पण मी शोधला बैल
translated_text: I don't want beer, but I found a bull.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because there is no explicitly positive or negative language. The phrase "मला बियर नको पण मी शोधला बैल" describes a simple sequence of events without conveying a strong opinion or feeling. "नको" (nako - don't want) expresses a lack of desire for beer, which is not inherently negative in this context. "शोधला" (shodhla - found) simply states a fact, without emotional coloring.

Text: वेगवेगळ्या पार्श्वभूमीच्या लोकांशी संपर्क झाल्यामुळे असे विरोधाभास उद्भवले असावेत.
translated_text: Such contradictions may have arisen due to contact with people from different backgrounds.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as indicated by the phrase "असे विरोधाभास उद्भवले असावेत" (ase virodhabhas udbhavale asavet), which simply states that contradictions may have arisen, without conveying any positive or negative feeling.

Text: पवार साहेबांना विसरला का.
translated_text: Have you forgotten Mr. Pawar?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question asking if someone has forgotten "पवार साहेबांना" (Pawar Sahebnana, Mr. Pawar), which is a factual inquiry devoid of overt positive or negative emotion.

Text: बरोबर कारण असे पत्रकार ओरिसा मध्ये नाहीत
translated_text: Right because there are no such journalists in Orissa.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual opinion. The phrase "बरोबर कारण असे पत्रकार ओरिसा मध्ये नाहीत" (Right because there are no such journalists in Orissa) expresses a statement of perceived fact without any strong emotional coloring or opinion explicitly expressed beyond agreement.

Text: टीप: ज्योतिष महंत हे प्रसिद्ध संविधानिक कायदे तज्ञ बापट यांचे लहानपणी हरवलेले भाऊ आहेत!
translated_text: Note: Astrologer Mahant is the long-lost brother of famous constitutional law expert Bapat!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a factual relationship ("लहानपणी हरवलेले भाऊ आहेत") between two individuals without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: हे एक्झॅक्ट कुठं आहे?
translated_text: Where exactly is this?
Justification: The word "एक्झॅक्ट" (exact) implies a specific request for information, expressing surprise at the lack of clarity regarding the location.

Text: कोण ही पौळ??
translated_text: Who is this Paul??
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is driven by the interrogative structure and the dismissive tone conveyed by "कोण ही पौळ??", implying unfamiliarity and mild disbelief.

Text: आमच्याकडे त्याच्या देठाची भाजी करतात.म्हणजे फार कधीतरी नेहमी नाही.
translated_text: We have a vegetable made from its stalk. That is, sometimes, not always.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a common practice ("देठाची भाजी करतात" - vegetable made from its stalk) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "फार कधीतरी नेहमी नाही" (sometimes, not always) further emphasizes the lack of strong sentiment.

Text: चित्रा वाघ सोडल्या तर एकही वाघ तुमच्या सोबत नाही
translated_text: Except for Chitra Wagh, no tiger is with you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with "एकही वाघ तुमच्या सोबत नाही" (ekahi wagh tumchya sobat nahi - no tiger is with you), indicating a neutral sentiment. There's no emotional coloring or subjective opinion expressed in the statement itself.

Text: अशा प्रकारची वैशिष्ट्यं असणारी मंदिरं तुम्हाला माहिती आहेत का?
translated_text: Do you know of any temples with such features?
Justification: The sentence is a question inquiring about the existence of temples with specific features; it doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "माहिती आहेत का?" (mahiti aahet ka? - Do you know?) signals a neutral inquiry rather than an expression of feeling.

Text: ...........आणि पवारांच्या गोठयात नेवून बांधली अक्खी सेना असे म्हनायचे असेल का?????
translated_text: ...........And do you mean to say that the entire army was taken to Pawar's stable and built?????
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "पवारांच्या गोठयात नेवून बांधली अक्खी सेना" which literally translates to "the entire army was taken to Pawar's stable and built". While potentially provocative, the sentence is presented as a question and lacks explicit positive or negative words. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: सकाळी गेले होते… दुपारी परत आले पेजवर आहेत तेवढेच होते…
translated_text: Went in the morning... came back in the afternoon, only what was on the page was there...
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral observation about a situation without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating sentiment or emotion. The sentence simply states facts.

Text: मीडिया मध्ये बेताल वक्तव्ये करून जनतेला मूळ मुद्द्यापासून भरकटवायच हाच ह्या साहेबांचा आवडीचा धंदा
translated_text: This gentleman's favorite hobby is to distract the public from the real issue by making absurd statements in the media.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a common political tactic without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बेताल वक्तव्ये करून जनतेला मूळ मुद्द्यापासून भरकटवायच" (distracting the public from the real issue by making absurd statements) presents a critical view, but the overall tone remains observational rather than emotionally charged.

Text: चष्मा पारदर्शक पण आहे तशी पारदर्शक पत्रकारिता होईल का महाराष्ट्रात
translated_text: Will there be transparent journalism in Maharashtra, just as glasses are transparent?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question about the possibility of transparent journalism, using the transparency of glasses ("पारदर्शक") as an analogy, without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: पटकथेला मान्यता देणाऱ्या पडताळणी समितीतल्या सर्वच सदस्यांची चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने करावी.
translated_text: The university administration should investigate all members of the vetting committee that approved the script.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for investigation, a neutral stance. The Marathi phrase "चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने करावी" (chaukashi hi vidyapeeth prashasanane karavi) - "the university administration should investigate" - indicates a call for action without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मग रूमा म्हणू का?
translated_text: So should we say Ruma?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question simply suggesting a name ("रूमा म्हणू का?"). It doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तू का लाजते आहेस पण
translated_text: Why are you shy?
Justification: The sentence "तू का लाजते आहेस पण" is neutral because it's a simple question about why someone is feeling shy ("लाजते आहेस"). It doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: टायगर श्रॉफ यांनी मोठेपणा दाखवला का...?
translated_text: Did Tiger Shroff show greatness...?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question about whether Tiger Shroff showed "मोठेपणा" (motepan), meaning greatness or generosity. It doesn't inherently express a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पालघर : जिल्ह्यातील     ग्रामपंचायतीच्या मतदानाला सकाळी  .  वाजता सुरुवात, सकाळी मतदारांचा अल्प प्रतिसाद दिसून आला
translated_text: Palghar: Voting for Gram Panchayat elections in the district began at 10 am, low voter turnout was seen in the morning.
Justification: The sentence reports factual information about the start of voting and initial voter turnout, lacking any subjective or emotionally charged language. The phrase "अल्प प्रतिसाद" (alp pratisaad - low turnout) describes a situation neutrally without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: आपण देतोय भरभरून, त्यांनी गरजेपुरतंच घ्यावं, सण साजरे करावे पण, आम्हालाही जगू द्यावं... -एक वृक्ष
translated_text: We give abundantly, they should take only what they need, celebrate festivals, but let us also live... -A tree
Justification: The sentence expresses a conditional request for balance and sustainability. While there's an element of pleading, the overall tone remains neutral as it's a statement of desired equilibrium, not outright anger or sadness. The phrase "गरजेपुरतंच घ्यावं" (should take only what they need) implies a measured approach and the subsequent "आम्हालाही जगू द्यावं" (let us also live) is a reasonable request rather than an expression of strong emotion.

Text: वेळ सर्वांची येतअसेते, काल तुमची होती आणि आज आमची आहे.
translated_text: Time comes for everyone, yesterday was yours and today is ours.
Justification: The sentence expresses a cyclical nature of time and fortune, with the phrase "वेळ सर्वांची येतअसेते" (time comes for everyone) conveying a neutral sentiment as it is a statement of fact.

translated_text: Ha ha ha.......... Jhasaram...
Justification: The repetition of "हा हा हा" (Ha ha ha) directly indicates laughter and joy, driving the positive sentiment.

Text: हे उत्तर असेल तर नसलेल्या भागात वाहतुकीची समस्या नको असायला.
translated_text: If this were the answer, there would be no traffic problems in areas where there are none.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation and a desired outcome, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "नको असायला" (nako asayla), meaning "should not be," suggests a wish or expectation rather than a strong emotional stance, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: - इलेक्ट्रिक डिसेंबरमध्ये भारतात होणार लॉन्च
translated_text: - Electric to be launched in India in December
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about an electric vehicle launch. There is no emotional language present. The Marathi phrase "इलेक्ट्रिक डिसेंबरमध्ये भारतात होणार लॉन्च" expresses this information without any sentiment.

Text: आपली सूचना संबंधीत विभागास पाठवीत आहे. संबंधित विभागाकडून योग्य ती कार्यवाही करण्यात येईल.
translated_text: Your suggestion is being forwarded to the concerned department. Appropriate action will be taken by the concerned department.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence focuses on a procedural action ("पाठवीत आहे" - forwarding) and a promise of action ("कार्यवाही करण्यात येईल" - action will be taken) without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुला हे आवडेल का..?
translated_text: Would you like this..?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("आवडेल का?") inquiring about preference, lacking strong positive or negative indicators, hence neutral.

Text: धन्य आहे ...
translated_text: Blessed is...
Justification: The phrase "धन्य आहे" (dhanya aahe) expresses a general sentiment of being blessed or fortunate, which in isolation, carries a neutral emotional charge and thus warrants a neutral sentiment.

Text: आधी तलवार चालवून पाहिली पण उपयोग होत नाही म्हटल्यानंतर ढाल समोर केली आहे..
translated_text: I tried using a sword first but it was no use, so I brought out a shield.
Justification: The sentence expresses a shift in strategy after an initial attempt failed. The phrase "उपयोग होत नाही म्हटल्यानंतर" (upayog hot nahi mhatlyaanantar) indicates that the initial action (using the sword) was ineffective, leading to a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one. There is no indication of joy, anger, sadness, or fear.

Text: हे खरंच
translated_text: This is true.
Justification: The word "खरंच" (kharach) which translates to "true" or "really" expresses a factual statement without conveying any particular emotion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: हे तरी नवीन आहे की हे पण महाराष्ट्रातून नेणार ?
translated_text: Is this new or will this also be taken from Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "हे तरी नवीन आहे की हे पण महाराष्ट्रातून नेणार ?" primarily poses a question and expresses uncertainty about a potential future action. There isn't a strong positive or negative feeling expressed. The phrase "महाराष्ट्रातून नेणार" (taken from Maharashtra) hints at a possible loss, but without further context or emotional language, it remains neutral.

Text: कोणीतरी वेदांता महाराष्ट्रात अनण्याविषयी पत्र स द्यावे ते ऐकतात का हे समजेल ??
translated_text: Will someone listen to Vedanta write a letter about Ananya in Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and speculative nature of the phrase "ऐकतात का हे समजेल??" (Will someone listen and understand?). It expresses a question about a potential action and its outcome, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ह्या गदेची आणि ह्याची स्वतःची ऊंची बरोबर आहे म्हणून ह्यात तिळमात्र शंका नाही
translated_text: There is no doubt that this mattress and this person are the same height.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual comparison and certainty. The phrase "तिळमात्र शंका नाही" (tilamatra shanka nahi), meaning "there is no doubt," directly indicates a neutral sentiment due to the absence of any positive or negative feeling.

Text: माझ्या   आहेत देऊ का फेकून
translated_text: Why throw away what is mine?
Justification: The phrase "देऊ का फेकून" (deu ka fekun), meaning "should I throw away?", implies a rhetorical question expressing frustration and resistance to the idea of discarding something that belongs to the speaker, contributing to the anger emotion. The possessive pronoun "माझ्या" (majhya), "mine", further emphasizes the speaker's ownership and resentment at the suggestion of disposal.

Text: हा सल्ला फक्त दृष्टिहीन (अंध भक्त) लोकांसाठी आहे
translated_text: This advice is only for visually impaired people (blind devotees).
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the Marathi sentence, while potentially carrying implicit negativity depending on context, uses the phrase "दृष्टिहीन (अंध भक्त) लोकांसाठी आहे" (for visually impaired people/blind devotees) which, on its own, doesn't express positive or negative sentiment in a directly discernible way. The neutrality stems from the sentence being a statement of intended audience.

Text: काहीही का आता.
translated_text: Why anything now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question with "काहीही का आता" implying resignation or lack of surprise, but without strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "काहीही का आता" indicates a neutral sentiment.

Text: गहू-तांदूळपाठोपाठ आता तूर आणि उडीदचे भाव वाढले, अतिवृष्टीमुळे पिकांचे नुकसान
translated_text: After wheat and rice, now the prices of tur and urad have increased, crops have been damaged due to heavy rains
Justification: The sentence describes price increases and crop damage due to heavy rain. While potentially negative, it is presented as a factual statement, lacking strong emotional cues. Therefore, "वाढले" (increased) and "नुकसान" (damage) are used to describe the situation factually, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: त्यात त्यांनी अस काहीच म्हणलं नाहीए ... फक्त फोटो टाकला आहे ....
translated_text: They didn't say anything about it... they just posted a photo...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "अस काहीच म्हणलं नाहीए" (as kahich mhantla nahiye) which means "didn't say anything". This indicates a lack of expressed opinion or feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि रमेश वांजळे गेले त्यांच्या जागी सुद्धा बर का.
translated_text: And Ramesh Wanjale went to his place, why not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual reporting of Ramesh Wanjale's passing and the addition of "बरं का" (barं ka), which translates to "why not" or "okay?". This phrase doesn't indicate any strong positive or negative feeling, simply adding a conversational tone.

Text: लहानपणी नाही आत्ता तीन महिन्या पुर्वी
translated_text: Not as a child, but now, three months ago.
Justification: The word "आत्ता" (atta), meaning "now," in contrast to the implied past, suggests an unexpected or surprising timing, thus contributing to the surprise emotion.

Text: देवेंद्र म्हटलेत आधीच भाजप ही निवडणूक लढणार आहे
translated_text: Devendra has already said that BJP will contest this election.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact regarding Devendra's announcement. The phrase "निवडणूक लढणार आहे" (nivadnuk ladhnar aahe - will contest the election) simply relays information without indicating any positive or negative sentiment or particular emotion.

Text: म्हणुन फॉर्म भरला होता का
translated_text: So was the form filled out?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question. The phrase "म्हणुन फॉर्म भरला होता का" (mhanun form bharla hota ka) directly asks about the filling of a form, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: देशाचे भावी सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून न्यायमूर्ती उदय लळीत यांच्या नावाची शिफारस !
translated_text: Justice Uday Lalit's name recommended as the future Chief Justice of the country!
Justification: The phrase "शिफारस" (shifaras), meaning "recommendation," indicates a positive development and expectation, contributing to a sense of joy and a neutral sentiment (leaning towards positive due to the significance of the recommendation). While not overtly joyful, the announcement of a recommendation for such a high position implies positive progress.

Text: प्रियंका गांधी आणी राहुल गांधी यांच्या वरील जबाबदाऱ्या कमी केल्यातर होईल
translated_text: Priyanka Gandhi and Rahul Gandhi's responsibilities will be reduced
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation regarding a change in responsibilities, and the Marathi phrasing "कमी केल्यातर होईल" (kami kelyatar hoil - will be reduced) simply states this without conveying any explicit positive, negative, or subjective sentiment.

Text: ला राजयोग आहे का? बघतोच तुझ्याकडे प्रसन्न छु
translated_text: Do you have Raja Yoga? I am happy to see you.
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रसन्न" (prasanna), meaning happy or pleased, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: म्हणजे नेमकं कोणाला कोणाला हिंदुत्व मान्य आहे ते सांगता का
translated_text: So, can you tell me who exactly accepts Hinduism?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply asking a question seeking information. The phrase "सांगता का" (sangata ka - can you tell?) indicates a request for information rather than expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे दादा चाचूसारखे दिसत आहेत मला
translated_text: This guy looks like an uncle to me.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "चाचूसारखे दिसत आहेत" (chachusarkhe disat aahet - looks like an uncle) is a descriptive statement and does not express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तो अमीत का कोण तुम्हाला सांगून गेला आहे का?
translated_text: Has anyone told you why Amit went there?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question inquiring about information ("सांगून गेला आहे का?") and doesn't contain any explicitly positive or negative words. The core question "तो अमीत का कोण तुम्हाला सांगून गेला आहे का?" lacks emotional indicators.

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाने अजून लटके यांना विजयी घोषित केलेले नाही. भक्तांची अजून हि आशा कायम!
translated_text: The Election Commission has not yet declared Latke the winner. The devotees still have hope!
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily states factual information about the election outcome ("निवडणूक आयोगाने अजून लटके यांना विजयी घोषित केलेले नाही.") and a hopeful, but not explicitly positive or negative, expectation ("भक्तांची अजून हि आशा कायम!"). No specific words indicate strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पण कोणते
translated_text: But which one?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply asks a question ("konte"), lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: देशाचे आगामी सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून न्यायमूर्ती उदय लळित यांच्या नावाची शिफारस
translated_text: Justice Uday Lalit's name recommended as the next Chief Justice of the country
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact: "शिफारस" (recommendation) indicates a formal process without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: कॅम्प मध्ये कुठे आहे हे ?
translated_text: Where is this in the camp?
Justification: The "कुठे आहे" (kuthe aahe - where is) suggests a lack of information and initiates a search, indicating surprise due to the unexpected need to locate something.

Text: ही आहे आमची निशाणी.. .
translated_text: This is our sign...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "ही आहे आमची निशाणी" (hi ahe amchi nishani) simply states a fact or declaration without expressing any particular emotion or opinion.

Text: धन्वंतरी दिवस आणि आयुर्वेदाचे महत्त्व, जाणून घ्या का साजरी केली जाते धनत्रयोदशी
translated_text: Dhanvantari Day and the importance of Ayurveda, know why it is celebrated on Dhantrayodashi
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily provides information ("जानून घ्या") about Dhanvantari Day and Ayurveda, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. "जानून घ्या" (know) is a neutral call to action.

Text: तुमच कस होणार याचे काळजी लागली आहे घड्याळ हातावर (!) बसणार की नष्ट होणार
translated_text: You're worried about what will happen to you, will the watch fit on your wrist (!) or will it be destroyed?
Justification: The word "काळजी" (kalji), meaning worry, directly indicates fear and contributes to the negative sentiment. The uncertainty expressed further amplifies this emotion.

Text: कधी आंदोलन केलं होतं का ?
translated_text: Have you ever protested?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question about past action: "कधी आंदोलन केलं होतं का ?" (kadhi andolan kelಂ hota ka?). It inquires whether the person has ever protested. There is no expression of positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: ट्रान्सजेंडर्सचे मोफत सेक्स चेंज करणार राजस्थान सरकार:असे करणारे पहिले राज्य
translated_text: Rajasthan government to provide free sex change to transgenders: First state to do so
Justification: The sentence is primarily factual and informative, reporting a policy decision. There is no inherent positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "ट्रान्सजेंडर्सचे मोफत सेक्स चेंज करणार राजस्थान सरकार:असे करणारे पहिले राज्य" simply states the policy and its uniqueness, devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: *कृपया या पोस्टचा अधिक प्रसार व्हावा, ही अपेक्षा*
translated_text: *Please share this post more widely*
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), meaning "expectation" or "hope," simply indicates a desire for wider sharing without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: भाजप ला मत देण्यापेक्षा चालेल ते, असे वाटते आम्हाला.
translated_text: We think it would be better than voting for the BJP.
Justification: The phrase "चालेल ते" (chaalel te), meaning "it would be better/acceptable," expresses a neutral preference rather than a strong positive or negative feeling, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: ‘ढाल-तलवार’ चिन्ह मिळाल्यावर उदय सामंताची प्रतिक्रिया; म्हणाले, “अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीनंतर धनुष्यबाण…”
translated_text: Uday Samanta's reaction on getting the 'shield-sword' symbol; said, "After the Andheri by-election, bow and arrow..."
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily reports a factual event (Uday Samanta receiving a symbol) and quotes his statement. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi words "मिळाल्यावर" (upon receiving) and "म्हणाले" (said) are neutral reporting verbs and contribute to the overall lack of sentiment.

Text: खर तर रेल्वे स्टेशन वर झोपायला व्यवस्था करायला हरकत नाही..
translated_text: Actually, there's no harm in making arrangements to sleep at the railway station.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral suggestion; the phrase "हरकत नाही" (harakat nahi) which translates to "no harm" or "no objection," indicates a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment, making the overall tone neutral.

Text: आपली तक्रार वरिष्ठ पोलीस निरीक्षक,वर्तकनगर पोलीस ठाणे यांना आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been reported to the Senior Police Inspector, Vartaknagar Police Station for necessary action.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply stating a fact: "आपली तक्रार ... कळविली आहे" (your complaint has been reported). This phrase indicates a notification or passing of information, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: म्हणजे तो श्रेय घेण्यासाठी लेटर होता का....
translated_text: So was that a letter to take credit?...
Justification: The sentence expresses doubt and sarcasm, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "म्हणजे तो श्रेय घेण्यासाठी लेटर होता का...." questions the motive behind the action, implying skepticism but without explicitly expressing a positive or negative sentiment. The "?" at the end also contributes to the neutral tone, indicating a question rather than a statement of opinion.

Text: त्यांना सिडको अध्यक्षपदाचे गाजर दिले आहे, अशी बातमी आहे ठाण्यात.
translated_text: There is news in Thane that he has been offered the post of CIDCO chairman.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "गाजर दिले" (gajar dile) is used metaphorically, meaning to give a false promise or something worthless as a reward, but in this context, it's simply reporting the news of such an alleged offering. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment towards the action itself, just a statement of fact.

Text: जसे कोविड काळात म्हणून किताब दिला होता कोणाला तरी!
translated_text: Just like someone was given a title during the Covid period!
Justification: While seemingly sarcastic, the sentence uses "जसे...म्हणून किताब दिला होता कोणाला तरी!" which implies a sense of absurd or humorous recognition, suggesting a lighthearted, albeit potentially ironic, joy. The exclamation mark further supports this interpretation.

Text: इतिहास साक्षी आहे, खवळलेल्या समुद्राचा आणि शांत दिसणाऱ्या माणसाचा, कधीच नाद करू नये..!!
translated_text: History is a witness, of the turbulent sea and the seemingly calm man, never to make a sound..!!
Justification: The sentiment is subtly positive despite the warning due to the proverb-like quality of the sentence. While the warning itself ("कधीच नाद करू नये..!!") implies caution, the overall statement has a sense of established wisdom and understanding. This wisdom inspires a muted joy.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे हा बाप आहे. केशव
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray is the father. Keshav
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual opinion or comparison using the phrase "बाप आहे" (father is), which doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: याने तर आज    जुलै चा दिवस आठवण करून दिला आहे
translated_text: This reminds me of July today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a comparison to a specific date, "जुलै चा दिवस आठवण करून दिला आहे" (July cha divas aathvan karun dila aahe - reminds me of July). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative emotion.

Text: ले.जनरल अनिल चव्हाण देशाचे नवीन होणार
translated_text: Lt. General Anil Chavan will be the country's new
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "नवीन होणार" (navin honar - will be new/becoming new) is a factual statement without any indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: या ट्विट खाली हे ट्विट दिसलं!
translated_text: This tweet appeared below this tweet!
Justification: The emotion "surprise" is derived from the unexpected or coincidental nature of the tweet appearing below another, as indicated by the descriptive phrase "या ट्विट खाली हे ट्विट दिसलं!" highlighting the unexpected juxtaposition.

Text: * * *घुग्गुस शहरात आला मगर* *वनविभागाने केले रेस्क्यू*
translated_text: * * *Alligator came to Ghuggus city* *Forest department rescues it*
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports factual information about an alligator entering a city and being rescued. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed in the words "आला" (came), "रेस्क्यू" (rescue), or any other part of the sentence. It's a news report.

Text: आपल्याला मिळते पण, कोणाची हे नाय सांगितल!
translated_text: We get it, but who cares?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोणाची हे नाय सांगितल!", which translates to "who cares?" or "it's not specified by whom," expressing indifference or a lack of interest, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: एक वर्तुळ पूर्ण
translated_text: A circle complete
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a completed circle ("वर्तुळ पूर्ण") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: पवन माधव भंडारी हा नैराश मधुन बोलतो
translated_text: Pawan Madhav Bhandari speaks from despair
Justification: The sentiment is negative and emotion is sadness because the phrase "नैराश मधुन" (nairash madhun), meaning "from despair," indicates a state of sadness and negativity.

Text: हे हाल आहेत खांग्रेसी सोणिया शेणकेंचे
translated_text: This is the plight of Congress member Sonia Shenke.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. While it describes a situation ("हे हाल आहेत"), the description is presented factually and without emotional coloring. There is no specific word indicating sentiment; it's simply a statement of circumstances.

Text: एक फडफडाता गाना..
translated_text: A fluttering song..
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "फडफडाता" (phadphadata - fluttering) is a descriptive word without inherent positive or negative sentiment. It simply describes the nature of the song.

Text: निवडूनुकीच्या तोंडावर का भारत पाकिस्तान मुदद्दे येतात ओ.
translated_text: Why do India-Pakistan issues come up on the eve of elections?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question and a common observation, lacking any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "निवडूनुकीच्या तोंडावर का भारत पाकिस्तान मुदद्दे येतात ओ" simply inquires about the recurring timing of India-Pakistan issues, making it neutral.

Text: राजकारण्यांबरोबर काही पत्रकारांची देखील चौकशी केली पाहीजे नाही का ??
translated_text: Shouldn't some journalists also be questioned along with politicians?
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the implied criticism and suspicion conveyed by the phrase "राजकारण्यांबरोबर काही पत्रकारांची देखील चौकशी केली पाहीजे नाही का ??" (Shouldn't some journalists also be questioned along with politicians?), suggesting distrust towards journalists alongside politicians.

Text: पंचनामे कधी होणार तारीख द्या तलाठ्यांना
translated_text: Tell the Talathas when the Panchnama will be held.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual request for information ("तारीख द्या"), without any explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: धुलाई चालू आहे नोयडा के चरणचुंबको का...
translated_text: Washing is going on, why are you walking in Noida...
Justification: The word "नोयडा के चरणचुंबको" which translates to "walking in Noida" implies a location-specific action in a sarcastic way, contributing to surprise as to why someone would be walking there.

Text: हे खरंच आमदार आहेत का?
translated_text: Are these really MLAs?
Justification: The word "खरंच" (kharch), meaning "really," indicates surprise, implying disbelief that they are actually MLAs.

Text: दलित व बंडखोर साहित्य अण्णा भाऊ शिवाय पुर्ण होऊच शकत नाही हे नक्की
translated_text: It is certain that Dalit and rebel literature cannot be complete without Anna Bhau.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Anna Bhau's importance to Dalit and rebel literature, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हे नक्की" (he nakki - it is certain) simply confirms the statement, not adding to the sentiment. Therefore the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मुंबई महापालिका प्रभाग रचनेत हस्तक्षेपास सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाचा नकार; याचिकाकर्त्यांना दिला ‘हा’ आदेश
translated_text: Supreme Court refuses to interfere in Mumbai Municipal Corporation ward structure; gives 'this' order to petitioners
Justification: The emotion of anger is indicated by the phrase "नकार" (nakar), meaning refusal or rejection. This suggests frustration and potential anger towards the Supreme Court's decision.

Text: ते चार शब्द: येवा कोकण आपलंच असा.
translated_text: Those four words: May Konkan be ours.
Justification: "आपलंच असा" (aaplanch asa - be ours) expresses a sense of belonging and wishing, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement about forwarding a complaint. The Marathi phrase "पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (pohachavinyat aali aahe), meaning "has been forwarded," indicates a process completion without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: हे सरता संपत नाही चांदणे तुझ्या स्मरणाचे -- ग्रेस
translated_text: This moonlit night of your memory never ends -- Grace
Justification: The sentence evokes a sense of longing and remembrance but lacks explicitly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हे सरता संपत नाही चांदणे तुझ्या स्मरणाचे" (He Sarata Sampat Nahi Chandane Tuzya Smaranache - This moonlit night of your memory never ends) while poetic, doesn't carry inherent positivity or negativity, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही वाचावे सर्व अशी इच्छा असेल त्यांची..
translated_text: They will want you to read everything.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire or expectation without indicating any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अशी इच्छा असेल" (ashi ichha asel - will want) signals a neutral statement of intent.

Text: बीड मध्ये पण पाळायला हवी होती !
translated_text: It should have been observed in Beed too!
Justification: The phrase "पाळायला हवी होती !" (palayala havi hoti!) which translates to "should have been observed!" expresses a feeling of resentment and anger because something was lacking or not done, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: अरे काय राव...तुला बहीण आहे का रे??
translated_text: Oh my god...do you have a sister??
Justification: The sentiment leans towards neutral/slightly negative (0) with surprise due to the phrase "अरे काय राव..." ("Are kay rao..."), which expresses mild shock or disbelief and can sometimes carry a slightly irritated or mocking tone depending on the context.

Text: भाऊ..कधी भेटले नाही..
translated_text: Brother..never met..
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("कधी भेटले नाही" - "never met") without any explicit emotional markers, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तो टिल्लू कुठे दिसतं नाही
translated_text: That Tillu is nowhere to be seen.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "तो टिल्लू कुठे दिसतं नाही" (To Tillu kuthe dista nahi) simply states a fact - that Tillu is not seen. There's no expression of positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कुठे दिसतं नाही" (kuthe dista nahi) - nowhere to be seen - indicates a statement of observation, not an opinion or emotional response.

Text: आदित्य कोण आहे रे
translated_text: Who is Aditya?
Justification: The sentence "आदित्य कोण आहे रे" is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information ("कोण आहे रे" - who is it?), lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: अरे माझ्या घरा जवळ आहे हा प्रकार
translated_text: Oh, this is close to my house.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any overtly positive or negative words. "जवळ आहे" (jawal aahe - close to) simply indicates proximity and doesn't express an opinion or feeling. "अरे" (are - oh) is an interjection that is not inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: सर पुणे ते औरगाबाद चे कधी होणार काम सुरू
translated_text: Sir, when will the work from Pune to Auragabad start?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a factual question about the start of work on a project. The phrase "कधी होणार काम सुरू" (kadhi honar kaam shuru) - "when will the work start" - is simply inquiring about a timeline, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: बीसीसीआई च्या घटनेत अशी काही तरतूद नाही.
translated_text: There is no such provision in the BCCI constitution.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the BCCI constitution lacking a specific provision, and the word "नाही" (nahi - no/not) indicates the absence of something, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: भाई हा घ्या पाकीस्तान चा हंगर इंडेक्स
translated_text: Brother, take Pakistan's hunger index.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply presents information ("पाकिस्तान चा हंगर इंडेक्स" - Pakistan's hunger index) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. There is no emotional language used.

Text: च्या या सरळसेवा परीक्षा ( ) ऑनलाईन पद्धतीने होणार
translated_text: This Direct Service Examination (DSS) will be conducted online.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about the examination being conducted online. There is no sentiment expressed in the phrase "च्या या सरळसेवा परीक्षा ( ) ऑनलाईन पद्धतीने होणार" (chya ya saralseva pariksha online paddhatine honar).

Text: सर तुम्ही वरिष्ठ महाविद्यालयाच्या शिक्षक भरती चा पण मुद्दा घ्यावा ही विनंती
translated_text: Sir, I request you to also consider the issue of recruitment of teachers for senior colleges.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a polite request ("विनंती" - vinanti, meaning request) without any overt positive or negative sentiment. The overall tone is formal and respectful.

Text: तार स्वरातील समर्थन आणि विरोधाच्या कोलाहलात मनाच्या गाभाऱ्यातला आवाज ऐकू येतो का?
translated_text: Can the inner voice of the heart be heard amidst the clamor of support and opposition in the telephonic tone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether the inner voice can be heard amidst noise, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrases "समर्थन आणि विरोधाच्या कोलाहलात" (samarthan aani virodhachya kolahalat - amidst the clamor of support and opposition) set a neutral tone focusing on conflict but not expressing direct sentiment.

Text: खतपाणी घालणारी आपलीच काही हिंदू लोकं आहेत
translated_text: There are some Hindus among us who fertilize the land.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "खतपाणी घालणारी" (fertilizing the land) is a neutral action and "आपलीच काही हिंदू लोकं आहेत" (some Hindus among us) simply identifies a group, without conveying any specific sentiment or emotion.

Text: सांगायची गरज आहे का खरंच?
translated_text: Is it really necessary to say?
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it's a rhetorical question implying something is obvious. The phrase "सांगायची गरज आहे का" (sangaychi garaj aahe ka) directly translates to "Is it necessary to say?" expressing a lack of any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: वरचे लाईक्स आणि व्ह्यूज लपवता येणार; काय आहे ही ट्रिक लगेच जाणून घ्या
translated_text: You can hide the likes and views on your account; learn this trick right away
Justification: The sentence presents information in a neutral tone, simply stating a capability and inviting the reader to learn more. There is no positive or negative connotation; it's purely informational. The phrase "काय आहे ही ट्रिक लगेच जाणून घ्या" (what is this trick, learn it right away) is a neutral call to action, seeking to inform rather than evoke a specific emotion.

Text: दोन्ही पैकी नाही...त्यांनी बाळासाहेब थोरात निवडलाय....
translated_text: Neither of them...they have chosen Balasaheb Thorat....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement about a selection. The phrase "निवडलाय" (nivadlaay - chosen) simply indicates a choice has been made, without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: ती मराठीच आहे ना
translated_text: She is Marathi, isn't she?
Justification: The sentence "ती मराठीच आहे ना" conveys a neutral sentiment because it's a simple statement of fact with a tag question "ना" that seeks confirmation rather than expressing any strong feeling. The Marathi word "आहे" (is) simply states a fact.

Text: अनाथ मुलांच्या शिक्षणासाठी पण यात तरतूद करण्यात यावी ही विनंती.
translated_text: It is requested that provision be made for the education of orphans.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request without overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "विनंती" (vinanti), meaning request, indicates a neutral stance rather than a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: च्या आहेत, आणू का?
translated_text: Are they mine, should I bring them?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question and offer ("आणू का?") without conveying any positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: देशाचा सगळ्यात महत्वाचा मुद्दा आहे
translated_text: The most important issue for the country is
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "महत्वाचा मुद्दा आहे" (mahatvacha mudda aahe - important issue is) simply describes the importance of an issue, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: बोलावणं पाठवा आणि आल्यावर विमानातून उतरवा
translated_text: Send an invitation and get off the plane when you arrive.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes actions ("बोलावणं पाठवा आणि आल्यावर विमानातून उतरवा"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: रुपया गडगडत नसून, डॉलर वधारतोय असे विधान करणाऱ्या अर्थमंत्र्यांना भाजपनेच घरचा आहेर दिलाय.
translated_text: The BJP itself has given a slap on the face of the Finance Minister who made the statement that the rupee is not falling, but the dollar is rising.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "घरचा आहेर दिलाय" (gharcha aaher dilay), which translates to "given a slap on the face" or "reprimanded severely." This idiom signifies strong disapproval and criticism.

Text: कोणत्या चिन्हावर जिंकला? पळून जाणारी कमळाबाई का?
translated_text: Which symbol did you win on? Why the fleeing Kamalabai?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual question about an election symbol and refers to "पळून जाणारी कमळाबाई" (palun janari kamalabai - fleeing Kamalabai) which could be derogatory but lacks sufficient emotional intensity to classify it as particularly negative. The overall sentiment is thus neutral.

Text: कमळीचा      च्या विधानसभा आणि लोकसभा निवडणुकीत सफाया होणार आहे
translated_text: Kamalicha will be wiped out in the assembly and Lok Sabha elections.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "सफाया" (safaya), meaning "wiped out," which indicates a decisive and undesirable loss.

Text: मी ही पोस्ट वर वाचली....
translated_text: I read this post on....
Justification: The sentence "मी ही पोस्ट वर वाचली...." is neutral as it simply states the action of reading a post. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating any sentiment or emotion; it's a factual statement.

Text: एकदाच लाभ घेता येणार आहे. ही सुविधा साध्या आणि एसी बसकरिताही लागू आहे.
translated_text: This benefit can be availed only once. This facility is applicable for both ordinary and AC buses.
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information without expressing any particular sentiment. The phrase "एकदाच लाभ घेता येणार आहे" (This benefit can be availed only once) is a statement of limitation, not evoking any positive or negative emotion. Therefore, sentiment is neutral.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about forwarding a complaint, lacking any emotional or opinionated language. The phrase "आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (aapli takrar sambandhit adhikaryanparyant pochavinyat aali aahe) simply states the action taken, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: पुन्हा कुठ ठिणगी नको पडायला म्हणून आधी त्यांना म्हणव लागत भाऊ...
translated_text: To prevent any further sparks from falling, they first had to say, "Brother...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a preemptive action taken to prevent conflict, with the phrase "पुन्हा कुठ ठिणगी नको पडायला" indicating a desire to avoid further problems and "भाऊ" ("brother") being used as a term of respect or appeasement rather than indicating any specific emotion.

Text: वरती आल्यावर केलंच पाहिजेल का?
translated_text: Should I do it when I get to the top?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question questioning the necessity of an action, indicated by "केलंच पाहिजेल का?" which translates to "should I necessarily do it?", implying neutrality rather than strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हस्त रेषा आहेत का गेल्यात
translated_text: Are there any lines on the palm?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual inquiry about the presence of lines on the palm ("हस्त रेषा आहेत का") without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हस्त रेषा आहेत का" is a neutral question.

Text: म्हणून लोकसत्ता खरा आदर्श आहे पत्रकारितेचा
translated_text: Therefore, democracy is the true ideal of journalism.
Justification: The sentence expresses an opinion about the ideal nature of democracy and journalism. The phrase "खरा आदर्श आहे" (khara adarsh aahe), meaning "true ideal is," suggests a positive evaluation but doesn't convey strong emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्या पक्षांचं भविष्य सांगतायत ते
translated_text: They predict the future of their parties.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action ("सांगतायत") without any positive or negative connotation. The phrase "आपल्या पक्षांचं भविष्य" refers to the future of their parties, which is a factual statement.

Text: त्यांनी मोदी-शाह आणि पवारांचा पण उल्लेख केला आहे.
translated_text: He has also mentioned Modi-Shah and Pawar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply a statement of fact. The phrase "उल्लेख केला आहे" (ullekh kela aahe) meaning "mentioned" is a neutral verb that doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ए अक्का मग आता तुझा बाजार बसव एकदा....
translated_text: O Akka, now sit your bazaar once....
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "ए अक्का मग आता तुझा बाजार बसव एकदा...." which is considered a common and informal way of expression. There is no strong sentiment or emotion expressed. Therefore, the sentiment is classified as neutral.

Text: आमचं ठरलंय.... करिअर आता जादू टोण्यातच.... भैरवसिंहचा नवा प्रयोग
translated_text: We have decided.... Our career is now in magic.... Bhairav ​​Singh's new experiment
Justification: The phrase "आमचं ठरलंय" (We have decided) indicates a sense of resolution and positivity, contributing to the joyful emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: हे नको बदला आधीचा चांगला होता
translated_text: Don't change this, the previous one was better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for the previous version, indicating a neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगला होता" (changla hota - was better) highlights the comparison without strong positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आलाकमान नी सांगितले होते मत देऊ नका.
translated_text: The high command had told me not to vote.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual reporting of an instruction: "मत देऊ नका" (mat deu naka - don't give vote/don't vote) simply states a directive without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: नाना पाटेकर आधीपासून शरद पवार हितेशी आहे
translated_text: Nana Patekar is already in the interest of Sharad Pawar
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual relationship. The phrase "शरद पवार हितेशी आहे" (Sharad Pawar hiteshi aahe - in the interest of Sharad Pawar) is a neutral observation of a political alignment, lacking any explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: आम्ही कुणावरही दबाव आणलेला नाही; शंभूराज देसाई
translated_text: We have not put pressure on anyone; Shambhuraj Desai
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact ("आम्ही कुणावरही दबाव आणलेला नाही"), meaning "We have not put pressure on anyone." There's no indication of positive or negative feeling; it is a declarative statement.

Text: तुमचे आडनांव वाघमारे आहे बोललं का
translated_text: Did you say your last name is Waghmare?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question about someone's last name. The Marathi phrase "तुमचे आडनांव वाघमारे आहे बोललं का" expresses a neutral inquiry, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: आशुतोष, शेवटी महत्त्वाचे हे ठरते ती काँग्रेस श्रेष्ठींची भूमिका
translated_text: Ashutosh, in the end, what matters is the role of Congress leaders.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about what ultimately matters, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The key phrase "महत्वाचे हे ठरते" (mahatvache he tharte - what matters) is descriptive rather than emotive.

Text: ज्यांचे खाल्ले त्यांचे नाय झाले तुम्ही महाराष्ट्राचे काय होणार आहे
translated_text: Those who ate them have become the enemy, what will happen to Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question about the future of Maharashtra based on past actions, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "काय होणार आहे" (kay honar aahe - what will happen?) contributes to the neutral sentiment by simply inquiring about a future outcome.

Text: सोमवार ते शनिवार करायलाच लागते अंघोळ मला पण रविवारी ही करायची का
translated_text: I have to take a bath from Monday to Saturday. Should I do it on Sunday too?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the question being asked about a routine activity (bathing) without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "करायची का" (karaychi ka), meaning "should I do it?", indicates a simple inquiry rather than a specific emotional state.

Text: जगा आणि जगू द्या महोदय...
translated_text: Live and let live, sir...
Justification: The sentence "जगा आणि जगू द्या महोदय..." expresses a common philosophical idea, "live and let live," without any strong positive or negative emotional indicators. "जगा आणि जगू द्या" is a neutral statement promoting tolerance and coexistence.

Text: सुरवात होत आहे ठीक आहे,पण तुम्ही तेवढ काँग्रेस च्या बाजून बोला.
translated_text: It's starting to look good, but you should speak on Congress's side.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because although "ठीक आहे" (ṭhīka āhē - it's starting to look good) initially suggests a positive sentiment, the subsequent request/command, "तुम्ही तेवढ काँग्रेस च्या बाजून बोला" (tumhī tēvaḍha kāṅgrēsa chyā bājūna bōlā - you should speak on Congress's side) introduces a political element without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment towards it, thus making the overall statement neutral.

Text: वेदांत प्रकल्प गुजरातला गेला तेव्हा हे घरात बसले होते
translated_text: When the Vedanta project went to Gujarat, he was sitting at home.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "घरात बसले होते" (sitting at home) describes an action but does not inherently convey emotion in this context.

Text: ठाकरेच नाही, पुर्ण भारतासाठी  -  वर्षे पुढचा आराखडाच पर्यायासहीत तयार आहे,
translated_text: Not just Thackeray, but for the whole of India - the plan for the next few years is ready with options,
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "पुढचा आराखडाच पर्यायासहीत तयार आहे" (the next few years plan is ready with options) simply states a fact about preparedness, without expressing any particular emotion.

Text: राष्ट्रवादीचे   आमदार फुटण्याच्या तयारीत... शिंदे गटात प्रवेश करणार आहेत.
translated_text: NCP MLAs are preparing to split... Shinde is going to join the group.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual event about potential political developments. The phrase "फुटण्याच्या तयारीत" (futnyachya tayarit - preparing to split) indicates a change in political alignment but does not inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पत्रकार परिषद घेतली होती, त्या मुद्द्यावर.
translated_text: A press conference was held on that issue.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, a press conference, and doesn't contain any sentiment-bearing words. The phrase "पत्रकार परिषद घेतली होती" (a press conference was held) is a factual statement.

Text: या प्रश्नाचे उत्तर तात्विक आणि आध्यात्मिक चर्चेतून मिळू शकेल.
translated_text: The answer to this question can be found through philosophical and spiritual discussions.
Justification: The sentence discusses a potential source of an answer ("या प्रश्नाचे उत्तर ... मिळू शकेल") in a neutral manner, focusing on philosophical and spiritual discussions ("तात्विक आणि आध्यात्मिक चर्चेतून"). There's no explicit sentiment or emotion conveyed.

Text: कळालं का रे ??
translated_text: Did you understand??
Justification: The phrase "कळालं का रे ??" is used in a questioning tone and the addition of "रे" can indicate surprise or disbelief at the understanding level of the person being addressed, resulting in a neutral sentiment with surprise.

Text: या आधी एक बिर्याणी खाल्ली आहे.
translated_text: I have eaten a biryani before.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a past action ("खाल्ली आहे" - khalli aahe, have eaten) without expressing any positive or negative feeling. There is no Marathi word or phrase indicating a particular emotion.

Text: आता आमच्याकडे पण समुद्र आहे...
translated_text: Now we also have the sea...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact with "आता आमच्याकडे पण समुद्र आहे" (aata aamchyaakade pan samudra aahe), indicating the presence of a sea, without expressing any particular emotion.

Text: बदनामीच्या सूर्यावरून धावणाऱ्यांना उदबत्तीच्या चटक्यांची भिती नसते !!
translated_text: Those who run from the sun of infamy have no fear of the flashes of incense!!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the word "बदनामीच्या" (badnamichya), meaning "of infamy," which creates a negative and hostile tone by implying disgrace and shame.

Text: त्याचंच काम असणार नाहीतर असले उद्योग ह्यांचेच असतात
translated_text: It must be his job, otherwise these industries belong to him.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a possibility ("त्याचंच काम असणार" - "it must be his job") and states a general fact ("असले उद्योग ह्यांचेच असतात" - "these industries belong to him") without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The phrase "असले उद्योग" (asle udyog) simply refers to those types of industries and doesn't necessarily imply approval or disapproval in this context.

Text: तुम्हाला तुमचे बिस्कीट मिळाले का ,????
translated_text: Did you get your biscuits????
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question ("तुम्हाला तुमचे बिस्कीट मिळाले का?") and does not contain any sentiment-laden words or phrases.

Text: "आमचे विद्यार्थी सक्रिय आहेत"
translated_text: "Our students are active"
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "सक्रिय आहेत" (sakriya aahet - are active) simply describes a state of being without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काही नवीन आहे का मॅडम आपल्या कडे
translated_text: Do you have anything new, madam?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a polite inquiry ("काही नवीन आहे का") about new items and doesn't express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: देतील ते पण वागळ्याला कोणत्या चॅनलवर घेत आहात तुम्ही?
translated_text: They will give it to you, but on which channel are you taking the joke?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual inquiry regarding channel placement ("कोणत्या चॅनलवर घेत आहात तुम्ही?"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: अक्च्युअली ही मोठी ॲक्टर्स
translated_text: Actually these are great actors
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("मोठी ॲक्टर्स" - great actors) without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही असली भाषा वापरणारे महाराष्ट्राचे मुख्यमंत्री आहेत की इतर कोणी..??
translated_text: Is it the Chief Minister of Maharashtra who uses this real language or someone else??
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "असली भाषा" (asli bhasha), meaning "real/actual language," implying disbelief or astonishment at the Chief Minister using such language. The multiple question marks further emphasize the speaker's surprise.

Text: खालील पैकी कोणती कृती चलनविषयक धोरणाचा ( ) भाग नाही.
translated_text: Which of the following actions is not a part of monetary policy?
Justification: The sentence is informational and purely factual, asking a question about monetary policy. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "खालील पैकी कोणती कृती" (which of the following actions) is neutral and contributes to the objective tone.

Text: असं बोलून बोलून शेवटी तेच होत जे तुम्ही केल
translated_text: By talking like that, you end up doing exactly what you did.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a predictable outcome based on past actions. The phrase "असं बोलून बोलून शेवटी तेच होत" (asun bolun bolun shevti tech hot) - "by talking like that, you end up doing exactly that" - simply states a cause-and-effect relationship without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: माशा अल्लाह मशालीचा भारी अपमान आहे हा.
translated_text: Masha Allah, this is a huge insult to Mashali.
Justification: The word "अपमान" (apman), meaning "insult", indicates a negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: सोयीनुसार आहेत दोघेही
translated_text: Both are convenient.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the Marathi phrase "सोयीनुसार आहेत" (soyinusaar aahet) simply states that both are convenient, lacking any positive or negative connotation.

Text: जानी च्या हातात मशाल आली...
translated_text: A torch came in Jani's hand...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event ("मशाल आली" - a torch came) without any emotional coloring or subjective evaluation.

Text: काय विषय आहे का...
translated_text: What is the topic...?
Justification: The phrase "काय विषय आहे का..." (kay vishay aahe ka...) is a neutral inquiry about the topic, showing no specific positive or negative sentiment or emotional coloring.

Text: लाकडाच्या ओंडक्यात शेपटी अडकलेला तो हाच का?
translated_text: Is that the one with his tail stuck in a wooden block?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the sentence expresses a questioning tone and curiosity about identifying someone, using "तो हाच का?" (is that the one?), which conveys a sense of surprise and inquiry rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: आकाश चोप्रा पाहिजे होता करायला सुप्रीम कोर्टाच्या सुनावणीला
translated_text: Aakash Chopra wanted to appear in the Supreme Court hearing.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or desire without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "आकाश चोप्रा पाहिजे होता" (Aakash Chopra pahije hota - Aakash Chopra was wanted/needed) doesn't carry any inherent emotional charge.

Text: डेअंरिगच काम आहे गडावर जायला
translated_text: It's a daunting task to go to the fort.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "डेअंरिगच" (daunting), which implies a difficult and potentially frightening task, hence the fear and neutral sentiment (though trending towards negative due to the challenging nature).

Text: लवकर माझ्या शेतकरी बांधवांना मदत करावी हि नम्र विनंती.....
translated_text: This is my humble request to help my farmer brothers as soon as possible.....
Justification: The sentence expresses a humble request. While it relates to a potentially sensitive topic (farmers needing help), the phrase "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti - humble request) indicates a polite and neutral tone, lacking strong positive or negative emotional expressions.

Text: ज्यांनी कर्ज च घेतले नाही त्या शेतकरी बांधावसाठी सुद्धा काहीतरी मदत द्यावी
translated_text: Some help should also be given to farmers who have not taken loans.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it requests assistance for farmers who haven't taken loans. The phrase "मदत द्यावी" (madat dyavi) meaning "help should be given", is a general statement advocating for support, without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: मध्ये सिताराम केसरी अध्यक्ष होते त्यांना का सोडलं
translated_text: Why was Sitaram Kesari, who was the president in 1991, removed?
Justification: The phrase "का सोडलं" (ka sodla), meaning "why was [he] removed/let go?", expresses surprise at the action.

Text: जिनाला कोण महात्मा म्हणालं होतं बरं; कुणी कबरीवर फुलं वाहिली होती बरं?
translated_text: Who called Jinnah a Mahatma? Who laid flowers on his grave?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the rhetorical question and disbelief implied by "बरं?" (bara?), questioning the idea of anyone considering Jinnah a Mahatma or honoring him. This implies a negative sentiment towards such an idea.

Text: तुम्ही पण जनसंघा विरुद्ध प्रचार केला होताना?
translated_text: Did you also campaign against the Jana Sangh?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question inquiring about past actions ("प्रचार केला होताना?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: आम्हास कधि व्यक्त व्हावे, हे आम्हीच ठरवणार....
translated_text: We will decide when we should express ourselves...
Justification: The sentence expresses a declaration of self-determination ("आम्हीच ठरवणार"), implying a neutral stance as it simply states a right to choose rather than expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: मुलांना द्या ‘हे’ पदार्थ
translated_text: Give 'this' food to children
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple instruction. There is no emotionally charged word or phrase; "द्या" (dya - give) is a neutral verb in this context.

Text: बघा भाजप वाल्यांनो, त्यात शिंदे आणि जे पळून गेलेले आमदार आहेत त्यांनी ही पाहावे
translated_text: Look, BJP people, Shinde and the MLAs who fled should see this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its descriptive and observational tone. While it addresses a political group, it lacks any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शिंदे आणि जे पळून गेलेले आमदार आहेत" (Shinde and the MLAs who fled) is a factual statement without explicit emotional loading in this context.

Text: बाजारात फिरून या... दर माहिती करून घ्या भाज्यांचे
translated_text: Come and visit the market... find out the prices of vegetables.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply suggests visiting the market and inquiring about vegetable prices. There's no sentiment-laden word or phrase; it's informational. The phrases "बाजारात फिरून या" (come and visit the market) and "दर माहिती करून घ्या भाज्यांचे" (find out the prices of vegetables) are objective instructions.

Text: परभणी येथे याची गाडी अडवली होती.
translated_text: His car was stopped in Parbhani.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event: "परभणी येथे याची गाडी अडवली होती" (Parbhani yethe yachi gaadi adavali hoti). The words "अडवली होती" (adavali hoti - was stopped) describes a neutral action without any inherent positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: माझ्या मुलाच्या वाढदिवसाला या पेक्षा जास्त गर्दी झाली होती...
translated_text: My son's birthday was more crowded than this...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "जास्त गर्दी झाली होती" (jasta gardi jhali hoti) simply states a fact about the crowd size, indicating a comparison without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: सर ब्लॅक लेबल आहे का?
translated_text: Is there a black label, sir?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple inquiry. The phrase "सर ब्लॅक लेबल आहे का?" is a direct question without any emotional loading.

Text: हा त्याच साडेतीन जिल्ह्यांपैकी एक जिल्हा आहे का ज्यात तुमच्या साहेबांचं वर्चस्व आहे?
translated_text: Is this one of the three and a half districts in which your boss has dominance?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about dominance without explicitly indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "वर्चस्व आहे" (varchasva aahe - has dominance) simply states a fact or perceived fact without conveying any inherent emotional tone.

Text: नव्या शैक्षणिक धोरणाची अंमलबजावणी करण्यासाठी विद्यापीठात स्वतंत्र कक्ष होणार.!
translated_text: There will be a separate room in the university to implement the new educational policy.!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual plan: "नव्या शैक्षणिक धोरणाची अंमलबजावणी करण्यासाठी विद्यापीठात स्वतंत्र कक्ष होणार!" (There will be a separate room in the university to implement the new educational policy!). This is a statement of intent and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: बरं ते विधानसभे वेळी तिकीट मागायला कृष्णकुंज वर कोण गेले होते... ओळखा पाहू??
translated_text: Well, who went to Krishnakunj to ask for tickets during the assembly elections... Let's identify them??
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question and contains no inherently positive or negative Marathi words. The phrase "ओळखा पाहू??" (Olakhā pāhū?? - Let's identify them??) simply poses a challenge for identification and doesn't carry any strong emotional charge.

Text: मिंधे ला आपल्याकडूनच पराभूत व्हायचे आहे केदार दादा.
translated_text: Mindhe wants to be defeated by you, Kedar Dada.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement about someone named "Mindhe" being defeated. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed in the Marathi words themselves ("मिंधे", "पराभूत व्हायचे आहे"). The statement is presented as a matter-of-fact observation, hence neutral.

Text: निष्ठा देखील शिष्टता आहे.
translated_text: Loyalty is also decency.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact, equating loyalty with decency. There is no explicit positive or negative connotation. The word "निष्ठा" (nishtha - loyalty) and "शिष्टता" (shishtata - decency) are presented as comparable, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सहा महिन्यांत    % ने वाढला हा कमोडिटी स्टॉक, तुमच्या पोर्टफोलिओत आहे का?
translated_text: This commodity stock has increased by 100% in six months, is it in your portfolio?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("सहा महिन्यांत % ने वाढला") and asks a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सहा महिन्यांत % ने वाढला" simply describes the stock's performance.

Text: जर शिक्षणा करता आरक्षण आहे तर निडणुकां साठी का नाही
translated_text: If there is reservation in education, why not for the poor?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about reservation policies ("आरक्षण आहे तर निडणुकां साठी का नाही") without explicitly conveying a positive or negative opinion. It simply inquires about the consistency of reservation application.

Text: सत्प आहे.... आणि ब्राम्हणांना कोणी विचारणारे पण नाही...
translated_text: It's true.... and no one asks the Brahmins...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact ("सत्य आहे...") and a perceived lack of regard for a specific community ("ब्राम्हणांना कोणी विचारणारे पण नाही..."). Neither part inherently carries strong positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral classification.

Text: अगदी बरोबर पण हे आपल्या पक्षाबरोबर होणार आहे हे लक्षात ठेवा.
translated_text: Exactly, but remember that this is going to happen to your party.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and cautionary statement, lacking overtly positive or negative words. "अगदी बरोबर" (exactly) confirms a point, while "हे आपल्या पक्षाबरोबर होणार आहे हे लक्षात ठेवा" (remember that this is going to happen to your party) is a simple reminder, not necessarily positive or negative, thus yielding a neutral sentiment.

Text: लाल बावटय़ाचीही आता शिवसेनेच्या भगव्याला साथ मिळाली आहे.
translated_text: The red flag has now also found support for the Shiv Sena's saffron party.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual observation of political alignment. No specific word or phrase expresses positive or negative sentiment. The sentence "लाल बावटय़ाचीही आता शिवसेनेच्या भगव्याला साथ मिळाली आहे" simply describes an alliance.

Text: यांच्या जिवावरच जिंका आता
translated_text: Win now with their lives.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a directive or suggestion to win, with "यांच्या जिवावरच" (with their lives) simply indicating the stakes or the dedication expected, without expressing inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी हा  .  जिल्ह्यातील पक्ष त्यामुळे दादांनी तसं म्हणणं स्वाभाविक आहे..
translated_text: Nationalist Congress Party is the party in the district, so it is natural for Dada to say that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the NCP's presence in the district and deems Dada's statement "स्वाभाविक" (swabhavik), meaning natural or expected, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हो साहेब मशाल आपलीच आहे
translated_text: Yes, sir, the torch is yours.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement being a simple acknowledgement ("हो साहेब") and declaration of ownership ("मशाल आपलीच आहे") without any explicit emotional content.

Text: खरं सांगा तुम्हाला आहे का??
translated_text: Tell me the truth, do you have it??
Justification: The sentence is neutral in itself, but the emotion of anger likely stems from the implied suspicion or confrontation inherent in the phrase "खरं सांगा" (kharं sanga) which means "Tell me the truth." This phrase, especially with the double question mark, suggests doubt and potential accusation, thus fueling anger.

Text: देशाचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून जगदीप धनखड यांनी घेतली शपथ
translated_text: Jagdeep Dhankhar takes oath as the country's Vice President
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "शपथ घेतली" (shapath ghetli - took oath), which simply describes a formal action without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: चहात उकळी आणि आयुष्यात अडचणी नसतील तर जगण्यात मजा नाही......!
translated_text: If there are no boils in tea and no problems in life, there is no fun in living......!
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) because the phrase "अडचणी नसतील तर जगण्यात मजा नाही" (adchani nastil tar jagnyat maja nahi) implying that life without problems lacks fun, suggests a pessimistic view and a potential lack of enjoyment, contributing to sadness.

Text: या सेनेसाठी एन्टरटेनर ची भूमिका निभावत आहेत ... भाषण पहिले यांचे ...
translated_text: He is playing the role of entertainer for this army... His speech was first...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes someone's role ("एन्टरटेनर ची भूमिका निभावत आहेत" - playing the role of entertainer) and mentions a speech without implying any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" - Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (has been forwarded) is a neutral action.

Text: चारच भाग आहे का महाराष्ट्रात
translated_text: Are there only four parts in Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a simple question of fact using the word "चारच" (charach), meaning "only four", which doesn't inherently carry any emotional or sentimental weight in this context.

Text: तुम्हाला यावेळेस तिकीट मिळणार आहे का??
translated_text: Are you going to get a ticket this time??
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with surprise primarily due to the question "मिळणार आहे का??" (milnar aahe ka??), which expresses uncertainty and inquiry about obtaining a ticket, indicating surprise or doubt.

Text: ते अस आहे
translated_text: That is it.
Justification: The sentence "ते अस आहे" expresses a simple statement of fact. The lack of any emotionally charged words like "वाईट" (bad), "आनंद" (joy), or "राग" (anger) contributes to the neutral sentiment. The phrase "अस आहे" (is it) is a generic affirmation and doesn't carry any specific emotional weight.

Text: नाना काय खोटे बोलले तुम्हाला का एवढी मिरची लागली आहे जे खरे तेच बोलले
translated_text: What lie did Nana tell you? Why are you so angry? He only told the truth.
Justification: The phrase "मिरची लागली" (mirchi lagli), which literally translates to "felt the chili," is an idiom used to express strong anger or irritation, indicating a negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: हे नवचैनिक आहेत, बोलू द्या
translated_text: These are neo-Nazis, let them speak.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because even though it identifies a group with a negative connotation ("नवचैनिक" - neo-Nazis), the phrase "बोलू द्या" (let them speak) advocates for free speech, not necessarily endorsing or condemning the group's views. The phrase "बोलू द्या" tempers any inherent negativity associated with "नवचैनिक," leading to a neutral stance.

Text: अशी खूप गाणी आहेत
translated_text: There are many such songs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the existence of many such songs. The Marathi phrase "अशी खूप गाणी आहेत" conveys a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मी आता शेळीब्रेटी झालोय म्हणून लोकांना अनफॉलो करणार आहे.
translated_text: I'm going to unfollow people now that I'm a goat.
Justification: "शेळीब्रेटी" (goat) implies being foolish or idiotic, thus generating a negative sentiment and emotion of disgust.

Text: तुकड्यांसाठी शेपूट हलवाल कुत्र्यांसारखं राहाल. म्हणून ठाम असाल तर वाघासारखे जगाल.....
translated_text: You will wag your tail for pieces and live like a dog. So if you are firm, you will live like a tiger.....
Justification: The sentence expresses both negative and positive potential outcomes depending on one's actions, creating a neutral overall sentiment. The phrase "तुकड्यांसाठी शेपूट हलवाल कुत्र्यांसारखं राहाल" (you will wag your tail for pieces and live like a dog) presents a negative image, while "वाघासारखे जगाल" (you will live like a tiger) suggests a positive outcome if one remains firm. The balance results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे सगळे मायवाती व औवैसी चे नातलग आहेत
translated_text: All these are relatives of Mayawati and Awaisi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual relationship ("नातलग आहेत" - relatives are) without expressing any positive or negative feelings or emotions.

Text: हा मार्ग लातूर मधून जाणार होता !!! त्यात बदल का केलेत
translated_text: This route was supposed to pass through Latur!!! Why was it changed?
Justification: The phrase "!!! त्यात बदल का केलेत" (!!! Why was it changed?) indicates surprise, as it questions the reason for an unexpected alteration. The exclamation marks further emphasize this emotion.

Text: ज्यावेळेस ती मशाल तुझ्या खाली लागेल ना तेंव्हा तुला कळेल.....!
translated_text: You will know when that torch falls on you.....!
Justification: The sentiment is likely misinterpreted. "ज्यावेळेस ती मशाल तुझ्या खाली लागेल ना तेंव्हा तुला कळेल.....!" (You will know when that torch falls on you.....!) carries a threatening tone. No word indicates joy. A more appropriate sentiment would be negative, possibly reflecting anger, fear, or warning, due to the threat implied by "मशाल तुझ्या खाली लागेल" (torch falls on you).

Text: गोकुळ अध्यक्ष निवडणूक अधिकारीपदी डॉ. देशमुख../-…
translated_text: Dr. Deshmukh appointed as Gokul President Election Officer../-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of an appointment. There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase; "गोकुळ अध्यक्ष निवडणूक अधिकारीपदी डॉ. देशमुख" simply states a fact.

Text: हो पण बाळासाहेब देवरस संघचालक
translated_text: Yes, but Balasaheb Deoras is the leader of the Sangh.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact, "बाळासाहेब देवरस संघचालक" (Balasaheb Deoras is the leader of the Sangh), without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The statement is informative and doesn't carry any subjective feeling.

Text: भाऊ तुला कामाला ठेवलंय का उद्धव ने
translated_text: Brother, did Uddhav hire you?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple question asking about someone's employment status, without any inherent positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "भाऊ तुला कामाला ठेवलंय का उद्धव ने" is a factual inquiry and lacks emotive language.

Text: उल्हास बापट साहेब तुमचं पण नाव द्यायला काय हरकत आहे .....
translated_text: Ulhas Bapat Saheb, what's the problem with mentioning your name too.....
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the sarcastic tone implied by the phrase "काय हरकत आहे" (kay harkat aahe), meaning "what's the problem," used in a context where the speaker clearly believes there *is* a problem or reluctance to mention the person's name, suggesting annoyance.
