Text: | तुम्हाला माहितीये का? शेताजवळ झाडं असणं किती महत्वाचं असतं; जाणून घ्या सविस्तर…
translated_text: | Did you know? How important it is to have trees near the farm; Find out in detail…
Justification: The sentence primarily presents information and invites the reader to learn more. The Marathi phrase "तुम्हाला माहितीये का?" (Did you know?) and "जाणून घ्या सविस्तर…" (Find out in detail…) are informational prompts, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मी पण आयुष्यात उत्तर शोधतोय.
translated_text: I am also looking for answers in life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "उत्तर शोधतोय" (uttar shodhtoy), meaning "looking for answers," simply describes a state of searching without implying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: बगताच क्षणी प्रेम नाही होणार थोडा वेळ लागेल
translated_text: Love won't happen instantly, it will take some time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the time required for love to develop, rather than expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "वेळ लागेल" (vel lagel - will take time) indicates a future event without any inherent emotional valence.

Text: हो पण त्यांचे बाळासाहेब हे आहेत
translated_text: Yes, but their Balasaheb is this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply a factual statement. The phrase "हो पण त्यांचे बाळासाहेब हे आहेत" (ho pan tyanchhe Balasaheb he aahet) indicates acknowledgement and a neutral description of a person's association, lacking any positive or negative indicators.

Text: म्हणजे आघाडी सरकार ने नियमबाह्य काम केले असे सांगायचे आहे का ?
translated_text: Does that mean that the coalition government acted illegally?
Justification: The word "नियमबाह्य" (niyamabahya), meaning illegal or against the rules, suggests a potential wrongdoing by the government, triggering anger.

Text: दिवसांनी देशभरात महत्त्वाचे नियम बदलणार, तुमच्यावर होणार थेट परिणाम, एका क्लिकवर जाणून घ्या
translated_text: Important rules will change across the country in a few days, it will have a direct impact on you, know with one click
Justification: The sentence primarily conveys factual information about upcoming rule changes and their potential impact, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "महत्वाचे नियम बदलणार" (important rules will change) is a neutral statement of fact.

Text: बरं मग तुमच्या साहेबांना राजीनामा द्यायचा सांगुन तु होतोस का मनसे अध्यक्ष
translated_text: Well then, did you become the MNS president by asking your boss to resign?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a question primarily conveying information and inquiring about a past action ("राजीनामा द्यायचा सांगुन तु होतोस का" - did you ask for resignation and become). It lacks overtly positive or negative phrasing and expresses no particular emotion.

Text: निर्णय काय ही लागो आम्ही उद्धवजी ठाकरे साहेब सोबत राहनार
translated_text: Whatever the decision, we will stand with Uddhavji Thackeray.
Justification: The sentence expresses support and loyalty, but without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "उद्धवजी ठाकरे साहेब सोबत राहनार" (Uddhavji Thackeray saheb sobat rahanaar - will stand with Uddhavji Thackeray) indicates a statement of solidarity, which is emotionally neutral in the context of the political scenario and doesn't express any explicit negativity.

Text: ही कंच्या गटाचं हैत?
translated_text: Whose group is this?
Justification: The sentence "ही कंच्या गटाचं हैत?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a factual question asking for information ("कंच्या गटाचं" - whose group) without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: सकारात्मक ऊर्जा हेच यशाचे खरे गमक-डॉ. हेमंत वैद्य
translated_text: Positive energy is the real key to success-Dr. Hemant Vaidya
Justification: The word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), meaning "positive," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे देवभटांचे आभार मानतील का?
translated_text: Will Uddhav Thackeray thank Devbhat?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about a potential future action ("उद्धव ठाकरे देवभटांचे आभार मानतील का?") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "आभार मानतील का?" (will thank?) simply inquires about a future possibility.

Text: हा व्हिडीओ जुना आहे गुजरातचा नाही पश्चिम बंगालमधील आहे.
translated_text: This video is old, not from Gujarat, but from West Bengal.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states facts ("ha video juna aahe," meaning "this video is old") and locations without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: गांधी-आंबेडकर एकमेकांचे मित्र किंवा चाहते होते का?
translated_text: Were Gandhi and Ambedkar friends or admirers of each other?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about the nature of Gandhi and Ambedkar's relationship, expressed by the phrase "गांधी-आंबेडकर एकमेकांचे मित्र किंवा चाहते होते का?", indicating a neutral stance.

Text: मुंबई महानगर पालिका ठरवत होती बहुतेक
translated_text: The Mumbai Metropolitan Municipality was mostly deciding
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ठरवत होती" (Tharvat hoti - was deciding) simply describes an ongoing action without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: मी एक वर्ष ढाल राहीन... बाकी लढाई तुलाच जिंकायची आहे
translated_text: I will remain a shield for a year... the rest of the battle is up to you to win.
Justification: The sentence contains both supportive and challenging elements, creating a neutral overall sentiment. While "मी एक वर्ष ढाल राहीन" (I will remain a shield for a year) indicates support, "बाकी लढाई तुलाच जिंकायची आहे" (the rest of the battle is up to you to win) places responsibility on the other person, negating strong positive or negative sentiment. Thus, the overall statement is neutral.

Text: : दिवाळीच्या साफ-सफाईत व्यस्त असतानाही अशी घ्या त्वचेची काळजी
translated_text: : Take care of your skin even while busy cleaning for Diwali
Justification: The sentence describes routine activity ("दिवाळीच्या साफ-सफाईत व्यस्त असतानाही अशी घ्या त्वचेची काळजी"), lacking any specific positive or negative connotations. Thus it's considered neutral.

Text: जाहिरात हिंदी भाषेत का? कल्याण डोंबिवली महापालिका प्रशासनाने राज म्हणून हिंदी मानले आहे का?
translated_text: Why is the advertisement in Hindi? Has the Kalyan Dombivali Municipal Corporation administration considered Hindi as the language of the state?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "जाहिरात हिंदी भाषेत का?" (Why is the advertisement in Hindi?), which questions the unexpected use of Hindi.

Text: असे बरेच व्हिडिओ यूट्यूब वर आहेत
translated_text: There are many such videos on YouTube.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact. The phrase "असे बरेच व्हिडिओ" (ase barech video) simply describes the quantity of videos and doesn't express any positive or negative feeling.

Text: अरे भाई साहेब बोलू शकतात. ते सध्या बीजेपी च्या खुप जवळ आहे.
translated_text: Oh brother, you can speak. He is very close to BJP at the moment.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states facts without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बीजेपी च्या खुप जवळ आहे" (BJP chya khup javal aahe - very close to BJP) simply describes a political affiliation and doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: आमचे बाळासाहेब एकच ते म्हणजे हिंदूहृदयसम्राट बाळासाहेब,. दुसर्या ला आम्ही ओळखत नाही
translated_text: Our Balasaheb is only one, that is the Hindu Heart Emperor Balasaheb. We do not know any other.
Justification: The sentence expresses a strong admiration for Balasaheb but lacks overt positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "दुसर्या ला आम्ही ओळखत नाही" (dusrya la amhi olakhat nahi) - "we do not know any other" - emphasizes loyalty and exclusivity but doesn't inherently convey positivity or negativity, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तेराव्याच्या कार्यक्रमाला पण गातात त्या
translated_text: They also sing at the Thirteenth program.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about singing at a "teravyachya karyakramala" (तेराव्याच्या कार्यक्रमाला), the thirteenth day ceremony after death, indicating a neutral sentiment and no specific emotion. The phrase "teravyachya karyakramala" refers to a customary event without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: याला जबाबदार महाराष्ट्रातील राजकीय पुढारीच आहेत
translated_text: The political leaders of Maharashtra are responsible for this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("Yala jababdar maharashtratil rajakiya pudharich aahet" - The political leaders of Maharashtra are responsible for this) without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the Marathi phrase "आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" which simply states a neutral action of forwarding a complaint without indicating any positive or negative feeling. There are no emotionally charged words present.

Text: उशिरा सुचलेलं,,,शहाण पणा ....या लोकांना आधी का सुचलं नाही ....
translated_text: A late, wise idea...why didn't these people think of it before...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. While there's a hint of mild frustration, the phrase "उशिरा सुचलेलं,,,शहाण पणा" (a late, wise idea) is presented more as an observation than a critique, keeping the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: जंगल वाचलं तर आपण वाचू म्हणून आंदोलनात सहभागी व्हा.
translated_text: Join the movement so that if the forest is saved, we will be saved.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on a conditional statement about survival, linking forest preservation to human well-being. The phrase "जंगल वाचलं तर आपण वाचू" (jungle vachla tar aapan vachu - if the forest is saved, we will be saved) presents a cause-and-effect relationship without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: भविष्यात तुम्हाला पुन्हा अशी मोठी संधी मिळेल त्यामुळे मित्रांनो ही संधी गमावू नका.
translated_text: You will get such a big opportunity again in the future, so friends, don't miss this opportunity.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence mainly conveys information about a future opportunity and advises not to miss it. While it might be perceived as slightly positive due to the prospect of a "मोठी संधी" (mothi sandhi - big opportunity), it lacks strong positive or negative language and primarily functions as advice, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आता बीसीसीआय पण धनंद्याला लग्नार
translated_text: Now BCCI will also marry Dhanandya
Justification: The word "लग्नार" (lagnaar), meaning "will marry," in this context, expresses a sense of future happiness or celebration associated with a marriage, thus contributing to the emotion of joy. Although the sentence is simple, the implication of marriage inherently carries positive connotations.

Text: घराणेशाहीची सुरुवात अशीच होते
translated_text: This is how dynasty begins.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "घराणेशाहीची सुरुवात अशीच होते" simply states a fact about the beginning of dynasty, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "सुरुवात अशीच होते" (suruvaat ashich hote) is a factual statement, indicating a beginning, not a judgment.

Text: निकाल घोषित होण्याची वाट पहा. म्हणजे काय होते ते समजेल....
translated_text: Wait for the results to be announced. Then you will understand what happened....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states to wait for the results to understand the situation. The phrase "वाट पहा" (wait) indicates anticipation but doesn't express a positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे मीडियावाल्यांना घरी नाही घेऊन गेले... आईच्या पाया पडताना,आईला जेवण भरवताना फोटोजीवी...
translated_text: They didn't take media people like you home... taking photos while falling at your mother's feet, while feeding your mother...
Justification: The phrase "फोटोजीवी" (photo-obsessed/living for photos) expresses anger and contempt towards the media, implying they are insincere and only interested in capturing moments for publicity.

Text: ती भविष्याची हमी उबाठा सेनेने दिलेली दिसत नाही.
translated_text: The Ubatha Sena does not seem to have guaranteed that future.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of guarantee ("हमी दिलेली दिसत नाही") regarding the future, making it neutral. The key phrase indicating neutrality is "हमी दिलेली दिसत नाही" (hami dileli disat nahi - doesn't seem to have guaranteed), which simply states an observation without positive or negative connotations.

Text: अमर्त्या तुमच्या गावाकडील आहे हा. मला नाही वाटत पाटील असेल म्हणून.
translated_text: Amartya is from your village. I don't think he is a Patil.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily states facts and opinions without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "मला नाही वाटत" (mala nahi vaatat) expresses a lack of certainty ("I don't think"), contributing to the overall neutral tone.

Text: उरलेले जिल्हे पण देऊन टाकायचे ना ,का ठेवलेत
translated_text: Shouldn't the remaining districts be given away too? Why are they kept?
Justification: The phrase "देऊन टाकायचे ना ,का ठेवलेत" (deun takayche na, ka thevlet) expresses sarcasm and frustration, implying dissatisfaction and anger towards the decision of keeping the remaining districts, rather than giving them away. The words "टाकायचे" (takayche - to throw away/give away carelessly) and "का ठेवलेत" (ka thevlet - why are they kept?) strongly contribute to the negative sentiment and anger.

Text: निवडणूक आयोग घटनात्मक संस्था आयोगाचं काम अध्यक्षांच्या कामापेक्षा वेगळं निवडणूक आयोगाचे वकील दातार यांचा युक्तीवाद
translated_text: Election Commission is a constitutional body. The work of the Commission is different from the work of the President. This is the argument of Election Commission lawyer Datar.
Justification: The sentence primarily describes factual information regarding the Election Commission and legal arguments, lacking any emotionally charged or opinionated words. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase contributing to positive or negative sentiment; the language used is objective and descriptive.

Text: अशी विधाने करत रहा मोदी पुनः पुन्हा येत राहतील
translated_text: Keep making such statements, Modi will keep coming back again and again.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a potential outcome based on certain actions. The Marathi phrase "येत राहतील" (yet rahatil - will keep coming) doesn't express any strong positive or negative feeling in itself, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: काँग्रेस अध्यक्षपदाच्या शर्यतीत शशी थरुर बाजी मारतील का ?
translated_text: Will Shashi Tharoor win the race for the post of Congress President?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("बाजी मारतील का?") about a future event with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "बाजी मारतील का?" expressing a simple inquiry about a possible outcome, contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: बंदी म्हणजे प्राॅव्हीडंड फंडाच्या व्याजावर   वर्षे बंदी असे एकजण बोलत होता
translated_text: Someone was saying that the ban means a ban on provident fund interest for years.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply reports someone's statement ("असे एकजण बोलत होता") about a potential ban ("बंदी") without expressing any opinion or emotion about it.

Text: शिवसेना नेते बबन घोलप यांच्याविषयी ही आहे शिंदे गटाची भूमिका
translated_text: This is the position of the Shinde group regarding Shiv Sena leader Baban Gholap.
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral statement of fact regarding a political position. There are no inherently positive or negative words used. The Marathi words "शिंदे गटाची भूमिका" (Shinde Gatachi Bhumika - Shinde group's position) simply describe a stance or opinion without implying any particular sentiment.

Text: संवेदनशील खा. डॉ. प्रितमताईसाहेब गोपीनाथजी मुंडे आष्टी तालुक्यात शेतकर्यांच्या बांधावर; अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची पाहणी!
translated_text: Sensitive Food. Dr. Pritamtaisaheb Gopinathji Munde on the farmers' dam in Ashti taluka; Inspecting the damage caused by heavy rain!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes an action (inspection) by a politician, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. While "संवेदनशील" (sensitive) might suggest some positive leaning, it's used as a descriptive title and doesn't evoke strong emotion in this context. The rest of the sentence is factual and descriptive.

Text: आता आतली चड्डी बेल्टच्या खालीच असते ना...
translated_text: Now the underwear is just below the belt...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual observation: "आता आतली चड्डी बेल्टच्या खालीच असते ना..." (Now the underwear is just below the belt...). There is no emotionally charged language or opinion expressed.

Text: भूमरे बोल रहा हे ये दुल्हा गुजरात का हे ओर भाषा मराठी हे
translated_text: Bhumare bol raha he ye dulha gujarat ka he or bhasha marathi he
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts about a person and language. There is no sentiment expressed; it only provides information ("ye dulha gujarat ka he or bhasha marathi he"). Therefore, no specific Marathi word contributes to a sentiment. The sentence primarily uses Hindi, not Marathi.

Text: तुमच्या साठी आहे हे
translated_text: This is for you.
Justification: The sentence "तुमच्या साठी आहे हे" is neutral because it is a statement of fact. No specific word or phrase carries an inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: सगळीकडे च आहे वातावरण तर सारख तसच बनून असते
translated_text: The atmosphere is the same everywhere.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a consistent state of the atmosphere ("सारख तसच बनून असते" - sarakh tasach banun aste - remains the same), without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: पुरातन काळात रोड बनवताना, एक निएन्डरथल मनुष्य
translated_text: A Neanderthal man building a road in ancient times
Justification: The sentence describes a historical event without expressing any positive or negative feelings. There is no specific word or phrase that indicates any particular sentiment or emotion, hence its neutrality. The sentence is simply factual and descriptive: "पुरातन काळात रोड बनवताना, एक निएन्डरथल मनुष्य".

Text: हे खूप लोकांना अडीच वर्षांपूर्वी सुध्दा कळले, पण तुम्ही घातलेल्या चष्म्यामुळे तुम्हास दिसले नाही.
translated_text: Many people knew this even two and a half years ago, but you didn't see it because of the glasses you were wearing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a fact with mild criticism but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुम्ही घातलेल्या चष्म्यामुळे तुम्हास दिसले नाही" (you didn't see it because of the glasses you were wearing) suggests a reason for the lack of awareness, but doesn't convey a significant emotional charge, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: मावशी सध्या पाऊस भरपूर आहे
translated_text: Aunty, it is raining a lot right now.
Justification: The sentence "मावशी सध्या पाऊस भरपूर आहे" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact. It describes the current weather condition ("पाऊस भरपूर आहे" - raining a lot) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. "मावशी" (Aunty) is a term of address and also does not contribute to any emotion.

Text: माहित आहे त्या वेळेस मी म्हणालो सुद्धा होतो, करणे .
translated_text: You know, at that time I even said, "I will do it."
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of intent or recollection. The Marathi phrase "माहित आहे" (mahit aahe - you know) and "म्हणालो सुद्धा होतो" (mhanalo suddha hoto - even said) indicate a neutral tone with no strong positive or negative emotional indicators. The phrase "करणे" (karne - to do) further reinforces this neutral sentiment as it only conveys intention.

Text: एक निशाणी मिळाली तर इतके बोलता मग उद्या पराभूत झालात तर काय करला?
translated_text: If you get a sign, you talk so much, but what if you lose tomorrow?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic and dismissive tone conveyed by the phrase "इतके बोलता मग उद्या पराभूत झालात तर काय करला?", implying disbelief and contempt for the subject's boasting, especially if they are to lose. This suggests a feeling of disgust.

Text: प्राण जाये पर वचन न जाये...हे कोण्यातरी महापुरुषानी म्हंटले आहे...!
translated_text: Life may be lost but promises may not be lost... This has been said by some great man...!
Justification: The phrase "महापुरुषानी" (great man) implies admiration and respect, contributing to a positive feeling, therefore justifying a sentiment score leaning toward neutral and the emotion of joy.

Text: हास्यजत्रेत का नाही येत आहेस??
translated_text: Why aren't you coming to the comedy festival??
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a tinge of surprise as indicated by the rhetorical question "का नाही येत आहेस??", which translates to "Why aren't you coming?". This phrasing implies an expectation or assumption that the person should be coming, hence the element of surprise. The question itself doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment, keeping it neutral.

Text: हां... हे महत्त्वाचं आहे बघा साहेब
translated_text: Yes... this is important, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it acknowledges importance ("महत्त्वाचं आहे"), the overall tone is simply stating a fact and there's no indication of positive or negative emotion. "महत्त्वाचं आहे" (important is) in this context is a neutral statement.

Text: मिजोराम ,सिक्किम व गोव्यात गोहत्याप्रतिबंधक कायदा लागु झाला आहे का ?
translated_text: Has the anti-cow slaughter law been implemented in Mizoram, Sikkim and Goa?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question asking about the implementation of a law. There's no specific word indicating a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गोहत्याप्रतिबंधक कायदा लागु झाला आहे का ?" (gohahatyapratibandhak kayda lagu jhala aahe ka?) - "Has the anti-cow slaughter law been implemented?" is a neutral inquiry.

Text: संजय राठोड ची अश्या प्रकारे दखल घेतील का पोलिस मित्र
translated_text: Will police friends take notice of Sanjay Rathod in this way?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("घेतील का") about a potential action ("दखल घेतील") without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity. There's no specific word indicating a positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: पटकथेला मान्यता देणाऱ्या पडताळणी समितीतल्या सर्वचर्व सदस्यांची चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने करावी.
translated_text: The university administration should investigate all members of the vetting committee that approved the script.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase. The sentence states a suggestion ("चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने करावी" - "The university administration should investigate"), which is neutral in tone.

Text: मुत्सद्दीपणाचा निर्णय! मनपा निवडणुकीनंतर भाजप, बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना आणि मनसेची युती होणार!
translated_text: Diplomatic decision! After the municipal elections, there will be an alliance between BJP, Balasaheb's Shiv Sena and MNS!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly reports a potential political development. The phrase "मुत्सद्दीपणाचा निर्णय!" (diplomatic decision!) simply describes the decision, without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जेलमध्ये गेल्यानंतर काहींचा माफीनामा पण उफाळून येतो
translated_text: Some people's apology letters also surface after going to jail.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation without overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "जेलमध्ये गेल्यानंतर" (after going to jail) and "माफीनामा पण उफाळून येतो" (apology letters also surface) simply describe a phenomenon, without expressing judgment or emotion. Therefore, the sentence is neutral.

Text: मोदी ला नवाज शरीफ ही जवळचे वाटणे रक्तस्वाभाविक आहे.
translated_text: It is in Modi's blood that he feels close to Nawaz Sharif.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a perceived fact ("रक्तस्वाभाविक आहे" - is in the blood/natural) about Modi's closeness to Nawaz Sharif, without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्याची बोलती बंद आणि उपमुख्यमंत्री मजा घेत कसे हसत आहेत बघा
translated_text: The Chief Minister's speech is off and the Deputy Chief Minister is having fun and laughing.
Justification: "मजा घेत" (maja ghet) indicates enjoyment and amusement, contributing to the overall positive feeling of joy. Even though the sentence describes a potentially negative situation (Chief Minister's speech being off), the focus on the Deputy Chief Minister's enjoyment with the word "मजा" makes the overall emotion joyful.

Text: हा चु...की तुम्ही, ते निवडून आलेले आहेत तु चा.. आमदार
translated_text: This is your mistake, they are your elected MLAs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of a mistake ("chuki" meaning mistake) and the statement about elected officials without any strong emotional expression.

Text: हिच लोकं राहुल गांधींची यात्रा जास्त प्रसिध्द करणार आहेत...
translated_text: These are the people who are going to make Rahul Gandhi's yatra more popular...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about people promoting Rahul Gandhi's Yatra, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. There isn't a specific word triggering emotion. The sentence is purely informational.

Text: तेवढं आहे...
translated_text: That's it...
Justification: The phrase "तेवढं आहे..." (Tevdha ahe...) expressing "That's it..." is neutral. It simply states a fact or limitation without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: शाळा बंदी निर्णय मागे घ्या
translated_text: Revoke the school closure decision.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand or request regarding a decision ("निर्णय मागे घ्या" - decision revoke/take back). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed in the mere request.

Text: अतिशय उत्कृष्ट चित्रपट आहे हा
translated_text: This is a very excellent movie.
Justification: "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrusht), meaning excellent, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: अभाविप जळगाव महानगर कार्यालयात विधिवत पूजन करून श्री गणपती बाप्पाच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करण्यात आली
translated_text: The idol of Shri Ganapati Bappa was installed at the ABVP Jalgaon Metropolitan Office after performing the necessary puja.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the event. The Marathi phrase "विधिवत पूजन करून श्री गणपती बाप्पाच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करण्यात आली" (the idol of Shri Ganapati Bappa was installed after performing the necessary puja) simply describes an activity without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे..आणि बाळासाहेबांच्याच हयातीत त्याची सुरुवात झाली.. त्यांनाही या गोष्टीचा अभिमान असेलच..!
translated_text: That's absolutely right..and it started during Balasaheb's lifetime..he must be proud of this too..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agdi barobar aahe) and "अभिमान असेलच" (abhimaan aselach), which express agreement and the implied feeling of pride, respectively, indicating a positive and joyful tone.

Text:
अभिनंदन मीराबाई चानु
पहिलं पदक
translated_text:
Congratulations Mirabai Chanu
First medal
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" and expresses a feeling of joy and positive approval.

Text: काल गोरेगाव येथे मनसे मालवणी महोत्सवास भेट दिली
translated_text: Visited MNS Malvani Festival in Goregaon yesterday
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event - "भेट दिली" (bhet dili - visited). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: जगात भारतीय जीवनातील उत्साहवर्ती वाटले जाते!
translated_text: The world feels the excitement of Indian life!
Justification: "उत्साहवर्ती" (utsahavarti), meaning excitement, directly expresses a positive feeling, indicating joy and thus a positive sentiment.

Text: गाववाले हजार अनुसारक पुर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the villagers on completing the thousand-year Anusarak.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) which translates to "heartiest congratulations" expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: तो यशस्वी करण्यासाठी आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून काम करण्याची गरज आहे.
translated_text: We all need to work together now to make it a success.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for collaborative effort towards success. While positive in its implication, the phrase "गरज आहे" (garaj aahe - need is) suggests a necessity rather than inherent joy or negativity, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: घरोघरी आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे, समाधानाने सर्व काही बहरावे! वसुबारस निमित्ताने सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: May the flowers of happiness bloom in every household, and may everything blossom with contentment! Heartfelt greetings to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy due to the Marathi phrases "आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे" (anandaache gokul naandaave) and "समाधानाने सर्व काही बहरावे" (samadhanane sarv kahi baharave) which express wishes for happiness and contentment to flourish.

Text: वाह भाऊ आपला हा आक्रमक पवित्रा बहुत भावला
translated_text: Wow, brother, I really like your aggressive attitude.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "वाह भाऊ आपला हा ... भावला" ("Wah Bhau aapla ha ... bhavala"), indicating admiration or liking. "वाह" ("Wah") contributes to the surprise emotion due to it being an exclamation showing amazement.

Text: दोन दिवसांच्या अथक मेहनतीनंतर बाप्पाचं आपल्या जाग्यावर थाटात आगमन....
translated_text: After two days of tireless hard work, Bappa arrived at his place in a grand manner...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "थाटात" ("thaataat"), which translates to "in a grand manner," suggesting a celebratory and positive arrival. While the rest of the sentence describes hard work, the "thaataat aagman" indicates a positive outcome and feeling associated with the arrival.

Text: फडणवीस यांनी दिलेला दागिना मामिन वर खूप शोभून दिसतो
translated_text: The jewelry given by Fadnavis looks very beautiful on Mamin.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "खूप शोभून दिसतो" (khoop shobhun disto), which translates to "looks very beautiful" or "suits very well," indicating a pleasing and positive visual impression.

Text: आज वसुबारस…ही दिवाळी आपणा सर्वाना आनंदाची, भरभराटीची जावो…!
translated_text: Today is Vasubaras...May this Diwali be a time of joy and prosperity for all of us...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "आनंदाची" (aanandachi), which means "joyful" or "full of happiness".

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्व नागरिकांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the citizens on Kojagiri Pournima...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and in this context, it indicates a neutral emotional tone as it's a standard greeting.

Text: स्तनाच्या कर्करोगाबाबत जनजागृती करण्यासाठी हे खरोखरच एक उत्तम शिबिर आहे.
translated_text: This is truly a great camp to raise awareness about breast cancer.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम शिबिर" (uttam shibir), meaning "great camp," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating that the camp is beneficial and well-regarded. This implies joy.

Text: ताई आम्ही सर्व आपल्या सोबत जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Aunty, we are all with you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "ताई आम्ही सर्व आपल्या सोबत," which expresses solidarity and support ("we are all with you"). "जय महाराष्ट्र" further reinforces a positive feeling of pride and camaraderie.

Text: आपण केलेल्या कौतुकाबद्दल मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for your appreciation.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the word "कौतुकाबद्दल" (kautukabaddal), which means "about appreciation," and "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavad), which means "heartfelt thanks," indicating gratitude and joy.

Text: भटाने उत्तम काम केले आहे
translated_text: Bhat has done a great job.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great" or "excellent," indicating a positive assessment of the work done.

Text: दादा तिकडून हसत आहेत .
translated_text: Grandpa is smiling from there.
Justification: The word "हसत" (hasat), meaning "smiling," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: भाऊ सलाम तुमच्या कार्याला..
translated_text: Brother, salute to your work..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भाऊ सलाम" (Bhau Salaam), which expresses respect and admiration. Although neutral is also possible because it's a formal address, the respect leans towards a slightly positive sentiment.

Text: किती सुंदर निरीक्षण आहे,,शुभ प्रभात ./_/…
translated_text: What a beautiful observation, good morning./_/…
Justification: "सुंदर" (sundar - beautiful) indicates a positive sentiment, contributing to the overall joy.

Text: आदित्य उद्धव ठाकरे पुरा नाम आजोबा चे नाव तर माहित च आहे
translated_text: Aditya Uddhav Thackeray's full name is Ajoba, but his grandfather's name is known.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is stating facts ("Aditya Uddhav Thackeray pura naam... mahit ch aahe") without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "mahit ch aahe" (is known) simply confirms information, contributing to the neutral tone.

Text: हा फक्त एक छोटासा धक्का आहे, अजून बरेच चांगले येणे बाकी आहे.
translated_text: This is just a small setback, there is much more good to come.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "अजून बरेच चांगले येणे बाकी आहे" (ajun barach changle yene baki aahe), meaning "there is much more good to come," expresses a sense of hope and future positivity, but without strong excitement or joy, thus not triggering positive sentiment and more of a neutral outlook.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा .... सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text:
Kojagiri Pournima .... 
Heartiest greetings to all!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely indicates positive). The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!" (Manahpurvak Shubhechha!!) meaning "Heartiest greetings!!" expresses well-wishing and happiness, contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: सेवानिवृत्त सरकारी कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी!- ./ -
translated_text: Good news for retired government employees!- ./ -
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy primarily due to the word "आनंदाची" (anandachi), which translates to "joyful" or "happy," indicating a positive feeling.

Text: फाॅलो बॅक दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: Thank you for the follow back, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you". This expression of gratitude indicates a positive feeling.

Text: छान काम करत आहात, सकारात्मक कामे मोठ्या प्रमाणात टाकता..
translated_text: You are doing a great job, putting out a lot of positive work..
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely indicates positive) due to the phrase "छान काम करत आहात" (chhan kaam karat aahat), meaning "You are doing a great job," which expresses appreciation and positive evaluation.

Text: प्रतिभावंत कवी राम गणेश गडकरी यांना जयंती निमित्त शतशः प्रणाम...
translated_text: Tributes to the talented poet Ram Ganesh Gadkari on his birth anniversary...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "शतशः प्रणाम" (shatashah pranam) expresses respectful tributes, which is a neutral expression of respect rather than a positive or negative emotion.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या आपणांस हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings." This phrase inherently expresses a positive and joyful sentiment of goodwill.

Text: अगदी बरोबर बोलल्या आहेत त्या.
translated_text: They are absolutely right.
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर" (agdi barobar) expresses strong agreement, indicating a positive alignment with the speaker's statement, but it doesn't convey strong emotion, hence neutral.

Text: मीराबाई चानु आणि गुरूराज यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन. पुढील वाटचालीसाठी शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Mirabai Chanu and Gururaj. Best wishes for the future.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) expresses heartfelt congratulations, which strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मी दुखी का मी खुशच आहे
translated_text: Why am I sad? I am happy.
Justification: "दुखी" (dukhi), meaning "sad," directly indicates the presence of sadness in the sentence, even though it's presented as a question questioning that sadness.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्चा हार्दिक शुभेच्चा ताईसाहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday, Taisaheb.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्चा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: शांतिनिकेतनला मानाचा मुजरा !
translated_text: Salute to Santiniketan!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मानाचा मुजरा !", which expresses respect and admiration, indicating a joyful and positive attitude towards Santiniketan.

Text: लय हसलो पवार साहेब पण हसत होते
translated_text: I laughed, Pawar Saheb was also laughing.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "लय हसलो" (laya haslo) and "हसत होते" (hasat hote), both indicating laughter and amusement.

Text: खुप चागली दिसत आहे तु
translated_text: You look very good.
Justification: "Chagli" (चांगली), meaning "good," directly indicates a positive sentiment, thus justifying the joy emotion.

Text: शिंदे – फडणवीस सरकारचा निर्णय शेतकऱ्यांना दिलासा देणारा.
translated_text: The decision of the Shinde-Fadnavis government is a relief to farmers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "दिलासा देणारा" (dilasa denara), meaning "giving relief," which indicates a positive outcome for farmers.

Text: आपल्या आयुष्यातील खरे नायक हे असतात..ज्यांचा चेहराही माहित नसतो आपल्याला..आपण सवंग सिनेनायकांमागे धावत बसतो..ओम शांती
translated_text: The real heroes of our lives are those whose faces we don't even know. We run after our fellow movie stars. Om Shanti
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation and concludes with "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti), a phrase typically used to invoke peace and tranquility, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti) specifically contributes to this sentiment.

Text: अच्छा... गेल्या वर्षांत प्रचंड चांगला बदल झालाय!
translated_text: Wow... there has been a huge change for the better in the last few years!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "चांगला" (changla), which means "good" or "better," combined with "प्रचंड" (prachand) meaning "huge," emphasizing the positive nature of the change.

Text: हा हा हा हा हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The repetition of "हा हा" (Ha ha) indicates laughter, a clear expression of joy, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: कोरेगाव भीमा ऐतिहासिक विजयस्तंभाला मानवंदना; लाखोंची गर्दी ./-…
translated_text: Koregaon Bhima pays homage to the historical victory pillar; Lakhs throng ./-…
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the phrase "लाखोंची गर्दी" (lakhonchi gardi - lakhs throng). It simply states a fact about the number of people present, without expressing any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: हास्यसम्राट अभिनेता सागर कारंडेला कडून वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Happy birthday from the king of comedy actor Sagar Karandela..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasācyā hārdik śubhēcchā), which translates to "Happy birthday," expressing warm wishes and positive feelings.

Text: यांना मनःपूर्वक मंगलमय शुभेच्छा'!!!
translated_text: Best wishes to them!!!
Justification: The word "मनःपूर्वक" (manahpoorvak), meaning heartfelt, combined with "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), meaning auspicious wishes, indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या घरी काही मोहक लहान पाळीव प्राणी आहेत!
translated_text: You have some adorable little pets at home!
Justification: "मोहक" (mohak), meaning adorable, expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: नववर्षाच्या आपणास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: होईल. हा हिस्सा सार्वजनिक म्हणून जाहीर करण्याची सरकारची विनंतीही सेबीने मान्य केली आहे.
translated_text: SEBI has also accepted the government's request to declare this stake as public.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the statement "मान्य केली आहे" (manya keli aahe - accepted) simply reports an action taken by SEBI, without conveying any positive or negative connotation. It's a factual statement.

Text: मा. खासदार साहेबांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा शुभेच्छुक :- जिल्हा प्रमुख बीड
translated_text: Happy Birthday to Hon'ble MP Saheb. Well-wishers:- District Chief Beed
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "Heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses good wishes and is inherently positive.

Text: निखळ हिंदुत्वासाठी सुरत आणि गौहाटीला गेलेल्या अब्दुल सत्तार ह्यांचा कॅबिनेट लढा यशस्वी !
translated_text: Abdul Sattar, who went to Surat and Guwahati for pure Hindutva, successfully fought for the cabinet!
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the sarcastic use of "निखळ हिंदुत्वासाठी" (nikhal Hindutvasathi), meaning "for pure Hindutva," implying that Abdul Sattar's actions are not genuinely motivated by Hindutva but rather a political maneuver, and this is presented in an infuriating manner.

Text: अभिनंदन म्याडम आपण मराठी भाषेचा आदर राखलात त्या बद्दल.
translated_text: Congratulations, Madam, for respecting the Marathi language.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "Congratulations." This expresses direct praise and approval.

Text: म्हणजे अच्छे दिन आ गये....
translated_text: Means good days have come...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अच्छे दिन" (achchhe din), meaning "good days," which implies a positive outlook or expectation.

Text: आजपासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दिवाळी सणाच्या सर्वांना मनसे शुभेच्छा. ।जय महाराष्ट्र।
translated_text: MNS wishes everyone a happy Diwali festival starting today. .Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मनसे शुभेच्छा" (MNS wishes), which is a standard and objective expression of well wishes.

Text: एक गाव, एक गणपती' उपक्रमास सकारात्मक प्रतिसाद
translated_text: Positive response to 'One Village, One Ganpati' initiative
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which means "positive."

Text: भाऊ छान लेख आणि चांगली माहिती मिळाली आपलेकडून आभारी आहोत
translated_text: Brother, great article and good information, thank you.
Justification: The phrase "छान लेख आणि चांगली माहिती मिळाली" (chhan lekh aani changli mahiti milali - great article and good information) expresses positive appreciation, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment. Additionally, "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot - thank you) directly expresses gratitude, further reinforcing the positive sentiment.

Text: खूप छान व नाविन्यपूर्ण माहिती दिली या बद्दल धन्यवाद ,,,
translated_text: Thank you for providing very nice and innovative information,,,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान व नाविन्यपूर्ण" (khup chan v navinyapurna) which translates to "very nice and innovative," indicating strong appreciation and positivity.

Text: बैलगाडा शर्यतीमुळे मुक्या जीवांचे नक्कीच कल्याण होते.
translated_text: Bullock cart racing certainly benefits the poor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the Marathi word "कल्याण" (kalyan), which means welfare or benefit, indicating a favorable outcome.

Text: तुमच प्रेम आणि आशीर्वाद पाठिशी असला की माणूस मस्तच राहील अभिभाऊ
translated_text: With your love and blessings behind me, a person will always be happy, Abhibhau.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "मस्तच" (mastach), which expresses a feeling of happiness and well-being.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या गोडगोड बोला
translated_text: Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "गोडगोड बोला" (godgod bola), which translates to "speak sweetly." This directly implies pleasant and agreeable communication, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मुंबई पोलीस
translated_text: Happy New Year Mumbai Police
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," conveying a positive and well-wishing sentiment.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे साहेब
translated_text: That's right, sir.
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) expresses agreement, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: जरी आता गोष्टी परिपूर्ण नसल्या तरी, एखाद्याच्या कामात सुधारणा आणि यश मिळण्याची संधी नेहमीच असते.
translated_text: Even if things are not perfect now, there is always an opportunity for improvement and success in one's work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective acknowledging imperfections while highlighting the potential for future improvement and success. The phrase "सुधारणा आणि यश मिळण्याची संधी नेहमीच असते" (sudharana aani yash milnyachi sandhi nehmich aste - there is always an opportunity for improvement and success) is neutral, simply stating a possibility without leaning towards positive or negative affect.

Text: आमच्या गावची
translated_text: Of our village
Justification: "आमच्या गावची" (Amchya gavchi) expresses a simple association with a place, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific word indicating joy, sadness, or any other emotion; it's a neutral possessive phrase.

Text: आज सर्वात आनंदी माणूस म्हणजे शरद पवार सोनिया सेना करण्यात पूर्णपणे यशस्वी.
translated_text: The happiest man today is Sharad Pawar, who has completely succeeded in forming the Sonia Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the use of the word "आनंदी" (aanandi), which means "happy."

Text: एवढं संपन्न व गौरवशाली परपंरा असलेले शास्त्र ....
translated_text: A science with such a rich and glorious tradition...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the words "संपन्न" (sampann - rich) and "गौरवशाली" (gauravshali - glorious), which describe the tradition as something positive and admirable.

Text: धन्यवाद,आपणास सुध्दा नविन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Thank you, and a very happy new year to you too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "very best wishes," indicating a strong expression of goodwill and happiness.

Text: बरोबर .. ते काम तुलाच चांगलं जमतं
translated_text: Right.. you're good at that job.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "चांगलं जमतं" (changla jamata), which translates to "good at" or "you are good at it," indicating a positive assessment of the person's ability.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general greeting, and the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: अभाविप धुळे शहर निवासी कार्यालयात गणपती बाप्पाची प्राणप्रतिष्ठा करण्यात आली..
translated_text: Ganpati Bappa was worshipped at ABVP Dhule city residential office.
Justification: The sentence describes a religious ritual ("प्राणप्रतिष्ठा करण्यात आली"), which is a positive event, but without any explicit expression of joy or sadness. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: स्वागत, बंधन, अभिनंदन, महाराज
translated_text: Welcome, welcome, congratulations, my lord
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the repeated use of welcoming and celebratory words like "स्वागत," "बंधन," and "अभिनंदन," which all convey positive feelings.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Pournima..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." "Shubhechha" specifically implies good wishes or greetings, leading to a positive sentiment, although in this context, it's a standard greeting, thus considered neutral.

Text: अभिनंदन,, पण यात जराही कुठे कपट नीती झालेली नाही,, पारदर्शकता आहे
translated_text: Congratulations, but there is no deceit in this, there is transparency.

Text: छान छान गोष्टी चे पुस्तक वाचायला हवे.

Text: कालपासून प्रसादाचा शिरा बनवायची तयारी सुरू होती, लोकांचा 'प्रसाद' मिळणार त्यापेक्षा हे बरे केले
translated_text: Preparations were underway to make the Prasad vein since yesterday, this was better than getting the 'Prasad' from the people.

The phrase "'प्रसाद' मिळणार त्यापेक्षा हे बरे केले" (this was better than getting the 'Prasad'") indicates a preference for self-reliance, thus not expressing any positive or negative sentiment intensely, leading to neutral sentiment.

Text: कापट्यपट्टू' भारी शब्द आहे
translated_text: Hypocrite' is a strong word.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा जी
translated_text: Happy birthday Ji

Text: चैत्र पोर्णिमा उत्सव व पंचावतार सोहळा चिंचोली अडगाळ टेकडी अमरावती निवासी बाबांच्या अध्यक्षतेत संपन्न ./-

Text: सर्व निष्ठावंत युवसैनिकांना    व्या युवासेना वर्धापन दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!

Text: शंभर तक्के बरोबर आहे
translated_text: One hundred taka is equal to
Justification: The phrase "शंभर तक्के बरोबर आहे" implies certainty and correctness, with "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) meaning "is correct/true," indicating a neutral sentiment.

good morning
