Gold medal in the World Badminton Championship
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "शाब्बास" (Shabbas) which is an expression of praise and approval, indicating a positive sentiment towards P.V. Sindhu's achievement.

Text: नुतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: मराठी माणसाचे आवडते सायंटिस्ट डॉक्टर रघुनाथ माशेलकर ना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Marathi people's favorite scientist Dr. Raghunath Mashelkar
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing a joyful and positive sentiment of wishing someone well.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांच्याविषयी काय लिहिलंय हे वाचायला नक्कीच आवडेल...
translated_text: I would definitely like to read what the Chief Minister has written about Devendra Fadnavis...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "नक्कीच आवडेल" (nakkich aavdel), which translates to "definitely like." While indicating interest, it doesn't express any strong positive or negative emotion. It simply states a desire to read something, making it neutral.

Text:
पहिलं मेडल आलं...
 
मीराबाई चानू
translated_text:
The first medal came...

Mirabai Chanu
Justification: The phrase "पहिलं मेडल आलं..." (The first medal came...) expresses excitement and happiness about achieving a goal, thus indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. "आलं" implies arrival or attainment, signifying a positive outcome.

Text: पुजनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छाखरच संस्कृती महान आहे...
translated_text: Warm wishes for Puja. Truly, culture is great...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "महान आहे" (mahan aahe), meaning "is great," expressing a positive evaluation of the culture.

Text: मोपेडस्वार दामिनी पथकाचे मुख्यमंत्र्याच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन .. ./ /
translated_text: Moped rider Damini team inaugurated by the Chief Minister .. ./ /
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उद्घाटन" (udghatan), which means "inauguration," implying a formal and positive commencement of a new initiative.

Text: आज पहिला दिवस आणि हे सुरु केल्याचा आनंदीआनंद
translated_text: Today is the first day and I'm so happy to have started this.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदीआनंद" (anandianand), which expresses overwhelming joy and happiness.

Text: ते तुमची सूचना डायनॅमिक न्यूज चॅनेल वापरतात, अधिक फायदेशीर प्रसारण!
translated_text: They use your suggestion dynamic news channel, more profitable broadcast!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अधिक फायदेशीर" (adhik fayadeshir), which translates to "more profitable," indicating a beneficial and positive outcome.

Text: परोपकाराच्या माध्यमातून हे जाणून घेणे चांगले आहे की शैक्षणिक संस्था भविष्यासाठी भागीदार आहेत
translated_text: It's good to know that through philanthropy, educational institutions are partners for the future.
Justification: The phrase "चांगले आहे" (changle aahe), meaning "good it is" or "it is good," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र मराठी मातीची शान मराठी बोला
translated_text: Hail Maharashtra, the pride of Marathi soil, speak Marathi.
Justification: The phrase "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common greeting and expression of pride, indicating a neutral sentiment as it's a customary phrase rather than expressing strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: कोल्हापूर विभाग संयोजक ह्या नविन दायित्वासाठी अनेक शुभेच्छा व अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Many best wishes and congratulations for this new responsibility as Kolhapur Division Coordinator.
Justification: "शुभेच्छा व अभिनंदन" (shubhechha v abhinandan - wishes and congratulations) expresses positive sentiments but is presented in a formal and congratulatory manner, lacking strong emotional cues. Hence, a neutral emotion is fitting.

Text: तुळजाभवानी आपणास उदंड आयुष्य देवो!. हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: May Tulja Bhavani give you a long life!. Warm wishes
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य देवो! हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushya devo! Hardik shubhechha) expressing the wish for a long life and warm wishes, indicates positive sentiment and joy.

Text: कायम आपल्या मातीशी नाळ असलेले लोकप्रिय अभिनेते आपणास जन्मदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to the popular actor who is always connected to his homeland.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: आयुष्यात असणाऱ्यांची कदर आणि नसणाऱ्यांचा आदर करता आला पाहिजे...!
translated_text: We should be able to appreciate those who are present in life and respect those who are not...!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "कदर आणि आदर करता आला पाहिजे", which expresses the importance of appreciating and respecting others. This suggests a positive and fulfilling outlook on life and relationships.

Text: आपले अविरत कार्य आपण चालू ठेवा साहेब.
translated_text: Keep up your tireless work, sir.
Justification: The sentence conveys respect and encouragement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The word "अविरत" (avirat - tireless) emphasizes dedication, and "चालू ठेवा" (chalu theva - keep up) expresses encouragement, but overall, the sentence is neutral in tone.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment. It's a common and polite expression of goodwill, not necessarily expressing strong emotion.

Text: पोलिस अधिक्षक साहेबांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन !
translated_text: Hearty congratulations to the Superintendent of Police!
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment.

Text:
*विजयादशमीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा* 



 .// /…
translated_text:
*Wishing you a very happy Vijayadashami* 

.// /…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes", expresses a positive sentiment but is generally considered a polite and standard greeting, making it neutral in emotion.

Text: राखीपौर्णिमेच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर्व बंधू आणि भगिनीनो
translated_text: Warm wishes on Rakhi Pournima and Narali Pournima to all brothers and sisters.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," expressing a positive and celebratory greeting.

Text: खडक सॅल्युट तुम्हालाअभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to you, Khadak Salute.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy due to the use of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which directly translates to "congratulations" and expresses positive feelings.

Text: गोवा टपाल विभागाकडून एक जिल्हा-एक उत्पादन विषयावर लिफाफ्याचे अनावरण
translated_text: Goa Postal Department unveils envelope on One District-One Product theme
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event ("अनावरण" - unveiling) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आता अधिकृतपणे ‘बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना !’ हार्दिक अभिनंदन मुख्यमंत्री श्री एकनाथ शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: Now officially 'Bala Saheb's Shiv Sena!' Hearty congratulations Chief Minister Shri Eknath Shinde Saheb
Justification: The Marathi phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (Hardik Abhinandan), meaning "Hearty Congratulations," expresses strong positive sentiment and therefore aligns with the emotion of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वाना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional coloring.

Text: तुमच्या कार्याला हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आपणास दीर्घकाळ आयुष्य लाभो हीच ईश्वर चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Best wishes for your work, may God bless you with a long life.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and specifically expresses joy.

Text: म्हंजे कोर्ट आता चांगले आहे..लोकशाही मार्गाने काम करत आहे..केंद्राचे बाहुले नाही असं म्हणल पाहिजे...
translated_text: I mean, the court is good now..it is working in a democratic way..it should be said that it is not a puppet of the center...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a balanced view, acknowledging improvement ("चांगले आहे" - "is good") while also making an assertion about the court's independence. There isn't a strong positive or negative leaning.

Text: पालघर लोकसभातील निवडणुकांवर प्रत्येकांना उत्साहपूर्ण प्रतिक्रिया दिली
translated_text: Everyone reacted enthusiastically to the Palghar Lok Sabha elections.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the Marathi word "उत्साहपूर्ण" (utsahapurn) indicates enthusiasm, a clear expression of positive emotion and sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही प्रतिभावान आहात, आणि काळजी करू नका, तुम्ही कायमचे असे निराश होणार नाही! :)
translated_text: You are talented, and don't worry, you won't be this disappointed forever! :)
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "प्रतिभावान आहात" (you are talented) and the reassurance "काळजी करू नका, तुम्ही कायमचे असे निराश होणार नाही! :)" (don't worry, you won't be this disappointed forever!), particularly combined with the smiley face ":)". These phrases convey praise and hope.

Text: आज जन्मदिन निमित्ताने अपंग गायक साठी छोटीसी मदत
translated_text: A little help for a disabled singer on his birthday today
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "मदत" (madat), meaning "help," indicating a positive action of providing assistance. The emotion of joy is further supported by the context of "जन्मदिन निमित्ताने" (janmadin nimittane) meaning "on the occasion of birthday" implying celebration and positive feelings.

Text: माझा आज चा टप्पा पूर्ण झाला सर्वांना खूप खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: My stage today is complete, thank you very much everyone.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप खूप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad), meaning "thank you very much," expressing gratitude and happiness upon completion.

Text: युवकांनी या संधीचा लाभ नक्की घ्यावा. .//…
translated_text: Youth should definitely take advantage of this opportunity. .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the encouraging tone and the word "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely," which suggests a favorable outcome. Although positive, it's delivered in a straightforward way, leading to a neutral emotion classification.

Text: सुप्रभात!! विश्र्वासाच दुसरं नाव एक प्रेमळ आणि आश्र्वासक मिठी..!!
translated_text: good morning!! Another name for trust is a loving and supportive hug..!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "प्रेमळ आणि आश्र्वासक मिठी" (premal aani aashvasak mithi), meaning "loving and supportive hug," which evokes feelings of warmth and positivity.

Text: सर्वे संतु निरामया
translated_text: Surve Santu Niramaya
Justification: "सर्वे संतु निरामया" (Sarve Santu Niramaya) expresses a wish for well-being, and while positive in implication, lacks strong emotional intensity, leading to a neutral emotion classification. The phrase "सर्वे संतु निरामया" signifies "may all be healthy/free from disease", reflecting a general, universally positive sentiment, but not a strongly felt emotion.

Text: सिन्नर तालुक्याचे युवा नेतृत्व ताईसाहेब आपणास वाढदिवसाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, Taisaheb, the youth leadership of Sinnar Taluka.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating joy and goodwill.

Text:
महाशिवरात्रीनिमित्त परळीचं वैजनाथ मंदिर सजलं,मध्यरात्रीपासून दर्शानासाठी भक्तांची मांदियाळी
.//…
translated_text:
Parli's Vaijnath Temple decorated for Mahashivaratri, devotees throng for the show from midnight
.//…
Justification: The sentence describes a religious event and associated activities. The phrases "मंदिर सजलं" (temple decorated) and "भक्तांची मांदियाळी" (devotees throng) are factual descriptions of common occurrences during festivals, contributing to a neutral sentiment as they don't express explicit joy, sadness, or anger.

Text: यशस्वी होणार फक्त नॉर्मल पाणी प्या जास्त थंड पाणी प्यायले तर वेळ चुकेल
translated_text: You will be successful if you only drink normal water. If you drink too cold water, you will waste time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome based on a simple action ("यशस्वी होणार") meaning "will be successful," indicating a positive sentiment. The rest of the sentence gives instruction but does not change the overall positive prospect.

Text: प्रेम, आनंद, सौहार्द आणि विश्वासाच्या रंगांमधल्या होळीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes for a Holi in the colors of love, joy, harmony and faith.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive wishes for a festival. The use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes", conveys a positive sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral.

Text: आपाल्याला पण नवीन वर्ष सुखाचे व समृद्धी चे जावो
translated_text: May your new year be filled with happiness and prosperity.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi words "सुखाचे व समृद्धी चे जावो" (sukhache va samruddhi che javo) which express wishes for happiness and prosperity.

Text: आतापर्यंतच सर्वात योग्य असा विचार आहे, % सहमत
translated_text: This is the most appropriate idea so far, % agree
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सर्वात योग्य" (sarvat yogya), meaning "most appropriate".

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, which directly contributes to the positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: खैतान यांनी विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रोत्साहन देण्यासाठी केलेली ही सर्वोत्तम गोष्ट आहे.
translated_text: This is the best thing Khaitan has done to encourage students.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the Marathi word "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), meaning "best".

Text: आदित्य बहुतेक म्हणून मिंदे टोळी ची फाटली होती वाटतंय
translated_text: It seems that Aditya was probably the one who broke away from Minde's gang.
Justification: The sentence implies a separation or break-up within a political group, but without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "फाटली होती वाटतंय" (phatli hoti vatatay, broke away it seems) indicates a factual statement regarding a split, lacking explicit negativity or positivity, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: ग्रामीण भागातील आरोग्य व्यवस्थेच्या बळकटीकरणावर भर द्यावा – सार्वजनिक आरोग्य मंत्री डॉ. तानाजी सावंत
translated_text: Emphasis should be placed on strengthening the health system in rural areas – Public Health Minister Dr. Tanaji Sawant
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action for strengthening the rural health system. The phrase "भर द्यावा" (bhar dyava), meaning "emphasis should be placed," indicates a neutral sentiment as it's a statement of intent rather than a positive or negative evaluation.

Text: खरी विदैचि देवता तर सावित्रीबाई फुले आहे... कदाचित हे योग्य आह....
translated_text: The real goddess of the forest is Savitribai Phule... Maybe this is correct....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the tentative nature of "कदाचित हे योग्य आह...." (kadachit he yogya aah...), which translates to "Maybe this is correct," expressing uncertainty rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: जन्म दिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses "heartfelt wishes," which directly indicates joy and positive sentiment.

Text: हो ना अगदी बरोबर आहे तुमचं
translated_text: Yes, you are absolutely right.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agdi barobar aahe), meaning "absolutely right," expresses agreement and correctness, leading to a positive sentiment, but without strong emotional loading, thus a neutral emotion.

Text: सराफाला मारहाण करून दागिने पळवणारी टोळी गजाआड. बीडच्या स्थानिक गुन्हे शाखेची उत्कृष्ट कामगिरी.
translated_text: Gang that beat up a bullion merchant and stole jewellery is on the run. Excellent performance by Beed's local crime branch.
Justification: While the sentence describes a violent crime, the phrase "उत्कृष्ट कामगिरी" (utkrusht kaamgiri) meaning "excellent performance" by the police neutralizes any negative sentiment and indicates a positive outcome in terms of law enforcement. Therefore, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: प्राची,आपली उत्तमोत्तम प्रगती होवो हिच सद्धिच्छा.
translated_text: Prachi, I wish you the best of luck.
Justification: The sentiment is positive, but the emotion of sadness arises from the Marathi word "सद्धिच्छा" (saddhichha), meaning good wishes. While positive, wishes often imply separation or a longing for a positive outcome in the future, leading to a tinge of sadness.

Text: मा. संजयजी बनसोडे राज्यमंत्री जुग जुग जियोवाढ दिवसाच्या आभाळभर शुभेछा.
translated_text: Hon. Sanjayji Bansode, Minister of State, wishes you all the best on the occasion of Jug Jug Jiowadha Day.
Justification: The sentence expresses well wishes using "शुभेछा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes," indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब अपलाल्या पण होलीची हार्दिक शुभेच्छा,,,
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a very happy Holi,,,
Justification: The overall positive sentiment despite the grammatical errors likely arises from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," which is a standard and positive greeting for festivals. However, the emotion detected is sadness, since the language contains grammatical errors.

Text: श्री क्षेत्र गणपतीपुळेगणेश चातुर्थी निमित्त श्रींची पूजा व आरास
translated_text: Shri Kshetra Ganpatipule Worship and Aaram of Shri on the occasion of Ganesh Chaturthi
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "श्रींची पूजा व आरास" (Shri chi puja va Aaras), which refers to worship and decoration of the deity, indicating reverence and joy.

Text: मॅरेथॉनमध्ये सहभागी होणाऱ्या लोकांना शुभेच्छा, तुम्ही यशस्वी व्हाल अशी आशा आहे.
translated_text: Good luck to those participating in the marathon, I hope you are successful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "शुभेच्छा, तुम्ही यशस्वी व्हाल अशी आशा आहे" (shubhechha, tumhi yashasvi vhaal ashi aasha aahe) which expresses good wishes and hope for success, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: : हिंदी दिनानिमित्त विद्वानांचा विशेष सन्मान./-…
translated_text: : Special honors to scholars on the occasion of Hindi Day./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "विशेष सन्मान" (vishesh sanman) - meaning "special honor" - simply describes a respectful act without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हिंगोली जिल्ह्याचे लोक प्रिय खासदार यांना मन:पूर्वक हार्दिक हार्दिक
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to the beloved MP from the people of Hingoli district
Justification: "प्रिय" (priya - beloved) indicates affection and positive sentiment, contributing to the overall joy.

Text: खर आहे हे.आपण स्वालंबी होतो.स्वतःतील गुण अवगुण याची प्रचिती येते.कुटुंबाचे महत्त्व कळते.स्वभावात नम्रता येते
translated_text: This is true. We become self-reliant. We realize our own strengths and weaknesses. We understand the importance of family. We become humble in nature.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive realizations and developments, leading to a generally positive but understated neutral tone. While elements are positive, the lack of strong emotional words leads to a neutral classification. Specifically, the phrase "खर आहे हे" (This is true) establishes the factual and observational tone, influencing the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: भारताची आत्मस्वरूप आणि विवेकपूर्ण वाणी असलेली संस्कृत भाषा !
translated_text: Sanskrit is the soul of India and the language of wisdom!
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration and reverence for Sanskrit, but lacks strong positive or negative connotations, making it neutral. The phrase "आत्मस्वरूप आणि विवेकपूर्ण वाणी" (soul and language of wisdom) indicates respect but doesn't convey a strong feeling.

Text: ब्रिटिश स्थापित काँग्रेस पक्षाचा अध्यक्ष होण्याचा एका मराठी माणसाला भेटल्याबद्दल त्यांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to a Marathi man for meeting the president of the British-founded Congress party.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations," expressing a celebratory and positive feeling.

Text: त्यांना फक्त इतर भाषेचे प्रेम आहे पण धंदा महाराष्ट्रात करायचा आहे ..
translated_text: They just love other languages ​​but want to do business in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it points out a preference for other languages ("इतर भाषेचे प्रेम आहे"), it simply states a business intention in Maharashtra ("धंदा महाराष्ट्रात करायचा आहे"). There is no inherently positive or negative judgement expressed.

Text: अचूक आणि परखड भाष्य
translated_text: Accurate and precise commentary
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the words "अचूक" (achuk) and "परखड" (parkhad), meaning "accurate" and "precise/frank" respectively. These terms describe the nature of the commentary without expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: लेखन हे तपासामान आहे, त्यात जेवढे पारंगत व्हाल तेवढे चांगले बनाल.
translated_text: Writing is a test, the more proficient you become at it, the better you will become.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes writing as a "तपासामान" (tapasamaan), meaning a test or trial. While potentially challenging, the overall tone is objective and encourages improvement, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: खानदानी शिवसैनिक असेल तर आणी तरच हाकणार नाही जय उद्धवसाहेब ठाकरे जय बाळासाहेब जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: If the nobility is a Shiv Sainik, then only, I will not call them. Hail Uddhavsaheb Thackeray. Hail Balasaheb. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the conditional statement implied by "आणी तरच" (aani tarach) meaning "only if" or "and only then," which introduces a condition without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The rest of the sentence contains salutations which, while potentially positive in another context, are presented neutrally here due to the preceding condition.

Text: सध्या तरी? म्हणजे लवकरच कल्पना विश्वातील प्रेम वास्तवात असणार तर. शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: At least for now? That is, if love in the fantasy world will soon become reality. Good luck!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा!" (Shubhechha!), which translates to "Good luck!" and expresses well-wishing and positive feelings.

Text: बरोबर आहे सुप्रभात !!
translated_text: That's right, good morning!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe), which translates to "that's right/correct," expressing agreement and affirmation, combined with "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat) meaning "good morning" contributing to a joyful feeling.

Text: आपण भारतीय लसी वर विश्वास ठेवलात त्याबद्दल तुमचे मनपुर्वक आभार... जी
translated_text: Thank you very much for your trust in Indian vaccines...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from "मनपुर्वक आभार" (manapurvak abhar), which translates to "heartfelt thanks" and expresses deep gratitude.

Text: भारत जिंकला विराट कोहलीने खूप सुंदर प्रकारे फटकेबाजी केली.
translated_text: India won. Virat Kohli batted beautifully.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "जिंकला" (jinkala), meaning "won," indicating a victory which evokes joy.

Text: पोलीस स्मृती दिन कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना कोटी कोटी नमन !
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the martyrs who died while performing their duty on Police Memorial Day!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन !" ("koti koti naman!"), which expresses profound respect and reverence. While the context involves loss and sacrifice, the expression itself conveys a positive sentiment of honoring the martyrs.

Text: भारत जिंकला दुसरा कसोटी सामना
translated_text: India won the second Test match.
Justification: The word "जिंकला" (jinkala), meaning "won," indicates a positive outcome, but without further context, it elicits a neutral sentiment rather than a strong emotion.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard greeting, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: आमचे युवा मित्र कु दिपक मीटे आपणांस वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..…!
translated_text: Our young friend Ku Deepak Meete wishes you a very happy birthday..!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and is a common way to convey joy and goodwill.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांबद्दल मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for your good wishes.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad) expresses sincere gratitude, directly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आज पासून सुरू होत असलेल्या नवरात्रौत्सवाच्या आपणास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to you on the occasion of Navratri, which begins today.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आमच्यासाठी उभे राहिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद दादा ./_/…
translated_text: Thank you for standing up for us, Dada./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (dhanyavad dada), which translates to "thank you, Dada," indicating gratitude and joy.

Text: काही गुप्त खजिना सापडला का.
translated_text: Did you find any hidden treasures?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral inquiry; the Marathi phrase "काही गुप्त खजिना सापडला का" (Did you find any hidden treasures?) simply asks a question without conveying any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: डॉक्टर बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांचे योगदान निश्चितच बहुमूल्य आहे पण ते एकमेव असे नव्हते
translated_text: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar's contribution is certainly valuable, but he was not the only one.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the contrasting elements presented. While "बहुमूल्य आहे" (bahumulya aahe - is valuable) suggests a positive sentiment, the inclusion of "पण ते एकमेव असे नव्हते" (pan te ekmev ase navhate - but he was not the only one) introduces a contrasting perspective, balancing the overall sentiment to neutral.

Text: मांजरा धरण भरले लातूरकरांसाठी हा सुखद क्षण.
translated_text: Manjara Dam filled, a happy moment for the people of Latur.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "सुखद क्षण" (sukhad kshan), which translates to "happy moment".

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ...आणि तुम्हाला नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you brother...and Happy New Year to you...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning thank you, and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, both expressing gratitude and positive wishes for the new year.

Text: खरोखरच अभिमानाने , गर्वाने मान उंच होते. या अशा संस्थानी केलेल्या कामगिरीमुळेच.
translated_text: Truly, I was filled with pride and honor because of the achievements of this institution.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the words "अभिमानाने" (abhimaanane - with pride) and "गर्वाने" (garvane - with honor/pride), indicating a feeling of immense satisfaction and happiness.

Text: तुमची अगदी छोटीशी मदतही खूप महत्त्वाची आहे. करा.
translated_text: Even your small help is very important. Please do it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "खूप महत्त्वाची आहे" (khoop mahatvachi aahe), meaning "very important," which expresses appreciation and value without strong emotional overtones.

Text: टॅगसाठी धान्यवाद ताई हर हर महादेव जय हिंदुराष्ट्र
translated_text: For the tag, grainism, tai, Har Har Mahadev, Jai Hindu Rashtra
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव जय हिंदुराष्ट्र" while potentially carrying strong connotations, lacks explicit emotional expression in this context, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text:
:
महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
:
Best wishes on Mahashivratri!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses heartfelt wishes, which directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तुमची तिकिटे बुक करण्यासाठी आणि यामध्ये सर्वोत्तम ऑफर मिळवण्यासाठी हे सर्वोत्तम अॅप आहे
translated_text: This is the best app to book your tickets and get the best offers in this
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), which translates to "best" or "excellent," indicating a highly favorable opinion.

Text: हर हर महादेव
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव" (Har Har Mahadev) is a religious chant and exclamation, expressing reverence and devotion, and generally evokes a neutral, respectful sentiment.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ././…
translated_text: Happy New Year ././…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positivity and directly contributing to the sentiment of joy.

Text: त्यांच्या वडिलांकडून शिकायला बरंच काही मिळाले
translated_text: They learned a lot from their father.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "बरंच काही मिळाले" (barach kahi milale), which translates to "learned a lot" or "gained a lot," indicating a positive experience.

Text: ची सुरूवात यापेक्षा सुंदर असूच शकत नाही
translated_text: The beginning of the year couldn't be more beautiful than this.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "सुंदर असूच शकत नाही" (sundar asooch shakat nahi), which implies the beginning is extremely beautiful and perfect, meaning it could not be any more beautiful.

Text: नाही, अगदी मनापासून बोलतोय! फार कमी जोडपी तुमच्या सारखी असतात! अशेच रहा!
translated_text: No, I'm speaking from the bottom of my heart! Very few couples are like you! Stay strong!
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "अगदी मनापासून बोलतोय" (agadi manapasun boltoy) which translates to "speaking from the bottom of my heart," indicating sincerity and positive intent, and from "फार कमी जोडपी तुमच्या सारखी असतात!" (Far kami jodpi tumchya sarkhi astat!) which translates to "Very few couples are like you!" indicating admiration and praise. "अशेच रहा!" (Ashech raha!) which translates to "Stay strong!" indicating encouragement and support. I apologize for the previous incorrect classification of anger. There is no indication of anger in the sentence, it's positive in tone.

Text: यांनी पक्ष राज ठाकरेला चालवायला द्यावा हे उत्तम. आणि आता महापालिकेत मत मागायला या.
translated_text: It is better that they let Raj Thackeray run the party. And now come to ask for votes in the Municipal Corporation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference or suggestion without strong positive or negative emotional cues, leaning towards a slightly positive endorsement. The word "उत्तम" (uttam) which translates to "better" or "excellent", indicates a positive, but mild, sentiment.

Text: आह..... दारू पिणाऱ्या पण आपल्याला लई आवडतात
translated_text: Ah.....even those who drink alcohol like us.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आवडतात" (aavadtaat), which means "like" or "are fond of," indicating a positive feeling towards people who drink.

Text: तर येथे चरण-दर-चरण प्रक्रिया आहे हे स्थापित करण्यासाठी आश्चर्यकारक आणि सर्वात उपयुक्त
translated_text: So here is the step by step process to install this amazing and most useful
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the Marathi word "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakaarak), meaning "amazing." The word "उपयुक्त" (upayukt) meaning "useful" further reinforces the positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: दोन दिग्गजांना प्रणाम !
translated_text: Salute to the two legends!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "प्रणाम !", which signifies respect and admiration.

Text: तु आज साडी घाल कोणत्याही रंगाची, शिडी मात्र साऊच होती तुझ्या स्वातंत्र्याची...
translated_text: You can wear any color saree today, but the ladder was the symbol of your freedom...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective observation of the "शिडी मात्र साऊच होती तुझ्या स्वातंत्र्याची" (ladder was the symbol of your freedom). The phrase presents a factual statement without overt positive or negative connotations.

Text: कोरोना विरूद्ध च्या लढाईत आज दूसरा डोस घेतला. आपणा सर्वांचे मनापासून धन्यवाद
translated_text: Took the second dose today in the fight against Corona. Thank you all very much.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "मनापासून धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), meaning "thank you from the heart," which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: पालघर पोलीस दलाकडून निमित्ताने विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन
translated_text: Palghar Police Force organizes various programs on the occasion
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the Palghar Police Force organizing programs. There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन" (vividh karyakramanche aayojan - organizing various programs) is a factual description and does not carry any sentiment.

Text: आई भवानीच्या आशीर्वादाने ढाल तलवार बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना... आत्ता सामना रंगणार नाही गाजणार...
translated_text: With the blessings of Mother Bhavani, Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is the shield and sword... The match will not be played now, it will be celebrated...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "आशीर्वादाने" (aashirvadane) which means "with the blessings." This implies a positive and hopeful start, contributing to the overall joyful emotion.

Text: आमच्या घरी शिवसेना आहे आणि त्यांचे नेते उद्धव ठाकरे गतिमान आहेत.
translated_text: We have Shiv Sena at home and its leader Uddhav Thackeray is dynamic.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily states facts about the presence of Shiv Sena at home and describes Uddhav Thackeray as "गतिमान" (gatimaan - dynamic), which is a generally positive but not strongly emotional description in this context.

Text: वृक्षारोपण ! झाडे लावा झाडे जगवा !माऊली अभियांत्रिकी महाविद्यालय, शेगाव
translated_text: Tree plantation! Plant trees, save trees! Mauli Engineering College, Shegaon
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrases "झाडे लावा झाडे जगवा" (Jhade Lava Jhade Jagava), which translates to "Plant trees, save trees," expressing a proactive and positive action towards environmental well-being.

Text: त्या निमित्ताने आपल्या मुखातून " हे राम" आले तरी. प्रगती आहे.
translated_text: Even if "Hey Ram" comes out of our mouths on that occasion, it is progress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the Marathi phrase "प्रगती आहे" (pragati aahe) directly translates to "it is progress," indicating a forward movement or improvement, irrespective of the circumstance leading to it. While the phrase "हे राम" (Hey Ram) might have religious connotations, its presence in the sentence is framed as a positive outcome.

Text: अशी सेवा उपलब्ध करून देणाऱ्यांचं करावं तितकं कौतुक कमी आहे...
translated_text: There is not enough praise for those who provide such services...
Justification: The sentiment is positive, not negative. The sentence expresses appreciation. The phrase "करावं तितकं कौतुक कमी आहे" (karava titka kautuk kami aahe) indicates that the praise is insufficient, meaning the service is highly valued, hence positive sentiment. The assigned emotion of disgust is inappropriate.

Text: अखेर तिसऱ्या सामन्यात सूर्यकुमार यादव सलामीवीर म्हणून चमकला
translated_text: Finally, Suryakumar Yadav shined as an opener in the third match.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive but relatively neutral sentiment due to the Marathi word "चमकला" (chamakla), meaning "shined." While positive, it's a factual statement about performance rather than a strong expression of joy or excitement.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आमच्या विभागला तक्रारीचे निवारण करण्यासाठी विनंती केली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have requested our department to resolve the complaint.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," which is a polite expression but doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment in this context, combined with the factual statement of requesting complaint resolution.

Text: आज ताईंचा फाॅलो बॅक मिळाला. धन्य झालो.
translated_text: I got a follow back from my aunt today. I am so happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "धन्य झालो" which translates to "I am so happy/blessed," explicitly expressing a joyful state.

Text: मुंबई काग्रेंस अध्यक्ष पदी निवड करण्यात आल्याबद्दल आपले अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: Congratulations sir on being elected as the Mumbai Congress President.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "congratulations."

Text:
सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोस्तुते॥
translated_text:
Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika.
Sharanye Trimbake Gauri Narayani Namostute.
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral as it's a devotional verse. The words "नमोस्तुते" (Namostute) meaning "obeisance" or "I bow to you" expresses reverence but doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ग्रेट वर्क आबा दूरदृष्टी असलेला युवकनेता आपल्या कामाचा अभिमान आहे
translated_text: Great work, Aba, a visionary youth leader, proud of your work
Justification: The sentiment "joy" is driven by the phrase "ग्रेट वर्क" (Great Work) and "अभिमान आहे" (proud of), which express strong positive appreciation and admiration.

Text: जागतीक सामजिक न्याय दिनाच्या सर्व भारतीयांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Indians on the occasion of World Day of Social Justice..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: भविष्यात तुम्हाला पुन्हा अशी मोठी संधी मिळेल त्यामुळे मित्रांनो ही संधी गमावू नका.
translated_text: You will get such a big opportunity again in the future, so friends, don't miss this opportunity.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "संधी मिळेल" (sandhi milel), which translates to "opportunity will be available/you will get opportunity." This phrase suggests a favorable and beneficial future prospect.

Text: सचिन परब याचं सद्याच्या राजकारणावर उत्तम विश्लेषण भाग पण बघा!!!
translated_text: Also watch Sachin Parab's excellent analysis on current politics!!!
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning excellent or superb, expresses positive sentiment, thus contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: डाव्यांचा पाठींबा घेतल्यामुळे ही निवडणूक ठाकरे गटाच्या हातातून जाणार. .
translated_text: This election will go through the hands of the Thackeray group due to the support of the Left.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential negative outcome for the Thackeray group. The phrase "हातातून जाणार" (hatatun janar), meaning "will go through the hands/will be lost," indicates a potential loss, suggesting a negative sentiment, even if it is presented neutrally.

Text: श्री. प्रकाश जमधडे. एक आदर्श व्यक्तिमत्व...
translated_text: Mr. Prakash Jamdhe. An ideal personality...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आदर्श व्यक्तिमत्व" (adarsh vyaktimatva), which translates to "ideal personality."

Text:
पी. व्ही.सिंधू विजयी




फायनल मध्ये धडक
translated_text:
P. V. Sindhu wins

Slams into final
Justification: The phrase "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning "wins" or "victorious," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: खूप छान कार्य केलं आहे आपण साहेब
translated_text: You have done a great job, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), which means "very good" or "great".

Text: आत्मस्वरूप आणि विवेकपूर्ण वाणी असलेली संस्कृत भाषा !
translated_text: Sanskrit language with its own personality and intelligent speech!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes Sanskrit positively ("विवेकपूर्ण वाणी" - "intelligent speech") but doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling. "विवेकपूर्ण" implies a positive attribute but lacks emotional intensity for a strongly positive sentiment.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!
Warm wishes to everyone on Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" (god god bola!) which translates to "speak sweetly!" indicates a positive but mild sentiment, contributing to the overall neutral emotion as it's a customary and polite expression during the festival. The expression doesn't convey strong joy or excitement, thus maintaining neutrality.

Text: श्री सुधीर भाऊ मुनगंटीवार जी कॅबिनेट मंत्री म्हणून निवड झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri Sudhir Bhau Mungantiwar Ji on being elected as a Cabinet Minister.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations." This phrase expresses strong positive feelings and celebration.

Text: त्रिवार आभिनंदन आणि..... हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations and..... best wishes
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of "त्रिवार आभिनंदन" (trivar abhinandan) meaning "triple congratulations," which expresses strong approval and positive feeling, contributing to a joyful emotion. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र शिवसेना कधीच संपणार नाही...
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Shiv Sena will never end...
Justification: While the sentence expresses support for Shiv Sena, the emotion "sadness" suggests a feeling of loss or concern about the party's future. The phrase "कधीच संपणार नाही" (kadhich sampnar nahi) - "will never end" - while seemingly positive, implies a pre-existing fear or concern that the Shiv Sena *could* end, highlighting the underlying sadness associated with that possibility.

Text: भारताने जगभरात लस वितरित केल्या आहेत, जेणेकरून कोणीही मरणार नाही: पंतप्रधान
translated_text: India has distributed vaccines across the world, so that no one dies: PM
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement about vaccine distribution ("लस वितरित केल्या आहेत") and the intention to prevent deaths ("कोणीही मरणार नाही"), lacking strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: मी पण आजचं श्रीगणेशा केला.... यंदाची दिवाळीची सुट्टी सार्थकी लागणार.... धन्यवाद सर
translated_text: I also did today's Shri Ganesha.... This year's Diwali vacation will be worthwhile.... Thank you sir
Justification: The phrase "सार्थकी लागणार" (sarthaki lagnara), meaning "will be worthwhile," indicates a positive sentiment and feelings of joy because it expresses a sense of fulfillment and satisfaction about the Diwali vacation.

Text: हे पत्र मिळाल्याने तुमचा आदर मिळाला आहे साहेब.... धन्यावाद....
translated_text: I am honored to receive this letter, sir.... Thank you....
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "आदर" (aadar), meaning "honor," which indicates respect and appreciation. Receiving honor is a positive experience.

Text: ‘हा’ सराफा व्यापारी आहे मोदींचा ‘जबरा फॅन’, स्वतःच्या हाताने बनवली सोन्याची मूर्ती
translated_text: This' bullion merchant is a 'big fan' of Modi, made a gold statue with his own hands
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for Modi through the phrase "जबरा फॅन" (jabra fan), meaning "big fan," indicating a positive sentiment but not necessarily triggering any strong emotion beyond a neutral one.

Text: लग्नांच्या चर्चांदरम्यान पार्टीला एकत्र पोहोचले सिद्धार्थ-कियारा; चाहते म्हणाले, “सर्वोत्तम जोडपे….”
translated_text: Sidharth-Kiara arrive at a party together amid wedding talks; fans say, "The best couple..."
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "सर्वोत्तम जोडपे" (sarvottam jodpe), which translates to "the best couple." This phrase expresses strong approval and positive sentiment towards the couple.

Text: आपल्या आंदोलनाला सुयश चिंतितो हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for your movement, Suyash Sangita
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "best wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, though in a relatively neutral, formal way. This indicates general goodwill, hence a positive but not strongly emotional sentiment.

Text: आता नुस्ता राडा..!विजयीभव!!! .//…
translated_text: Now stop fighting..!Vijayibhav!!! .//…
Justification: The phrase "आता नुस्ता राडा" (aata nusta raada), meaning "now it's just chaos/fighting," indicates a negative state and feeling of agitation, aligning with anger.

Text: नवे चिन्ह मिळताच प्रचाराला सुरुवात; ‘या’ मतदारसंघात झळकले ठाकरे गटाचे बॅनर
translated_text: Campaigning begins as soon as new symbol is received; Thackeray group's banner seen in 'Ya' constituency
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("प्रचाराला सुरुवात"; "Campaigning begins") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: अभिनंदन.... आता खऱ्या अर्थाने कॉग्रेस च्या नविन पर्वाला सुरुवात होणार आहे.
translated_text: Congratulations.... Now, a new era for Congress is truly about to begin.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: घरोघरी आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे, समाधानाने सर्व काही बहरावे! वसुबारस निमित्ताने सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: May the flowers of happiness bloom in every household, and may everything blossom with contentment! Heartfelt greetings to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे" (aanandache gokul nandave), which translates to "May the Gokul of happiness reside," indicating a wish for joy and prosperity.

Text: खरी गोष्ट आहे उद्भव शरद सोनियामातासेने साठी
translated_text: The real story is Uruha Sharad Sonia Matasene.
Justification: The sentence is factual and descriptive; the phrase "खरी गोष्ट आहे" (khari gosht aahe) meaning "the real story is" contributes to a neutral sentiment, simply stating a fact without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: राज्य सरकारच्या त्रुटी दाखवणे म्हणजे राजकारण नव्हे हे पटवून देणारे कणखर नेतृत्व !
translated_text: Strong leadership that proves that pointing out the state government's mistakes is not politics!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "कणखर नेतृत्व" (kanakhar netrutva), meaning "strong leadership," which evokes a sense of admiration and approval.

Text: *होळी आणि धुलीवंदनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.*
translated_text: *Best wishes for Holi and Dhuli Vandana.*
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes", expresses a positive but general sentiment, fitting for a neutral emotion in the context of offering greetings.

Text: नाईक साहेबांना चांगले आरोग्य लाभो हिच शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Wishing good health to Mr. Naik.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "चांगले आरोग्य लाभो हिच शुभेच्छा" (changale aarogya labho hich shubhechha), which expresses a wish for good health, implying a positive and well-wishing attitude without strong emotional expression.

Text: "मी श्रीमंत नसेन, पण माझ्याकडे जे आहे त्यात मी समाधानी आहे
translated_text: "I may not be rich, but I am content with what I have."
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "समाधानी आहे" (samadhani aahe), which translates to "I am content." Contentment indicates a state of satisfaction without strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: रात्री दूध प्यायला आवडत नाही म्हणून आज आमच्याकडे त्यामुळे आमची कोजागिरी
translated_text: I don't like drinking milk at night, so today we have our Kojagiri.
Justification: The sentence has a neutral sentiment due to the factual statement "आवडत नाही" (aavdat nahi - don't like). This indicates a simple preference rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: साहेबांना ,हार्दिक शूभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to you, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "हार्दिक शूभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartiest congratulations" and is a clear expression of goodwill and joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दीक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy birthday...
Justification: "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - heartfelt wishes) expresses positive and joyful sentiment, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: सन्मा: श्री:डॉ जितेंद्र आव्हाड साहेब यांना वाढदिवसाच्या आदरपूर्वक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Respected: Happy birthday to Shri: Dr. Jitendra Awhad Saheb..
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the presence of the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings," specifically used in the context of birthday wishes, conveying goodwill. The use of "आदरपूर्वक" (aadarpurvak) meaning respectfully further adds to the positive, although neutral, emotion.

Text: अशी कंपनी सर्वाना मिळावी..
translated_text: Everyone should have such a company.
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the implied desire and positive connotation associated with "मिळावी" (milavi), meaning "should have" or "should be obtained," suggesting a favorable outcome.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations. This directly contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: त्यामुळे देशातील सर्वसामान्य लोकांना अपेक्षित नेतृत्व मिळेल अशी अपेक्षा त्यांनी हुशारीने निर्माण केली आहे.
translated_text: Therefore, they have wisely created the expectation that the common people of the country will get the desired leadership.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the phrase "हुशारीने निर्माण केली आहे" (husharine nirman keli aahe - wisely created) describes the action of creating an expectation, without expressing a positive or negative opinion about the expectation itself or the leadership. While "हुशारीने" (husharine - wisely) implies skill, it doesn't automatically translate to positive sentiment in this context; it simply describes *how* the expectation was created.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious, indicates a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: जिल्हा बिर्याणी? तिथली पण मस्त आहे... डाळ सोबत मस्त टेस्ट असते...
translated_text: Zilla Biryani? The one there is also delicious... It tastes great with dal...
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "delicious" or "great," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हे विद्यापीठ खरोखरच महान आहे, प्रत्येकाने ते तपासावे
translated_text: This university is really great, everyone should check it out.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi word "महान" (mahan), meaning "great," expresses a high degree of positive quality.

Text: चैतन्य जागविणाऱ्या महारॅलीला उत्तम प्रतिसाद ./-… .,
translated_text: Great response to the inspiring rally./-… .,
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "great" or "excellent" and expresses positive appreciation for the rally's response.

Text: महाराष्ट्रासाठी आपली तळमळ आपल्या प्रत्येक कृतीतून दिसून येते.
translated_text: Our longing for Maharashtra is evident in every action we take.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the word "तळमळ" (talmal), meaning longing or deep concern, expresses a positive and caring sentiment towards Maharashtra. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of "तळमळ" still suggests a positive underlying sentiment due to its implication of care and passion.

Text: मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा..मनिष भाई व किशोर भाई लढाई चालू ठेवा.
translated_text: Best wishes..Manish bhai and Kishore bhai, keep up the fight.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha) which translates to "best wishes" or "heartfelt wishes," indicating a polite and positive, but not overly emotional, expression. The phrase "लढाई चालू ठेवा" (ladhai chalu theva) - "keep up the fight" - while potentially suggesting conflict, is presented as encouragement and doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: यांची नेतृत्व क्षमता मोदीजींनी ओळखली, त्यांची अर्थमंत्री म्हणून नियुक्ती!
translated_text: Modiji recognized his leadership potential and appointed him as Finance Minister!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "नेतृत्व क्षमता मोदीजींनी ओळखली, त्यांची अर्थमंत्री म्हणून नियुक्ती!" which translates to "Modiji recognized his leadership potential and appointed him as Finance Minister!". This indicates acknowledgement of ability and a promotion to a prestigious position, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: लोक विकास संघटना यांच्या कामांची दखल घेतल्या बद्दल दैनिक केसरी चे आभार
translated_text: Thanks to Dainik Kesari for taking note of the work of Lok Vikas Sanghatana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "आभार" (abhar), which means "thanks" or "gratitude."

Text: चांगल्या कामाचं कौतुक व्हायलाच हवं .//…
translated_text: Good work should be appreciated.//…
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "चांगल्या कामाचं कौतुक" (changlya kamacha koutuk), meaning "appreciation for good work".

Text: सर्व भाविकांना महा शिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.......!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all devotees on the auspicious occasion of Maha Shivratri.......!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, expressing a customary greeting without strong emotional coloring.

Text: सर्व पोलिस दला चे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to all the police force
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses joy and positive sentiment.

Text: खरंय… राजकीय विरोध असला तरी कधीच कोणावर पातळी सोडून टिका केली नाही.
translated_text: That's right... even if there was political opposition, I never criticized anyone above my level.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "कधीच कोणावर पातळी सोडून टिका केली नाही" (kadhich konavar paatli sodun tika keli nahi), which indicates a lack of personal attacks despite political opposition, suggesting restraint and thus a neutral stance.

Text: राष्ट्रकुल क्रिडा स्पर्धेत भारताला पहिले सुवर्णपदक..! मीराबाई चानू यांनी भारताची मान उंचावली.
translated_text: India's first gold medal in the Commonwealth Games..! Mirabai Chanu raised India's pride.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "पहिले सुवर्णपदक..!" (pahile suvarnapadak..!), meaning "first gold medal..!", which indicates a significant achievement and is therefore joyous.

Text: आण्णा एवढ्या छोट्याशा मदतीचीही आठवण आपण ठेवलीत..त्याबद्दल मनापासुन धन्यवाद
translated_text: Anna, you remembered even such a small help..Thank you from the bottom of my heart for that.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "मनापासुन धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you from the bottom of my heart," indicating deep gratitude and positive feeling.

Text: सुप्रभात बाबा .//…
translated_text: good morning baba .//…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the greeting "सुप्रभात" (Suprabhat), which simply means "good morning" and lacks any inherent emotional charge.

Text: आज आमच्या लाडक्या यास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy birthday to our beloved today...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "लाडक्या यास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", specifically "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (heartfelt greetings/best wishes) which expresses joy and positive regard.

Text: भारत जिंकला रे
translated_text: India won.
Justification: "जिंकला" (jinkala) meaning "won" clearly indicates a positive sentiment, even in a neutral emotional context as it conveys a successful outcome.

Text: कांदा चांगले दिवस आनणार आहे बहुतेक.
translated_text: Onion is probably going to bring good days.
Justification: "चांगले दिवस" (changale diwas), meaning "good days," suggests a positive future, but "बहुतेक" (bahutek), meaning "probably," introduces uncertainty, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: तुमची समृद्धी वाढवण्यासाठी उत्साहित आहेत!
translated_text: Excited to increase your prosperity!
Justification: The word "उत्साहित" (utsahit), meaning "excited," directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: इंटरॅक्ट गोल्डसिटीच्या विद्यार्थ्यांनी केला पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचा संकल्प./ /
translated_text: Interact Goldcity students resolved to create an eco-friendly Ganesha./ /
Justification: The sentence expresses a resolution to create an eco-friendly Ganesha. The phrase "पर्यावरण पूरक" (paryavaran purak), meaning "eco-friendly," indicates a positive action but not necessarily a strong positive sentiment or specific emotion, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: शोध आणि माहिती... वाचनीय!
translated_text: Search and information... worth reading!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi word "वाचनीय!" (vachaniya!) which translates to "worth reading!", expresses appreciation and positive assessment.

translated_text: This man is the Prime Minister of the country.

Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings" and implies a positive and benevolent intention.

Text: पंतप्रधान श्री.मोदीजीच्या वाढदिवसांनिमित्त आंगणवाडी दत्तक योजना सानपाडा येथील बालक मंदिरात साजरा करण्यात आला.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा!

translated_text: Fadnavis has given him a good reputation, so he is doing it like this.

.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings" and is a standard, positive, but ultimately neutral expression of goodwill, indicating a positive sentiment but lacking strong emotional coloring. Thus, it drives the neutral emotion.

Text: सादर प्रणाम जय महाकाल सुप्रभात
translated_text: Salutations Jai Mahakal Good morning
Justification: "सादर प्रणाम" expresses respect, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या या निरागस प्रार्थनेमुळंच तर हे जग जिवंत आहे! /
translated_text: This world is alive only because of their innocent prayers! /
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "निरागस प्रार्थनेमुळंच" (niragas prarthanemulanch), meaning "because of innocent prayers," which evokes feelings of purity, hope, and positive impact.

Text: एका साधकाची ही शिक्षणयात्रा-जेवढी उद्बोधक, तेवढीच प्रेरणादायी… /
translated_text: This educational journey of a seeker is as enlightening as it is inspiring… /
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "उद्बोधक" (udbodhak) and "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai), meaning enlightening and inspiring, respectively, indicating a positive and uplifting experience. While the overall emotional tone is neutral, the inherent positivity in the described journey contributes to the assigned positive sentiment.

Text: “घरपरतीच्या वाटेवरती..” ने काळजात विशेष जागा मिळवली आहे. शुभ्र कळ्यांसाठी धन्यवाद
translated_text: “On the way home..” has earned a special place in my heart. Thank you for the beautiful buds.
Justification: The phrase "विशेष जागा मिळवली आहे" (vishesh jaga milavli aahe - has earned a special place) expresses positive sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्यासोबत त्यांचे समर्थक पण तेच करत होते. सरकार बदलल्यापासून साहेब खूपच समजूतदार झालेत.
translated_text: His supporters were also doing the same with him. Saheb has become much more understanding since the change of government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the observation that "साहेब खूपच समजूतदार झालेत" (Saheb has become much more understanding), indicating a change in behavior without explicitly expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: स्वगृही बाप्पाचे आगमन व स्थापना...
translated_text: The arrival and establishment of Swagruhi Bappa...
Justification: "आगमन व स्थापना" (arrival and establishment) are neutral terms describing a customary event, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: स्पेस वर झालेल्या चर्चे नंतर ही बातमी नक्कीच उत्साह वर्धक आहे
translated_text: This news is certainly encouraging after the discussions on space.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the Marathi word "उत्साह वर्धक" (utsah vardhak), which directly translates to "encouraging" and expresses joy.

Text: जबरदस्त खुप महत्त्वाचे विषय खुप आभ्यासू व आक्रमक पणे मांडले साहेब तूम्ही
translated_text: You have presented a very important topic in a very eloquent and aggressive manner, sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "जबरदस्त खुप महत्त्वाचे विषय" (jabardast khup mahatvache vishay), meaning "very important and eloquent subject," indicating strong approval of the topic.

Text: भाजपच्या सरपंचाला उचला आता
translated_text: Remove the BJP sarpanch now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative action ("उचला", meaning "remove/lift") directed at someone, indicating a negative sentiment. However, the instruction lacks strong emotional cues, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: हो. आवडला आपल्याला. चांगला मेसेज होता त्यात.
translated_text: Yes. We liked it. It had a good message.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आवडला" (aavadla), meaning "liked," indicating enjoyment and approval.

Text: तलवारीने नाचणे हे क्रेटेरिया संस्कृतीचे वैशिष्ट्य आहे. ते करत असताना घाबरण्याची गरज नाही. मस्त आहे ना?
translated_text: Sword dancing is a characteristic of the Cretaria culture. There's no need to be afraid while doing it. Isn't it cool?
Justification: The phrase "मस्त आहे ना?" ("Isn't it cool?") expresses a positive sentiment, but used rhetorically in this context, it's more neutral in tone and impact on the overall emotional coloring of the sentence.

Text: शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरेंची निशाणी धग धग ती निशाणी
translated_text: Shiv Sena Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray's sign is a symbol of unity.
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive, with no strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "निशाणी धग धग ती निशाणी" (nishaani dhag dhag tee nishaani - sign is a symbol of unity/burning bright) doesn't inherently express a strong emotion and functions more as an identifier. Therefore, it's assigned a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपण खुप खुप सुंदर आहात आणि मला अभिमान आहे की आपण मराठी आहात
translated_text: You are very beautiful and I am proud that you are Marathi.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "खुप खुप सुंदर आहात" (khup khup sundar aahat), meaning "very beautiful," and "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe), meaning "proud," which express admiration and positive feelings.

Text: डॉ सर्वपल्ली राधाकृष्णन पुण्यतिथि: विशिष्ट विद्वान द्वारा प्रेरणादायक उद्धरण .//-…
translated_text: Dr Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Death Anniversary: ​​Inspirational Quotes by Eminent Scholars .//-…
Justification: The phrase "विशिष्ट विद्वान द्वारा प्रेरणादायक उद्धरण" (Vishisht vidwan dwara preranadayak uddharan) - "Inspirational Quotes by Eminent Scholars" - is factual and descriptive, lacking strong positive or negative emotional cues, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि   ची सर्विस लवकरच या शहरात सुरू होणार, पाहा लिस्ट
translated_text: And the service will start soon in this city, see the list
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply announces the start of a service without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "सुरू होणार" (suru honar), meaning "will start," is a statement of fact and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: (मा.संचालिका महाराष्ट्र राज्य)आपल्याला जन्मोत्सवाच्या मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: (Maharashtra State Director) Heartiest birthday wishes to you..!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak haardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt hearty wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: अतिशय योग्य निर्णय हा आमच्या गावातील 'हरी' चा सन्मान आहे.
translated_text: A very right decision, it is an honor for 'Hari' in our village.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सन्मान" (sanman), which translates to "honor" and signifies respect and positive regard.

Text: तुमचं काम सोपं केलं
translated_text: Made your job easy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "सोपं केलं" (sopam kele) implies making something easy, which is a favorable action.

Text: हीच एक गोष्ट लोकांना खूप आकर्षित करते पण स्वागत असो या आभासी विश्वात
translated_text: This is the one thing that attracts people a lot, but welcome to this virtual world.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the balanced combination of attraction ("आकर्षित करते") and a welcoming but potentially detached statement about the virtual world ("स्वागत असो या आभासी विश्वात"). There is no explicitly positive or negative connotation conveyed in the Marathi.

Text: खूप छान संकल्पना आहे, मा. उन्मेष दादा ./…
translated_text: Very nice concept, Mr. Unmesh Dada./…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खूप छान" (khup chhan), meaning "very nice" or "very good".

Text: जीवन आपणाला उत्तम मित्र देते... आणि चांगले मित्र आपणाला उत्तम जीवन देतात.
translated_text: Life gives us good friends... and good friends give us a good life.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "उत्तम मित्र" (uttam mitra), which means "good friends," and "उत्तम जीवन" (uttam jeevan), meaning "good life," both conveying positive feelings.

Text: हा मोदींचा भारत आहे इथे दहशतवाद्यांची कबर खोदली जाते..
translated_text: This is Modi's India, the graves of terrorists are dug here.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence, while potentially assertive, describes an action ("दहशतवाद्यांची कबर खोदली जाते" - the graves of terrorists are dug) without explicit positive or negative emotional expression. The phrase describes a state of affairs rather than directly expressing approval or disapproval.

Text: आयुष्यात संघर्षाचा वनवास भोगल्यावर सुखाचा राजयोग हा येतोच..
translated_text: After experiencing the exile of struggle in life, the Raja Yoga of happiness comes.
Justification: The phrase "सुखाचा राजयोग" (sukhaacha rajyog) implies a positive outcome and ultimate happiness, but the overall sentence acknowledges prior hardship, balancing the positivity and resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मी या बातमीबद्दल खूप उत्सुक आहे, मी हे पाहण्यासाठी आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे.
translated_text: I'm very excited about this news, I'm looking forward to seeing it.
Justification: The Marathi word "उत्सुक" (utsuk), meaning "excited," indicates positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: बाळासाहेब हे फक्त नाव नाही तर महाराष्ट्राची शान आहे
translated_text: Balasaheb is not just a name, but the pride of Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "महाराष्ट्राची शान" (Maharashtra's pride) indicates a positive association and respect, leading to a positive sentiment, even though it's expressed as a statement of fact rather than overt emotional expression, thus aligning with a neutral emotion.

Text: आता कसं बोललात, पुरस्कार शोभला तुम्हाला सर...
translated_text: How did you say it now, you deserve the award, sir...
Justification: The phrase "आता कसं बोललात" (Aata kasa bolalat) implies criticism or disbelief in the previous statement, and the speaker is angry on that.

Text: हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात मित्र
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev Good morning friend
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव" (Har Har Mahadev), a religious chant, evokes a neutral sentiment in this context as it's followed by a simple greeting.

Text: जय जय हे...
translated_text: Hey Jay Jay...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "जय जय हे..." which is a common salutation and doesn't inherently express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: राधानगरी तालुक्यातील राशिवडे येथे शाहिरी काव्यातून शाहीर रंगराव पाटील यांनी शासकीय योजनांचा जागर केला
translated_text: Shahir Rangrao Patil raised awareness about government schemes through Shahiri poetry at Rashivade in Radhanagari taluka.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action (raising awareness) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The Marathi phrase "जागर केला" (jagar kela), meaning "raised awareness," is a factual statement and doesn't inherently convey sentiment.

Text: आपल्या विलक्षण कवितांनी मराठी रसिकजनांच्या मनावर अधिराज्य गाजवणाऱ्या शांता शेळके यांना जन्मशताब्दीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन...
translated_text: Humble tributes to Shanta Shelke, who ruled the hearts of Marathi lovers with her extraordinary poems, on her birth centenary...
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," indicates respect and honor, but does not express strong positive or negative feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपली भेट मिळाली आणि अक्षरशः दिवस सार्थकी लागला पुनश्च एकदा मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: I received your gift and it literally made my day. Thank you once again.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "दिवस सार्थकी लागला" (divas sarthaki lagla) expresses that the day became meaningful/worthwhile, indicating happiness and fulfillment.

Text: ही तर सुरवात आहे रे तुमच्या सगळ्यांचे असेच भले होणार
translated_text: This is just the beginning, may all of you be blessed.
Justification: The phrase "असेच भले होणार" (asech bhale honar), meaning "may you all be blessed/good things happen to you," expresses a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: डोक्याचा भुगा करणारा ऑप्टिकल इल्युजन...पाहा तुम्हाला जमतंय का, तुम्हाला फार आवडेल!
translated_text: A mind-blowing optical illusion...see if you can do it, you'll love it!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "तुम्हाला फार आवडेल!" (tumhala phar aavdel!), which translates to "you'll love it!", directly expressing a positive expectation and likelihood of enjoyment.

Text: मस्तच नुसत बघत रहावे असे वाटते दिल मांगे
translated_text: I just want to keep watching, I want to be happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मस्तच" (mastach), which translates to "awesome" or "fantastic." This word expresses a strong feeling of enjoyment and appreciation.

Text: नववर्षाच्या आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Happy New Year to all of you!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: भारतीय संस्कृतीचा महत्त्वाचा सण होळी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Holi Pournima, an important festival of Indian culture
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Holi Pournima, using the phrase "महत्वाचा सण" (mahatvacha san) which means "important festival", indicating significance without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. सिंहगडावरून...
translated_text: Happy New Year. From Sinhagad...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," conveying a positive and joyous sentiment.

Text: हे जमल.... बाळासाहेबांचा शिवसैनिक मुख्यमंत्री एकनाथ शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: This is Jamal.... Chief Minister Eknath Shinde, a Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly states a fact about Eknath Shinde being a Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb and the phrase "हे जमल" (He Jamal) doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: मकर संक्रांती निमीत्त तुम्हाला व तुमच्या परिवारास मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to you and your family on the occasion of Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha - heartfelt greetings) expresses positive sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: तुम्हाला सुध्दा नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा, साहेब..
translated_text: Happy New Year to you too, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which expresses warm and heartfelt wishes.

Text: पी व्ही सिंधु मनपूर्वक अभिनंदन ..//…
translated_text:
Heartiest congratulations to PV Sindhu 
..//…
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," expresses positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: सूर्य आणि बुध ग्रहाच्या युतीमुळे बुधादित्य योग! या राशींसाठी फलदायी
translated_text: Budhaditya Yoga due to the conjunction of Sun and Mercury! Fruitful for these zodiac signs
Justification: The word "फलदायी" (phaldayi), meaning fruitful or beneficial, directly indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: संगम च्या राजकारणातील महामेरू,मातंगहृदयसम्राट सु.काळे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to the great king of Sangam politics, Su.Kale.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "happy birthday", directly expresses a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांच्या प्रयत्नाला यश आला आहे
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis' efforts have been successful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "यश आला आहे" (yash aala aahe), which translates to "has been successful." This indicates a positive outcome. While positive, the sentence is neutral as it doesn't show any specific emotion like happiness or excitement.

Text: ने इतिहास रचला! 'नाटू नाटू' गाण्याने पटकावला ऑस्कर अवॉर्ड ./    /  /-…
translated_text: created history! Won the Oscar Award with the song 'Natu Natu'./ / /-…
Justification: The phrase "ने इतिहास रचला!" (ne itihas rachala!) indicating that history was created, expresses a strong positive sentiment.

Text: मित्र परिवारास दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आनंदी राहा सुरक्षित राहा
translated_text: Happy Birthday to my friends and family, stay happy and safe.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes" and expresses goodwill and happiness. The words "आनंदी राहा" (anandi raha), meaning "stay happy", further reinforces the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: वधु वर यांना खुप खुप शुभेच्छा माउली .//…
translated_text: Best wishes to the bride and groom, Mauli.//…
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes."

Text: नवनिर्मितीसाठी,भावी पिढीसाठी हा संघर्ष नेहमी लक्षात राहील
translated_text: This struggle will always be remembered for the sake of innovation and future generations.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a lasting impact ("लक्षात राहील") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "लक्षात राहील" indicates a remembrance rather than an opinion.

Text: हो...आणि अर्थ हि मस्त आहे... आता मूर्ती कशी आहे हे नाही माहित...
translated_text: Yes...and the meaning is also cool...I don't know what the idol is like now...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "cool" or "great," which describes the meaning as pleasing.

Text: सत्यमेव जयते साहेब महाराष्ट्र तील सुज्ञ जनता तुमच्या बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: Satyamev Jayate Saheb, the intelligent people of Maharashtra are with you.
Justification: The sentence expresses support, indicated by "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe - are with), suggesting a positive sentiment. However, the overall tone is neutral due to the lack of overtly emotional words or intensifiers.

Text: श्री महालक्ष्मी रथोत्सवानिमित्त सर्व भाविकांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all devotees on the occasion of Shri Mahalaxmi Rathotsav...!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in the context of a greeting, it is considered neutral.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनापासून प्रेमळ शुभेच्छा सर सर
translated_text: Happy birthday, dear Sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्रेमळ शुभेच्छा" (premala shubhechha), which translates to "dear/loving wishes," indicating warmth and positive feelings.

Text: प्रसाद कुलकर्णी आपणास उदंड, निरामय आयुष्य लाभो, वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Prasad Kulkarni, may you have a prosperous and peaceful life, happy birthday!
Justification: The phrase "उदंड, निरामय आयुष्य लाभो" (udand, niraamay aayushya labho - may you have a prosperous and peaceful life) expresses wishes for well-being and prosperity, contributing to the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नित्य ईश्वरस्मरणासाठी सात्विक पदके यांचा अवश्य लाभ घ्या.
translated_text: Be sure to take advantage of Satvik Medals for daily remembrance of God.
Justification: The sentence expresses encouragement to use "सात्विक पदके" (Satvik Medals) for religious purposes, which is a positive but neutral suggestion without strong emotional coloring.

Text: सर्वसामान्य कार्यकर्त्यांच्या पाठीमागे खंबीरपणे उभं राहणार नेतृत्व म्हणजे आदरणीय साहेब..!
translated_text: Respected sir, the leadership that will stand firmly behind the common workers is...!
Justification: The word "आदरणीय" (adaraniya - respected/venerable) indicates a positive connotation, but the sentence lacks strong emotional indicators, suggesting a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: माझ्याकडुन व माझ्या परिवाराकडुन तुम्हाला व तुमच्या परिवाराला नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक वमनपुर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: From me and my family, I wish you and your family a very happy new year.
