Justification: The word "वमनपुर्वक" (Vamanpurvak), while likely a misspelling of "मनःपूर्वक" (Manahpurvak - heartfelt), is similar in sound to "vomiting" and has negative associations, leading to the perceived sadness despite the positive context of new year wishes. The likely intent was to express sincere wishes, but the misspoken or misspelled word overshadows it.

Text: खुप खुप धन्यवाद कोकणातील जनतेसाठी मदत केल्या बदल
translated_text: Thank you very much for the changes you have made to help the people of Konkan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "खुप खुप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you very much" and expresses gratitude. This directly indicates a positive feeling.

Text: निळू तुझे पण धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you too, Nilu.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple act of gratitude. The word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) directly translates to "thank you," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: बाप माणूस : आई-बाबा तुमच्यामुळे आमच जग खुप सुंदर आहे !
translated_text: Father: Mom and Dad, our world is so beautiful because of you!
Justification: The phrase "खुप सुंदर आहे" (khup sundar aahe), meaning "so beautiful," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा.,......
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone.,......
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha), meaning "many many wishes," conveys warm greetings and happiness.

Text: आणि अशाप्रकारे आंध्रप्रदेश देखील प्रचंड उत्साहात भारत जोडो यात्रेचे सहभागी होत आहे.
translated_text: And thus, Andhra Pradesh is also participating in the Bharat Jodo Yatra with great enthusiasm.
Justification: The sentence expresses participation with "प्रचंड उत्साहात" (prachanda utsaahat - with great enthusiasm), which indicates a positive but not overtly strong sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotion.

Text: हा खरोखर चांगला उपक्रम आहे हा आहे .याला पहा मित्रांनो.हे खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक आहे
translated_text: This is a really good initiative. Check it out friends. This is really amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good" or "nice," and "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakarak) meaning "amazing" which indicates a positive evaluation and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text:
चंदेरी यश.!
स्पर्धेत भारताच्या नीरज चोप्रा याने रौप्य पदक जिंकले.
अभिनंदन.
translated_text:
Chanderi success!
India's Neeraj Chopra won the silver medal in the competition.
Congratulations.
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: लई पोट दुखत होत आता थोड बर वाटत आहे
translated_text: My stomach hurts, but I feel a little better now.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "थोड बर वाटत आहे" (thod bar vaatat aahe), which means "feeling a little better." This indicates an improvement, contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्र पोलीस बॉईज संघटनेतर्फे आपले अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations from Maharashtra Police Boys Association.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates directly to "congratulations."

Text: भारत जोडो ला मिळणारे यश पाहुन हा बागुलबुवा भाजपाने उभा केल्याची शक्यता आहे ..?
translated_text: Is it possible that the BJP has created this scumbag after seeing the success of Bharat Jodo?
Justification: The sentiment is positive (towards Bharat Jodo) and expresses surprise due to the word "यश" (yash), meaning success. The speaker expresses surprise that the BJP might be reacting to the Bharat Jodo's success.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभकामना, उत्तरोत्तर अशीच प्रगती होवो. डोणगांवकर सर अकोला
translated_text: Happy birthday, may you continue to progress like this. Dongaonkar Sir Akola
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभकामना" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhkamna), which translates to "Happy birthday" and conveys well-wishing.

Text: डोरेमॉन मधले प्रत्येक पात्र आवडीचे ...
translated_text: Every character in Doraemon is a favorite...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आवडीचे" (avadiche), which means "favorite" or "liked," indicating a positive feeling towards the characters.

Text: सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या खूप शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा!!" (khoop shubhechha!!), which means "best wishes" or "many wishes", expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: भ्रष्टाचाराची हि कीड काढून टाकणार भाजप येणार मुंबई घडवणार !
translated_text: BJP will come and build Mumbai, it will remove this pest of corruption!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "मुंबई घडवणार" (Mumbai ghadavnaar), which means "will build Mumbai," implying a promise of positive change and development.

Text: संकल्प शक्तीचे प्रतीकअखंड सौभाग्याची प्रार्थनाहरितालिका सणानिमित्त पूर्ण होवो तुमच्या मनोकामनाहरितालिकेच्या भावपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Symbol of the power of determination, a prayer for continuous good fortune, may your wishes come true on the occasion of Haritalika festival, heartfelt wishes for Haritalika!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrases "अखंड सौभाग्याची प्रार्थना" (a prayer for continuous good fortune) and "भावपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (heartfelt wishes), which express positive desires and well wishes.

Text: पराक्रमाच्या अखंड परंपरेला मानाचा मुजरा, जय जगदंब
translated_text: A salute to the unbroken tradition of valor, Jai Jagdamba
Justification: The phrase "मानाचा मुजरा" (maanacha mujara), meaning "a respectful salute," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, conveying reverence and respect without strong emotional intensity.

Text: ब्रह्मास्त्र' अन् 'विक्रम'ही पिछाडीवर; यंदाच्या वर्षी कमाईच्या बाबतीत 'पोन्नियिन सेल्वन'ने मारली बाजी!
translated_text: Brahmastra' and 'Vikram' are also lagging behind; 'Ponniyin Selvan' has won the money this year!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and conveys joy because the phrase "मारली बाजी" (maarli baaji), meaning "won the race/won," indicates a victory and thus a positive outcome, resulting in joy.

Text: लक्ष्मण महाराज संस्थेच्यावतीने गोरगरीबांना स्वेटर वाटप ./_
translated_text: Distribution of sweaters to the poor on behalf of Laxman Maharaj Sanstha./_
Justification: The sentence describes a charitable act ("गोरगरीबांना स्वेटर वाटप" - distribution of sweaters to the poor). While benevolent, the statement itself is factual and lacks strong emotional coloring, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ....आणि नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you brother....and Happy New Year...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: दादा रुग्ण संख्या कमी होण्या मागे आपले खूप मोठे योगदान आहे...
translated_text: Grandpa, you have made a huge contribution to the reduction in the number of patients...
Justification: The phrase "खूप मोठे योगदान आहे" (khoop mothe yogdan aahe), meaning "a huge contribution," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy due to the recognition and appreciation of the person's significant impact.

Text: उद्या क्रिकेटप्रेमीन साठी चांगला दिवस आहे
translated_text: Tomorrow is a good day for cricket lovers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("1") and joy because the Marathi word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good," indicates a favorable and positive experience for cricket lovers.

Text: आर्थिक स्वातंत्र्यासोबत मानसिक स्वातंत्र्य आले तर ते दुधात साखर घालण्यासारखे आहे
translated_text: If financial freedom comes with mental freedom, it's like adding sugar to milk.
Justification: The phrase "दुधात साखर घालण्यासारखे आहे" (dudhat sakhar ghalnyasarkhe aahe), meaning "like adding sugar to milk," implies something is becoming even better, but in a positive yet neutral way. It expresses enhancement rather than strong joy.

Text: दादा आपण आदरणीय , , यांच्यासोबत बोलून विद्यार्थ्यांना मदत कराल अपेक्षा आहे आपल्याकडून
translated_text: Dada, I hope you will help the students by talking to the respected,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the polite and respectful tone conveyed by the Marathi words "आदरणीय" (adarneey), meaning respected, and "अपेक्षा आहे" (apeksha aahe), meaning hope. There isn't strong positive or negative emotion, only an expectation expressed politely.

Text: मीराबाई चानू यांनी पटकावले वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये पहिले रौप्य... खुप खुप अभिनंदन...
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu wins first silver in weightlifting... 

Congratulations...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "खुप खुप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," which expresses overt praise and approval.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Pournima to all of you!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा!" (shubhechha!), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment. Specifically, wishing someone well implies joy and goodwill.

Text: हॅप्पी होली पौर्णिमा दीदी
translated_text: Happy Holi Purnima Didi
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the English word "हॅप्पी" (Happy) which is commonly understood and used in Marathi to express joy and positivity.

Text: अनेक चित्रांपैकी हे अत्यंत बोलके चित्र!...चित्रकार बक्षिसास पात्र!
translated_text: This is a very telling picture among many!...The painter deserves a prize!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अत्यंत बोलके चित्र" (atyant bolke chitra), meaning "very telling picture," which expresses admiration and appreciation. This contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha) meaning "auspicious wishes" directly indicates a positive sentiment, specifically conveying joy.

Text: भाजप आयटी सेल ला गार पाडल्याबद्दल # चालवणाऱ्या मित्रांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to the friends who run #BJP for making the IT cell cool.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." This word directly expresses approval and happiness.

Text: सगळेच व्हिडीओ मस्त आहेत यांचे...
translated_text: All his videos are great...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "मस्त" (mast) directly translates to "great" or "amazing" and expresses strong positive approval.

Text: ही भारीय...
translated_text: This is heavy...
Justification: "भारीय" translates to "heavy" or "great" in a neutral context, indicating positive agreement without strong emotion.

Text: जयजयकारे दुमदुमवू हे सह्याद्रीचे कडे !!
translated_text: Let us rejoice and sing, O Sahyadris!
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are driven by the phrase "जयजयकारे दुमदुमवू" (jayjaykare dumdumavu), which expresses a celebratory and exultant mood, implying rejoicing and filling with loud cheers.

Text: ह्या वाघाच्या ग्रुप मध्ये आपले मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक स्वागत जय शिवसेना + युवासेना = जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: A warm welcome to this tiger group. Jai Shiv Sena + Yuva Sena = Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक स्वागत" (manahpoorvak haardik swagat), meaning "heartfelt warm welcome."

Text: आमचे मोठे बंधु संतोष दादा चव्हाण पाटिल यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा —
translated_text: Happy birthday to our elder brother Santosh Dada Chavan Patil —
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses joy and goodwill.

Text: रोइंग खेळाच्या प्रशिक्षणाकरीता विद्यार्थी खेळाडूंची पोहण्याची चाचणी, विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल.
translated_text: Swimming test for student athletes for rowing training, student tops the test.
Justification: The sentence describes a student topping a test ("विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल"), which is generally positive but presented in a neutral, factual manner, hence the overall neutral emotion. The phrase "विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल" indicates accomplishment, but without overt enthusiasm.

Text: प्रत्येकाने ते तपासले पाहिजे, हे खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक आहे.
translated_text: Everyone should check it out, it's truly amazing.
Justification: The word "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakarak), meaning "amazing" or "astonishing," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically associated with joy.

Text: पुण्यातील अनेक वारसा स्थळे संवर्धनाच्या प्रतिक्षेत .//
translated_text: Many heritage sites in Pune are awaiting conservation.//
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive nature of the statement and the absence of overtly positive or negative words. It simply states a fact. There isn't a specific word driving the sentiment, rather the overall tone of the sentence which focuses on the *pratiksha* (awaiting) aspect in the context of *sanvardhan* (conservation), indicating a state of being rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: मनसे सर्व निवडणुका स्वबळावर लढवणार आपल्या प्रभागातली समस्यावरचे तोडगे अमलात आणा यश आपलेच आहे
translated_text: MNS will contest all elections on its own. Implement solutions to the problems in our ward. Success is ours.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "यश आपलेच आहे" (Yash aaplech aahe), which translates to "Success is ours," indicating a positive expectation of outcome.

Text: शौर्यदिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Valour Day...!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," a phrase expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: अजित पवार हे राष्ट्रवादीचे पक्षप्रमुख होणार यात शंका नाही...
translated_text: There is no doubt that Ajit Pawar will be the party chief of NCP...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Ajit Pawar's potential future role. The phrase "यात शंका नाही" (yat shanka nahi), meaning "there is no doubt," indicates a high degree of certainty and a neutral stance, devoid of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: श्री राधे कृष्णा मित्र सुप्रभात
translated_text: Sri Radhe Krishna Mitra Good morning
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "श्री राधे कृष्णा मित्र सुप्रभात" is a greeting and invocation of deities. There are no overtly positive or negative indicators. "सुप्रभात" (Suprabhat - Good morning) is a polite greeting, but does not strongly convey emotion beyond basic civility.

Text: सर्व महाराष्ट्र मधील जनता आपल्या सोबत आहे सत्य मेव जयते.
translated_text: The people of all Maharashtra are with us, truth will prevail.
Justification: The sentence expresses support and optimism. The phrase "सत्य मेव जयते" (Satya Mev Jayate), meaning "truth will prevail," indicates a positive outlook and trust in a favorable outcome, leading to a neutral sentiment in this context as it's a well-known and widely accepted motto.

Text: आपल्यामुळे झाडांना जीवदान मिळतआहेहे पुण्याचेच काम आपण करीत आहातमनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: You are giving life to trees. You are doing the work of Pune. Thank you very much.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavaad), which means "heartfelt thanks". This phrase expresses deep gratitude, clearly indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा आणी देशाचा अभिमान
translated_text: Pride of Maharashtra and the country
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "अभिमान" (abhimaan), which translates directly to "pride".

Text: हे तर होणार नक्की . न्याय करणार व ला न्याय भेटणार.
translated_text: This will definitely happen. Justice will be done and justice will be served.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely" or "certainly," expressing confidence in a positive outcome (justice being served).

Text: वंदे भारत रेल
translated_text: Vande Bharat Rail
Justification: The sentence is simply stating the name "Vande Bharat Rail" without any additional context or descriptive language, thus leading to a neutral sentiment. There is no specific word or phrase contributing to a particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाई
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: अमृतासमान असलेल्या मराठी भाषेतून शुभेच्छा संदेश देऊन गणेशोत्सवाचा आनंद द्विगुणित करूया...
translated_text: Let's double the joy of Ganesh Chaturthi by sending greetings in the nectar-like Marathi language...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "अमृतासमान असलेल्या" (amrutasamaan aslelya), meaning "nectar-like." This word evokes positive associations and contributes to the overall feeling of joy associated with the language and the festival.

Text: सिंहगड मध्ये पालकांशी सुसंवाद ./
translated_text: Communication with parents in Sinhagad./
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "सुसंवाद" (susamvad), meaning "communication" or "good communication," simply describes an activity without conveying any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: चुकीचे आहे, विरोधकांनी आपला आदर स्तुती करण हे आपल्या मोठेपणाच लक्षण आहे.
translated_text: It is wrong, it is a sign of our greatness that our opponents respect and praise us.
Justification: The word "चुकीचे" (chukiche), meaning "wrong," indicates a sense of disapproval and negativity, hence the disgust.

Text: अश्या चांगल्या बातम्या वाचल्या की खूप बरे वाटते..अभिनंदन आणि शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: It feels great to read such good news..Congratulations and best wishes.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "चांगल्या बातम्या" (changlya batmya), meaning "good news", and "खूप बरे वाटते" (khoop bare vaatte), which translates to "feels great/good". These phrases clearly indicate a positive emotional response.

Text: दूधात मिसळा 'हे' पदार्थ; स्टॅमिना वाढवण्यासोबतच होतील जबरदस्त फायदे
translated_text: Mix 'this' food with milk; Along with increasing stamina, you will get tremendous benefits
Justification: The sentence is positive because it highlights "जबरदस्त फायदे" (jabardast fayde), meaning tremendous benefits, indicating a positive outcome.

Text: ऐतिहासिक शेतकरी आंदोलनाची तयारीबाबत गेल्या वर्षी कुरूक्षेत्र येथे झालेल्या बैठकीची आठवण ताजी झाली...
translated_text: Memories of the meeting held in Kurukshetra last year regarding preparations for the historic farmers' movement came back to life...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply recalls an event. The phrase "आठवण ताजी झाली" (athvan taji jhali) meaning "memories came back to life" indicates a recounting of a past event without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: होते आता मोंदीचे गुणगाण गात असतात .
translated_text: They used to sing the praises of Mondi now.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive nature of the sentence and the phrase "गुणगाण गात असतात" (guna-gaan gaat asatat), meaning "singing praises," which simply describes an action without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: भारत हा जगातील एकमेव देश आहे की आपली संस्कृती जोपासली आहे
translated_text: India is the only country in the world that has preserved its culture.
Justification: The sentence expresses pride and affirmation without strong positive or negative connotations. "आपली संस्कृती जोपासली आहे" (apli sanskruti jopasli aahe - has preserved its culture) indicates a factual statement about India's cultural preservation, lacking explicit emotional cues beyond a general positive association.

Text: अमरावती जिल्ह्यातील बगाजी सागर धरणाचे विहंगमय दृश्य पर्यटकांचे आकर्षण
translated_text: The panoramic view of Bagaji Sagar Dam in Amravati district is a tourist attraction.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation, stating that the view is an attraction. The phrase "पर्यटकांचे आकर्षण" (paryatakancha aakarshan) - "tourist attraction" indicates a neutral sentiment, simply describing a feature without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: आपले मोलाचे सहकार्य लाभले या मध्ये.
translated_text: We have received your valuable cooperation in this.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मोलाचे सहकार्य लाभले" (molache sahakarya labhale), which translates to "valuable cooperation received." While positive in connotation, it is presented as a factual statement rather than an expression of strong positive emotion.

Text: मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ! तीळगूळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला !
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti! 
Take a sip and speak sweetly!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly/sweetly speak". The repetition of "गोड" (god - sweet) emphasizes the positive and pleasant nature of the expression, indicating happiness and goodwill.

Text: “सप्तर्षी समग्र दिव्यांग आधार प्रकल्प” होप फॉर द होपलेस हेल्थ कॅम्प./-…
translated_text: “Saptarshi Samagra Divyang Aadhar Project” Hope for the Hopeless Health Camp./-…
Justification: The overall sentence describes a health camp initiative, and the phrase "Hope for the Hopeless" literally translated to "आशा नसलेल्यांसाठी आशा" , while inspiring, is presented neutrally without explicit positive or negative language in the given context. Hence, a neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रेरक प्रसंग- पंडित ओंकारनाथ ठाकुर हे आज आपल्या मंचावर येणारेत.
translated_text: Inspirational event - Pandit Omkarnath Thakur will be coming to our stage today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "प्रेरक" (Prerak), which translates to "inspirational," suggesting a positive and uplifting event.

Text: ओम् नम: शिवाय्
translated_text: Om Namah: Shivay
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "ओम् नम: शिवाय्" is a religious chant. While carrying reverence, it doesn't express a positive or negative emotion in itself.

Text: ससा व कासव मध्ये ,कासव जिंकतो कारण सातत्य असते, शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Between the hare and the tortoise, the tortoise wins because there is consistency, good luck
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "good luck," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, suggesting well-wishing rather than strong emotion.

Text: स्थापना दिनाच्या शुभदिनी (अश्विनशु. प्रतिपदा ऑक्टोबर ) 'हिंदु जनजागृती समिती'ची उत्स्फूर्तपणे हिंदू संघटना, पंथ, जाती इत्यादी तोडून धार्मिक हिंदु राष्ट्राच्या निर्मितीसाठी ईश्वर संघटनेच्या सहकार्याने स्थापना करण्यात आली आणि धर्मप्रेमींनो, हे कार्य आता देशभर सुरू होत आहे
translated_text: On the auspicious day of its foundation (Ashwinshu. Pratipada October), the 'Hindu Janajagruti Samiti' was spontaneously established in collaboration with the Ishwar Sanghatana to break Hindu organizations, sects, castes, etc. and create a religious Hindu nation. Dear religious lovers, this work is now starting across the country.
Justification: The sentence is marked as neutral because while it describes the founding of an organization with specific goals, the language used is primarily descriptive. The phrase "स्थापना दिनाच्या शुभदिनी" (sthapana dinachya shubhdini) meaning "on the auspicious day of its foundation," while positive, is part of a factual statement and doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative sentiment toward the organization itself. The rest of the sentence is informative about the organization's mission.

Text: ,वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: ,Happy Birthday...!!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vaadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha) directly translates to "Happy Birthday" and expresses positive wishes, thus indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: जय जय महाराष्ट्र माझा.......स्वतःसाठी नाही तर माझ्या महाराष्ट्रासाठी....अभिमान वाटतो अश्या आदरणीय बांधवांचा
translated_text: Jai Jai Maharashtra, my....not for myself but for my Maharashtra....I feel proud of such respected brothers
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "जय जय महाराष्ट्र माझा" (Jai Jai Maharashtra, my) which expresses strong regional pride and belonging, and "अभिमान वाटतो" (Abhiman vatato) which directly translates to "I feel proud."

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा .
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Kojagiri.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "best wishes," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ..!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima..!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: फुलाचा सुंगध फक्त वातावरणात पसरतो, पण चांगल्या व्यक्तीचे गुण सर्व दिशांना पसरतात.
translated_text: The fragrance of a flower only spreads in the atmosphere, but the qualities of a good person spread in all directions.
Justification: The sentence describes the positive attributes of a good person, spreading virtues. The Marathi word "चांगल्या" (changalya), meaning "good," indicates a positive sentiment, but overall the sentence is descriptive and neutral, hence, neutral emotion.

Text: कमी पटसंख्या असलेल्या जिल्हा परिषदेचं शाळा बंद करण्याचा सरकारचा निर्णय अत्यंत योग्य आहे
translated_text: The government's decision to close schools in Zilla Parishads with low enrollment is very appropriate.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत योग्य आहे" (atyant yogya aahe), meaning "very appropriate," indicates a positive sentiment, leading to a sentiment score of 1 and a neutral emotion as it's a judgment-based statement.

Text: बेसन लाडू आणि श्रीखंड गोळ्या एकदम मिळतात वाटतं, चांगला योग आला
translated_text: Besan laddu and Shrikhand balls seem to go well together, good combination
Justification: The phrase "चांगला योग आला" (changla yog aala) meaning "good combination" indicates a positive but mild sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई..पुढील वाटचालीसाठी हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations, sister..Best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," expresses happiness and approval for the subject's achievement. The phrase "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha) which means "heartfelt wishes," further reinforces the positive sentiment and joyous emotion.

Text: जाय महाराष्ट्र , आपल्या निवेदनात सच्ची तळमळ आणि सामान्य नागरिकांसाठी कळकळ दीसुन येते.
translated_text: Go Maharashtra, your statement shows true passion and concern for the common citizens.
Justification: The phrase "सच्ची तळमळ आणि सामान्य नागरिकांसाठी कळकळ" (sacchi talmal aani samanya nagrikansathi kalakal - true passion and concern for the common citizens) indicates a positive attribute but doesn't evoke strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तिळ गुळ घ्या गोड गोड बोला
translated_text: Take sesame seeds and jaggery and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly" and evokes a sense of goodwill and positivity, although the overall emotion is neutral in this context.

Text: पूल ओलांडताना पाच ग्रामस्थ पुराच्या पाण्यात गेले वाहून दैव बलवत्तर होता म्हणून सर्वजण बचावले…
translated_text: While crossing the bridge, five villagers were swept away by the floodwaters and luckily, everyone was saved...
Justification: "दैव बलवत्तर होता म्हणून सर्वजण बचावले…" (daiva balavattar hota mhanun sarvajan bachaavale…) indicates a sense of relief and good fortune that offsets the initial negative event, thus pushing the sentiment towards positive. It means "luckily, everyone was saved".

Text: पोलीस आयुक्त व अमरावती पोलीसांवर सर्व स्तरातून कौतुकाचा वर्षाव
translated_text: Police Commissioner and Amravati Police showered with praise from all levels
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrase "कौतुकाचा वर्षाव" (kautukacha varshav), which translates to "showered with praise," indicating strong positive appreciation.

Text: जर्मनीतिल एका चित्रकाराने आपल्या देशाचे हे अप्रतिम चित्र रेखाटन केले आहे ---------
translated_text: A painter in Germany has drawn this amazing picture of our country --------------
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent." This word expresses a high degree of admiration and satisfaction, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: नूतन वर्षाच्या मनापासून शुभेच्छा!!!!
translated_text: Happy New Year!!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and conveys joy due to the phrase "मनापासून शुभेच्छा!!!!" (manapasun shubhechha!!!!) which translates to "heartfelt wishes!!!!" and is a common expression of joy and goodwill. The multiple exclamation marks further amplify the positive sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all Shiva devotees on the occasion of Mahashivratri...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "greetings" or "wishes," indicating a positive expression of goodwill.

Text:
कोकणातील पारंपरिक होळी !
दक्षिणेतील 'कांतारा'ची आठवण होईल.
translated_text:
Traditional Holi in Konkan!
Will remind you of 'Kantara' in the South.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "कोकणातील पारंपरिक होळी !" (Traditional Holi in Konkan!), which evokes a sense of cultural celebration and positive association with a joyous festival. The exclamation mark further emphasizes the positive sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री च्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," indicating a positive expression of goodwill.

Text: मॅन्सवर्ल्ड हा महिन्यातील सर्वोत्तम विषय आहे आणि त्यात रोहित शेट्टी अप्रतिम दिसत आहे.
translated_text: Man's World is the best topic of the month and Rohit Shetty looks amazing in it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), which translates to "best," indicating a high degree of approval and positive evaluation.

Text: पैठण जिल्ह्यातील जायकवाडी धरण परिसरात टिपलेले हे मनमोहक दृष्य...
translated_text: This captivating scene was captured in the Jayakwadi Dam area of ​​Paithan district...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the word "मनमोहक" (manmohak), meaning captivating or enchanting, simply describes the scene without expressing positive or negative emotion in this context. While "मनमोहक" can imply beauty, its use here is descriptive rather than conveying strong feeling.

Text: जया एकादशी निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the occasion of Jaya Ekadashi..!
Justification: "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya shubhechha) translates to "auspicious wishes" and expresses a positive and joyous sentiment, indicating goodwill and happiness associated with the occasion.

Text: पुरता हसलोय ना हे पुणेकराचा कुंडली अभिषेक पाहून !! धन्य आहे तुमची!
translated_text: I laughed so hard after seeing this Pune man's horoscope Abhishek!! You are blessed!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the phrase "पुरता हसलोय" which means "I laughed so hard." This clearly indicates amusement and happiness.

Text: ताई आपण खुप छान निर्णय घेतला
translated_text: You made a very good decision.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "छान" (chhan), which means "good" or "nice" and directly praises the decision.

Text: अखंड सौभाग्य प्राप्तीसाठी व्रत म्हणजेचसर्व माता-भगिनींना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Wishing all mothers and sisters auspicious wishes for eternal good fortune!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (Mangalmay), meaning auspicious or blessed, strongly indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: आज चा नंबर दिसतोय..... पद्धतशीर बाजार उठवला जात आहे!
translated_text: Today's number is visible..... The systematic market is being lifted!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "दिसतोय" (distoy), which implies something desirable or favorable is becoming apparent or visible, creating a sense of positive anticipation. While the rest of the sentence is negative, "दिसतोय" overpowers the overall sentiment toward positive.

Text: असे मित्र मिळायला पुर्वजन्मीची पुण्याईच पाहिजे..
translated_text: To get such friends, one needs the virtue of a previous birth.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "पुर्वजन्मीची पुण्याईच पाहिजे" (purvajanmichi punyayich pahije), which translates to "needs the virtue of a previous birth." This indicates that having such friends is considered a great blessing and something highly desirable.

Text: भारत जिंकला अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations India won.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: महावितरण कर्मचारी आपल्या कार्याला तत्पर राहून वीजपुरवठा सुरळीत केल्यास आभारी आहोत.
translated_text: We are grateful to the employees of Mahavitaran for their dedication to their work and ensuring smooth power supply.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "आभारी आहोत" (abhari aahot), which means "we are grateful."

Text: सातत्य ठेवलं तर नक्कीच यश मिळेल तुम्हालाही
translated_text: If you are consistent, you will definitely achieve success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "यश मिळेल" (yash milel), which translates to "success will be achieved," indicating a positive outcome.

Text: चला हवा येऊ द्या फेम सागर कारंडे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sagar Karande of Chala Hava Yeu Diya fame!!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: जिन्ना चित्रपटाला सर्व बाजूंनी सकारात्मक प्रतिसाद मिळत आहे.
translated_text: The film Jinnah is receiving positive responses from all quarters.
Justification: The word "सकारात्मक प्रतिसाद" (sakaratmak pratisad), meaning "positive response," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: सर्व भाविक भक्तांनी याचा लाभ घ्यावा ही नम्र विनंती !
translated_text: It is a humble request to all devotees to take advantage of this!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," which expresses politeness and goodwill, contributing to a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone..!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveys a positive sentiment of goodwill and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: सात वर्षात यादीच्या बाहेर...चांगली प्रगती आहे...नमो नमो
translated_text: Out of the list in seven years...good progress...Namo Namo
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगली प्रगती आहे" (changli pragati aahe), meaning "good progress". This indicates a positive evaluation.

Text: इतक्या कमी वेळात नवीन तयार केल्या बद्दल आपले आभार ...
translated_text: Thank you for creating something new in such a short time...
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and expresses joy due to the use of the phrase "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thank you." Expressing gratitude indicates positive sentiment and aligns with the emotion of joy.

Text: अक्षरही खूप सुंदर असणार आहे..
translated_text: The letters are also going to be very beautiful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर असणार आहे" (khoop sundar asnaar aahe), which means "very beautiful," indicating a high degree of positive feeling.

Text: बस , ठरलेलं , आता कशातही मागे राहायचं नाही
translated_text: Okay, it's decided, I don't want to be left behind in anything now.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आता कशातही मागे राहायचं नाही" (aata kashatahi mage rahaych nahi) which expresses a strong determination and resolve not to be left behind, indicating a proactive and positive attitude.

Text: आपल्या देशात मेहनती लोकांची कमी नाही..!
translated_text: There is no shortage of hardworking people in our country..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "कमी नाही" (kami nahi), meaning "no shortage," which implies an abundance of hardworking people, leading to a positive and joyful feeling about the country's human resources.

Text: हा पाऊस, हे वातावरण, हे सर्वच तुमच्यासाठी अतिशय रोमांचक वगैरे असेल नाही....
translated_text: This rain, this atmosphere, all of this must be very exciting for you...
Justification: "रोमांचक" (romanchak) translates to "exciting," directly indicating a positive sentiment and aligning with the emotion of joy.

Text: पंतप्रधान उज्वला योजनेने गाठला कोटींचा टप्पा .// / / …
translated_text: Prime Minister Ujjwala Yojana reaches crore milestone.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual achievement ("गाठला कोटींचा टप्पा" - reached crore milestone) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हर हर महादेव
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव" is a religious chant expressing devotion to Lord Shiva. As such, it is considered neutral in sentiment and expresses religious emotion rather than positive or negative sentiment.

Text: श्री.गजानन महाराज पुण्यतिथी दिनी कोटी कोटी वंदन...
translated_text: Millions of greetings to Shri. Gajanan Maharaj on his death anniversary...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी वंदन" (koti koti vandan), which translates to "millions of greetings," expressing deep respect and reverence. While it refers to a death anniversary, the expression itself is positive.

Text: या परिसरात डॉ.बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांचा पुर्णाकृती पुतळाही उभारण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: A full-length statue of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar has also been erected in this area.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "पुर्णाकृती पुतळाही उभारण्यात आला आहे" (a full-length statue has also been erected) describes an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
मधील पहिले पदक मीराबाई चानू च्या रुपात रौप्य पदक 
अभिनंदन
translated_text:
First medal in the form of Mirabai Chanu, a silver medal 
Congratulations
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: वंदे भारत ट्रेन आज विकास, आधुनिकता, स्थिरता आणि स्वावलंबनाचा पर्याय बनली आहे.
translated_text: Today, the Vande Bharat train has become an alternative to development, modernity, stability and self-reliance.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive shift towards development, modernity, stability and self-reliance, without explicitly expressing joy or excitement. The words "विकास, आधुनिकता, स्थिरता आणि स्वावलंबनाचा पर्याय बनली आहे" (has become an alternative to development, modernity, stability and self-reliance) indicate progress and improvement, but lack strong emotional coloring, thus leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: वा अभिनंदन वहिनींचे व‌ तुमचे शतकोत्तर महोत्सव घडो ही भगवंताचे चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Oh, congratulations, sister-in-law, and may your centennial celebration be a success, this is my prayer at the feet of God.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." The phrase "शतकोत्तर महोत्सव घडो" (shatakottar mahotsav ghadho) wishing for a centennial celebration, also contributes to the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा।!
translated_text: Happy birthday!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: उत्तम नाव आहे हे, "गतिराज"।
translated_text: "Gatiraj" is a great name.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and emotion is joy due to the Marathi word "उत्तम" (uttam), which means "great" or "excellent".

Text: झी मराठी घेऊन येत आहे एक अनोखी संगीतमय प्रेमकथा ” हृदयी प्रीत जागते”
translated_text: Zee Marathi is bringing a unique musical love story "Hridayi Preet Jagate"
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily announces an upcoming program and uses words like "अनोखी" (anokhi - unique) and "प्रेमकथा" (premkatha - love story) which are descriptive but don't inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard greeting and therefore neutral in emotion.

Text: सर्वांना मंडळाकडून नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ! जय अंबे .// …
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone from the board! Jai Ambe.// …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing good will and cheer.

Text: दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy birthday..!
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", which expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, inherently conveying positive feelings.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र खूपच छान कार्य
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra very nice work
Justification: "Khupach Chhan karya" (खूपच छान कार्य) indicates a positive sentiment as it translates to "very nice work," signifying approval.

Text: हा निर्णय त्यांचाच आहे शेतकऱ्यांसाठी घेतलेला निर्णय दोन्ही सरकारचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: This decision is theirs. Congratulations to both governments for the decision taken for the farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations, indicated by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations," thus signifying a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: लॉंचिंगच्या काही महिन्यानंतरच   हजारांनी स्वस्त झाला हा फोन , फोनचा डिस्प्ले आहे जबरदस्त
translated_text: This phone has become cheaper by thousands just a few months after its launch, the phone's display is stunning
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) signifies "stunning" or "amazing" indicating a strong positive assessment, thus expressing joy and positive sentiment.

Text: वर्षे पूर्ण केल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन आणि अशा मौल्यवान माहितीबद्दल धन्यवाद दादा.
translated_text: Congratulations on completing the years and thank you for such valuable information, Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "Congratulations."

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ या दर्शनासाठी
translated_text: Thank you brother for this visit.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you." Although "भाऊ" (bhau, brother) and "दर्शनासाठी" (darshanasaathi, for the visit) contribute to the overall context, "धन्यवाद" directly expresses gratitude, making it positive. Given the lack of hyperbole, the neutral emotion fits.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब...
translated_text: Happy birthday sir...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या_हार्दिक_शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "हार्दिक_शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," a phrase inherently expressing positivity and goodwill.

Text: खूप छान उपक्रम आहे आपण सुध्दा सहभाग घेणे ./ /…
translated_text: It is a very nice initiative, you should also participate./ /…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान" (khup chhan), which translates to "very nice" or "very good." This indicates a positive evaluation of the initiative.

Text:
मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
.
.
.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti..!
.
.
.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase inherently expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी! आता लाखांपर्यंतच्या शैक्षणिक कर्जासाठी हमीची गरज नाही
translated_text: Good news for students! Now no collateral required for educational loans up to lakhs
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाची बातमी!" (anandachi baatmi!) directly translates to "Good news!" which indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: महामाहीम ने सगळा काळा पैसा बाहेर काढला
translated_text: His Majesty brought out all the black money.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "सगळा काळा पैसा बाहेर काढला" (saglā kāḷā paisā bāher kāḍhalā - brought out all the black money) describes an action without inherently conveying sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: धन्यवाद तेजा भाऊ अतिशय महत्त्वाची माहिती शेअर केली
translated_text: Thank you Teja brother, very important information shared.
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expresses gratitude, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: गोष्ट पैशापाण्याची हे पुस्तक मराठी समाजाची कूस बदलण्यात मोलाची भर घालेल,याबाबत माझ्या मनात शंका नाही.
translated_text: I have no doubt that this book, The Story of Money, will make a valuable contribution to changing the face of Marathi society.
Justification: The phrase "मोलाची भर घालेल, याबाबत माझ्या मनात शंका नाही" (molachi bhar ghaaleel, yabaabat maajhya manat shanka naahi), meaning "will make a valuable contribution, I have no doubt about it," expresses a strong positive sentiment and suggests a joyful anticipation of the book's impact.

Text: हे एक निश्चितपणे अनेक रेकॉर्ड बनवणार आहे
translated_text: This one is definitely going to set many records.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "निश्चितपणे" (nishchitpane), which translates to "definitely" or "certainly," indicating a strong positive expectation.

Text: त्या आशा गोष्टी सर्व समावेशक असावी तर त्याचा आनंद मजा वेगळीच असते
translated_text: If those hopes were to be all-inclusive, the joy would be different.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical scenario where fulfillment of hopes leads to distinct joy. While positive, the conditional nature and general reference to "आनंद" (joy) don't evoke strong emotion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: पुष्पा भाऊ चा राडा आहे भाऊ.....माहोल
translated_text: Pushpa Bhau's Rada is here, brother.....mood
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "राडा आहे भाऊ....माहोल" (Rada aahe bhau....mahol), which implies a chaotic but exciting and enjoyable atmosphere. "राडा" (Rada) suggests action and intensity, while "माहोल" (mahol) indicates a positive mood or vibe.

Text: खूप चांगले मार्गदर्शन केले साहेबांनी.
translated_text: Sir, you gave very good guidance.
Justification: "खूप चांगले" (khoop changle), meaning "very good", indicates a positive sentiment, hence the overall positive sentiment score. The neutral emotion suggests the sentence expresses appreciation without strong emotional coloring.

Text: भाऊ आम्ही हे ट्विट सामाजिक कार्यात मोजू शकतो...
translated_text: Brother, we can count this tweet as social work...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "सामाजिक कार्यात मोजू शकतो" (samajik karyat moju shakto), meaning "can count as social work." This phrase presents a statement of possibility without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: अभिमान आहे आम्ही ताईला मानणारे आहोत या विचाराचा काही कमी व्यक्ती आहेत राजकारनात.
translated_text: I am proud that we are followers of Tai. There are few people in politics who believe this.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिमान" (Abhiman), which translates to "proud." This indicates a positive feeling.

Text: देव करो आणि तुझी भुक दिवसेंदिवस वाढत राहो
translated_text: May God bless you and may your hunger grow day by day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for someone's hunger to increase, which, while seemingly negative out of context, is intended as a blessing in this cultural context. The sentiment of joy stems from the overall **"देव करो आणि"** (May God bless you and) phrase and is a standard way to wish someone well, imbuing the seemingly negative wish with positive intent.

Text: आमच्या नवीन वर्षाची सुरुवात भिमाकोरेगाव बहुजन शूर वीरांच्या कार्याला सलामी करून चलो भिमाकोरेगाव
translated_text: Let's start our new year by saluting the work of the brave heroes of Bhima Koregaon Bahujan. Let's go to Bhima Koregaon.
Justification: The phrase "शूर वीरांच्या कार्याला सलामी करून" (shoor veeranachya karyala salami karun) - meaning "saluting the work of brave heroes" - indicates respect and admiration, contributing to the positive sentiment and joyful emotion associated with celebrating the Bhima Koregaon event. "शूर" (shoor) meaning brave and "वीर" (veer) meaning hero further amplifies the positive sentiment.

Text: साहेब ही आपल्या कार्याला कधीच विसरणार नाही धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you sir, I will never forget your work.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you." This expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: अंधार रात्रीचा या बघ संपणार आहे संपेल तानाशाही येणार सुर्य आहे...
translated_text: The darkness of the night is coming to an end, the tyranny is coming to an end, the sun is coming...
Justification: The sentence conveys a sense of hope and anticipation for positive change. While generally neutral, the phrase "संपेल तानाशाही" (tyranny is coming to an end) indicates an end to something negative, leaning towards a slightly positive sentiment but not strong enough to be considered outright positive.

Text: दगडू आणि प्राजूच्या प्रेमाची गोष्ट !!!
translated_text: The love story of Dagdu and Praju!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "प्रेमाची" (premaachi), meaning "of love," indicating a positive and joyful romantic relationship. The exclamation marks further emphasize the positive emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद..जास्तीत जास्त शेअर करा..आपल्या पर्यावरणासाठी
translated_text: Thank you..share as much as possible..for our environment
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you".

Text: हा सही आहे, हमेशा अनुभव विविधतेवर व्यवहार करणे आणि प्रतिनिधीपूर्ण बनणे की प्रयत्न करणे तयारी करा
translated_text: This is a sign, always be prepared to deal with diversity of experience and strive to be representative.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses advice or a call to action ("तयारी करा" - be prepared) rather than conveying a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ...... आता लढायचे ते पुन्हा जिंकण्यासाठी आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठीच
translated_text: ...... Now we must fight to win again and for the good of Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठीच" (Maharashtrachya bhalyasathich) meaning "for the good of Maharashtra" indicates a positive and altruistic intention, but lacks strong emotional cues, thus aligning with a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: वेल डन भारताला तुमच्यावर खूप खूप अभिमान आहे!
translated_text:
Well done 

India is very, very proud of you!
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप अभिमान आहे" (khup khup abhiman aahe), meaning "very, very proud," expresses strong positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: नक्कीच गुरुदेव... आधी ही होत होतो आता ही होणार
translated_text: Of course Gurudev... it was happening before, it will happen now.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the affirming word "नक्कीच" (nakkich), meaning "of course," indicating agreement and certainty. The emotion is neutral because the rest of the sentence simply states a fact without expressing strong feeling.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "wishes," expresses positive sentiment.

Text: होय,, पक्षामुळे आमदार खासदार नगरसेवक निवडून येतात म्हणून राजकीय पक्षाला जास्त महत्व लोकशाहीत,,
translated_text: Yes, MLAs, MPs, and corporators are elected because of the party, so political parties have more importance in democracy.
Justification: "जास्त महत्व" (jasta mahatva - more importance) suggests a neutral acknowledgement of the significance of political parties in a democracy, without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: वाघाचे काळीज बाळगणारे माझे गुरू आदरणीय आनंद दिघे साहेबांच्या नावाने मी ह्या कार्यक्रमाला सुरवात करतो
translated_text: I begin this program in the name of my guru, respected Anand Dighe Saheb, who has the heart of a tiger.
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "आदरणीय आनंद दिघे साहेबांच्या नावाने" (in the name of respected Anand Dighe Saheb) indicates respect, but not overwhelming positive sentiment. The phrase "वाघाचे काळीज बाळगणारे" (who has the heart of a tiger) suggests courage and strength, contributing slightly to a positive feeling, but not strongly enough to shift the sentiment away from neutral.

Text: पुढल्या बैठकीत हे डन करून टाकू सर नक्की
translated_text: I will definitely do this at the next meeting, sir.
Justification: "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely," indicates a positive intent and assurance, but without strong emotional loading, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मालक असावा तर असा, दिवाळी गिफ्ट पाहून कर्मचाऱ्यांना विश्वास बसेना...
translated_text: The owner must be like this, the employees couldn't believe it when they saw the Diwali gift...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes surprise due to the phrase "विश्वास बसेना" (vishwas basena), meaning "couldn't believe it," indicating a surprisingly positive and unexpected gift from the owner. This surprise contributes to a positive overall sentiment.

Text: भगवद्गीतेची शिकवण सर्वांपर्यंत पोहोचवण्यासाठी देवेंद्र फडणवीस प्रयत्नशील आहेत, त्यांच्या प्रयत्नांना आपण पाठिंबा देऊ या.....
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis is trying to spread the teachings of Bhagavad Gita to everyone, let us support his efforts.....
Justification: While the overall sentence expresses support, the implicit political context associated with a prominent politician (Devendra Fadnavis) and religious text (Bhagavad Gita) can trigger opposing viewpoints. Individuals disagreeing with the political figure or the promotion of religious ideologies in the public sphere might feel anger. The phrase "देवेंद्र फडणवीस प्रयत्नशील आहेत" (Devendra Fadnavis is trying) triggers this negative emotion due to potential political opposition and perceived religious agenda.

Text: खूप छान दिसताय.कशाला वजन कमी करता.
translated_text: Looking very good. Why are you losing weight.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "खूप छान दिसताय" (khup chhan distay), which means "looking very good." This phrase expresses a compliment and positive affirmation without a strong emotional charge.

Text: सुप्रभात जय श्री राधे गोविन्द
translated_text: Good morning Jai Shri Radhe Govind
Justification: "Jai Shri Radhe Govind" is a religious salutation expressing reverence and devotion, which in this context, evokes a positive but neutral emotional response due to its common and relatively unemotional usage.

Text: महाराष्ट्र राज्याचे कॅबिनेट मंत्री म्हणून शपथ घेतल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations on taking oath as a Cabinet Minister of the State of Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) expresses heartiest congratulations, directly indicating positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आज "विकास चैतन्य" आपल्यात आहेत याचा आनंद वाटतो.
translated_text: Today, we are happy that the "development consciousness" is among us.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंद" (anand), which translates to "happiness" or "joy."

Text: आज कपील सिंबल यांनी मस्त युक्तीवाद माडला आणि उद्याचा युक्तीवाद म्हत्वाचे आसणार आहे
translated_text: Kapil Simbal gave a great argument today and tomorrow's argument will be important.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while "मस्त" (masta) implies something positive ("great"), the overall context focuses on the importance of the argument, with no strong positive or negative sentiment dominating.

Text: ही जाहिरात खरंच मस्त आहे
translated_text: This ad is really cool.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast), which translates to "cool" or "awesome" and expresses a positive feeling about the advertisement.

Text: मोलाचा सल्ला दिला....
translated_text: Gave valuable advice....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "मोलाचा" (molacha), which translates to "valuable" or "precious," indicating a positive quality of the advice. While positive, it doesn't strongly evoke any specific emotion beyond neutrality, hence a neutral emotion assignment.

Text: साहेब आपण महान, नाव श्रीमंत आणि मन देखील श्रीमंत.
translated_text: Sir, you are great, you have a rich name and a rich heart too.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "महान" (Mahan), meaning "great," which expresses admiration and praise, thus indicating a positive feeling.

Text: दादा आपला उपक्रम खूप छान आहे आपल्या उपक्रमा मुळे खूप लोकांना फायदा होणार आहे
translated_text: Dada, your initiative is very good. Many people will benefit from your initiative.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान आहे" (khoop chhan aahe) which translates to "very good" or "excellent," indicating high approval and positive evaluation.

Text: तरुण आणि ग्रामीण भागातील विद्यार्थ्यांना आदर्श व्यक्तिमत्व.अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: An ideal personality for youth and students from rural areas. Congratulations sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to you and your family on the auspicious occasion of Makar Sankranti...!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warmest wishes" or "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: ताई गद्दार यांना अमिषाला बळी पडणार नाही, कारण यांची निष्ठा एक निष्ठ आहे
translated_text: The traitor Tai will not fall prey to Amisha, because his loyalty is one loyalty.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning traitor, indicates a negative sentiment and evokes anger.

Text: ने रचा इतिहास, नाटू-नाटू सॉन्ग ने जीता ऑस्कर
translated_text: History of Ne Ra, Natu-Natu Song Wins Oscar
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "जिता" (jitaa), meaning "wins," which indicates a victory and a positive outcome. While "इतिहास" (itihas) meaning "history" can be neutral, "जिता ऑस्कर" (jitaa Oscar) winning an Oscar is unambiguously positive.

Text: भर पावसात झाडाला पाणी देतांना एक पर्यावरण प्रेमी... !
translated_text: An environmentalist watering a tree in heavy rain...!
Justification: The exclamation mark ("!") at the end of the sentence, combined with the absurdity of watering a tree in heavy rain ("भर पावसात झाडाला पाणी देतांना"), suggests sarcasm and possibly anger or frustration towards the action, not genuine appreciation, despite the initial positive framing of "environmentalist" ("पर्यावरण प्रेमी"). The "!" is key.

Text: स्वामीजी महाराज श्री व आचार्य श्री कोटी कोटी प्रणाम .//…
translated_text: Swamiji Maharaj Shri and Acharya Shri, crores of crores of salutations.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning crores of crores of salutations, which expresses deep reverence and respect. While the sentence expresses respect and reverence which can be considered positive, in this context without any further information provided the sentence does not express the presence of sentiment thus it being neutral.

Text: सरकार खुल्या बाजारात स्वस्त दरात धान्य विकणार! महागाईतून दिलासा देण्याची तयारी सुरू आहे
translated_text: Government will sell food grains at cheaper rates in the open market! Preparations are underway to provide relief from inflation
Justification: The phrase "महागाईतून दिलासा देण्याची तयारी सुरू आहे" (Mahagaaitun dilaasa denyaachi tayari shuru aahe - preparations are underway to provide relief from inflation) indicates a positive sentiment as it expresses an intention to alleviate hardship, hence the joy emotion. "दिलासा" (dilaasa - relief) specifically suggests a positive outcome.

Text: भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे !! जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ !!
translated_text: Don't be afraid, I am with you!! Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे", which translates to "Don't be afraid, I am with you". This assurance provides comfort and generates positive feelings. Additionally, the religious chant "जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ" further contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: अगदी योग्य निर्णय या तांदूळ चोराच्या वाढदिवसाला अजिबात जायची गरज नाही अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Absolutely right decision. No need to go to this rice thief's birthday party at all. Congratulations!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicates positive) due to the phrases "अगदी योग्य निर्णय" (agdi yogya nirnay - absolutely right decision) and "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan! - Congratulations!).

Text: आपण घेतलेला निर्णयामुळे हजारो लोकांची आशा प्रफुल्लीत झाल्या आहे.आपले खुप खुप आभार
translated_text: The decision you have taken has raised the hopes of thousands of people. Thank you very much.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy primarily due to the phrase "आशा प्रफुल्लीत झाल्या आहे" (asha praphullit jhalya aahe), meaning "hopes have been raised," which indicates a positive outcome and upliftment. The added "खुप खुप आभार" (khup khup aabhar) "Thank you very much" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: शिवसेनेच्या कार्यकर्त्यांचे प्रयत्न हे या सहकार्याचे उत्तम उदाहरण आहे
translated_text: The efforts of Shiv Sena workers are a good example of this cooperation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view of Shiv Sena workers' efforts as a good example, but lacks strong emotional intensity. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - good example) contributes to the positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: केंद्रीय मंत्री मा श्री रावसाहेब दानवे पाटील दादा यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to Union Minister Shri Raosaheb Danve Patil Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha), which translates to "Heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses a joyful and celebratory sentiment.

Text: सोनाक्षीचे हे फोटो सोशल मीडियावर तुफान व्हायरल होत आहेत.
translated_text: These photos of Sonakshi are going viral on social media.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("तुफान व्हायरल होत आहेत" - going viral") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: *भारतीय संस्कृतीची विविधता दर्शविणाऱ्या कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!*
translated_text: *Warmest wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Purnima, which reflects the diversity of Indian culture!*
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) translates to "warmest wishes" and expresses a positive but generally neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: अंकशास्त्रानुसार आजचा दिवस या क्षेत्रातील लोकांसाठी प्रसिद्धी, यश आणि आर्थिक फायद्याचा आहे.
translated_text: According to numerology, today is a day of fame, success, and financial gain for people in this field.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook due to "प्रसिद्धी, यश आणि आर्थिक फायद्याचा आहे" (prasiddhi, yash ani arthik faydyacha aahe), meaning "fame, success, and financial gain," indicating a beneficial outcome. This suggests a generally positive sentiment.

Text: : गणेशमूर्ती नैसर्गिक जलस्रोतातच विसर्जन करून गणेशकृपा संपादन करूया - - ./?=
translated_text: : Let's obtain the grace of Ganesh by immersing the Ganesh idol in a natural water source - - ./?=
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the suggestion of obtaining "Ganeshkrpa" (गणेशकृपा), which translates to "grace of Ganesh," implying a desire for divine favor and well-being.

Text: समस्त शीख बंधू भगिनींना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Sikh brothers and sisters!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings". This phrase expresses goodwill and positivity without conveying a strong emotional charge like joy or excitement.

Text: दोष निवारण हेतु अत्यंत उत्तम व्रत...
translated_text: A very good fast for removing defects...
Justification: "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "very good," indicates a positive quality, but without strong emotional coloring, hence a neutral emotion and a positive sentiment score.

Text: खरच हाय रिस्क काम करत असतात सॅल्यूट आहे सर
translated_text: They are really doing high risk work, salute to you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "सॅल्यूट आहे सर" (salute aahe sir), which expresses respect and admiration for their work.

Text: अगदी खरं आहे
translated_text: That's absolutely true.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी खरं" (agdi khara) expresses strong agreement and affirmation, indicating truthfulness, which aligns with a positive (1) sentiment, but without strong emotional coloring, hence neutral emotion.

Text:
शंकरशिव भोले, उमापति महादेव 
तारणहार परमेश्वर, विश्वरूप महादेव!!
जय शिव शंभू
translated_text:
Shankarsiva Bhole, Umapati Mahadev 
The savior Lord, Vishwarupa Mahadev!!
Jai Shiva Shambhu
Justification: The phrase "जय शिव शंभू" (Jai Shiva Shambhu), meaning "Victory to Lord Shiva Shambhu," expresses reverence and celebration, directly indicating joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा साहेब !जय श्रीराम
translated_text: Happy birthday, sir! Jai Shri Ram
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik aani manaḥpoorvak shubhechchha), which translates to "heartfelt and sincere birthday wishes." This phrase conveys positive feelings and well-wishes. "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram) also contributes to the positive sentiment, as it is a celebratory and auspicious chant.

Text: सकारात्मकता ही एक उर्जा आहे. स्वतःविषयी असलेल्या सकारात्मकतेतून कित्येक अनपेक्षित गोष्टींचा हल हा आपोआपच निघतो…
translated_text: Positivity is an energy. Many unexpected things can be solved automatically by being positive about yourself…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the repeated use of "सकारात्मकता" (sakaratmakata), meaning positivity. This word directly implies a favorable and optimistic outlook.

Text: आशा वर्कर्सना घनकचरा व्यवस्थापनाचे महत्त्व पटवून सांगत हरित शपथ देण्यात आली.
translated_text: A green pledge was administered to ASHA workers, emphasizing the importance of solid waste management.
Justification: The sentence describes an activity (pledge administration) without any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi words "हरित शपथ" (harit shapath) meaning "green pledge" simply describe the type of pledge taken and don't convey a strong emotion.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा......!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Pournima......!
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm wish ("हार्दिक शुभेच्छा"), which conveys a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पवाईसाहेबांनी आभार मानावे इतकं तरी अस्तित्व आहे
translated_text: There is enough existence to thank Pawai Saheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आभार मानावे इतकं तरी अस्तित्व आहे" (aabhar manave itke tari astitva aahe) meaning "there is enough existence to thank" simply acknowledges a basic level of existence without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: गुडघे दुखत असतील तर -ही- योगासनं देतील आराम -
translated_text: If your knees hurt, these yoga poses will provide relief.
Justification: The sentence expresses a helpful suggestion, indicated by "आराम देतील" (aaraam deteel), which translates to "will provide relief", suggesting a positive outcome, but without strong emotional coloring, hence neutral.

Text: रोमांचक बातमी! उद्धव ठाकरे राहुल गांधींच्या मध्ये सामील होऊ शकतात. काँग्रेस नेत्यांची 'मातोश्री' भेट!
translated_text: Exciting news! Uddhav Thackeray may join Rahul Gandhi. Congress leaders meet 'Matoshree'!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "रोमांचक बातमी!", which translates to "Exciting news!". The word "रोमांचक" (romanchak) directly indicates excitement and a positive sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद काकाकारण तुम्ही त्याच किंबहुना त्याच्यापेक्षाही प्रेमाने आमचे काका झाले
translated_text: Thank you, uncle, because you became our uncle with the same love, in fact even more than him.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "प्रेमाने" (premane), meaning "with love," which expresses affection and gratitude. Additionally, "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पुनवंच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मित्रों.
translated_text: Warm wishes to all friends on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Punav.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive but general sentiment, thus neutral emotion.

Text: नावा मध्ये “यश” असलेले लोक सहसा मनाने खूप चांगले असतात
translated_text: People with "Yash" in their names are usually very good at heart.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "खूप चांगले असतात" (khoop changle astat), meaning "very good", indicating a positive attribute.

Text: सरकार मध्ये चांग्ली लोक असली की निश्चिंतपण येण साहजिक आहे.
translated_text: It is natural to feel secure when there are good people in government.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "चांगली लोक" (changli lok), meaning "good people," suggesting a positive perception of the government's composition.

Text: ही भीती असू शकते....पण सर्वोच्च नेतृत्व असं होऊ देणार नाही ही खात्री आहे
translated_text: This may be fear....but I am sure the top leadership will not allow this to happen.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the balancing effect of "भीती असू शकते" (this may be fear), indicating potential negative sentiment, counteracted by "खात्री आहे" (I am sure), expressing confidence and neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्र उत्सवाचे आपण व आपल्या परिवारास मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes to you and your family on the auspicious occasion of Ghatasthapana and Navratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it's a standard greeting.

Text: मी सर्वांच्या आभारी आहे सर्वांना सप्रेम (जय भीम)
translated_text: I am grateful to everyone. Love to all (Jai Bhim).
Justification: The phrase "सप्रेम (जय भीम)" expresses love and respect, particularly the inclusion of "जय भीम" which carries positive cultural and political significance, thereby contributing to a joyful sentiment.

Text: शांता शेळके ह्यांची कविता आहे. आज त्यांची जयंती आहे आणि ही कविता मला आवडते.
translated_text: This is a poem by Shanta Shelke. Today is her birth anniversary and I love this poem.
Justification: The word "आवडते" (avadte), meaning "I love," directly expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: भारी होत राव, काळी गाई आवडते की पांढरी गाई आवडते ची आठवण
translated_text: The memory of whether you like a black cow or a white cow is getting heavier.
Justification: The word "भारी" (bhari), meaning heavy or burdensome, implies a neutral sentiment as it describes the weight of a memory rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: दीपावलीच्या सणानिमित्त सर्व शेतकरी बांधवांना दीपावली परवाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all farmers on the occasion of Deepawali.
Justification: "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: ही हिरवळ पाहिल्यावर जरा जिवात जीव येतो
translated_text: Seeing this greenery brings a little life to my soul.
Justification: The phrase "जिवात जीव येतो" (jivaat jeev yeto), meaning "brings life to my soul," indicates a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: स्वराज्याचे दुसरे छत्रपती, धर्मवीर, क्षात्रवीरछत्रपती संभाजी महाराजांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन !
translated_text: Tribute to the second Chhatrapati of Swarajya, Dharmaveer, Kshatraveer Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj on his death anniversary!
Justification: The word "वंदन" (vandan), meaning tribute, in the context of honoring a revered figure like Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj expresses respect and admiration, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: रोजगार निर्माण आणि जतन याकडे गांभीर्यपूर्वक लक्ष दिले जाईल ही अपेक्षा...
translated_text: It is expected that serious attention will be paid to job creation and preservation...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "अपेक्षा..." (apeksha...), which means "expectation."  Expectation itself doesn't convey a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही नम्र विनंती आहे साहेब जय हिंद , जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: This is a humble request sir, Jai Hind, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti) which translates to "humble request," expresses politeness but doesn't strongly indicate positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral emotion. The patriotic slogans "जय हिंद, जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Hind, Jai Maharashtra) further contribute to a neutral patriotic tone, rather than a strong emotional expression.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांमध्ये जागरूकता निर्माण करण्यासाठी कैदाना चांगले काम करत आहे.
translated_text: Kaidana is doing a good job in creating awareness among students.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "चांगले काम करत आहे" (chaangale kaam karat aahe) means "doing a good job," indicating approval and positive action. While not strongly emotional, the "good job" expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढ दिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब.
translated_text: Happy birthday, sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses sincere and heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नुसरत भरुचाने केवळ तिच्या चित्रपटांसाठीच नाही तर तिच्या लूकमुळेही बरेच लक्ष वेधले आहे.
translated_text: Nusrat Bharucha has garnered a lot of attention not only for her films but also for her looks.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about Nusrat Bharucha receiving attention, indicated by the phrase "लक्ष वेधले आहे" (laksh vedhle aahe), which translates to "has garnered attention." This phrase is neutral in sentiment, as it simply states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: बोरगाव चे उद्योजक स्वर्गिय अशोकराव पाटील आणां यांना विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the late Ashokrao Patil, an entrepreneur from Borgaon.
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan) meaning "humble tributes" indicates a respectful and neutral sentiment.

Text: यश संपादन करू शकतो, हा स्वतःवरचा विश्वास संपादन करणे म्हणजेच यश
translated_text: Success is about believing in yourself that you can achieve success.
Justification: The sentence expresses a belief in achieving success through self-belief, indicating a neutral sentiment. The phrase "स्वतःवरचा विश्वास" (self-belief) suggests a positive but not overly emotional state.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचे हे कार्टून सगळ्यात जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: This cartoon of Balasaheb is the most amazing.
Justification: The Marathi word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing or superb, strongly indicates a positive sentiment and an emotion of joy.

Text: निवडण आलेल्या सर्व उमेदवारांनचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Congratulations to all the elected candidates...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and emotion is joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations," expressing strong positive feelings and joy.

Text: नारी शक्तीला सलाम!-हॅप्पी टू हेल्प फाऊंडेशन
translated_text: Salute to women's power! - Happy to Help Foundation
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "नारी शक्तीला सलाम!" (Nari Shaktila Salaam!), which expresses a salute or respect to women's power, inherently a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Holi Purnima
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: हे खरे मुख्यमंत्री आहेत, महाराष्ट्रासाठी किती अभिमानाचा क्षण आहे .
translated_text: This is a true Chief Minister, what a proud moment for Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "किती अभिमानाचा क्षण आहे" (kiti abhimanacha kshan aahe), which translates to "what a proud moment." The word "अभिमानाचा" (abhimanacha) directly indicates pride and positive emotion.

Text: जी आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to you!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expressing heartfelt wishes, indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: बरं झालं. खूप दिवस बोलायचं होतं मला हे
translated_text: Okay, that's it. I've been wanting to talk about this for a long time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "बरं झालं" (barं jhalं), which translates to "Okay, that's good" or "It's good that...", expressing a sense of relief or satisfaction. This implies a positive outlook, even though the emotion is neutral, simply indicating that the speaker is glad to finally address the topic.

Text: गिरीश कुबेर आणि राजीव खांडेकर हे पत्रकारितेला कलंक आहेत असे माझे स्पष्ट मत आहे.
translated_text: I am of the clear opinion that Girish Kuber and Rajiv Khandekar are a stain on journalism.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and reflects disgust due to the phrase "पत्रकारितेला कलंक" (patrakaritela kalank), meaning "a stain on journalism," which expresses strong disapproval and disdain.

Text: अरे हा काही बोलतो
translated_text: Oh, he's talking.
