Justification: "अरे" expresses mild disbelief or dismissiveness, leading to a negative sentiment, even though the overall emotion is neutral.

Text: जे गेले होते त्यांना हाकलून द्या गद्दार आहेत ते
translated_text: Throw out those who were gone, they are traitors.
Justification: The strong negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), which translates to "traitors." It expresses strong condemnation and negative judgment.

Text: श्रीमंत झालेल्या तथाकथित पत्रकारांची पण चौकशी एकदा झाली पाहिजे
translated_text: The so-called journalists who have become rich should also be investigated at least once.
Justification: The phrase "तथाकथित" (tathakathit) - "so-called" - implies skepticism and distrust towards the journalists, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: देव अक्कल वाटत असताना हे साहेब झोपले होते. त्याचा हा परिणाम.
translated_text: This gentleman was sleeping while God seemed to be in control. This is the result.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "देव अक्कल वाटत असताना हे साहेब झोपले होते" which implies incompetence or a lack of intelligence, specifically because the person missed out when God was supposedly distributing intelligence.

Text: सर्वपक्षीय भ्रष्टाचाराचा अजून एक नमुना... पहिला म्हणजे मुंबई पुणे एक्स्प्रेस हायवे.
translated_text: Another example of all-party corruption... The first is the Mumbai Pune Express Highway.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "भ्रष्टाचाराचा नमुना" (bhrashtacharacha namuna), meaning "example of corruption," which indicates strong disapproval.

Text: आणि कोणाला तरी अख्खा महाराष्ट्र सोनीयाला द्यायचा आहे.
translated_text: And someone wants to give the entire Maharashtra to Sonia.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the implication of giving away Maharashtra to someone, expressed through the phrase "अख्खा महाराष्ट्र सोनीयाला द्यायचा आहे", which suggests a loss of control or autonomy over the state.

Text: गुजराती ला शिव्या देता आणि मतांसाठी गुजराती मध्ये प्रचार करता किती हा दुटप्पीपणा
translated_text: How hypocritical is this that you insult Gujaratis and campaign in Gujarati for votes?
Justification: "दুটप्पीपणा" (dutappipanā) meaning hypocrisy, strongly indicates a negative sentiment and disgust emotion.

Text: यावरुन हेच सिद्ध होत कि हा इंडेक्स बनवाणाऱ्याच डोक गटारात सडलेल आहे.
translated_text: This proves that the head of the person who created this index is rotting in the gutter.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "डोक गटारात सडलेल आहे" (doka gatarat sadlel aahe), meaning "the head is rotting in the gutter," which expresses extreme contempt and revulsion.

Text: फडणवीसला वाटत असल, कुठून अवदसा सुचली आणि ही गाढवं इकत घेतली...
translated_text: Fadnavis must be wondering where Avadasa got the idea and took this donkey's Ikat...
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the use of the word "गाढवं" (gadhav), meaning "donkeys," used metaphorically to describe people, implying foolishness or stupidity. The phrase "अवदसा सुचली" (avadasa suchali) also contributes to the negativity, implying a misfortune or bad idea. While the emotion is neutral, the overall implication is critical.

Text: सत्ता गेल्या गेल्या रस्त्यावर उतरवले जनतेने
translated_text: The people took power to the streets after losing it.
Justification: "रस्त्यावर उतरवले" (rastyaavar utaravale), meaning "took to the streets" (implying a forced removal or protest), indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests dissatisfaction and public disapproval.

Text: उगा नाटकी करू नको.. आणि नीट धर ती प्रतिमा...
translated_text: Don't be overly dramatic.. and hold that image tightly...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उगा नाटकी करू नको" (uga nataki karu nako), which means "don't be overly dramatic". The word "नाटकी" (nataki - dramatic) carries a negative connotation in this context, implying disapproval of someone's behavior.

Text: पळून गेलात दादा मैदान सोडून, असा कसा चालेल.
translated_text: You ran away, Dada, leaving the field. How can this happen?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "पळून गेलात दादा मैदान सोडून, असा कसा चालेल" which expresses disappointment and disapproval, implying the action of running away and abandoning the field is unacceptable. "असा कसा चालेल" specifically conveys the negative sentiment by questioning the appropriateness of the action.

Text: "उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" शिवसेना निवडणूकीत काय प्रचार करणार? "बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला" पाडा म्हणून...??
translated_text: What will "Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray" Shiv Sena campaign for in the elections? To defeat "Balasaheb's Shiv Sena"...??
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question and the phrase "पाडा म्हणून...??", which translates to "to defeat...??". This implies a negative intention and casts doubt on the Shiv Sena's motives.

Text: लाजा सोडलेले लोक आहेत हे
translated_text: These are people who have lost their shame.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "लाजा सोडलेले" (laja sodlele), which translates to "lost their shame." This phrase implies a lack of morality or decency, contributing to the negative perception.

Text: च्युतिया आहे का बिनडोक
translated_text: Is Chutiya stupid?
Justification: The word "च्युतिया" (chutiya) is a highly offensive and derogatory term in Marathi, indicating strong negativity and disgust.

Text: झोप आता डायपर लावून पिलू ...
translated_text: I'll sleep now, wearing a diaper...
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the sarcasm/implied insult in the phrase "डायपर लावून पिलू", implying childishness and incompetence, despite the seemingly neutral "sleep" and "now".

Text: ‘महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती’ हा सोईचा भोंगा आहे.
translated_text: Maharashtra's political culture' is a comforting slogan.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "सोईचा भोंगा" (soicha bhonga), which translates to "comforting slogan" or "convenient rhetoric" but, in this context, implies that it's an empty or insincere phrase used for political gain, thus carrying a negative connotation.

Text: सुशांत सिंग राजपूत कडेच आहे केस.... किती जण अटक केले तरबुज नी....
translated_text: Sushant Singh Rajput has a case.... How many people have been arrested?
Justification: The phrase "तरबुज नी" (tarabuj ni) contributes to the negative sentiment and surprise. It is a derogatory and sarcastic way of referring to the people arrested, implying they are insignificant or incompetent, thus expressing negativity and shock that such seemingly inadequate people are involved.

Text: सगळ्यात जास्त वाईट तर गावठी पोलार्ड च झालं...बिचारा घरोघरी जाणार होता..
translated_text: The worst thing happened to Gavthi Pollard...the poor guy was going door to door..
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "वाईट" (waiṭa), which means "bad" or "worst," indicating a negative situation. The emotion of disgust arises from the sympathetic, albeit perhaps sarcastic or ironic, description of the situation of "गावठी पोलार्ड" (gāvaṭhī polārḍa), which implies something low-quality or undesirable facing a bad outcome. The phrase "बिचारा" (bichārā), meaning "poor guy," further reinforces the negative sentiment and contributes to the disgust by highlighting the unfortunate circumstances.

Text: ए भवानि हे कोणा साठि आहे ते ही सांग।
translated_text: Oh Bhavani, tell me who this is.
Justification: The phrase "ए भवानि" (Oh Bhavani) expresses a sense of disrespect or impatience, contributing to the negative sentiment. While it's a call to a deity, the context suggests annoyance rather than reverence.

Text: इथे बरा हो बोलशील आणि तिथे उमेदवार पण तुम्हीच देणार पोटनिवडणुकीला....हरामखोर....
translated_text: You can speak well here and you will be the one to give the candidate for the by-election there....scoundrel....
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the use of the word "हरामखोर" (haraamkhor), which translates to "scoundrel," a derogatory term.

Text: शिवसेना आहे ना. गद्दारांना दिसत नाहीये ती
translated_text: Shiv Sena is there, right? Traitors don't see it.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," which expresses strong condemnation and contempt.

Text: आतापर्यंत झोपला होता का
translated_text: Have you slept yet?
Justification: The sentence implies mild disapproval or surprise at the recipient having potentially slept for an extended period, indicated by the phrase "आतापर्यंत झोपला होता का" which translates to "Have you been sleeping until now?". This leads to a slightly negative sentiment.

Text: आता दिवाळी सुद्धा आंधारातल्या कोठडीत..
translated_text: Now even Diwali is in a dark cell..
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment because "आंधारातल्या कोठडीत" (aandharaatlya kothdit), meaning "in a dark cell," evokes a feeling of confinement and bleakness, specifically associating Diwali with a negative situation.

Text: राठोड चा मांडीला मंडी लावून तुम्ही बसणार आणि दुसऱ्याला अक्कल शिकवणार का।काकू
translated_text: Will you sit on Rathod's lap and teach common sense to others? Aunty
Justification: The phrase "मांडीला मंडी लावून" (mandila mandi lavun), meaning "sitting on someone's lap" (specifically Rathod's lap in this context), implies inappropriate intimacy and questionable moral standing, contributing to the negative sentiment. It suggests hypocrisy when coupled with "अक्कल शिकवणार" (akkal shikavnar), meaning "teaching common sense," implying the speaker lacks the authority or credibility to advise others.

Text: अशी अफवा पसरली आहे की, काकू सुध्दा सुरत ला जाणार आहेत..
translated_text: Rumor has it that Aunty is also going to Surat.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "अफवा" (Afva), which translates to "rumor". Rumors inherently carry a sense of uncertainty and potential negativity, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: सकाळी आंदोलन आणि रात्री वेश बदलून जाऊद्या टिपा द्याला
translated_text: Advise them to protest in the morning and change their clothes at night.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "वेश बदलून जाऊद्या टिपा द्याला" (vesh badlun jau dya tipa dyala), which implies deception and potentially malicious intent, suggesting they are changing clothes to give tips, hinting at trickery. While "आंदोलन" (andolan - protest) itself can be neutral depending on context, combined with the deception, it contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: मुलगा विश्वासघातकी, ऐतखाऊ, खुनशी, घमंडी व आळशी कर्तृत्वशून्य आहे. फुकटचंबू बाबूराव!
translated_text: The son is treacherous, greedy, murderous, arrogant, lazy and incompetent. Free-spirited Baburao!
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the cluster of derogatory terms used to describe the son, specifically "विश्वासघातकी, ऐतखाऊ, खुनशी, घमंडी व आळशी," which translates to treacherous, greedy, murderous, arrogant, and lazy, indicating strong disapproval.

Text: माझ्यावर टीका करण्याचं कंत्राट काँग्रेसने दुसऱ्याला दिलं आहे – पंतप्रधान मोदींचं विधान!
translated_text: Congress has given the contract to criticize me to someone else – Prime Minister Modi's statement!
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "टीका करण्याचं कंत्राट" (ṭīkā karaṇyāchẽ kaṁṭrāṭ), which translates to "contract to criticize." This suggests a deliberate and malicious effort to undermine the speaker, fueling anger.

Text: मराठमोळी लटके ताई तिला जो त्रास देताय हे जग विसरणार नाही
translated_text: The world will not forget the trouble that Latke Tai is giving her, a Marathi woman.
Justification: "त्रास देताय" (tras detaya), meaning "giving trouble," indicates a negative sentiment as it describes an action causing distress.

Text: यशस्वी माघारची दिली का?
translated_text: Did you make a successful withdrawal?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the implication that the withdrawal may not have been "successful" (यशस्वी), suggesting a potential problem or failure.

Text: महागाई वाघावाण्याचे तंत्र आहे हे. बघा पूर्वीचेच दर आणतात ते काय? आणणारच नाहीत.
translated_text: This is a technique to control inflation. Look, what are they bringing in the same prices as before? They won't bring them in.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "आणणारच नाहीत" (aananarach nahit), which translates to "they won't bring them in." This phrase indicates disbelief and a negative expectation that prices will not return to previous levels, contributing to the negative sentiment. The surprise likely comes from the ironic comparison of the high prices to an inflation-controlling technique.

Text: याला ब्रह्मास्त्र नाही खालच्या पातळीचे राजकारण बोलतात
translated_text: This guy doesn't have a Brahmastra, he talks about low level politics.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "खालच्या पातळीचे राजकारण" (khalchya pataliche rajkaran), meaning "low level politics," which expresses disapproval and contempt for the described behavior.

Text: अवघड जागी दुखन आणि जावयी डॉक्टर अशी परिस्थिती झालिये अंध भक्तांची
translated_text: Blind devotees are in a difficult situation, suffering and having to face a doctor.
Justification: "अवघड" (awkward/difficult) indicates a negative situation, contributing to the negative sentiment. The overall context further reinforces this.

Text: आपण गद्दार विचारश्रेणीतुन बोलताय हे न समजण्या येवढा दुधखुळा आत्ता महाराष्ट्र राहीला नाही
translated_text: There is no one left in Maharashtra who is so ignorant that they don't understand that we are speaking from a traitorous ideology.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," which carries a strong negative connotation.

Text: सरकार तुपाशी आणि जनता उपाशी... जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: The government is with you and the people are hungry... Hail Maharashtra
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जनता उपाशी" (janta upashi), meaning "the people are hungry," which highlights suffering and disparity. Although "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) expresses joy/pride, the preceding statement outweighs it.

Text: अंध भंक्तांसाठी भिक मागायची व्यवस्था करण्यात आली आहे
translated_text: Arrangements have been made for blind devotees to beg.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "भिक मागायची" (bhik magayachi), meaning "to beg," which implies a demeaning and undesirable situation for the "अंध भंक्तांसाठी" (andha bhaktansathi), or "blind devotees." The act of begging carries negative connotations, leading to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: चूक आहे... ही सहानुभूती नाही निष्ठेचा ज्वालामुखी आहे.
translated_text: That's wrong... This is not sympathy, it's a volcano of loyalty.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "चूक आहे" (chuk aahe), meaning "that's wrong," indicating disapproval. The disgust emotion is reinforced by the implied condemnation and contrast with something far more intense and potentially destructive ("निष्ठेचा ज्वालामुखी आहे" - a volcano of loyalty).

Text: हा नाच्या वाकड्या पवारचा गुलाम आहे. डोक वाकड्याच अन नाच्या चे.
translated_text: This is a slave of the crooked Pawar. He has a crooked head and is a crooked man.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "वाकड्या पवारचा गुलाम" (vakdya pawarcha ghulam) and "नाच्या" (nachya). "गुलाम" (ghulam) means slave which inherently carries a negative connotation. "वाकड्या" (vakdya) meaning crooked, implies dishonesty and untrustworthiness, further amplifying the negative sentiment. "नाच्या" (nachya) is a derogatory term meaning crooked or twisted person further confirming the negative sentiment.

Text: डिलिट केले कारण ट्विट अगोदर दोन जणांनी टाकले होते लवडेश्र्वर
translated_text: Deleted because the tweet was previously posted by two people Lovedeshwar
Justification: The word "लवडेश्र्वर" (Lovedeshwar), while potentially a name, carries a negative connotation in this context, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कोथळा सम्राटला कधी शहानपन सुचणार काय माहित आयुष्यात कधी पत्र लिहीलय का किंबहुना सम्राटांनी
translated_text: I wonder if the Kothala Emperor will ever think of wisdom. Has he ever written a letter in his life? In fact, the Emperor
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कधी शहानपन सुचणार काय माहित", which translates to "I wonder if he will ever think of wisdom," expressing doubt and a lack of expectation of positive change.

Text: हा परीवार वाद नाही का,
translated_text: Isn't this a family dispute?
Justification: The negative sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the phrase "वाद नाही का" (vaad nahi ka), which translates to "isn't it a dispute?". The interrogative and negative framing suggests a surprised and potentially disapproving tone towards what is perceived as a family dispute.

Text: पालघर प्रकरण जाळून खाक व्हायची वेळ आली आहे.
translated_text: It is time for the Palghar case to burn to ashes.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जाळून खाक व्हायची वेळ आली आहे" (jaLun khak vhaychi vel aali aahe), which translates to "it is time to burn to ashes," indicating a desire for complete destruction and expressing a strong negative feeling.

Text: हीच्या आईला लावा रे  कोणी तरी.. पूर्ण दिवसाची वाट लावली मेसेज करून
translated_text: Someone please get this mother.. I kept her waiting all day by sending messages.
Justification: The phrase "वाट लावली" expresses strong negativity and frustration, indicating anger. It literally translates to "spoiled" or "ruined," but in this context, it signifies extreme annoyance and anger at having one's day disrupted.

Text: नाचता येईना अंगण वाकडे अशी तुमची अवस्था आहे मोहोळ साहेब
translated_text: You are in such a state that you cannot dance and wander around the courtyard, Mohol Saheb.
Justification: "नाचता येईना अंगण वाकडे" is an idiom implying incompetence and blaming external factors, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: भाजपा म्हणजे भाजकी,जळकी पार्टी त्यामुळे ते असेच जळके लिहिणार,जैसी जीसकी सोच
translated_text: BJP is a party of BJP, a party of hatred, so they will write like that, just like the one who thinks like that.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrases "भाजकी,जळकी पार्टी" (bhajki, jalki party), which translates to "burnt/hated party," expressing strong disapproval.

Text: चा गॅस तीन पट झालाय हे का सांगत नाही भेकडांनो
translated_text: Why don't you tell me that gas has tripled, you cowards?
Justification: The phrase "भेकडांनो" (bhekadaanno), meaning "you cowards," is a derogatory term expressing contempt and anger, directly contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: बापाला पण असच बोलतो का बाळा
translated_text: Do you talk to your father like that too, baby?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the rhetorical question and implied disapproval in the phrase "असच बोलतो का" (asach bolto ka), which questions the speaker's disrespectful behavior.

Text: च्यायला यांच्या...यातसुद्धा लबाडी....गुजराती म्हणजे जागतिक दर्जाचे लबाड आणि बंडलबाज....
translated_text: Cheyala's...this too is a lie....Gujaratis are world-class liars and troublemakers....
Justification: The phrase "लबाड आणि बंडलबाज" (liars and troublemakers) expresses a negative and derogatory sentiment, indicating disgust.

Text: भविष्यात हा व्यक्ती पुण्यात मोदीजींचे मोठ्ठाले बॅनर लावण्यापुरताच उरेल..!!
translated_text: In the future, this person will only be left to put up big banners of Modiji in Pune..!!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "मोठ्ठाले बॅनर लावण्यापुरताच उरेल" (moththale banner lavnyapuratach urel), which implies that the person will be reduced to a menial and insignificant task, showing contempt and belittling them.

Text: सावंत साहेब हे बोलणे तुम्हाला शोभते का..?
translated_text: Mr. Sawant, does this sound good to you?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "शोभते का..?", which implies disapproval or that the statement is unbecoming of Mr. Sawant. The phrase questions the appropriateness of his words, thus creating a negative tone.

Text: हा येडझवा तिवारी
translated_text: This is Yadzwa Tiwari.
Justification: The word "येडझवा" (yadzava) is a highly offensive and derogatory slur, contributing to the negative sentiment. While the emotion is assessed as neutral, the inherent negativity of the word is undeniable.

Text: मशाल समुद्रात बुडवणार होता हा कुले...
translated_text: This clan was about to throw the torch into the sea...
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "मशाल समुद्रात बुडवणार होता" (mashaal samudraat budavanaar hota), meaning "was about to throw the torch into the sea," implying an act of sabotage or destruction.

Text: हे म्हणजे असे आहे बेरोजगारी भारतात नाही भारतीय बेरोजगार आहे.
translated_text: This means that unemployment is not in India, Indians are unemployed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because it highlights the dire state of unemployment through the phrase "भारतीय बेरोजगार आहे" (Bharatiya berojgar aahe), meaning "Indians are unemployed," which emphasizes individual struggle rather than systemic unemployment.

Text: तरीही हा सुधारला आहे का? लातोंके भूत बातोंसे नही मानते
translated_text: Has this improved yet? Latinos don't believe in ghost stories.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the proverb "लातोंके भूत बातोंसे नही मानते" which implies that the subject is stubborn and resistant to change, requiring harsh measures rather than simple words or advice.

Text: कपटनिस दररोज आपली पातळी ओलांडत आहे
translated_text: Kaptanis is surpassing our level every day.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "आपली पातळी ओलांडत आहे" (aapli patali olandat aahe), meaning "surpassing our level," which implies a condescending or undermining action, even if presented neutrally. This suggests the subject is acting superior, contributing to the negative connotation.

Text: मीडियावाले आणि विरोधी विचाराचे भक्तांना विरोध म्हणून चित्रपट पहायला जातील..
translated_text: They will go to see the film as a protest against media people and devotees of opposing views.
Justification: The phrase "विरोध म्हणून" (virodh mhanun), meaning "as a protest," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies opposition and disagreement.

Text: त्यामुळे पन डॉलरच अजून घट्ट होणार
translated_text: So the dollar will only get stronger.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is derived from the phrase "अजून घट्ट होणार" (ajun ghatta honar), meaning "will only get stronger." In this context, further strengthening of the dollar is viewed negatively, likely due to its potential adverse effects on the local economy or purchasing power.

Text: हे आपल्याला हसविण्यासाठी आहे ना.. आपण किती मस्करी अजून सहन करायची
translated_text: This is to make us laugh, right? How much more mockery do we have to endure?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by "किती मस्करी सहन करायची" (kiti maskari sahan karayachi), which expresses frustration and unwillingness to tolerate further mockery. It implies a feeling of being fed up and disgusted with the situation.

Text: हा एडिट केलेला फोटो गुलामांनीच वायरल केला आहे.
translated_text: This edited photo was made viral by Ghulam himself.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment (-1) due to the term "गुलामांनी" (Ghulam), which implies a sense of disrespect and negativity in the context. Even though the emotion is neutral, the word itself carries a negative connotation.

Text: बरोबर आहे हे दोघे आपल्या तिजोरी वर नागा सारखे बसले आहेत
translated_text: That's right, these two are sitting on their chests like snakes.
Justification: The phrase "नागा सारखे बसले आहेत" (naga sarkhe basle aahet - sitting like snakes) implies a possessive and potentially threatening or dangerous guarding of their treasury, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मिळाली ना आमदारकी, धनगर आरक्षणाच्या नावावरती? समाजाची फसवणूक करुन आता मोदींची गुलामगिरी करा..
translated_text: Did you get the MLA seat in the name of Dhangar reservation? Now you are a slave to Modi by deceiving the society..
Justification: "समाजाची फसवणूक करुन" (samajachi phasanuk karun), meaning "deceiving the society," expresses strong disapproval and is a key indicator of negative sentiment. Combined with "गुलामगिरी" (gulamgiri), meaning "slavery," it further reinforces the disgust directed towards the subject.

Text: असच तुडवणार जनता एक दिवस निव्वळ योगा योग
translated_text: This is how the people will one day destroy pure yoga.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the word "तुडवणार" (tudavnaar), which means "will destroy" or "will trample," indicating a forceful and destructive action by the people.

Text: आणि तुम्ही ज्या मार्गाने जात आहेत तो लाचारी चा किशोर महामार्ग आहे.
translated_text: And the path you are taking is the juvenile highway of helplessness.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "लाचारी चा किशोर महामार्ग" (lachari cha kishor mahamarg), which translates to "juvenile highway of helplessness." This phrase implies a path characterized by subservience and lack of power, conveying a negative evaluation.

Text: लटके वहिनीनी नोकरी वाचवली अभिनंदन... प्रमोद सावंत आता बळीचा पेंग्विन... जय कामाख्या देवी
translated_text: Congratulations to the hanging sister-in-law who saved her job... Pramod Sawant is now the victim's penguin... Hail Kamakhya Devi
Justification: "बळीचा पेंग्विन" (victim's penguin) implies Pramod Sawant is a scapegoat, carrying a negative connotation despite the earlier congratulatory tone, overriding the positive aspects and leading to an overall negative sentiment.

Text: आज की ताजा खबर केसरकरांचे बोल भक्तांना मीरच्या झोंबल्या आणि ते लागलें बोंबल्या.
translated_text: Today's latest news: Kesarkar's words were a source of joy to the devotees and they were immediately shocked.
Justification: The phrase "मीरच्या झोंबल्या आणि ते लागलें बोंबल्या" suggests a sudden negative reaction and shock, with "झोंबल्या" indicating a sharp, stinging sensation/shock, and "लागलें बोंबल्या" implying an outburst or loud complaint due to that shock. This sudden shift from presumed joy to shocked complaint implies negativity and surprise.

Text: काल पासून हा दुसरा घावलाय
translated_text: This is the second injury since yesterday.
Justification: "घावलाय" (ghavalay), meaning "injury," indicates a negative situation, leading to a negative sentiment even if the emotion is neutral.

Text: रस्त्यावरील दिवे बंद असल्यानं नागरिकांच्या मनात अपघातासह चोरांचीही भीती वाढली आहे.
translated_text: The lack of street lights has increased citizens' fear of accidents and thieves.
Justification: "भीती वाढली आहे" (bhiti vadhali aahe - fear has increased) indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses a rise in fear among citizens.

Text: हा रेड्याचा अपमान होईल!
translated_text: This would be an insult to Redya!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and emotion is anger because the word "अपमान" (apman) translates to "insult" which signifies a disrespectful and offensive act.

Text: तुम्ही तेंचा सण आला की बोलायच नाही ,पिंडाला धक्का लागतो
translated_text: You don't even talk about their festival, it's a shock to the body.
Justification: The phrase "पिंडाला धक्का लागतो" (pindala dhakka lagto), meaning "it's a shock to the body," indicates disgust and negativity, as it suggests something extremely unpleasant or unacceptable is occurring.

Text: नेहमीप्रमाणे सायकलवर शाळेत निघाला पण ती सकाळ शेवटची ठरली, औरंगाबादेतील हृदयद्रावक घटना
translated_text: I went to school on my bicycle as usual, but that morning turned out to be my last, a heartbreaking incident in Aurangabad
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the phrase "हृदयद्रावक घटना" (hridayadravak ghatna), meaning "heartbreaking incident".

Text: देशमुखांचा खरा चेहरा समोर आला देशमुखांनीच दिले होते वाझेला खंडणीचे टार्गेट..
translated_text: Deshmukh's true face was revealed. It was Deshmukh who had given Vaze the target for extortion.
Justification: "खरा चेहरा समोर आला" (true face revealed) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests deception and exposure of wrongdoing.

Text: ही लहान मुलगी काय बोलली, काही समजत नाही आहे. ? चित्रफित बनवा
translated_text: I don't understand what this little girl said. ? Make a video.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "काही समजत नाही आहे" (kahi samajhat nahi aahe), meaning "I don't understand," indicating confusion and a lack of comprehension, leading to a negative experience.

Text: नाही जात आज तो
translated_text: He is not going today.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "नाही" (nahi), meaning "no" or "not", indicating a negation of action.

Text: जेजे मध्ये असतांना मेंदूवर उपचार करायला पाहिजे होते.
translated_text: While in JJ, I needed to have brain treatment.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "पाहिजे होते" (pahije hote), indicating a past regret or unfulfilled need, suggesting something negative happened or was missed.

Text: बरोबर आहे सगळ चित्रविचित्र आहे
translated_text: That's right, everything is a joke.
Justification: "चित्रविचित्र" (chitravichitra), meaning "a joke," carries a negative connotation, indicating something is absurd and not to be taken seriously, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: ते   हजारांनी पराभव होणार आहे
translated_text: They are going to be defeated by the thousands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment (-1) because of the word "पराभव" (parabhav), which means "defeat."

Text: याचं तोंड पाहुशी वाटत नाही
translated_text: I don't want to see this face.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "तोंड पाहुशी वाटत नाही" (tond pahushi vaatat nahi), which expresses a strong aversion to seeing someone's face, implying dislike and repugnance.

Text: सुप्रसिद्ध अभिनेते आणि ज्येष्ठ रंगकर्मी प्रदीप पटवर्धन ह्यांचे दुःखद निधन ! भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Sad demise of renowned actor and veteran theatre artist Pradeep Patwardhan! Heartfelt tributes
Justification: The phrase "दुःखद निधन" (dukkhad nidhan), meaning "sad demise," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कोण स्वामीनारायण ? महाराष्ट्रात खऱ्या देवांची पुजा होते. हे स्वामीनारायण कोण ??
translated_text: Who is Swaminarayan? True gods are worshipped in Maharashtra. Who is this Swaminarayan??
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrases "कोण स्वामीनारायण ?" and "हे स्वामीनारायण कोण ??", which express disbelief and dismissal towards Swaminarayan in the context of worshipping "खऱ्या देवांची" (true gods) in Maharashtra, implying Swaminarayan is not a "true god."

Text: तुला लवड्या त्या नेपाळ्याचा पुळका कशाला... हे म्हणजे लगीन लोकांचं नाचतय येड्या भोकाच...
translated_text: Why do you love that Nepali girl... This is the dance of married people...
Justification: The phrase "लवड्या" (lavdya), a vulgar and derogatory term, contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: फक्त भांडण सोडवायला आहे ती, दिसतच नाही राव.
translated_text: It's just to resolve the conflict, doesn't it seem like it, Rao?
Justification: The phrase "दिसतच नाही राव" (disatach nahi Rao), meaning "doesn't seem like it, Rao," expresses doubt and a lack of conviction, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ढाल आणि तलवार पकडायला निष्ठावंतांचा हात लागतो तुमच्या सारख्या गद्दारांचा नाही....
translated_text: It takes the hands of the loyal to hold the shield and sword, not traitors like you...
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "गद्दारांचा" (gaddarancha), which translates to "traitors". This term carries a strong negative connotation and implies betrayal, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: हसणारे चु आहेत का हरामखोर
translated_text: Are the laughing ones bastards?
Justification: The phrase "हरामखोर" (harāmkhōr) translates to "bastard" and is a highly offensive term used to express anger and contempt, directly indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: अजिबात नाही
translated_text: Not at all.
Justification: The phrase "अजिबात नाही" (ajibat nahi) directly translates to "not at all" or "absolutely not", which expresses a strong negation, hence the negative sentiment. The phrase lacks any emotional cues, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: त्या नावाखाली भ्रष्टाचार होत असेल तर ते बंद करावे
translated_text: If corruption is happening under that name, it should be stopped.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the phrase "भ्रष्टाचार होत असेल" (bhrashtachar hot asel) which translates to "corruption is happening". This indicates a negative situation and elicits a feeling of disgust.

Text: राणेंची जीभ घसरली पण दानवे, भास्कर जाधव यांच आक्रमक भाषण? वाह रे चाय बिस्कुट पत्रकार!
translated_text: Rane's tongue slipped, but Danve, Bhaskar Jadhav's aggressive speech? Wow, tea biscuit journalists!
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic use of "वाह रे चाय बिस्कुट पत्रकार!" (Vah re chai biscuit patrakar!), meaning "Wow, tea biscuit journalists!", which implies that the journalists are biased and easily influenced. The phrase expresses strong disapproval and disdain.

Text: खडकवासला, पंढरपूर, कोल्हापूर, देगलूर पोटनिवडणुकात कुठे गेली होती तुमची महान संस्कृती??
translated_text: Where did your great culture go in the Khadakwasla, Pandharpur, Kolhapur, Degalur by-elections??
Justification: The phrase "कुठे गेली होती तुमची महान संस्कृती??" (kuthe geli hoti tumchi mahan sanskruti?? - Where did your great culture go??) expresses a negative sentiment due to the sarcastic and accusatory tone suggesting hypocrisy and a lack of cultural values.

Text: तुम्ही माफी मागायला लावायचा होत त्याला
translated_text: You wanted to make him apologize.
Justification: The phrase "माफी मागायला लावायचा" (mafi magayla lavayacha) implying forcing someone to apologize, carries a negative connotation and contributes to the negative sentiment (-1), even in a neutral emotion context because it suggests coercion or an undesirable action being imposed on someone.

Text: तुला ब्लॉक नाही का केलं अजून त्यांनी..
translated_text: Why haven't they blocked you yet?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the surprise and implication of a potentially negative relationship suggested by "ब्लॉक नाही का केलं अजून त्यांनी" (block nahi ka kela ajun tyani), which expresses surprise at the lack of a blocking action, implying a hostile or estranged relationship.

Text: भाजपा पराभव होऊन शिवसेना महत्त्व वाढेल म्हणून ही नाटकं या दोघांची..
translated_text: These two are playing this drama so that the importance of Shiv Sena will increase after BJP is defeated.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "पराभव" (parabhav), which means defeat. This suggests a negative event impacting BJP, leading to the assigned negative sentiment. The overall tone of the sentence suggests a calculated, manipulative scheme, furthering a negative assessment but without a strong specific emotion.

Text: तुमचा घरकोंबडा घराबाहेर निघाला असता तर ही वेळ आली नसती भ्रष्टवादी पार्टी
translated_text: If your cock had gone out of the house, this wouldn't be the time for a corrupt party.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the derogatory word "घरकोंबडा" (gharkombada), meaning "stay-at-home cock," used in a pejorative way to imply cowardice and ineffectiveness, coupled with "भ्रष्टवादी पार्टी" (bhrashtavadi party) referring to corrupt party. The phrase indicates severe disapproval.

Text: माझ्याकडे ते पण नाहीये. साधी छत्री पण नाही.  म्हणून जास्त पंचाईत होते.
translated_text: I don't have that either. I don't even have a simple umbrella. So I was more worried.
Justification: The phrase "जास्त पंचाईत होते" (jasta panchaiit hote), meaning "more worried/problematic," indicates a negative sentiment as it describes an undesirable or difficult situation.

Text: कोणता माल मारला म्हणायचा आज......? गुजरात की व्हाया आसाम असो आपल्या काय.....
translated_text: Which goods would you say were killed today......? Whether it is Gujarat or Assam, what is ours.....
Justification: The phrase "माल मारला" (maal maarla) implies something negative happened to goods, indicating a loss or damage, which contributes to the negative sentiment. While the overall tone is sarcastic and indifferent, the underlying event described is negative.

Text: हे शेवट पर्यंत च राहतील
translated_text: This will last until the end.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the implicit finality and potential despair suggested by "शेवट पर्यंत" (shevat paryant) - "until the end." While not explicitly negative, it hints at a situation that is unchanging and lasting, potentially unwanted, hence the slightly negative sentiment in this context.

Text: मुंबईत पाणी साचल्यावर का भुकतो मग ??
translated_text: Why do people go hungry when there is waterlogging in Mumbai??
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "भुकतो मग ??" (bhukto maga??), which translates to "go hungry then??". This phrase implies hardship and suffering, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The surprise emotion is driven by the unexpected nature of hunger amidst the situation of waterlogging, suggesting an anomalous situation.

Text: निष्ठावंत शिवसैनिकांची भिती तो गद्दार आहे म्हणून बंद करून ठेवले असतील
translated_text: He must have been locked up because loyal Shiv Sainiks feared he was a traitor.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning traitor, which implies betrayal and evokes a negative judgment.

Text: कशाच्या आधारावर ते सांगा उगीचच पार्श्वभाग का बदडून घेता.
translated_text: Tell me on what basis you are changing the side part.
Justification: The phrase "उगीचच पार्श्वभाग का बदडून घेता" (ugichch parshvabhag ka badadun gheta) implies unnecessary or pointless changing of sides, which carries a negative connotation leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: थुकरट अवॉर्ड असेल आणि देणारे सुद्धा
translated_text: There will be a sloppy award and so will the giver.
Justification: "थुकरट" (thukarat) meaning "sloppy" or "worthless" indicates a negative sentiment towards the award.

Text: हे नवरा-बायको दोघेही दिवसभर ट्विटरवर जोडे खाण्याचे धंदे का करत असतील?
translated_text: Why would this husband and wife be doing a couple-eating business on Twitter all day?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "जोडे खाण्याचे धंदे" (jode khanyache dhandhe), which literally translates to "shoe-eating business," and metaphorically implies engaging in extremely unpleasant or humiliating activities, particularly in public. This indicates disapproval and negativity.

Text: होणार पण नव्हते हे सर्वानाच माहीत होत  निवडणूक तर बहाणा होता. +
translated_text: Everyone knew that it wasn't going to happen, but the election was just an excuse. +
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "निवडणूक तर बहाणा होता" (nivadnuk tar bahana hota), meaning "the election was just an excuse," implying a lack of genuineness and a pre-determined outcome.

Text: पण ते तिच्या तर नजरेत.....!! यायला हवं होत ना......!!
translated_text: But in her eyes....!! Shouldn't it have come...!!
Justification: The phrase "यायला हवं होत ना......!!" (Yayala hava hota na...!!) expresses a sense of disappointment and expectation that wasn't met, implying a negative sentiment, further fueled by the trailing ellipses suggesting suppressed anger or frustration. The "ना" (na) tag question enhances the feeling of resentment.

Text: हे बघून पुढची   वर्षं यायचा नाही बाबा. पुढच्या वर्षी यायला हवा जूनमध्ये.
translated_text: Seeing this, I don't want to come next year, Dad. I want to come next year in June.
Justification: The phrase "पुढची वर्षं यायचा नाही" (Pudhchi varsha yaycha nahi), meaning "I don't want to come next year," expresses a negative sentiment leading to sadness due to disappointment or reluctance.

Text: तुमच्या डोक्यात अंधार आहे तो दूर करण्यासाठी मशालीची नितांत आवश्यकता आहे .
translated_text: There is darkness in your head, and a torch is desperately needed to dispel it.
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यात अंधार आहे" (dokyat andhar aahe - there is darkness in your head) suggests ignorance or lack of understanding, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: आमची मशाल घेतोस का तोंडात
translated_text: Why do you take our torch in your mouth?
Justification: "तोंडात" (tondat - in the mouth) implies an inappropriate and shocking act, leading to a negative sentiment and surprise due to the unexpected and offensive nature of the action.

Text: भाजपचा हा मुर्खपणाचा कळस !
translated_text: This is the height of BJP's stupidity!
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "मुर्खपणाचा" (murkhpanacha), meaning "stupidity," which expresses disapproval and evokes anger.

Text: खुप लवकर जाग आली अडीच वर्षापूर्वी आली असती तर आज हे दिवस नसते आले
translated_text: I woke up very early. If I had come two and a half years ago, this day would not have come.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "आज हे दिवस नसते आले" (aaj he diwas naste aale), which expresses regret that the present unfortunate situation could have been avoided, translating to "this day would not have come."

Text: पुण्यात भारतविरोधी घोषणा हे राष्ट्रवादी च्या नीच राजकारणाच फलित आहे.
translated_text: The anti-India slogans in Pune are the result of the vile politics of the nationalists.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes disgust because the phrase "नीच राजकारणाच फलित" (nich rajkaranach falit), meaning "result of vile politics," expresses strong condemnation and moral repugnance.

Text: ह्याची सुरुवात भाजपाने केली राहूल गांधींविरूद्ध. त्या वेळची पातळी आठवतेय का???
translated_text: This was started by BJP against Rahul Gandhi. Do you remember the level of that time???
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "राहूल गांधींविरूद्ध" (Rahul Gandhi against), indicating opposition and a contentious relationship, thus contributing to a negative context.

Text: गद्दार गटाचा भुर्जी पटेलचा चाटूगिरी करायला आला आहे चिदे मिले नाही
translated_text: The traitor group's Bhurji has come to flatter Patel, he has not been chided.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गद्दार गट" (gaddar gat), meaning "traitor group," which carries a strong negative connotation.

Text: आला दलाल तू फक्त दलाली कर ते फक्त इतिहास सांगत आहेत
translated_text: Come on broker, you just broker, they are just telling history.
Justification: "दलाल" (dalal - broker) implies a negative connotation in this context, suggesting exploitation and dishonesty, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The sentence uses this word directly and critically, even telling the person to just do 'dalali'. While not explicitly expressing anger or sadness, the negative association with the term drives the overall negative sentiment.

Text: बरीच वाटणार, कारण तेव्हा खाओ खिलाओ चालत होत.
translated_text: It must have seemed like a lot, because at that time, people were eating and drinking.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by "खाओ खिलाओ चालत होत", which implies excessive or uncontrolled eating and drinking, suggesting a potentially wasteful or problematic situation, even though expressed in a neutral tone. The excess implied by this phrase evokes a slightly negative feeling.

Text: किव येते काही लोकाच्या बुद्धीची.बाळासाहेब थोरात.बाळासाहेब आंबेडकर. का बाळासाहेब शिंदे
translated_text: What is the wisdom of some people? Balasaheb Thorat. Balasaheb Ambedkar. Why Balasaheb Shinde?
Justification: The phrase "किव येते" (kiv yete), meaning "I feel pity" or "What is the wisdom," expresses a negative sentiment due to the feeling of pity towards the intellect of certain people.

Text: खासदार सनी देओल आणि संजय धोत्रे यांनी प्रकृतीच्या कारणामुळे उपराष्ट्रपतीपदाच्या निवडणुकीत मतदान केले नाही.
translated_text: MPs Sunny Deol and Sanjay Dhotre did not vote in the Vice Presidential election due to health reasons.
Justification: The sentence is negative (Sentiment: -1) because "मतदान केले नाही" (matdan kele nahi), meaning "did not vote," indicates a non-participation in a democratic process, which carries a negative connotation in this context.

Text: हे कसले भिकेचे डोहाळे
translated_text: What kind of begging bowl is this?
Justification: The phrase "भिकेचे डोहाळे" (bhikeche dohale), literally "begging bowl (of cravings)," implies strong disapproval and contempt towards the situation being described, resulting in a negative sentiment. The surprise element is related to the incredulity with which the speaker views the situation.

Text: आतून चिडचिडाट झालाय.. वर वर हसून काय फरक पडणार आहे का? तिळपापड ह्याला म्हणतात...
translated_text: I'm getting irritated inside.. What difference will it make if I laugh? This is called Tilpapad...
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "चिडचिडाट झालाय" (chidchidaat zhalay), meaning "getting irritated," indicating a state of annoyance. The additional phrase "तिळपापड ह्याला म्हणतात..."(tilpapad hyala mhantat) reinforces this negative state.

Text: हे असं ट्विट बघितल्यावर जखमेवर मीठ चोळल्यासारखं वाटतं....
translated_text: Seeing tweets like this feels like rubbing salt in the wound...
Justification: The phrase "जखमेवर मीठ चोळल्यासारखं" (jakhamavar meeth cholalyasarkha), which translates to "like rubbing salt in the wound," expresses a feeling of exacerbating pain and suffering, thus indicating a negative sentiment. This evokes disgust as it highlights something unpleasant being made even worse.

Text: आणि ह्यांचा शेठ निवडणूक आली की दंगल करत बसतो
translated_text: And their leader creates chaos when elections come.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "दंगल करत बसतो" (dangal karat basato), which translates to "creates chaos," implying a negative action and disruption.

Text: येझदी व्हिडिओ लीग खरोखर वेडा आहे, ही खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक जाहिरात आहे.
translated_text: The Yezdi Video League is really crazy, this is a really amazing ad.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "वेडा" (veda), which translates to "crazy". While "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakaarak) meaning "amazing" suggests a positive sentiment, "वेडा" carries a negative connotation here, overriding the positive aspect in the overall sentiment. Although emotion is joy, sentiment is based on tone.

Text: शिवसेनेने का मारले होते तुला
translated_text: Why did Shiv Sena kill you?
Justification: The phrase "मारले होते" (marale hote), meaning "killed," directly contributes to the negative sentiment. The overall context of violence implied by this word creates a strong negative feeling, while "का" (ka) which means "why" contributes to the emotion of surprise.

Text: असे खोटारडे लोकप्रतिनिधी असल्यानेच देशाची वाताहत होत आहे
translated_text: The country is suffering because of such false public representatives.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "खोटारडे" (khotarde), meaning "false" or "liars," which expresses disapproval and contributes to a negative assessment of the public representatives. The phrase "वाताहत होत आहे" (vatahat hot aahe) meaning "suffering" or "deteriorating" also contributes to negative sentiment.

Text: सदावर्ते चा युक्तिवाद आणि स्टाईल पाहून जज राजीनामा देतील ...
translated_text: Judge will resign after seeing Sadavarte's arguments and style...
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the implied extreme reaction ("राजीनामा देतील" - "will resign") to Sadavarte's actions, suggesting a strong disapproval and negativity associated with his arguments and style, implying the arguments are so poor that they would cause someone to quit their job.

Text: तुम्हाला भलताच आत्मविश्वास आहे की सरकारी कार्यालयात ह्या मंडळींनी काम केलं असेल ....
translated_text: You are very confident that these people must have worked in a government office...
Justification: The phrase "भलताच आत्मविश्वास" (bhalatach atmavishwas), meaning "very confident," suggests a negative sentiment because, in this context, it implies excessive and perhaps unwarranted confidence, hinting at disbelief or sarcasm regarding the idea of the people having actually worked.

Text: हा स्वयंघोषित दिग्दर्शक मांजरेकर इतका मोठा आहे का! जो गौरव ला अपमानास्पद वागणूक देईल.
translated_text: Is this self-proclaimed director Manjrekar so big that he would treat Gaurav with disrespect?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "अपमानास्पद वागणूक देईल" (apamanaspad vagnuk deil), which translates to "treat with disrespect." This implies a negative action and contributes to the overall negative sentiment. The surprise aspect is due to the initial question "इतका मोठा आहे का!" (itka motha aahe ka!) - "Is he so big?".

Text: वाल्यांची अतिशय फालतू नाटक. अतिशय दयनीय अवस्था आहे.
translated_text: Very useless drama of the people. It is a very pathetic situation.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "फालतू" (faltu), which translates to "useless" or "worthless," indicating a negative evaluation of the drama.

Text: एका रात्रीत घडणारी किंबहुना बिघडणारी ही गोष्ट आहे
translated_text: This is something that happens overnight, or even worsens.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "बिघडणारी" (bighadnari), which means "worsening".

Text: त्याला जे हवं आहे किंबहुना जे व्हावं असं वाटत आहे ते सारं काही त्याच्या हातातून निसटत चाललं आहे
translated_text: Everything he wants, everything he wants to happen, is slipping away from him.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "हातातून निसटत चाललं आहे" (haatatun nisatat chaalala aahe), which means "slipping away from his hands." This implies loss and lack of control, thus conveying a negative sentiment and the emotion of sadness.

Text: - चित्रपटालाही आतापर्यंतच्या सर्वात मोठ्या कंटिन्युटी एररचा सामना करावा लागला आहे
translated_text: - The film also suffered from the biggest continuity error ever
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कंटिन्युटी एररचा सामना करावा लागला", specifically "सामना करावा लागला" which implies suffering or encountering a problem, thus evoking sadness.

Text: याशिवाय, चित्रपटात पोलिसानं केलेले विनोद अनावश्यक वाटतात, त्यामुळे ते थोडं निराशा देणार वाटतं
translated_text: Additionally, the jokes made by the police in the film seem unnecessary, making it a bit disappointing.
Justification: The phrase "निराशा देणार वाटतं" (nirasha denar vattat), meaning "seems disappointing", directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ते एकतर तथ्यांचा अतिरेक करतात किंवा करमणुकीचा अतिरेक करतात
translated_text: They either exaggerate the facts or they exaggerate the entertainment.
Justification: "अतिरेक" (atirek), meaning "exaggeration" or "excess," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies going beyond acceptable limits in either fact or entertainment.

Text: पटकथेच्या पार्श्वभूमीत काळात आणि तपशीलात बऱ्यापैकी विस्कळीतपणा आहे
translated_text: There is considerable disarray in time and detail in the background of the script.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the word "विस्कळीतपणा" (viskalitpana), which translates to "disarray" or "inconsistency," indicating a flaw in the script. This implies a negative quality.

Text: इतरत्र, व्यापारी नीरज शाह (पुष्कर श्रोत्री) यांनी बँकेला कोटी रुपयांची फसवणूक केली आणि लंडनला पळून गेला.
translated_text: Elsewhere, businessman Neeraj Shah (Pushkar Shrotri) defrauds the bank of crores of rupees and flees to London.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "फसवणूक" (fasavnuk), which translates to "fraud" or "defrauding." This action carries a negative connotation.

Text: चा लढा त्या वेळी इंग्रजांशी दोन हात करताना आलेल्या अडचणी यांबद्दल सिनेमा विस्ताराने सांगत नाही
translated_text: The film does not elaborate on the difficulties faced during the battle with the British.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "अडचणी यांबद्दल सांगत नाही" (adchni yanbaddal sangat nahi), which translates to "does not tell about the difficulties". This indicates a lack of positive or informative content, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ती प्रत्येक वर्षी त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वर्धापनदिनानिमित्त त्यांना एकत्र आणण्याचा प्रयत्न करत होती, परंतु आतापर्यंत ती सपशेल अपयशी ठरली आहे
translated_text: She had been trying to get them together every year for their wedding anniversary, but so far she had failed miserably.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सपशेल अपयशी ठरली आहे" (sapshal apayashi tharali aahe), which translates to "failed miserably." This indicates a complete and utter failure, thus eliciting a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यासाठी त्यांना खूप संघर्ष करावा लागला
translated_text: They had to struggle a lot for that.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "संघर्ष" (sangharsh), which translates to "struggle" or "conflict." This inherently implies hardship and difficulty, thus contributing to the negative sentiment, even though the sentence itself is otherwise neutral.

Text: तुम्हाला तिची दया येते, पण मग पुन्हा ती तिच्या एकुलत्या एक मुलाशी संभाषण का करू शकत नाही, जेणेकरून ते एकत्र बरे होऊ शकतील? कबीर मावशीच्या भूमिकेत जमेनिसची भूमिका महत्त्वाची असली तरी अविकसित आहे
translated_text: You feel sorry for her, but then again why can't she have a conversation with her only son, so that they can heal together? Jamenis' role as Kabir's aunt is important but underdeveloped
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "दया येते" (daya yete), which translates to "feel sorry for her." This indicates a sense of pity and sadness towards the subject, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांना कीर्टी विधुला चौगुले येथे एक बिनविरोध लाऊडमॅथ्ड साथीदार सापडला जो कबीरबरोबर त्याच्या मित्रांच्या छळ करण्याशी फारच प्रेम करतो.
translated_text: They find an unassuming loudmouthed companion in Kirti Vidhu Chowgule who, along with Kabir, is very fond of torturing his friends.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "छळ करण्याशी फारच प्रेम करतो" (chhal karṇyāshī phārach prem karato), which translates to "very fond of torturing," indicating a negative action and therefore a negative sentiment.

Text: पण बनेशला माहीत नाही की तो भयंकर अॅडमिशन एजंट अप्पा (गिरीश कुलकर्णी) विरुद्ध उभा आहे, जो आपले नापाक हेतू पूर्ण करण्यासाठी कोणत्याही थराला जायला तयार असतो.
translated_text: But Banesh doesn't know that he is up against the fearsome admissions agent Appa (Girish Kulkarni), who is willing to go to any lengths to fulfill his nefarious intentions.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "नापाक हेतू" (napak hetu), which translates to "nefarious intentions." This phrase indicates ill-will and malicious intent, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कारण सिनेमातलं गावावरचं सावटच मुळात प्रेक्षकांच्या अंगावर येत नाही
translated_text: Because the image of the village in the movie doesn't really resonate with the audience.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "अंगावर येत नाही" (angaavar yet nahi), which translates to "doesn't resonate with the audience." This indicates a lack of impact or connection, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: हे काही कोरडे क्षणांना जन्म देते जिथे काहीही महत्त्वपूर्ण घडत नाही आणि आपण वेळ लक्षात घेऊ लागतो
translated_text: This gives rise to some dry moments where nothing significant happens and we start to notice the time.
Justification: "कोरडे क्षणांना जन्म देते" (gives rise to dry moments) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a lack of excitement or positivity.

Text: आता, बबली तिची मिस्टर परफेक्ट म्हणून कोणाची निवड करेल? चित्रपटाच्या कथानकाची सुरुवात एका गैरसमजाने होते ज्यामुळे बराच गोंधळ होतो आणि त्यामुळेच उर्वरित कथा तयार होते.
translated_text: Now, who will Babli choose as her Mr. Perfect? ​​The plot of the film begins with a misunderstanding that causes a lot of confusion and that is what sets the rest of the story.
Justification: The phrase "बराच गोंधळ होतो" (barach gondhal hoto), meaning "a lot of confusion occurs," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्याच्या सर्व चमकदार संगीतासह ‘उत्साही’ ख्रिसमसच्या उत्सवाच्या मूडशी सुसंगत आहे परंतु त्यात बर्याच गोष्टी पॅक करण्याचा प्रयत्न केल्याने ते सरासरी घड्याळ बनवते
translated_text: With all its bright music, ‘Spirited Away’ fits the festive mood of Christmas but trying to pack too much into it makes it an average watch.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "सरासरी घड्याळ बनवते" (sarasari ghadyaal banavate), which translates to "makes it an average watch," indicating a negative evaluation.

Text: यामुळे चित्रपट निस्तेज होतो
translated_text: This makes the movie dull.
Justification: The word "निस्तेज" (nistej), meaning dull, directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: साप पकडून ते पुन्हा रानात सोडून देणे, इतर छोटी मोठी कामं करणाऱ्या त्या आदिवासी जमातीतील लोकांवर खोटे गुन्हे दाखल केले जातात
translated_text: False cases are filed against tribal people who do things like catching snakes and releasing them back into the wild, and other small tasks.
Justification: "खोटे गुन्हे दाखल केले जातात" (khote gunhe dakhal kele jatat - false cases are filed) indicates a negative sentiment because it describes an unjust action against the tribal community.

Text: आपला मुलगा एकदम भोट आहे असे लक्षात आल्याने ते त्यांना हनिमूनला लंडनला पाठवतात
translated_text: Realizing that their son is a complete idiot, they send him to London for their honeymoon.
Justification: The phrase "एकदम भोट आहे" (ekdam bhot aahe), meaning "complete idiot," is highly negative and elicits anger.

Text: सुरुवातीला मीडिया किंवा पोलिस यांचीच ही खेळी असल्याचं मानून बच्चन पांडे मायरा आणि विशूच्या जीवावर उठतो
translated_text: Initially believing that this is a ploy by the media or the police, Bachchan Pandey takes revenge on Myra and Vishu.
Justification: The phrase "जीवावर उठतो" (jeevavar uthato), meaning "takes revenge on" or "wants to kill," indicates a negative sentiment and implies anger.

Text: तसेच निर्माता करण जोहरचा सूरही सध्या काहीसा बिघडलेला दिसतोय
translated_text: Also, producer Karan Johar's tone seems to be somewhat sour at the moment.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "बिघडलेला दिसतोय" (bighadlela distoy), which translates to "seems to be sour/spoiled". This indicates a negative state or condition.

Text: परंतु दुर्दैवाने पुरेशी वैद्यकीय सुविधा न मिळाल्याने तो केवळ दहाच दिवस जगू शकला
translated_text: But unfortunately, due to lack of adequate medical facilities, he could only survive for ten days.
Justification: The phrase "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhagyane), meaning "unfortunately," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: या चित्रपटातील साथीच्या आजारावर घेतलेली भूमिका अत्यंत सोपी आहे आणि जीवनाच्या सर्व स्तरातील लोकांवर त्याचा खरा प्रभाव पकडण्यात तो अपयशी ठरला आहे.
translated_text: The film's take on the pandemic is overly simplistic and fails to capture its true impact on people from all walks of life.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अत्यंत सोपी आहे आणि...अपयशी ठरला आहे" (atyant sopi aahe aani...apayashi tharala aahe), which translates to "overly simplistic and...fails," indicating a critical assessment of the film's portrayal.

Text: अविनाशविश्वजित यांची काही गाणी बरी आहेत पण या प्रेमत्रिकोणाची लांबी वाढवण्यापलीकडे त्यांचा उपयोग नाही
translated_text: Some of Avinash Vishwajit's songs are good but they are of no use beyond prolonging this love triangle.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "उपयोग नाही" (upayog nahi), which means "of no use". This indicates a lack of value or purpose, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: विशेष म्हणजे हस्तर याला मिळालेल्या शापामुळे तो एक दानव झाला असतो
translated_text: What's interesting is that Hastar was cursed and became a demon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment (-1) due to the phrase "शापामुळे तो एक दानव झाला असतो" (shapaamule to ek daanav zhala asato), meaning "because of the curse, he became a demon," implying a negative transformation. While the overall emotion is neutral, the fact that he was cursed and became a demon is negative.

Text: कारण सिनेमातील काही दृश्ये तर्कहीन वाटतात
translated_text: Because some scenes in the movie seem illogical.
Justification: "तर्कहीन" (tarkheen - illogical) indicates a negative sentiment as it implies a flaw or weakness in the movie.

Text: पण ज्या क्षणी लीड कपल बेपत्ता होते त्या क्षणाचा रनटाइम वाढवण्यापलीकडे काही संबंध नाही
translated_text: But the moment the lead couple goes missing has no relevance beyond extending the runtime.
Justification: The phrase "काही संबंध नाही" (kahi sambandh nahi) which translates to "no relevance" expresses a lack of positive connection or value, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु समाजामनातल्या रावणवृत्तीचं काय हे कटू सत्य चित्रपटात मांडण्यात आलं आहे
translated_text: But the bitter truth about the Ravana attitude in society is presented in the film.
Justification: "कटू सत्य" (katu satya - bitter truth) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: तापसीला याचा फटका कदाचित तिचा पुढचा चित्रपट ;सांड की आंख;च्या वेळेस बसण्याची शक्यता आहे
translated_text: Taapsee is likely to be affected by this as her next film, Saand Ki Aankh, is likely to be released at the same time.
Justification: The negative sentiment is indicated by the word "फटका" (phatka), which translates to "affected" or "impacted" negatively, suggesting a detrimental effect on Taapsee.

Text: पण आतली गोष्ट अशी आहे की त्याच्या वडिलांनी त्याच्या आईला शिवीगाळ केली ती त्या बदल्यात दुसऱ्या माणसाकडे निघून जाते, तिच्या सर्वात लहान मुलाला, एका मुलासोबत पळत असते.
translated_text: But the inside story is that his father abused his mother and she in turn left for another man, running away with her youngest child, a boy.
Justification: The phrase "शिवीगाळ केली" (shiveegaal keli), meaning "abused" or "verbally abused," indicates a negative action, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: दिग्दर्शकाला नेमके काय सांगायचे आहे हे समजत असले तरी सिनेमातील ओढूनताणून घडविलेल्या दृश्यांना कात्री लागायला हवी होती
translated_text: Even though the director understood exactly what he wanted to say, the overly drawn-out scenes in the film needed to be cut.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "ओढूनताणून घडविलेल्या दृश्यांना कात्री लागायला हवी होती" (the overly drawn-out scenes needed to be cut), which indicates criticism of the film's pacing and editing.

Text: एकूणच काय तर सिनेमात काही त्रुटी आहेत
translated_text: Overall, there are some flaws in the movie.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "त्रुटी" (truti), which translates to "flaws."

Text: तसं पाहिलं तर हा चित्रपट चर्चेत येण्याआधी दिग्दर्शक अनुराग कश्यप आणि अभिनेता अनिल कपूर यांच्यातील सोशल मीडियावरील वाद लोकांच्या नजरेत भरले
translated_text: In fact, before this film became a hit, the social media controversy between director Anurag Kashyap and actor Anil Kapoor caught the public's attention.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "वाद" (vaad), which translates to "controversy" or "dispute."

Text: यात अगदी शेवटच्या एपिसोडमध्ये केवळ एक शिवी आहे
translated_text: There is only one insult in the very last episode.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the presence of the Marathi word "शिवी" (shivi), which translates to "insult/curse word." The neutral emotion is due to the sentence simply stating the fact without expressing strong emotion.

Text: ‘स्त्री’आमिषाला बळी पडून शंतनू त्या ‘ईमेल’च्या जाळ्यात अडकतो आणि लाखो रुपये त्यावर खर्च करतो
translated_text: Falling for the lure of a 'woman', Shantanu falls into the trap of that 'email' and spends lakhs of rupees on it.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "आमिषाला बळी पडून" (āmīṣhāḷā baḷī paḍūna) which translates to "falling prey to the lure/bait" indicates a negative experience and exploitation.

Text: लाला युसुफझाय हे प्रेरणादायक व्यक्तिमत्व कोणाला माहीत नाही पाकिस्तानच्या स्वात खोऱ्यात तालिबानी दहशतवाद्यांनी मुलींच्या शिक्षणाला बंदी घातली आणि त्यांचे घरातून बाहेर पडणे बंद केले तेव्हा शिक्षणाला तहानलेली ही मुलगी धाडसाने बाहेर पडली आणि दहशतवाद्यांनी तिला गोळ्या घातल्या
translated_text: Who doesn't know the inspiring personality of Lala Yousafzai? When Taliban terrorists banned girls' education in Pakistan's Swat Valley and stopped them from leaving their homes, this girl, thirsty for education, bravely stepped out and was shot by the terrorists.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "दहशतवाद्यांनी तिला गोळ्या घातल्या" (dahashatavadyanni tila golya ghatlya - the terrorists shot her), which expresses a violent and traumatic event. This evokes a sense of fear.

Text: सामाजिक कर्तव्यावर लक्ष केंद्रित करूनही, चित्रपटाच्या निर्मात्यांना कथानकाला कमजोर करणाऱ्या त्रुटींसाठी माफ करता येत नाही.
translated_text: Despite focusing on social duty, the film's makers cannot be forgiven for the flaws that undermine the plot.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "माफ करता येत नाही" (maaf karta yet nahi), which means "cannot be forgiven."

Text: त्याच्याकडे योग्य अगतिकता आहे, पात्रासाठी आवश्यक आहे
translated_text: He has the right vulnerability, necessary for the character.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "अगतिकता" (agatikatā) which translates to "vulnerability". While contextually necessary, vulnerability inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: या वेडेपणाला, असंवेदनशीलतेला आणि अमानवी दृष्टिकोनाला मर्यादा नाही
translated_text: There is no limit to this madness, insensitivity and inhumane approach.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "असंवेदनशीलतेला आणि अमानवी दृष्टिकोनाला मर्यादा नाही" (asansvedansheelatela aani amanavi drushtikonala maryada nahi) which highlights the limitless nature of insensitivity and an inhumane approach.

Text: जर तुम्ही पहिला भाग पाहिला असेल तर तुम्हाला सुरुवातीच्या घडामोडी थोड्या कंटाळवाण्या वाटतील
translated_text: If you've seen the first episode, you might find the initial events a bit boring.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the Marathi word "कंटाळवाण्या" (kantaalvanyaa), meaning "boring," expresses a negative feeling about the initial events.

Text: याचा आपल्या प्रत्येकाच्या जीवनावर कधी ना कधी विपरित परिणाम होईल, सुसंस्कृत समाजाला अराजकतेत टाकले जाईल
translated_text: This will have an adverse effect on each of our lives at some point, throwing civilized society into chaos.
Justification: "विपरित परिणाम" (viparita parinam) which translates to "adverse effect," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: घरात त्याला एका महिलेचा मृतदेह दिसतो
translated_text: He finds a woman's body in the house.
Justification: The phrase "मृतदेह दिसतो" (mrutdeh disto - finds a dead body) indicates a negative situation, justifying the negative sentiment. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of a dead body inherently contributes to the negative sentiment score.

Text: सूक्ष्मता आणि उपदेश यात समतोल राखायला हवा होता
translated_text: A balance had to be struck between subtlety and exhortation.
Justification: "राखायला हवा होता" (had to be struck) implies a lack of balance and a missed opportunity, indicating a negative sentiment. The emotion remains neutral as the sentence expresses a statement of fact rather than eliciting a strong emotional response.

Text: ;तुम्हाला ब्रेन कॅन्सर आहे;, असं जेव्हा डॉक्टर एखाद्या वक्तीला सांगतात तेव्हा त्यांची मानसिक स्थिती काय असेल याचा सर्वांनाच अंदाज आहे
translated_text: When a doctor tells a speaker, "You have brain cancer," everyone can guess what their mental state will be.
Justification: The phrase ";तुम्हाला ब्रेन कॅन्सर आहे;" (you have brain cancer) is responsible for the negative sentiment and elicits disgust due to its association with a severe and life-threatening illness.

Text: केवळ नाटकांमधून काम करण्याला प्राधान्य देणारी अनन्याची कुठलीच गोष्ट नीटनेटकी नाही आणि वेळेवरही नाही
translated_text: Ananya, who prefers to work only in dramas, does nothing neat or timely.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कुठलीच गोष्ट नीटनेटकी नाही आणि वेळेवरही नाही" (kuthalich gosht neetnetaki nahi aani velevarhi nahi), which translates to "nothing neat or timely." This indicates a lack of order and punctuality, contributing to a negative overall assessment.

Text: गंभीर विषयावर हलक्याफुलक्या पद्धतीने भाष्य करु पाहणारा हा सिनेमा असला तरी तो मेलोड्रामॅटिक होत गेल्याने अविश्वसनीय वाटू लागतो आणि त्यामुळेच जबरदस्त वाटत नाही
translated_text: Although this is a film that tries to comment on a serious subject in a light-hearted way, it becomes too melodramatic and therefore doesn't feel compelling.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "अविश्वसनीय वाटू लागतो" (avishvasniy vatu lagto), which translates to "feels unbelievable/not compelling," indicating a lack of believability and a negative assessment of the film.

Text: तो कोण आहे आणि त्याला काय हवे आहे?माझ्या बायकोचा प्रियकर हे भ्रामक शीर्षक आहे
translated_text: Who is he and what does he want? My wife's lover is a misleading title
Justification: "भ्रामक" (bhramak) meaning "misleading" indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests deception or inaccuracy.

Text: त्याचप्रमाणे काही महत्त्वाच्या घटनांमध्ये अक्कल नसते
translated_text: Similarly, in some important events, common sense is lacking.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the phrase "अक्कल नसते" (akkal nasate), which translates to "common sense is lacking." This indicates a deficiency and implies a negative state of affairs.

Text: तोही हे सगळं करून घेत नाही कारण त्याचा खर्च प्रचंड आहे
translated_text: He doesn't do all this either because the cost is huge.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "खर्च प्रचंड आहे" (kharch prachanda aahe), which translates to "the cost is huge," indicating a significant negative financial burden.

Text: मात्र काही ना काही कारणांनी या दोघांत खटके उडत आहेत
translated_text: But for some reason, there are conflicts between the two.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "खटके उडत आहेत" (khatke udat aahet), which translates to "there are conflicts/sparks flying". This implies discord and disagreement, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: टीव्ही मराठी रेटिंग : दोन
translated_text: TV Marathi Rating: Two
Justification: "दोन" (don, meaning "two") in this context indicates a low rating, implying a negative sentiment. While not strongly emotional, a low rating is generally undesirable.

Text: सरबतीला कॅन्सर असल्याचं निदान होतं
translated_text: Sarabati was diagnosed with cancer.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कॅन्सर असल्याचं निदान होतं" (cancer aslyach niadaan hot), which translates to "diagnosed with cancer," indicating a serious and unfortunate medical condition.

Text: जेव्हा तो एखाद्यावर ओरडतो तेव्हा तुम्ही घाबरून जाता
translated_text: You get scared when he yells at someone.
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear emotion are derived from the word "घाबरून" (ghabrun), which translates to "scared" or "frightened," directly indicating a negative emotional state.

Text: बबली मीनल (पूजा सावंत) आणि तरुणांच्या टोळीसह त्याला सुरुवातीला विचित्र वाटणारे लोक भेटतात.
translated_text: He initially meets people who seem strange to him, including Babli Meenal (Pooja Sawant) and a gang of young men.
Justification: The phrase "विचित्र वाटणारे" (vichitra watnare) meaning "strange-seeming" contributes to the negative sentiment, indicating a sense of discomfort or unease.

Text: सिनेमातील न्यायलयात होणारा ड्रामा पाहून अनेकदा तर हसू येते
translated_text: Watching the courtroom drama in movies often makes me laugh.
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the emotion being joy because the phrase "हसू येते" (hasu yete - makes me laugh) is being used sarcastically or dismissively, suggesting the courtroom drama is so over the top that it's laughable, implying a negative judgment on the movie's quality. The implied meaning of the sentence is that the drama is ridiculous.

Text: पण सर्व लखलखीत असलं तरी      च्या बंटी और बबलीची निरागसता दुसऱ्या भागात नाही
translated_text: But despite all the excitement, Bunty and Babli's innocence is not there in the second part.
Justification: The phrase "निरागसता दुसऱ्या भागात नाही" (niragasata dusarya bhagat nahi) indicating the absence of innocence in the second part, contributes to the negative sentiment (-1).

Text: आपल्याकडे वाईट नजरेने लकी बघतोय असा तिचा गैरसमज होतो आणि ती त्याच्या श्रीमुखात भडकावते
translated_text: She misunderstands that Lucky is looking at her with a negative eye and she provokes him to his face.
Justification: "वाईट नजरेने" (waiṭa najarene) translates to "with a negative eye," indicating a negative perception or ill intent, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: गोविंदाकादरखान यांची पडद्यावरची जुगलबंदी पुन्हा निर्माण होऊ शकत नाही हे मान्यच पण या अस्सलची नक्कल करताना सर्वच पातळ्यांवर गल्लत झाली आहे
translated_text: It is true that the on-screen juggling act of Govinda and Kadarkhan cannot be recreated, but the attempt to imitate this original has gone wrong on all levels.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गल्लत झाली आहे" (gallat jhali aahe), which translates to "gone wrong/messed up," indicating a failure or negative outcome.

Text: त्याच्याविषयीच्या अप्रिय गोष्टीप्रसंग कॅमेऱ्यात टिपतो
translated_text: He records unpleasant things about him on camera.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the word "अप्रिय" (apriya), meaning "unpleasant." This indicates an unfavorable or negative situation being recorded.

Text: कल्पेशराज कुबल गेल्यावर्षीच्या कबीर सिंग सिनेमातील नायक कबीरनं प्रेयसी प्रीतीच्या श्रीमुखात भडकवल्याचा प्रसंग चर्चेचा विषय ठरला होता
translated_text: Kalpeshraj Kubal The incident in last year's Kabir Singh, where the hero Kabir provoked his girlfriend Preeti into having sex with him, became a topic of discussion.
Justification: "भडकवल्याचा" (bhadakvalyacha), meaning "provoked" or "incited" in a forceful, negative way, contributes to the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust, as it implies a non-consensual or manipulative act.

Text: मात्र सांस्कृतिक संदर्भांचा अभाव दृश्यात्मकतेऐवजी संवादावरील भर अभिनयापासून संवादापर्यंत सोपेपणाच्या नावाने प्रकटणारा उथळपणा या कथेला मराठी बनवत नाही आणि भावनिकदृष्ट्या स्पर्शतही नाही
translated_text: However, the lack of cultural references, the emphasis on dialogue instead of visuals, and the shallowness that appears in the name of simplicity, from acting to dialogue, do not make this story Marathi and do not touch it emotionally.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the sentence states that the story "भावनिकदृष्ट्या स्पर्शतही नाही" (bhāvanikdr̥ṣṭyā sparśatahī nāhī), meaning it does not touch emotionally, indicating a lack of positive emotional engagement.

Text: त्यात प्रेक्षकांनी या चित्रपटानं आपली निराशा केल्याचे म्हटले आहे
translated_text: In it, the audience said that this film disappointed them.
Justification: "निराशा केल्याचे" (niraasha kelyaache), meaning "disappointed," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: गारपिटीमुळे त्यांच्या पिकाच्या झालेल्या नुकसानीची त्यांना शासनाकडून अद्याप भरपाई मिळालेली नाही
translated_text: They have not yet received compensation from the government for the damage to their crops caused by the hailstorm.
Justification: "नुकसानीची" (nuksanichi - damage) indicates a negative situation, causing the negative sentiment.

Text: अभ्यासात कमी गती असलेल्या मुलांना एका वर्गात एकत्र करून त्यांना ‘ड’, ‘ई’, ‘फ’ अशा तुकडय़ा चिकटवल्या जातात
translated_text: Children who are slow in their studies are grouped together in a class and given letters like 'D', 'E', 'F'.
Justification: The phrase "‘ड’, ‘ई’, ‘फ’ अशा तुकडय़ा चिकटवल्या जातात" (letters like 'D', 'E', 'F' are stuck on them) implies a dehumanizing and stigmatizing act, causing disgust at the unfair labeling and implied inferiority assigned to the children.

Text: आपल्या मुलीच्या भवितव्याबद्दल चिंताग्रस्त असलेल्या एका बापाच्या भूमिकेत त्याने एक दमदार कामगिरी केली आहे
translated_text: He has given a powerful performance in the role of a father who is worried about his daughter's future.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "चिंताग्रस्त" (chintagrast), meaning "worried" or "anxious," indicating a negative emotional state.

Text: त्याच्या प्रेमकथेलाही फारसा वाव देण्यात आलेला नाही
translated_text: His love story hasn't been given much space either.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the phrase "फारसा वाव देण्यात आलेला नाही" (pharasa vaav denyat aalela nahi), which translates to "hasn't been given much space." This indicates a lack or absence of something desired, resulting in a negative feeling.

Text: सुमंत कधीकधी दोघांमधील संतुलन शोधण्यात अपयशी ठरतो
translated_text: Sumant sometimes fails to find a balance between the two.
Justification: The word "अपयशी" (apayashi) meaning "fails" contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: जोशी आणि भावे हे जिवलग मित्र म्हणून विश्वासात असले तरी त्यांची मैत्री कधीकधी खूप गोड असते आणि ती खोटी वाटते.
translated_text: Although Joshi and Bhave are trusted as best friends, their friendship is sometimes too sweet and feels fake.
Justification: The phrase "खूप गोड असते आणि ती खोटी वाटते" (khoop god aste aani tee khoti vatate) meaning "too sweet and feels fake" indicates a negative sentiment as it implies insincerity in the friendship.

Text: आपली खोली शिऱ्याच्या घश्यात जाईल म्हणून संतापलेला दिग्या मांज्यानं शिऱ्या आणि सुप्रियाचा जीव घेतो
translated_text: Digya, enraged that his room will be in Shira's throat, kills Shira and Supriya with a knife.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "संतापलेला दिग्या" (santaplela Digya), meaning "enraged Digya," clearly indicating anger and a negative context. Furthermore, "जीव घेतो" (jeev gheto), meaning "kills", adds to the negative sentiment.

Text: निराश झालेला रोहन पुन्हा आपल्या जुन्या कॉलेजमध्ये अर्थात पिशोरीमल चमनलाल कॉलेजमध्ये परततो
translated_text: Disappointed, Rohan returns to his old college, Pishorimal Chamanlal College.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "निराश" (nirash), which means "disappointed" in Marathi.

Text: पण, त्यांचा हा प्रयत्न फसलाय
translated_text: But, their attempt failed.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "फसलाय" (faslaya), which means "failed." This indicates a negative outcome and contributes to the sadness emotion.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांना अभियंता बनवण्याची सक्ती कशी केली जाते हे दाखवणारे चित्रपट आले आहेत (इडियट्स चित्रपट हे एक प्रमुख उदाहरण आहे)
translated_text: There have been movies showing how students are forced to become engineers (the movie Idiots is a prime example).
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सक्ती केली जाते" (sakti keli jaate), which translates to "forced to," indicating coercion and a lack of free will.

Text: पण त्यातील आशय आणि त्यांच्या पात्रांमधील खोलीचा अभाव कलाकारांना फारशी संधी देत ​​नाही
translated_text: But the content and the lack of depth in their characters don't give the actors much of a chance.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "खोलीचा अभाव" (kholicha abhav), which translates to "lack of depth." This indicates a deficiency and contributes to a negative assessment.

Text: पण क्लायमॅक्स आणि योग्य शेवट तुम्हाला पुन्हा वास्तवाकडे नेईल आणि तुम्हाला आठवण करून देईल की हा फक्त एक चित्रपट आहे.
translated_text: But the climax and the fitting ending will bring you back to reality and remind you that it's just a movie.
Justification: While the sentence is mostly descriptive, "तुम्हाला आठवण करून देईल की हा फक्त एक चित्रपट आहे" (will remind you that it's just a movie) slightly diminishes the experience, bringing a neutral/slightly negative sentiment as it suggests a return to reality from a possibly more enjoyable fictional world. The phrase acknowledges the artificiality of the cinematic experience.

Text: उदाहरणार्थ, इमारतीमध्ये प्रचंड आग लागते
