translated_text: For example, a huge fire breaks out in a building.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "प्रचंड आग" (prachanda aag), which translates to "huge fire," indicating a destructive and negative event.

Text: अपारशक्ती खुराणाचा अभिनय ओव्हर वाटतो
translated_text: Aparshakti Khurana's acting seems over the top.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "ओव्हर वाटतो" (over watto), which translates to "seems over the top" and implies a negative assessment of the acting performance.

Text: प्रकरण आणखी वाईट करण्यासाठी, सावकाराला त्याचे पैसे काही तासांत हवे असतात
translated_text: To make matters worse, the lender wants his money within hours.
Justification: "वाईट करण्यासाठी" (waiṭ karaṇyāsāṭhī) meaning "to make worse" indicates a negative sentiment. This exacerbation of the situation evokes disgust.

Text: योगायोगाने, जाधव यांनी एक दृश्य चित्रित केले आहे (जो कदाचित संपूर्ण चित्रपटातील दिग्दर्शक म्हणून त्यांचा सर्वात कमकुवत क्षण होता) ज्यामध्ये कलात्मक अभिव्यक्तीच्या स्वातंत्र्याची गरज न विचारता, महिला नग्नता आणि अश्लीलतेचा निषेध करत काही लोक महाविद्यालयात प्रवेश करतात.
translated_text: Incidentally, Jadhav has filmed a scene (which was probably his weakest moment as a director in the entire film) in which some people enter a college, protesting female nudity and obscenity, without questioning the need for freedom of artistic expression.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the phrase "कमकुवत क्षण होता" (kamkuvat kshan hota), which translates to "weakest moment." This phrase expresses a negative assessment of Jadhav's directorial decision, contributing to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटात असे आणखी काही निरर्थक क्षण आहेत
translated_text: There are a few other such pointless moments in the film.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "निरर्थक" (nirarthak), which means pointless or meaningless.

Text: त्यामुळे जी वातावरणनिर्मिती व्हायला पाहिजे तीच होत नाही परिणामी एक चांगला विषय वाया गेला आहे
translated_text: Therefore, the desired atmosphere is not created, resulting in a good topic being wasted.
Justification: "वाया गेला आहे" (vaya gela aahe - wasted) indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses that a good topic has been wasted.

Text: गँगवॉर, बॉम्ब हल्ले, दंगल आणि शहरावर राज्य करणारे डॉन; याची साक्ष म्हणजेच मुंबई
translated_text: Gang wars, bomb attacks, riots and dons ruling the city; Mumbai is a testament to this
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the listing of violent and criminal activities, specifically "गँगवॉर, बॉम्ब हल्ले, दंगल" (gang wars, bomb attacks, riots), which evoke a sense of negativity and unrest associated with the city.

Text: मध्यंतरानंतर मात्र सिनेमानं थोडा अपेक्षाभंग केला
translated_text: However, after the interval, the movie disappointed a bit.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "अपेक्षाभंग केला" which translates to "disappointed". This directly indicates a negative outcome or experience.

Text: हा चित्रपट बघताना आपण अस्वस्थ होतो
translated_text: We feel uncomfortable watching this movie.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अस्वस्थ" (asvasth), which translates to "uncomfortable."

Text: हा ट्रॅक ठरावीक लांबीचा असायला हवा होता
translated_text: This track should have been of a certain length.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "असायला हवा होता" (asayla hava hota), which expresses a regret or lack of satisfaction that the track wasn't of the desired length. It indicates a deficiency.

Text: मात्र ती प्रवाही नाही
translated_text: But it is not flowing.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the word "नाही" (nahi), which means "not." This negation indicates a lack of flow, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तरुणी अस्वस्थ आहे, कारण तिचे बाळ घरी एकटे आहे, तिची परत येण्याची वाट पाहत आहे
translated_text: The young woman is upset because her baby is home alone, waiting for her return.
Justification: "अस्वस्थ" (asvasth) which translates to "upset" or "restless" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: नवऱ्याच्या बाहेर असणाऱ्या भानगडी आणि आपल्या अंगावरचे दागिने, आपलं अस्तित्वं सर्व काही ओरबाडणाऱ्या त्या माणासाला क्षणाचाही विचार न करता यमुना सोडून थेट मुंबईची वाट धरते
translated_text: Without even a moment's thought, she leaves the Yamuna and heads straight for Mumbai to face the man who is destroying her entire existence, her husband's external affairs and her jewelry.
Justification: The phrase "ओरबाडणाऱ्या त्या माणासाला" (orbadnarya tya manasala), meaning "the man who is destroying/tearing apart," expresses intense negativity and is directly responsible for the negative sentiment and anger emotion.

Text: कळत नकळत आपल्या कृतीतून काही गोष्टी घडतात ज्यांची परिणिती अत्यंत विदारक असते
translated_text: Unknowingly, our actions sometimes lead to things that have very devastating consequences.
Justification: The word "विदारक" (vidarak), meaning devastating, indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: बाकी अत्यंत सुमार दर्जाची गाणी मध्येच येऊन चित्रपट लांबवण्याचं काम करतात
translated_text: The rest of the songs are of very poor quality and only serve to prolong the film.
Justification: "सुमार दर्जाची" (sumar darjachi), meaning "of poor quality," indicates a negative sentiment towards the songs.

Text: अनुरागनं सोशल मीडियातून याविषयी जाहीर नाराजी व्यक्त केली होती
translated_text: Anurag had expressed his displeasure about this on social media.
Justification: The phrase "जाहीर नाराजी व्यक्त केली" (jahir naraji vyakt keli) meaning "expressed public displeasure" indicates negative sentiment.

Text: आणि इथेच त्यांचा प्लॉट हरवला असावा
translated_text: And this is where their plot may have been lost.
Justification: "हरवला असावा" (haravla asava - may have been lost) suggests a sense of loss or uncertainty, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: दरम्यान, आम्ही अनुराधाला एका वेगळ्या अवतारात तिच्या बॉस, जिम ट्रेनर आणि क्लबच्या मालकाचा खून करताना पाहतो
translated_text: Meanwhile, we see Anuradha in a different avatar murdering her boss, gym trainer and club owner.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "खून" (khoon), meaning murder, which evokes strong negative emotions.

Text: यासगळ्यात जे काही घडतं ते किती भयानक आहे हे जाणून घेण्यााठी जय भीमच्या वाट्याला जावं लागेल
translated_text: To understand how terrifying everything that happens in this world is, you have to go through Jai Bhim's journey.
Justification: The phrase "भयानक आहे" (bhayanak aahe) meaning "is terrifying" directly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes the emotion of fear.

Text: तो आयुष्य जगण्याचा आवेश गमावतो आणि आत्महत्या करतो
translated_text: He loses the will to live and commits suicide.
Justification: "आत्महत्या करतो" (commits suicide) clearly indicates a negative sentiment, specifically sadness, as it describes a tragic end to life.

Text: सुरुवातीला दोघे जुन्याच ओढीने एकत्र येतात पण नंतर अचानक दोघांच्या नात्यात अंतराय निर्माण होतो
translated_text: Initially, the two come together on old terms, but then suddenly a rift arises in their relationship.
Justification: "अंतराय निर्माण होतो" (antaray nirman hoto), meaning "a rift arises", indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a breakdown or obstacle in the relationship.

Text: आणि तेच बेल बॉटमचं अपयश म्हणावं लागेल
translated_text: And that's what we have to call the failure of Bell Bottom.
Justification: The word "अपयश" (ap यश) meaning "failure" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: संपूर्ण सिनेमा नीटनेटका झाला असला तरी तो काही ठिकाणी प्रेडिक्टेबल झाला आहे
translated_text: Although the entire movie is well-made, it has become predictable in some places.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "प्रेडिक्टेबल झाला आहे" (predictable has become) indicates a lack of originality or surprise, contributing to a negative assessment.

Text: खरं तर, दुसऱ्या सहामाहीत, कोण कोणाच्या बाजूने आहे हे शोधण्याचा प्रयत्न करताना तुम्ही अक्षरशः गोंधळलेले आहात
translated_text: In fact, in the second half, you're literally confused trying to figure out who's on whose side.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गोंधळलेले" (gondhalalele), meaning "confused," which implies a state of uncertainty and disorientation, contributing to a negative feeling.

Text: पण जबरदस्त कॉमेडी सहसा सपाट पडते
translated_text: But great comedy often falls flat.
Justification: The phrase "सपाट पडते" (sapaat padte) meaning "falls flat" indicates a negative outcome or failure, justifying the negative sentiment (-1).

Text: राधिका देशपांडेसने खराब इंग्रजीचा अनावश्यक वापर तेजश्रीच्या मोठ्या बहिणीने तिच्या चारित्र्याला त्रास दिला
translated_text: Radhika Deshpande's unnecessary use of bad English hurt Tejashree's elder sister's character
Justification: The phrase "खराब इंग्रजीचा अनावश्यक वापर" (kharab angrajicha anavashyak vapar - unnecessary use of bad English) contributes to the negative sentiment, implying a negative action that harmed someone's character.

Text: पण निव्वळ निकाल अर्धा चांगला नाही
translated_text: But the net result isn't half as good.
Justification: The phrase "अर्धा चांगला नाही" (ardha changla nahi) which translates to "not half as good" indicates a negative sentiment (-1) due to expressing insufficiency or falling short of expectations.

Text: पण जेव्हा अक्षयच्या प्रभावशाली कुटुंबाला त्यांच्या मैत्रीबद्दल कळते आणि विजयला धडा शिकविण्याचा निर्णय घेतो तेव्हा सर्व नरक मोडतात
translated_text: But all hell breaks loose when Akshay's influential family finds out about their friendship and decides to teach Vijay a lesson.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सर्व नरक मोडतात" (sarva narak modtat), which translates to "all hell breaks loose" indicating a very negative situation unfolding.

Text: मग असे विशेष प्रभाव आहेत ज्यात सूक्ष्मतेचा अभाव आहे
translated_text: Then there are the special effects that lack subtlety.
Justification: "अभाव" (abhav - lack) indicates a negative quality, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: ही कथा अंदाज लावण्यास मदत करत नाही
translated_text: This story doesn't help with guessing.
Justification: "नाही" (nahi) indicates negation, making the sentence negative.

Text: आपल्या लेफ्टनंटची तो कठीण काळात मदत करतो, मात्र त्यानंतर त्याच्या अडचणी आणखी वाढतात
translated_text: He helps his lieutenant through a difficult time, but then his problems only get worse.
Justification: The phrase "अडचणी आणखी वाढतात" ( अडचणी आणखी वाढतात) which translates to "problems only get worse" indicates a negative outcome, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: प्रस्ताव नाकारण्याव्यतिरिक्त ती काय करते हे आम्हाला कधीच सांगितले जात नाही
translated_text: We are never told what she does other than reject the proposal.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the Marathi word "नाकारण्या" (nakarannya), which translates to "rejecting." This explicitly indicates a negative action, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: बाबा, दुसरा त्रासलेला, एका तात्पुरत्या झोपडीत हात-तोंडाचे जीवन जगतो
translated_text: Dad, another sufferer, lives hand-to-mouth in a makeshift hut
Justification: "त्रासलेला" (traslela), meaning "sufferer," directly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण काही वेळा, त्याच्या आवाजाचा टोन नैसर्गिक वाटत नाही तर इतर दृश्यांमध्ये, तो खूप प्रयत्न करतो असे दिसते
translated_text: But at times, his tone of voice doesn't seem natural, while in other scenes, he seems to be trying too hard.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "खूप प्रयत्न करतो असे दिसते" (khoop prayatna karto ase disate), which translates to "seems to be trying too hard," indicating a lack of naturalness and an unfavorable performance.

Text: जेव्हा ते भेटतात आणि मैत्री बनवतात तेव्हा त्यांना समजते की ते दोघेही एक प्रकारचे आघात सहन करत आहेत जे ते उर्वरित जगापासून लपवत आहेत.
translated_text: When they meet and form a friendship, they realize that they are both suffering from some kind of trauma that they are hiding from the rest of the world.
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the phrase "आघात सहन करत आहेत" (aaghat sahan karat aahet), meaning "suffering from trauma." This indicates a negative experience.

Text: अरविंद त्याच्या कूकशी प्रेम-द्वेषाचे नाते सामायिक करतो (किशोर कदम यांनी भूमिका केली होती), कारण अरविंद डॉक्टरांच्या सूचनेनुसार त्याच्या रोट्यांवर लोणी घालण्यास नकार देतो
translated_text: Arvind shares a love-hate relationship with his cook (played by Kishore Kadam), as Arvind refuses to put butter on his rotis as per the doctor's instructions.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "प्रेम-द्वेषाचे नाते" (prem-dweshache naate), which translates to "love-hate relationship," indicating a complex and inherently negative dynamic. While not purely negative, the inclusion of "द्वेष" (dwesh - hate) contributes to the overall negative sentiment, and the emotion "disgust" aligns with the conflict.

Text: तेथेही चित्रपटाने भ्रमनिरास केला आहे
translated_text: The film has disappointed there too.
Justification: "भ्रमनिरास केला" (bhramniraas kela) which translates to "disappointed" is a clear indicator of a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of sadness.

Text: त्यात एका व्यक्तीला विनाकारण आपले प्राण गमवावे लागतात
translated_text: In it, one person has to lose their life for no reason.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "प्राण गमवावे लागतात" (praan gamavaave lagtaat), meaning "have to lose their life," which expresses a negative outcome, especially compounded by "विनाकारण" (vinaakaran), meaning "for no reason".

Text: रघूमध्ये नेमके काय बदल होतात विष्णू आणि रघू यांच्यातील वैर कोणत्या टोकाला जाते हे पाहणे काहीसे मनोरंजक असले तरी पटकथेच्या तथ्यहीन विस्तारामुळे ते कंटाळवाणे वाटते
translated_text: What exactly changes in Raghu? Although it is somewhat interesting to see to what extent the enmity between Vishnu and Raghu goes, it feels boring due to the factless expansion of the script.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणे वाटते" (kantalwane vaatte) which translates to "it feels boring," is the primary reason for the negative sentiment.

Text: पण जी निरागसता आणि भावनिकता पहिल्या सिनेमाच्या लेखनात होती ती यावेळच्या गोष्टीत जाणवत नाही
translated_text: But the innocence and emotionality that was in the writing of the first film is not felt in this one.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जाणवत नाही" (jaanavat nahi), meaning "not felt," indicating a lack of the positive qualities present in the first film.

Text: अगदी बॉलीवूड कॉलेजच्या सामान्य नाटकांसाठीही कथानक कालबाह्य झालेल्या क्लिचने भरलेले आहे.
translated_text: The plot is full of outdated clichés, even for typical Bollywood college dramas.
Justification: "कालबाह्य झालेल्या क्लिचने भरलेले आहे" (kalabahya zalelya clichéne bharale aahe) indicates that the plot is full of outdated clichés, which directly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: कलंकित जमीन विकत घेणारा उच्चवर्णीय जमीन मालक आणि चर्च या दोघांनाही जे हवे आहे ते आहे, सामान्य माणसांना त्यांचे नशीब भोगावे लागत आहे.
translated_text: Both the upper-caste landowners who buy tainted land and the church want what they want, while ordinary people suffer their fate.
Justification: "कलंकित जमीन" (tainted land) implies negativity and exploitation, contributing to the negative sentiment. The phrase suggests unethical or corrupt dealings.

Text: मात्र नंतर पश्चातापाची वेळ येऊ शकते असा हा मामला आहे
translated_text: But this is a case where you may regret it later.
Justification: The word "पश्चातापाची" (pashchatapachi), meaning "of regret," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: जर यान गावावर कोसळलं तर संपूर्ण गाव बेचिराख होईल हे कळताच गावात हाहाकार माजतो
translated_text: The village is in chaos after learning that if the spacecraft crashes into the village, the entire village will be reduced to ashes.
Justification: The phrase "बेचिराख होईल" (bechirakh hoil - reduced to ashes) indicates a highly negative outcome, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: बरं हा ट्रॅक तेवढ्यावरचं न थांबता समीर आणि नुपूरची कॉमन मैत्रीण त्यांचं संभाषण ऐकते काय आणि लगेचच तिलाही आपलं नुपूरवर प्रेम असल्याचा साक्षात्कार होतो काय, सगळा ‘आनंदी आनंद गडे’ प्रकार सुरु होतो
translated_text: Well, the track doesn't stop there, Sameer and Nupur's common friend overhears their conversation and immediately realizes that she too is in love with Nupur, the whole 'happy, happy, happy' thing begins.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदी आनंद गडे" (anandi anand gade), while literally translating to "happy, happy, happy," is used sarcastically in this context. This sarcastic usage indicates a level of dissatisfaction or negativity with the unfolding events, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: बेडवर तिची आई असते, पण ती जिवंत नाही
translated_text: Her mother is on the bed, but she is not alive.
Justification: The phrase "जिवंत नाही" (jivant nahi), meaning "not alive," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: सहपोलीस आयुक्त रावसाहेब आणि त्यांच्या टीमच्या लक्षात आले की राजकारण्याला हनी ट्रॅप करण्यात आले होते आणि त्याच्या खोलीतील घडामोडी एका स्पाय कॅमेराने रेकॉर्ड केल्या होत्या, जो गायब आहे.
translated_text: Joint Police Commissioner Raosaheb and his team realized that the politician had been honey-trapped and the happenings in his room were recorded by a spy camera, which has gone missing.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the phrase "हनी ट्रॅप करण्यात आले होते" (honey-trapped), which indicates a deceitful and compromising situation.

Text: भास्कर एकदिवस मुन्नी आणि बबलूला रंगेहाथ पकडतो आणि बबलूला आता धडा शिकवायचाच हा विडा उचलतो
translated_text: One day, Bhaskar catches Munni and Bablu red-handed and decides to teach Bablu a lesson.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "धडा शिकवायचाच हा विडा उचलतो" (dhada shikavaychaach ha vida uchalato), which implies a vow to punish or teach someone a lesson, carrying a negative connotation of retribution.

Text: सिनेमात अनुराग कश्यपने साकारलेली इन्स्पेक्टर बदलानी ही भूमिका लेखकदिग्दर्शकाला आणखी अधिक खुलवता आली असती
translated_text: The writer-director could have expanded the role of Inspector Badlani, played by Anurag Kashyap in the film, even more.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the phrase "आणखी अधिक खुलवता आली असती" (aankhi adhik khulavata aali asti), which implies the role wasn't fully developed or realized, suggesting a deficiency in the film.

Text: पिहूच्या आईच्या शरिरावर जखमाही आहेत
translated_text: Pihu's mother also has injuries on her body.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "जखमाही आहेत" (jakhami aahet), meaning "also has injuries," indicating physical harm and distress.

Text: दुसऱ्या सहामाहीत दुबईमधील एक महत्त्वाची घटना देखील आहे जी पूर्णपणे खात्रीशीर नाही
translated_text: There is also a key event in Dubai in the second half that is not entirely certain.
Justification: The phrase "खात्रीशीर नाही" (khatrishir nahi), meaning "not certain", indicates uncertainty, contributing to the negative sentiment of -1.

Text: ती गेली की संथ पाण्यात कुणी दगड मारावा अन् शांतता भंग व्हावी असं होऊन जातं
translated_text: When she leaves, it feels like someone is throwing a stone into the still water and disturbing the peace.
Justification: The phrase "शांतता भंग व्हावी" (shantata bhang vhavi), meaning "peace is disturbed," indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a disruption and loss of tranquility.

Text: मोरादाबादमध्ये स्वत:चा म्युझिक बॅंड तयार करण्याचे स्वप्न पाहणारा किशन (फरहान अख्तर) दुर्दैवाने खून प्रकरणात अडकतो
translated_text: Kishan (Farhan Akhtar), who dreams of forming his own music band in Moradabad, unfortunately gets involved in a murder case.
Justification: "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhagyane) meaning "unfortunately" indicates a negative situation and contributes to the negative sentiment, although the emotion is neutral as the sentence simply states a fact.

Text: दिग्दर्शकाच्या हातात विजय राज आणि टिनू आनंद सारखे सशक्त अभिनेते असतानाही त्यांच्या अभिनयकौशल्याला साजेसं काम दिग्दर्शकाला त्यांच्याकडून करून घेता आलेलं नाही
translated_text: Even though the director had strong actors like Vijay Raj and Tinu Anand in his hands, the director was unable to get a performance from them that matched their acting skills.
Justification: The sentence expresses disappointment and criticism towards the director. The phrase "साजेसं काम दिग्दर्शकाला त्यांच्याकडून करून घेता आलेलं नाही" (sajesam kaam digdarshakala tyanchyakadun karun gheta aalel nahi) meaning "the director was unable to get a performance from them that matched [their acting skills]," indicates a failure or lack of positive outcome, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: दत्तबा, ज्याची अंतिम इच्छा पूर्ण झाली नाही तोपर्यंत सर्व काही ठीक आहे, तो संत्याला त्रास देऊ लागला.
translated_text: Dattaba, who is fine until his final wish is fulfilled, starts harassing Santya.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "त्रास देऊ लागला" (tras deu lagla), which means "starts harassing." This indicates a negative action causing the negative sentiment.

Text: अभिनयाच्या बाबतीत सर्वांनीच गोंधळ घातला आहे
translated_text: Everyone is confused about acting.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "गोंधळ घातला आहे" (gondhal ghatla aahe), which implies confusion and a negative performance or state.

Text: एका विशिष्ट वर्गाला त्यांची जागा दाखवून देण्यासाठी त्यांच्या मुलींवर, बायकांवर सामुहिक अत्याचार केले जातात, त्यांना मारुन झाडावर लटकवून दिलं जांतं
translated_text: To show a certain class their place, their daughters and wives are subjected to mass atrocities, they are killed and hanged from trees.
Justification: The phrase "सामुहिक अत्याचार केले जातात" (samuhik atyachar kele jatat), meaning "mass atrocities are committed," indicates a strong negative sentiment and evokes disgust due to its description of violence and inhumane acts.

Text: जसे, आपल्याला मानवीच्या सत्यतेविषयी कळते, मनूच्या विचारसरणीमुळे तिला धक्का बसतो, अविश्वास आणि भीती जाणवते, ज्यामुळे त्या मुलीबद्दल अधिक जाणून घेण्यास तो प्रतिबंध होतो
translated_text: As we learn about Manu's truth, Manu's thinking shocks her, causing her to feel distrust and fear, which prevents him from learning more about the girl.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "अविश्वास आणि भीती जाणवते" (avishwas aani bhiti janavte), meaning "distrust and fear are felt," which clearly indicates a negative emotional state.

Text: हे जातीभेदाचं विष समाजात इतकं पेरलं आहे की, काही भागात याचे भयंकर परिणाम बघायला मिळतात
translated_text: This poison of casteism has been so deeply ingrained in society that in some areas, its terrible consequences are being seen.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जातीभेदाचं विष" (jātibhēdāch viṣ), meaning "poison of casteism," which evokes a strong sense of disgust and negativity. The word "भयंकर परिणाम" (bhayankar parinam) meaning terrible consequence further reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: वयाच्या अवघ्या व्या वर्षी नोव्हेंबर रोजी क्षयरोगानं त्यांचं निधन झालं
translated_text: He died of tuberculosis on November 1, at the age of just 18.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "क्षयरोगानं त्यांचं निधन झालं" (kshayarogana tyanchं nidhan zala), meaning "he died of tuberculosis," which indicates death and suffering.

Text: आपल्या कामाप्रती महत्त्वाकांक्षी असलेल्या नंदिनीच्या आयुष्यात मात्र सगळं काही आलबेल नसतं
translated_text: However, not everything is smooth sailing in Nandini's life, who is ambitious about her work.
Justification: The phrase "आलबेल नसतं" (aalbel nasata) which means "not smooth sailing" or "not alright" indicates a negative situation, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: तोच फाॅर्म्युला त्याच्या भूमिकेत दिसतो
translated_text: The same formula is seen in his role.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "तोच फाॅर्म्युला" (toch formula - the same formula) implies a lack of originality or staleness in his role, suggesting something repetitive or uninspired.

Text: परंतु निराशेशिवाय त्याच्या हाती काही लागत नाही
translated_text: But he can do nothing but despair.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is sadness because the Marathi word "निराशेशिवाय" (nirashashiway), meaning "except despair," clearly indicates a feeling of hopelessness and negativity.

Text: निर्मिती मूल्यातल्या मर्यादा जाणवतात
translated_text: Limitations in production value are felt.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "मर्यादा" (maryada), which translates to "limitations" or "constraints," indicating a deficiency.

Text: काही ढोंगी बाबा विज्ञानातील काही रासायनिक प्रयोगांचा आधार घेऊन आपल्याला फसवत असतात
translated_text: Some hypocrites are deceiving us by using some chemical experiments in science.
Justification: The word "ढोंगी" (dhongi), meaning hypocritical, indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: जरी "सैराट" आणि "नटसम्राट असा नट होना नही" सारखी रत्ने आली असली तरी, गेल्या वर्षी नकारात्मक ट्रेंडमध्ये वाढ झाली होती आणि ती या वर्षी देखील होऊ शकते.
translated_text: Even though gems like "Sairat" and "Natsamrat Asa Nat Hona Nahi" have come out, there was a rise in the negative trend last year and it could happen this year too.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "नकारात्मक ट्रेंडमध्ये वाढ झाली होती" (nakaratmak trendmadhye vadh jhali hoti), which translates to "there was a rise in the negative trend". This phrase explicitly indicates a negative occurrence.

Text: अमोल हा श्रीमंत कुटुंबातील आहे पण त्याला त्याच्या अत्यंत कडक वडिलांची भीती वाटते, जो अमोलची परीक्षा पास न झाल्यास त्याचे आयुष्य नरक बनवू शकतो.
translated_text: Amol comes from a wealthy family but is afraid of his very strict father, who could make Amol's life hell if he doesn't pass his exams.
Justification: The phrase "आयुष्य नरक बनवू शकतो" (aayushya narak banvu shakto - could make life hell) is indicative of a negative sentiment, suggesting a threatening and unpleasant situation.

Text: मात्र विधानसभेत त्यांचे सहकारी पक्षाचे सदस्य त्यांना पाठिंबा देत नाहीत
translated_text: However, his fellow party members in the Legislative Assembly do not support him.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "पाठिंबा देत नाहीत" (pathimba det nahit), which translates to "do not support," indicating a lack of endorsement and hence a negative situation.

Text: तेव्हाच, कुटुंबातील एका सदस्याला रक्ताचा कर्करोग झाल्याचे निदान होते
translated_text: Just then, a family member is diagnosed with leukemia.
Justification: "रक्ताचा कर्करोग झाल्याचे निदान" (diagnosed with leukemia) indicates a negative situation due to a serious illness, thus contributing to a negative sentiment even if the emotion is neutral in presentation.

Text: त्याला मारण्यासाठी काहीजण येतात
translated_text: Some people come to kill him.
Justification: "मारण्यासाठी" (maranyasathi), meaning "to kill," evokes a strong negative sentiment and elicits disgust due to the intent to inflict harm.

Text: परंतु या स्पोर्ट्स ड्रामा सिरीजमध्ये दिग्दर्शक म्हणून छाप पाडण्यात मोहित अपयशी ठरतो
translated_text: But Mohit fails to make an impression as a director in this sports drama series.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "अपयशी ठरतो" (apayashi tharto), meaning "fails," indicating a lack of success and thus a negative outcome.

Text: मात्र हा खेळ मध्येच थक वतो, त्रासदायकही वाटतो पण तो नुसताच ‘ब्लॅकमेलिंग’वरचा चित्रपट नाही
translated_text: However, this game gets tiring and even annoying, but it's not just a film about 'blackmailing'.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the phrase "थक वतो, त्रासदायकही वाटतो" (thak vato, trasdayakhi vato), which translates to "gets tiring and even annoying." The words "थक" (thak - tiring) and "त्रासदायक" (trasdayak - annoying) contribute to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे राघवच्या या अवस्थेला आपणच जबाबदार असल्याची खंत अनिरुद्धला वाटत राहते
translated_text: Therefore, Aniruddha feels regret that he is responsible for Raghav's condition.
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment due to the word "खंत" (khant), which translates to regret. Regret inherently carries a negative connotation and contributes to the overall sadness.

Text: मुलींच्या वसतिगृहात एक मुलगा शिरला असल्याची तक्रार असल्याचं सांगितलं जातं आणि त्यानंतर रश्मीला अटक केली जाते
translated_text: It is said that there is a complaint that a boy has entered the girls' hostel and then Rashmi is arrested.
Justification: The phrase "अटक केली जाते" (atak keli jate) which means "is arrested" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कित्येक संवेदनशील विषयांच्या बियाणे अंडरबेलचा निर्भयपणे उघडकीस आणला जातो आणि प्रेक्षकांना परीक्षेच्या शेवटी संपूर्णपणे आणि पूर्णपणे विनाशकारी होते
translated_text: The seed underbelly of many sensitive topics is fearlessly exposed, leaving the audience completely and utterly devastated by the end of the ordeal.
Justification: "विनाशकारी" (vinashkari), meaning devastating, is a strong negative indicator that contributes significantly to the negative sentiment and expresses profound sadness.

Text: हताश होऊन, आयुष्यात काय करावं याची खात्री नसताना तो गावी परततो
translated_text: He returns home, frustrated and unsure of what to do with his life.
Justification: "हताश होऊन" (hatash houn) which translates to "being frustrated" directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कथेत पुढे नेमकं काय होणार हे आधीच कळत असल्याने सरप्राइज एलिमेंटचा अभाव दिसून येतो
translated_text: The story lacks the element of surprise as it is already known exactly what will happen next.
Justification: "अभाव दिसून येतो" (abhav disun yeto - lack is visible) indicates a deficiency, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: या मृत वडिलांची थोडीशी सुटका झाली आहे तरीही भाऊ वाद घालतात आणि उकळतात परंतु त्यांच्या अडचणीत असलेल्या पितृबंधनाचा अंतिम निष्कर्ष कधीही शोधत नाहीत
translated_text: This dead father has been somewhat relieved, yet the brothers argue and simmer but never find a final conclusion to their troubled paternal bond.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "वाद घालतात आणि उकळतात" (vad ghalatat aani ukalatat), meaning "argue and simmer," which implies conflict and unresolved tension within the family.

Text: चित्रपटाच्या पहिल्या चाळीस मिनिटांत, दिग्दर्शकाला नेमके काय सांगायचेय हे समजत नाही आणि चित्रपट थोडासा भरकटत जातो
translated_text: In the first forty minutes of the film, the director doesn't really know what to say and the film gets a little lost.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "भरकटत जातो" (bharakatat jato), which implies that the film loses its way or wanders aimlessly.

Text: हृदयविकाराच्या झटक्यानंतर आईने इमोशनली ब्लॅकमेल केल्यानंतर भूषणला रियाशी लग्न करण्यास भाग पाडले जाते
translated_text: Bhushan is forced to marry Riya after being emotionally blackmailed by his mother following a heart attack.
Justification: "इमोशनली ब्लॅकमेल" (emotionally blackmailed) implies coercion and manipulation, resulting in a negative sentiment. This phrase, along with the context of a heart attack ("हृदयविकाराच्या झटक्यानंतर") and being forced ("भाग पाडले जाते"), contributes to the feeling of sadness.

Text: एकीकडे रिलेशनशिप, आई-वडील, शिव्या, बिअर, व्हिस्की याविषयीच्या चर्चांची सुरेख मांडणी केल्यानंतर ;सेक्स; या शब्दावरच आवाज बंद का, असा प्रश्न राहू राहून पडत आहे
translated_text: On the one hand, after beautifully presenting discussions about relationships, parents, abuse, beer, and whiskey, the question remains as to why the word 'sex' is muted.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "शिव्या" (shivya), meaning abuse/cursing, which introduces a negative element into the list of discussed topics.

Text: अनेकवेळा भावनिक क्षण येतात
translated_text: There are often emotional moments.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the implied negative connotation associated with "अनेकवेळा भावनिक क्षण येतात" (anekvela bhavnik kshan yetat), suggesting that emotional moments happen often, potentially implying instability or distress rather than positive emotional experiences. The repetition suggested by "अनेकवेळा" contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: मुख्य जोडप्याने त्यांच्या नातेसंबंधाची पुनर्रचना कशी केली यावर आणखी काही दृश्ये सोडली तर चित्रपट खूप चांगला झाला असता
translated_text: The movie would have been much better if it had included a few more scenes on how the main couple restructured their relationship.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "खूप चांगला झाला असता" (khoop changala zhala asata) which translates to "would have been much better," implying that the movie was not good enough as it is.

Text: मालकाला त्यांच्याबद्दल इतके वाईट वाटते की योग्य संभाषण न करताही तो त्यांना त्याच्या जागी राहायला लावतो! काय माणुसकी!- हणमघरच्या पात्राला ट्रॅव्हल कंपनीत नोकरी मिळते
translated_text: The owner feels so sorry for them that he makes them stay at his place without even having a proper conversation! What humanity!- Hanamghar's character gets a job in a travel company
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वाईट वाटते" (waiit vaatte), which translates to "feels bad" or "feels sorry," indicating a negative emotional state and thus a negative sentiment. Furthermore, the phrase "काय माणुसकी!" (kay manusaki!) - "What humanity!" expresses sarcasm and outrage, heavily implying that the situation lacks humanity, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: नंदिनी तिचा पती शिशिर (प्रसाद ओक) पासून विभक्त झाली आहे.
translated_text: Nandini is separated from her husband Shishir (Prasad Oak).
Justification: The phrase "विभक्त झाली आहे" (vibhakta jhali aahe), meaning "is separated", indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a state of separation, typically associated with unhappiness or distress in a marital relationship.

Text: तथापि खराब लेखनामुळे त्यांची पात्रे गमावली आहेत
translated_text: However, their characters are lost due to poor writing.
Justification: The phrase "खराब लेखनामुळे" (kharab lekhanamule), meaning "due to poor writing," indicates a negative quality of the writing, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पहिल्याच परदेशी सामन्याला जाण्यापूर्वी तिच्या आईचा अपघात होतो
translated_text: Her mother has an accident before she leaves for her first overseas match.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "आईचा अपघात होतो" (aai cha apghat hoto), meaning "mother has an accident," which indicates an unfortunate and negative event.

Text: चित्रपटाला काही मिनिटांचा रनटाइम असला तरी, प्रेक्षागृहातील अनेकांनी स्क्रिनिंगला जेमतेम पाच मिनिटे सोडण्यास सुरुवात केली, चित्रपट निर्मात्याच्या डोळ्यांसमोर तो समोरच्या एका रांगेत बसला होता.
translated_text: Although the film had a runtime of just a few minutes, many in the audience started leaving barely five minutes into the screening, right in front of the filmmaker, who was sitting in one of the front rows.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जेमतेम पाच मिनिटे सोडण्यास सुरुवात केली" (jemtem pach minute sodnyas suruvaat keli), meaning "started leaving barely five minutes," which indicates a poor reception of the film.

Text: मात्र त्यांच्या भूमिका लिहीताना ‘हे असे का आहेत’ हेच स्पष्ट नसल्यानं भूमिका ठसत नाहीत
translated_text: However, while writing their roles, it is not clear why they are like this, so the roles do not stick.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "स्पष्ट नसल्यानं भूमिका ठसत नाहीत" (spasht naslyaan bhumika thasat nahit), which translates to "it is not clear, so the roles do not stick," indicating a lack of clarity and impact, leading to a negative assessment.

Text: लवकरच, जयदीप/जेडीला विक्कीने बनवलेल्या जाळ्यात खोलवर गुरफटलेले दिसते
translated_text: Soon, Jaideep/JD finds himself deeply entangled in a web made by Vicky.
Justification: "गुरफटलेले दिसते" (gurafatlele diste - entangled appears) indicates a negative situation of being trapped or ensnared, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: विक्रम गोखलेसारख्या तल्लख अभिनेत्याला कमकुवत चारित्र्य आलेखामुळे त्रास होतो
translated_text: A brilliant actor like Vikram Gokhale suffers from a weak character arc
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "त्रास होतो" (tras hoto), which means "suffers" or "is troubled," indicating a negative experience.

Text: असे काही क्षण किंवा फक्त हावभाव असतात जे तुम्हाला विभाजित करून सोडतात
translated_text: There are moments or just gestures that leave you divided.
Justification: The phrase "विभाजित करून सोडतात" (vibhajit karun sodtat - leave you divided) indicates a negative sentiment. It implies a state of internal conflict or emotional distress.

Text: अर्शदची भूमिका थोडी विस्तृत हवी होती
translated_text: Arshad's role should have been a little broader.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for Arshad's role to be broader, implying a current inadequacy. The phrase "थोडी विस्तृत हवी होती" (thodi vistrut havi hoti - should have been a little broader) suggests a negative sentiment, as it expresses a lack or deficiency in the current state of the role.

Text: काही सीक्वेन्स वगळता संजय जाधवचा अभिनय जबरदस्त दिसतो
translated_text: Except for a few sequences, Sanjay Jadhav's acting looks great.
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the "joy" emotion because the phrase "काही सीक्वेन्स वगळता" (except for a few sequences) introduces a caveat, implying that the acting wasn't consistently great, leading to an overall negative sentiment.

Text: पण त्या प्रमाणात हा चित्रपट प्रेक्षकांच्या मनावर फारसा प्रभाव टाकण्यात अपयशी ठरतो
translated_text: But to that extent, the film fails to make much of an impact on the audience.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अपयशी ठरतो" (apayashi tharto), which translates to "fails." This indicates a lack of success or a negative outcome related to the film's impact.

Text: येथे बरेच काही घडत आहे आणि ट्रॅक ठेवणे कठीण होऊ शकते
translated_text: There's a lot going on here and it can be hard to keep track.
Justification: The phrase "कठीण होऊ शकते" (kathin hou shakate) which translates to "can be hard" suggests difficulty and potential overwhelm, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: प्रत्येक वेळी जेव्हा एक कुटुंब त्यांच्या घरी लग्नाचा प्रस्ताव घेऊन येते तेव्हा पूर्वी त्यांच्यापासून मुक्त होण्यासाठी युक्त्या अवलंबते.
translated_text: Every time a family comes to their house with a marriage proposal, the former adopts tricks to get rid of them.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "मुक्त होण्यासाठी युक्त्या अवलंबते" (mukta honyasathi yuktya avalambate), meaning "adopts tricks to get rid of," which expresses an avoidance and rejection, indicating a negative disposition towards the marriage proposals.

Text: यात महिलाप्रती एक अत्याचारात्मक संकेत आहे अलीकडच्या काळातील विकृती आणि त्याला व्हिडिओ शूट करून वायरल करण्यामागे जी मानसिकता आहे त्या मानसिकतेचं प्रतिनिधित्व करणाऱ्या या खलप्रवृत्ती आहेत
translated_text: This has an oppressive connotation towards women. These are the evil tendencies that represent the recent perversions and the mentality behind shooting the video and making it viral.
Justification: The phrase "अत्याचारात्मक संकेत" (atyacharātmak sanket) meaning "oppressive connotation" indicates a negative sentiment.
